d: The Department of Biomedical Engineering (BME) aims to provide world-class education and to conduct research in emerging fields of engineering. To achieve these aims, the Department adopts an interdisciplinary approach and includes subject areas that ensure our graduates are equipped to meet Hong Kong's current and future needs. The Department ranked 46th in the world in the subject of biomedical engineering in the Academic Ranking of World Universities in 2024.

The Department currently offers a major in Biomedical Engineering. The Department’s faculty members have interdisciplinary backgrounds with academic strengths in areas including BioMEMS, Bioimaging, Flexible Bioelectronics, Biomedical Robotics, and Nanomedicine / Biomaterials.
Please refer to the Department's website for more information about the BME Department.

z: 生物醫學工程系（BME）旨在提供世界一流的教育並在新興工程領域進行研究。為實現這些目標，本系採用跨學科方法，涵蓋多個學科領域，以確保我們的畢業生能夠滿足香港當前和未來的需求。在2024年世界大學學術排名中，生物醫學工程學科位列全球第46名。
該系目前開設生物醫學工程專業。該系的教職員具有跨學科背景，在生物MEMS、生物成像、柔性生物電子學、生物醫學機器人和奈米醫學/生物材料等領域具有學術優勢。
有關 BME 部門的更多信息，請參閱該部門的網站。

d: The Biological Sciences major aims to nurture students to embark on scientific research, educational, professional or technical career after graduation. We provide a rigorous, broad-spectrum curriculum combined with specialization in major fields of biology such as cancer biology, nanobiotechnology, regenerative medicine, microbiology and neurobiology. The programme presents an in-depth study of biomedical and life sciences, with courses ranging from bioinformatics to biochemistry, genetics, cellular & molecular biology and immunology. With the two tailor-made practical courses as well as opportunities in research rotations and projects, students will gain a thorough understanding of how science is done with advanced technologies including omics & genome editing and state-of-the-art equipment in our research laboratories. It also nurtures students who are interested in pursuing postgraduate research training and undertaking a broad range of science-based careers.

The Biomedical Sciences major emphasizes the integration of basic fundamental knowledge in biomedical sciences with investigative skills and state-of-the-art technologies to enable students to understand the causes and diagnoses and treatments of human disorders and diseases. The programme is designed to prepare graduates for employment in medical & diagnostic laboratories, medical device & biotech/pharmaceutical industries and research. Our unique industry-informed curriculum provides students with extensive exposure to medical laboratory technology, modern biotechnology, and medical lab/industrial training opportunities through our strategic partnership with the healthcare and medical laboratory sectors as well as biotech & pharmaceutical industries.
Admission Arrangements

JUPAS applicants will be considered for admission to first-year studies at the Department of Biomedical Sciences. Students will enter a major (current major options: Biological Sciences; Biomedical Sciences) after one year of study. The top 40% of students# will have a free choice of majors offered by the Department. The other 60% of students will be allocated a major within the Department, subject to the availability of places and the selection criteria set by individual majors.
# based on CGPA with no failed grades and completion of at least 30 credit units including College/Department required courses

z: 生物科學專業旨在培養學生畢業後從事科學研究、教育、專業或技術職業。我們提供嚴格、廣泛的課程，並結合癌症生物學、奈米生物技術、再生醫學、微生物學和神經生物學等主要生物學領域的專業知識。該計畫對生物醫學和生命科學進行深入研究，課程從生物資訊學到生物化學、遺傳學、細胞和分子生物學以及免疫學。透過兩門量身定制的實作課程以及研究輪調和專案的機會，學生將全面了解如何利用先進技術（包括組學和基因組編輯以及我們研究實驗室的最先進設備）完成科學工作。它還培養有興趣接受研究生研究培訓和從事廣泛的科學職業的學生。
生物醫學科學專業強調將生物醫學科學的基礎知識與研究技能和最先進的技術相結合，使學生能夠了解人類失調和疾病的原因、診斷和治療。該計劃旨在幫助畢業生為醫療和診斷實驗室、醫療器材和生物技術/製藥行業和研究領域的就業做好準備。透過我們與醫療保健和醫學實驗室部門以及生物技術和製藥行業的戰略合作夥伴關係，我們獨特的行業知識課程為學生提供廣泛接觸醫學實驗室技術、現代生物技術和醫學實驗室/工業培訓的機會。
入學安排
聯招申請者將被考慮入讀生物醫學系一年級課程。學生學習一年後將進入專業（目前專業選擇：生物科學；生物醫學科學）。排名前40%的學生#將可以自由選擇系裡提供的專業。其餘60%的學生將根據名額的情況和各個專業設定的選擇標準，在系內分配一個專業。
# 基於 CGPA，無不及格成績並完成至少 30 個學分，包括學院/系必修課程

d: Why BSc Computational Finance and Financial Technology?
The BSc Computational Finance and Financial Technology major has two streams, namely (1) Computational Finance Stream and (2) Financial Technology Stream.

Computational Finance stream is an interdisciplinary stream offering a comprehensive curriculum that covers state-of-the-art training in finance, mathematics, statistics and computer programming. The integrated application of these four areas is in great demand by today’s financial markets.

Financial Technology stream gives students an interdisciplinary education in business, information technology, and innovation by training them in mathematics, statistics, programming, information systems, and finance. The FinTech core courses include blockchain, big data, cybersecurity, regulatory technology (RegTech), Python programming, machine learning, technology entrepreneurship, and Fintech capstone project.

Students from both Computational Finance and Financial Technology streams can apply for admission to the Joint Bachelor's Degree Program between City University of Hong Kong and Columbia University. Upon completion of this joint degree program, students will receive the dual awards conferred by Columbia University and CityUHK.
Career Prospects

Computational Finance stream provides comprehensive training and internship opportunities to prepare students to establish competitive advantages in financial careers such as asset management, investment banking and risk management, as well as further advanced studies.

Financial Technology stream prepares students for the careers in the emerging FinTech industry and business and technology sectors that require solid technology training and finance domain knowledge as well as further advanced studies.
Direct Admission to Joint Bachelor’s Degree Programme with Columbia University

Starting in 2026/27, JUPAS applicants can directly apply for Year 1 entry to the prestigious Joint Bachelor’s Degree Programme offered by CityUHK and Columbia University. Graduates will earn degrees from both institutions. A separate application to Columbia University is required after submitting the JUPAS application.

z: 為什麼選擇計算金融與金融技術理學士？
計算金融與金融科技理學士專業有兩個流向，即（1）計算金融流和（2）金融技術流。
計算金融流是一個跨學科流，提供全面的課程，涵蓋金融、數學、統計和電腦程式設計的最先進的培訓。當今金融市場迫切需要這四個領域的綜合應用。
金融技術流透過數學、統計、程式設計、資訊系統和金融方面的培訓為學生提供商業、資訊科技和創新的跨學科教育。金融科技核心課程包括區塊鏈、大數據、網路安全、監管技術（RegTech）、Python程式設計、機器學習、技術創業和金融科技頂點專案。
計算金融與金融科技專業的學生均可申請入讀香港城市大學與哥倫比亞大學聯合學士學位課程。完成此聯合學位課程後，學生將獲得哥倫比亞大學和香港城市大學授予的雙重獎項。
職業前景
計算金融方向提供全面的培訓和實習機會，幫助學生在資產管理、投資銀行和風險管理等金融職業以及進一步的深造中建立競爭優勢。
金融科技方向為學生在新興金融科技產業以及商業和科技領域的職業做好準備，這些領域需要紮實的技術培訓和金融領域知識以及進一步的高級研究。
直接入讀哥倫比亞大學聯合學士學位課程
由2026/27學年起，聯招申請者可直接申請入讀香港城市大學與哥倫比亞大學合辦學士學位課程一年級。畢業生將獲得這兩個機構的學位。提交聯招申請後，需另行向哥倫比亞大學提出申請。

d: Short DescriptionUpdated
Why BBA Global Business?

The BBA Global Business programme offers a globally oriented curriculum and opportunities for students to develop a global mindset, think strategically and contribute to companies doing business internationally. Our application-oriented courses prepare the next generation of managers to lead global teams. In the Global Business Consultancy Project, for instance, students will actually work in a multinational corporation and get involved in solving real business problems.

Students have opportunities to enhance their leadership and management skills while working with others from different cultures through study tours, executive forums, career development workshops, structured exchange programmes, internships, and case competitions. Students are offered three semester-based overseas exchange opportunities* (one compulsory and two optional) and take part in lots of other international immersion opportunities to widen their global exposure. High performing students can receive full sponsorship for studying at MIT Data Science Lab and Harvard Summer School.

Students can apply for admission to the Joint Bachelor's Degree Programme between City University of Hong Kong and Columbia University. Upon completion of this joint degree programme, students will receive the dual awards conferred by Columbia University and CityUHK.
* Subject to fulfilling the requirements for participating in the exchange studies.
Career Prospects

Graduates of this programme are equipped with the knowledge and skills needed to work as associates in global companies, professional business consulting firms and marketing or management positions in firms doing business internationally. Some examples include:
• J.P. Morgan
• Blackrock
• HSBC
• Citibank
• Bank of America
• Ernst and Young
• BnP Paribas
Flagship Programme

This is one of the CityUHK’s Flagship Programmes, which equip students with essential knowledge and skills, cultivate their global leadership abilities, and connect them with leading professionals. The Flagship Scholarships, which cover tuition and hall fees, a guaranteed berth, and a one-off exchange sponsorship of up to HK$500,000, will be awarded to local JUPAS talents who meet the criteria.
Direct Admission to Joint Bachelor’s Degree Programme with Columbia University

Starting in 2026/27, JUPAS applicants can directly apply for Year 1 entry to the prestigious Joint Bachelor’s Degree Programme offered by CityUHK and Columbia University. Graduates will earn degrees from both institutions. A separate application to Columbia University is required after submitting the JUPAS application.

z: 簡短說明已更新
為什麼選擇 BBA 全球業務？
BBA 全球商業課程為學生提供面向全球的課程和機會，培養他們的全球思維、策略性思考並為開展國際業務的公司做出貢獻。我們以應用為導向的課程培養下一代管理者領導全球團隊的能力。例如，在全球商業諮詢專案中，學生將實際在跨國公司工作並參與解決實際的商業問題。
學生有機會透過遊學、高階主管論壇、職業發展研討會、結構化交流計畫、實習和案例競賽與來自不同文化的其他人合作，提高領導和管理技能。學生將獲得三個學期的海外交流機會*（一個是必修的，兩個是可選的），並參加許多其他國際沉浸式機會，以擴大他們的全球視野。表現優異的學生可以獲得在麻省理工學院數據科學實驗室和哈佛暑期學校學習的全額贊助。
學生可申請入讀香港城市大學與哥倫比亞大學聯合學士學位課程。完成此聯合學位課程後，學生將獲得哥倫比亞大學和香港城市大學授予的雙重獎項。
* 須滿足參加交流學習的要求。
職業前景
該計畫的畢業生具備在跨國公司、專業商業諮詢公司擔任助理以及在國際業務公司中擔任行銷或管理職位所需的知識和技能。一些例子包括：
• 摩根大通
• 貝萊德
• 匯豐銀行
• 花旗銀行
• 美國銀行
• 安永會計師事務所
• 法國巴黎銀行
旗艦計劃
這是香港城市大學的旗艦課程之一，旨在為學生提供必要的知識和技能，培養他們的全球領導能力，並將他們與領先的專業人士聯繫起來。旗艦獎學金將頒發給符合資格的本地聯招人才，涵蓋學費和宿舍費、保證床位以及高達港幣50萬的一次性交換生贊助。
直接入讀哥倫比亞大學聯合學士學位課程
由2026/27學年起，聯招申請者可直接申請入讀香港城市大學與哥倫比亞大學合辦學士學位課程一年級。畢業生將獲得這兩個機構的學位。提交聯招申請後，需另行向哥倫比亞大學提出申請。

d: Why BBA Accountancy?

Known as the “language of business,” accounting is certainly vital knowledge in our quest for business excellence and fundamental to success in the business world. Studying accounting provides you with great employment potential and numerous educational opportunities. Aside from becoming an accounting professional, an accounting degree offers a doorway to almost every business opportunity you can dream of, from financial auditing to business consulting. If you want to pursue further studies in business, accounting is definitely also a perfect place to start.

Our BBA Accountancy program offers two streams. The Professional Accounting stream is designed to equip students with accounting knowledge and professional skills for the profession. The ESG and Tech stream is designed to equip students with digital technology, risk management and data analytical skills, in addition to the fundamental accounting knowledge.
BBA Accountancy students are eligible to apply for the following joint degree programme:
Joint Bachelor's Degree Programme between City University of Hong Kong and National Taiwan University
Career Prospects

The Department of Accountancy facilitate students' acquisition of the qualifications and skills you need for career advancement in prominent multinational certified public accounting firms, government departments, commercial, industrial and public organisations.

Our graduates have secured their positions in Alibaba, Bloomberg, Citi Group, Deloitte, Ernst & Young, Goldman Sachs, Hang Seng Bank, HSBC, Inland Revenue Department, JPMorgan, KPMG, Moody’s, Morgan Stanley, PricewaterhouseCoopers, Swire Group and The Hong Kong Jockey Club, etc. In addition, the Department has built up a strong alumni network for students’ life-long career development with outstanding graduates reaching management and executive level in various organizations.
See a career development story of our accountancy graduate at:
https://www.cb.cityu.edu.hk/ac/e-circular/10/Resource/Student_related/Challenge%20Your%20Limit-Edmund%20Ho/Article_Challenge_Your_Limits_Edmund_Ho.pdf

z: 為什麼選擇 BBA 會計？
會計被稱為“商業語言”，無疑是我們追求卓越商業的重要知識，也是商業世界成功的基礎。學習會計為您提供巨大的就業潛力和大量的教育機會。除了成為會計專業人士之外，會計學位還為您提供了通往幾乎所有您可以夢想的商業機會的大門，從財務審計到商業諮詢。如果你想在商業領域繼續深造，會計絕對是一個完美的起點。
我們的 BBA 會計課程提供兩個方向。專業會計流旨在培養學生的會計知識和專業技能。 ESG 和技術課程旨在為學生提供數位技術、風險管理和數據分析技能以及基礎會計知識。
BBA 會計學生有資格申請以下聯合學位課程：
香港城市大學與台灣大學聯合學士學位課程
職業前景
會計系幫助學生獲得在著名的跨國註冊會計師事務所、政府部門、商業、工業和公共組織職業發展所需的資格和技能。
畢業生曾於阿里巴巴、彭博、花旗集團、德勤、安永、高盛、恆生銀行、匯豐銀行、稅務局、摩根大通、畢馬威、穆迪、摩根士丹利、羅兵咸永道、太古集團及香港賽馬會等企業任職。此外，本係也建立了強大的校友網絡，為學生的終身職業發展提供支持，優秀畢業生在多個領域晉升為管理和行政人員級別。組織。
請參閱我們會計畢業生的職涯發展故事：
https://www.cb.cityu.edu.hk/ac/e-circular/10/Resource/Student_lated/Challenge%20Your%20Limit-Edmund%20Ho/Article_Challenge_Your_Limits_Edmund_Ho.pdf

d: Department of Management

The Department aims at providing professional business knowledge and skills that are grounded in the latest research in Management. We are equipping students with the professional skills critical for job success, as well as the interpersonal and analytical skills necessary for developing a successful career locally and globally.
Why BBA Management

The BBA Management programme aims to equip students with the abilities and skills to successfully manage people and teams within an organisation and manage the organisation itself, in both local and international environments. Students of this programme will acquire the knowledge to meet management challenges including decision making, leading and motivating people, leading organisational change as well as strategising and implementing business decisions locally and internationally. The major offers a choice of two distinctive streams: Human Resources Management (HRM) and Strategy and International Management (SIM). Students can indicate their preferred stream at the beginning of Year 2.
HRM Stream:
The HRM stream is designed for students who wish to pursue a career as an in-house specialist or outside consultant in the human resource management area.
SIM Stream:

The SIM stream is designed to equip students with the knowledge and skills to develop effective strategies to manage in the international business environment, particularly in the Asia Pacific Region.
Study at Columbia University in Year 3 and Year 4:

Outstanding Year 1 students admitted to our four-year programme will be invited to apply for admission to Columbia University's Joint Bachelor's Degree Program. Students will have the option to major in Psychology or Economics at Columbia University. These students will get one degree certificate from Columbia University and another one from CityUHK after four years of study.
Career Prospects

Employers of our graduates in recent years include well-known organisations, such as Bank of China, EY, HK Jockey Club, Hospital Authority, HSBC, KPMG, Morgan Stanley, PwC. Graduates are working in highly sought after positions including management trainee, graduate trainee, business analyst, HR business partner, and HR executive.
Direct Admission to Joint Bachelor’s Degree Programme with Columbia University

Starting in 2026/27, JUPAS applicants can directly apply for Year 1 entry to the prestigious Joint Bachelor’s Degree Programme offered by CityUHK and Columbia University. Graduates will earn degrees from both institutions. A separate application to Columbia University is required after submitting the JUPAS application.

z: 管理系
該系旨在提供基於最新管理研究的專業商業知識和技能。我們為學生提供對工作成功至關重要的專業技能，以及在本地和全球發展成功職業生涯所需的人際交往和分析技能。
為什麼選擇 BBA 管理
BBA 管理課程旨在培養學生在本地和國際環境中成功管理組織內的人員和團隊以及管理組織本身的能力和技能。該計畫的學生將獲得應對管理挑戰的知識，包括決策、領導和激勵人員、領導組織變革以及製定本地和國際業務決策的策略和實施。此專業提供兩個獨特的方向選擇：人力資源管理（HRM）和策略與國際管理（SIM）。學生可以在二年級開始時表明他們喜歡的課程。
人力資源管理流程：
人力資源管理流程專為希望在人力資源管理領域從事內部專家或外部顧問職業的學生而設計。
SIM 卡流：
SIM 課程旨在讓學生掌握在國際商業環境（特別是亞太地區）中製定有效管理策略的知識和技能。
在哥倫比亞大學學習三年級和四年級：
被我們四年制課程錄取的優秀一年級學生將被邀請申請哥倫比亞大學聯合學士學位課程。學生可以選擇在哥倫比亞大學主修心理學或經濟學。這些學生經過四年的學習後，將獲得一份哥倫比亞大學的學位證書和另一份來自香港城市大學的學位證書。
職業前景
近年來畢業生的雇主包括中國銀行、安永、香港賽馬會、醫院管理局、匯豐銀行、畢馬威、摩根士丹利、普華永道等知名機構。畢業生可以從事備受追捧的職位，包括管理培訓生、研究生培訓生、業務分析師、人力資源業務合作夥伴和人力資源主管。
直接入讀哥倫比亞大學聯合學士學位課程
由2026/27學年起，聯招申請者可直接申請入讀香港城市大學與哥倫比亞大學合辦學士學位課程一年級。畢業生將獲得這兩個機構的學位。提交聯招申請後，需另行向哥倫比亞大學提出申請。

d: Short DescriptionUpdated
Why BBA Marketing?
CityUHK BBA Marketing stands out from other BBA and Marketing programmes by providing a pioneering approach that consists of:
• i-Marketing +

The “i” element of our programme refers to INTERACTIVE, INTERNATIONAL and INTERLLIGENCE. With its discovery-enriched curriculum design, students in CityUHK Marketing interact and connect with world-class professors, top business leaders, experienced alumni, and executives from partner companies. They are strong in teamwork, presentation, problem-solving, and communication with people of different backgrounds and cultures. As key technologies and trends will drive changes in the marketing industry, our various digital marketing courses are set to prepare students for facing the challenges of the digital marketing environment.
• Global Marketing Stream

The stream aims to equip students with marketing knowledge in a global context. Students are expected to be outgoing and culture-sensitive, and prepared to be exposed to marketing strategies and institutions in various regions and countries. They have to complete a foreign language course and may have a chance to join more than one exchange program during their study period. All of these efforts ensure students are well-equipped and possess a strong foundation to succeed in the future world of work.
• Marketing Analytics Stream

The stream aims to prepare students to be big data marketing experts with advanced data analysis skills. They are capable of interpreting and utilizing data to develop effective marketing strategies. Students are expected to be strong in numeric skills and statistical knowledge and be proficient in social media and digital marketing. Students may participate analytics-related internships and professional certification courses outside the program to become certified professionals in the field.
• Joint Degree Programs with ESSEC Business School (ESSEC) and National Taiwan University (NTU)

The Department of Marketing distinctly encourages students to broaden their horizons and to actively engage in exchange and overseas internship programmes. In line with its aspirations, the Department organises joint degree programmes with top universities - ESSEC Business School and National Taiwan University (NTU) - for elite students to obtain two internationally recognised degrees within 4 years. Through the programme, students can sharpen their awareness of culture while building all-rounded competitive strengths and developing a blueprint for their future career development.

• ESSEC Business School (ESSEC) is one of the top Business Schools in Europe and one of the few Business Schools well-recognised by all EQUIS, AMBA and AACSB. It is ranked #1 – Bachelor of Business Administration ranking 2025 - Le Point, and #1 – Bachelors of Business Schools 2025 – Le Figaro Etudiant. ESSEC provides internationalised education: one-third of its students are from 98 countries and it receives over 500 inbound exchange students from around the globe every year.

• National University of Taiwan (NTU) is the top university in Taiwan and ranked 63th on the QS World University Ranking in 2026, being the only university ranked within the Top 100 Universities in the World. NTU is the alma mater of many eminent Taiwanese, including the Nobel Prize winner.
Career Prospects

Marketing careers are not only exciting and rewarding, but can also lead to top management positions. Marketing is an ideal field for those who enjoy working in teams and formulating strategies for company growth.
Business Career Services

The Business Career Service is committed to helping you enhance your employability by guiding you through all stages of the career development process, and by providing you with personalised career consultation with a coordinated team of advisors, plus career development workshops and career fairs, recruitment events, and up-to-date career related information. We offer students unique opportunities to build sustainable networks with industry communities. We aim to achieve these goals through providing
• Personalised service
• Up-to-date information
• Sustainable networks
• Coordinated advisors

z: 簡短說明已更新
為什麼是 BBA 行銷？
CityUHK BBA Marketing 透過提供開創性的方法從其他 BBA 和行銷課程中脫穎而出，其中包括：
• 網路行銷+
我們專案的「i」元素指的是互動、國際化和智慧。憑藉其豐富發現的課程設計，香港城市大學市場營銷專業的學生可以與世界一流的教授、頂尖商界領袖、經驗豐富的校友以及合作夥伴公司的高管進行互動和聯繫。他們擅長團隊合作、演講、解決問題以及與不同背景和文化的人溝通。由於關鍵技術和趨勢將推動行銷產業的變革，我們的各種數位行銷課程旨在幫助學生做好應對數位行銷環境挑戰的準備。
• 全球行銷流
本課程旨在讓學生掌握全球背景下的行銷知識。學生應該要開朗、對文化敏感，並準備好接觸不同地區和國家的行銷策略和機構。他們必須完成外語課程，並可能有機會在學習期間參加多個交換計畫。所有這些努力確保學生裝備精良，並為在未來的工作世界中取得成功奠定堅實的基礎。
• 行銷分析流程
本課程旨在培養學生成為具有高級數據分析技能的大數據行銷專家。他們能夠解釋和利用數據來制定有效的行銷策略。學生應具備較強的數位技能和統計知識，並精通社群媒體和數位行銷。學生可以參加專案外與分析相關的實習和專業認證課程，成為該領域的認證專業人士。
• 與 ESSEC 商學院 (ESSEC) 和國立台灣大學 (NTU) 聯合學位課程
行銷係明確鼓勵學生拓寬視野，積極參與交流和海外實習計畫。為了符合其願望，該系與頂尖大學－ESSEC商學院和國立台灣大學（NTU）合作舉辦聯合學位課程，讓菁英學生在4年內獲得兩個國際認可的學位。透過該項目，學生可以增強文化意識，建立全面的競爭優勢，為未來的職業發展制定藍圖。
• ESSEC商學院（ESSEC）是歐洲頂尖商學院之一，也是少數獲得所有EQUIS、AMBA和AACSB認可的商學院之一。它在 2025 年工商管理學士排名中排名第一 - Le Point，在 2025 年商學院學士排名中排名第一 - Le Figaro Etudiant。 ESSEC提供國際化教育：三分之一的學生來自98個國家，每年接收超過500名來自世界各地的入境交換生。
• 國立台灣大學（NTU）是台灣頂尖大學，在2026年QS世界大學排名中位列第63位，是唯一一所躋身世界大學百強的大學。南洋理工大學是許多台灣傑出人士的母校，其中包括諾貝爾獎得主。
職業前景
行銷職業不僅令人興奮且回報豐厚，還可以晉升到高階管理職位。對於那些喜歡團隊合作和製定公司發展策略的人來說，行銷是一個理想的領域。
商業職業服務
商業職業服務致力於幫助您提高就業能力，指導您完成職業發展過程的各個階段，並透過協調的顧問團隊為您提供個人化的職業諮詢，以及職業發展研討會和招聘會、招聘活動以及最新的職業相關資訊。我們為學生提供與行業社區建立可持續網絡的獨特機會。我們的目標是透過提供
• 個人化服務
• 最新訊息
• 永續網路
• 協調顧問

d: Short DescriptionUpdated

The Department of Economics and Finance provides solid training in both the theory and application of economics and finance. The Department aims to equip graduates with cutting-edge knowledge in modern economics and finance and to provide Hong Kong with the young financial executives, economists and business leaders it needs. The mission of the Department is to be a centre of excellence in research and teaching, using economics and finance for business and public sector decision making in Hong Kong, Mainland China and other economies in the world.
The Department currently offers the following two majors:
• BBA Business Economics
• BBA Finance
Why BBA Business Economics?

BBA Business Economics provides solid training in economic strategies for improving business operations, government policies and economic forecasting. Students are open for a wide range of career options, e.g. corporate strategist, management consultant, economist, private banker, investment advisor.
BBA Business Economics students are eligible to apply for the following joint degree programmes:
• Joint Bachelor's Degree Programme between City University of Hong Kong and National Taiwan University
• Joint Bachelor's Degree Program between City University of Hong Kong and Columbia University
Why BBA Finance?

BBA Finance provides rigorous training in asset valuation, portfolio and risk management, derivative securities, global investment and quantitative methods. The programme prepares you for key financial management positions in business and government sectors.
Career Prospects

Graduates are ready to develop career as corporate strategist, management consultant, economist, private banker, investment advisor and key financial management positions in business and government sectors.
Direct Admission to Joint Bachelor’s Degree Programme with Columbia University*

Starting in 2026/27, JUPAS applicants can directly apply for Year 1 entry to the prestigious Joint Bachelor’s Degree Programme offered by CityUHK and Columbia University. Graduates will earn degrees from both institutions. A separate application to Columbia University is required after submitting the JUPAS application.
*Only applicable to students with major in Business Economics
Admission Arrangements

JUPAS applicants will be considered for admission to first-year studies at the Department of Economics and Finance. Students will enter a major (current major options: Business Economics; Finance) after one year of study. The top 40% of students# will have a free choice of majors offered by the Department. The other 60% of students will be allocated a major within the Department, subject to the availability of places and the selection criteria set by individual majors. Please click here for details.
# based on CGPA with no failed grades and completion of at least 30 credit units including College/Department required courses

z: 簡短說明已更新
經濟與金融系提供經濟與金融理論與應用的紮實訓練。該系旨在為畢業生提供現代經濟和金融方面的前沿知識，並為香港提供所需的年輕金融高管、經濟學家和商界領袖。該系的使命是成為研究和教學的卓越中心，利用經濟學和金融學為香港、中國內地和世界其他經濟體的商業和公共部門決策提供支援。
該系目前開設以下兩個專業：
• BBA 商業經濟學
• BBA 金融
為什麼選擇 BBA 商業經濟學？
BBA 商業經濟學提供紮實的經濟策略培訓，以改善企業營運、政府政策和經濟預測。學生對各種職業選擇持開放態度，例如企業策略家、管理顧問、經濟學家、私人銀行家、投資顧問。
BBA商業經濟學學生有資格申請以下聯合學位課程：
• 香港城市大學與台灣大學聯合學士學位課程
• 香港城市大學與哥倫比亞大學聯合學士課程
為什麼選擇 BBA 金融？
BBA Finance 提供資產估值、投資組合和風險管理、衍生性證券、全球投資和定量方法的嚴格培訓。該計劃可協助您為企業和政府部門的關鍵財務管理職位做好準備。
職業前景
畢業生已準備好發展職業生涯，擔任企業策略家、管理顧問、經濟學家、私人銀行家、投資顧問以及商業和政府部門的關鍵財務管理職位。
直接入讀哥倫比亞大學聯合學士學位課程*
由2026/27學年起，聯招申請者可直接申請入讀香港城市大學與哥倫比亞大學合辦學士學位課程一年級。畢業生將獲得這兩個機構的學位。提交聯招申請後，需另行向哥倫比亞大學提出申請。
*僅適用於商業經濟學專業的學生
入學安排
聯招申請者將被考慮入讀經濟及金融系一年級課程。學生學習一年後將進入專業（當前專業選擇：商業經濟學；金融）。排名前40%的學生#將可以自由選擇系裡提供的專業。其餘60%的學生將根據名額的情況和各個專業設定的選擇標準，在系內分配一個專業。請點擊此處了解詳情。
# 基於 CGPA，無不及格成績並完成至少 30 個學分，包括學院/系必修課程

直接入讀哥倫比亞大學聯合學士學位課程
由2026/27學年起，聯招申請者可直接申請入讀香港城市大學與哥倫比亞大學合辦學士學位課程一年級。畢業生將獲得這兩個機構的學位。提交聯招申請後，需另行向哥倫比亞大學提出申請。

d: The Department of Economics and Finance provides solid training in both the theory and application of economics and finance. The Department aims to equip graduates with cutting-edge knowledge in modern economics and finance and to provide Hong Kong with the young financial executives, economists and business leaders it needs. The mission of the Department is to be a centre of excellence in research and teaching, using economics and finance for business and public sector decision making in Hong Kong, Mainland China and other economies in the world.
The Department currently offers the following two majors:
• BBA Business Economics
• BBA Finance
Why BBA Finance?

BBA Finance provides rigorous training in asset valuation, portfolio and risk management, derivative securities, global investment and quantitative methods. The programme prepares you for key financial management positions in business and government sectors.
Career Prospects

Graduates are ready to develop career as corporate strategist, management consultant, economist, private banker, investment advisor and key financial management positions in business and government sectors.

z: 經濟與金融系提供經濟與金融理論與應用的紮實訓練。該系旨在為畢業生提供現代經濟和金融方面的前沿知識，並為香港提供所需的年輕金融高管、經濟學家和商界領袖。該系的使命是成為研究和教學的卓越中心，利用經濟學和金融學為香港、中國內地和世界其他經濟體的商業和公共部門決策提供支援。
該系目前開設以下兩個專業：
• BBA 商業經濟學
• BBA 金融
為什麼選擇 BBA 金融？
BBA Finance 提供資產估值、投資組合和風險管理、衍生性證券、全球投資和定量方法的嚴格培訓。該計劃可協助您為企業和政府部門的關鍵財務管理職位做好準備。
職業前景
畢業生已準備好發展職業生涯，擔任企業策略家、管理顧問、經濟學家、私人銀行家、投資顧問以及商業和政府部門的關鍵財務管理職位。

d: Business IS Smart

Amazon, Facebook and Google have propelled business into a world of smart business. Business is made smart with information systems, such as those based on artificial intelligence (AI), big data and cloud services (ABC).

The Department of Information Systems in the College of Business is the largest Information Systems department in Hong Kong and one of the top three in the world for research productivity [1]. The Department is committed to nurturing smart people for smart business with careers of the future.
Technology IS Changing the World

AI, big data and cloud services have played important roles in business transformation today. Together with social networks, 5G mobile, FinTech and other information systems, these technologies are driving business innovations in financial services, accounting and professional services, online services and marketing.
Research IS Driving Innovation

We are among the best in Information Systems in the world. Our faculty members are doing cutting-edge research in information systems for business innovations. Our students are encouraged to conduct undergraduate research with faculty members in the Department.
Practice IS Useful
Our students will have opportunities to experience business in real-world contexts with leading business executives from our EMBA programmes and alumni.

The Department provides Smart Business Scholarships to recognise students with outstanding performance and support them in regional and international business competitions. Our students make business smart with information systems.
Information Systems IS Smart Business

The Department offers new and comprehensive information systems courses to meet the rapidly changing nature of information technologies such as social networks, mobile apps, AI, big data analytics, cloud services and FinTech. Our students will not only be equipped with the latest knowledge but also with communication and project management skills and professional attitudes. Our graduates will be well prepared to help companies make business smart with information systems.
Today IS Good

When you are admitted to the Department of Information Systems (options: BBA Global Business Systems Management, BBA Information Management), you will study general BBA courses in year one. At the end of year one, you can choose to major in either BBA Global Business Systems Management (GBSM) or BBA Artificial Intelligence in Business (AIB).
Tomorrow IS Even Better

Our graduates start their careers as management trainees, business analysts, data scientists, system analysts and programmers in global banks, consulting and technology firms, such as HSBC, BOC, PWC, Apple, Alibaba, Facebook, Google and IBM.
[1] Research Ranking of the Association for Information Systems (http://www.aisnet.org/)
Admission Arrangements

JUPAS applicants will be considered for admission to first-year studies at the Department of Information Systems. Students will enter a major (current major options: Global Business Systems Management; Artificial Intelligence in Business) after one year of study. The top 40% of students# will have a free choice of majors offered by the Department. The other 60% of students will be allocated a major within the Department, subject to the availability of places and the selection criteria set by individual majors. Please click here for details.
# based on CGPA with no failed grades and completion of at least 30 credit units including College/Department required courses

z: 商業是明智的
亞馬遜、Facebook 和Google已將企業帶入智慧商業世界。透過基於人工智慧（AI）、大數據和雲端服務（ABC）等資訊系統，業務變得智慧化。
商學院資訊系統係是香港最大的資訊系統系，也是全球研究生產力排名前三名的系之一[1]。本系致力於培養聰明人，為聰明的商業和未來的職業發展。
科技正在改變世界
人工智慧、大數據和雲端服務在當今的業務轉型中發揮了重要作用。這些技術與社交網路、5G行動、金融科技和其他資訊系統一起，正在推動金融服務、會計和專業服務、線上服務和行銷方面的業務創新。
研究正在推動創新
我們是世界上最好的資訊系統之一。我們的教職員工正在進行商業創新資訊系統的前沿研究。我們鼓勵學生與該系的教職人員一起進行本科研究。
練習很有用
我們的學生將有機會與 EMBA 課程的領先企業高管和校友一起在現實世界中體驗商業。
該系提供智慧商業獎學金，以表彰表現出色的學生，並支持他們參加區域和國際商業競賽。我們的學生利用資訊系統使商業變得智慧。
資訊系統就是智慧業務
該系提供全新且全面的資訊系統課程，以滿足社交網路、行動應用程式、人工智慧、大數據分析、雲端服務和金融科技等資訊科技快速變化的性質。我們的學生不僅將具備最新的知識，還將具備溝通和專案管理技能以及專業態度。我們的畢業生將為幫助公司利用資訊系統實現業務智慧化做好充分準備。
今天很好
當您考入資訊系統系（選項：BBA 全球商業系統管理、BBA 資訊管理）時，您將在第一年學習一般 BBA 課程。在第一年結束時，您可以選擇主修 BBA 全球商業系統管理 (GBSM) 或 BBA 商業人工智慧 (AIB)。
明天會更好
我們的畢業生在全球銀行、顧問和科技公司（如匯豐銀行、中國銀行、普華永道、蘋果、阿里巴巴、Facebook、谷歌和 IBM）開始他們的職業生涯，擔任管理培訓生、業務分析師、資料科學家、系統分析師和程式設計師。
[1] 資訊系統協會研究排名（http://www.aisnet.org/）
入學安排
聯招申請者將被考慮入讀資訊系統系一年級課程。學生學習一年後將進入專業（當前專業選擇：全球商業系統管理；商業人工智慧）。排名前40%的學生#將可以自由選擇系裡提供的專業。其餘60%的學生將根據名額的情況和各個專業設定的選擇標準，在系內分配一個專業。請點擊此處了解詳情。
# 基於 CGPA，無不及格成績並完成至少 30 個學分，包括學院/系必修課程

d: Why Study BBA Global Business Systems Management?
BBA Global Business Systems Management (GBSM) aims to nurture students to become smart business managers.
GBSM IS Smart Global

The best way to learn about the world is to experience it. Two semester-long exchanges to recognised universities in the US, Europe and/or Asia encourage our students to develop a global mindset. Enjoy a flexible curriculum and choose courses during your exchange that match your own interests and needs.
GBSM IS Smart Tech

Our students develop a technology mindset as they learn how modern information systems such as AI, big data and cloud services are transforming the business world. They can participate in a week-long Smart Business Study Tour to Stanford University and visit AAAF (Apple, Amazon, Alphabet and Facebook) companies in Silicon Valley, or join a one-month Smart Business Project Tour for visits and work experience in FinTech and/or BAT (Baidu, Alibaba and Tencent) companies closer to home.
GBSM IS Smart Business

Our students also develop a business mindset as they learn about new IS business strategies and Internet business models. Students gain the knowledge and skills to analyse high-growth technology companies and make wise investment decisions. They also develop good communication and project management skills, which prepare them for management trainee jobs in multinational companies.
GBSM IS a Smart Choice

Our students have opportunities to conduct undergraduate research or consulting projects with faculty members in the largest IS department in Hong Kong and one of the best IS department in research productivity in the world [1]. The Department provides Smart Business scholarships to support our undergraduate students in regional and international business competitions. Our students make business smart with information systems.
GBSM IS Smart Future
Our graduates begin their careers as management trainees and business analysts in global banks, consulting and technology firms, such as HSBC, BOC, PWC, Apple, Alibaba, Facebook, Google and IBM.

In 2018, 94% of our graduates were hired immediately after graduation and 6% of our graduates went overseas for further studies. The highest and average monthly salaries of our graduates from BBA Global Business Systems Management were approximately HK$60K and HK$24K, respectively. Their average salaries were 36% higher than those of BBA graduates of the Business College.
[1] Research Ranking of the Association for Information Systems (http://www.aisnet.org/)

z: 為什麼學習 BBA 全球商業系統管理？
BBA全球商業系統管理（GBSM）旨在培養學生成為聰明的商業經理。
GBSM 是智慧全球
了解世界的最好方法就是去體驗它。與美國、歐洲和/或亞洲的知名大學進行為期兩個學期的交流，鼓勵我們的學生培養全球思維。享受靈活的課程設置，並在交換期間選擇符合您自己的興趣和需求的課程。
GBSM 是智慧科技
我們的學生在了解人工智慧、大數據和雲端服務等現代資訊系統如何改變商業世界時，會培養技術思維。他們可以參加為期一周的史丹佛大學智慧商業考察之旅，參觀位於矽谷的 AAAF（蘋果、亞馬遜、Alphabet 和 Facebook）公司，或參加為期一個月的智慧商業計畫之旅，在離家較近的金融科技和/或 BAT（百度、阿里巴巴和騰訊）公司進行參觀和工作體驗。
GBSM 是智慧商業
我們的學生在學習新的資訊系統商業策略和網路商業模式時也培養了商業思維。學生獲得分析高成長科技公司並做出明智投資決策的知識和技能。他們也培養良好的溝通和專案管理技能，為跨國公司的管理培訓生工作做好準備。
GBSM 是明智的選擇
我們的學生有機會與香港最大的資訊系統系和世界上研究生產力最好的資訊系統系之一的教員一起進行本科研究或諮詢專案[1]。該系提供智慧商業獎學金，以支持我們的本科生參加地區和國際商業競賽。我們的學生利用資訊系統使商業變得智慧。
GBSM是智慧未來
我們的畢業生在匯豐銀行、中國銀行、普華永道、蘋果、阿里巴巴、Facebook、谷歌和 IBM 等全球銀行、顧問和科技公司以管理培訓生和業務分析師的身份開始他們的職業生涯。
2018年，94%的畢業生畢業即就業，6%的畢業生出國深造。 BBA 全球商業系統管理畢業生的最高月薪和平均月薪分別約為 6 萬港元和 2.4 萬港元。他們的平均薪資比商學院 BBA 畢業生高出 36%。
[1] 資訊系統協會研究排名（http://www.aisnet.org/）

d: Why Study BBA Artificial Intelligence in Business?
BBA Artificial Intelligence in Business (AIB) nurtures students to become smart business professionals.
AIB IS Smart Double Major

Our students have great flexibilities to complete a double major degree in Information Management and in Accounting, Finance or Marketing. Local core industries, such as financial services, professional services, logistics and trading services, are being transformed by big data and artificial intelligence (AI). Our graduates have outstanding opportunities to play a major role in this digital transformation process.
AIB IS Smart Innovation

Our students gain the knowledge and skills to apply modern information systems (e.g., AI, big data and cloud services) to business innovations. They can participate in a one-week Smart Business Study Tour to Stanford University and visit AAAF companies (Apple, Amazon, Alphabet and Facebook) in Silicon Valley, or join a one-month Smart Business Project Tour for visits and work experience in FinTech and/or BAT companies (Baidu, Alibaba and Tencent) closer to home.
AIB IS Smart Business

Our students gain a business mindset from exposure to new IS business strategies and Internet business models. They will gain the knowledge and skills to analyse high-growth technology companies and make wise investment decisions. They will also gain good communication and project management skills that will qualify them for project management jobs in multinational companies.
AIB IS Smart Choice

Our students have opportunities to conduct undergraduate research or consulting projects with faculty members in the largest IS department in Hong Kong and one of the best IS department in the world for research productivity [1]. The Department provides Smart Business scholarships to support our undergraduate students in regional and international business competitions. Our students make business smart with information systems.
AIB IS Smart Future

Our graduates begin their careers as business analysts, data scientists, IT auditors, systems analysts and programmers in global banks, consulting and technology firms, such as HSBC, BOC, PWC, Apple, Alibaba, Facebook, Google and IBM.

In 2018, 99% of our graduates were hired immediately after graduation and 1% went overseas for further studies. The highest, average and lowest monthly salaries of BBA Information Management graduates were HK$24K, HK$18K and HK$13K, respectively.
[1] Research Ranking of the Association for Information Systems (http://www.aisnet.org/)

z: 為什麼要學習 BBA 商業人工智慧？
BBA 商業人工智慧 (AIB) 培養學生成為聰明的商業專業人士。
AIB IS 智能雙專業
我們的學生可以非常靈活地完成資訊管理和會計、金融或行銷的雙學位。金融服務、專業服務、物流和貿易服務等當地核心產業正被大數據和人工智慧改造。我們的畢業生有絕佳的機會在這個數位轉型過程中發揮重要作用。
AIB 是智慧創新
我們的學生獲得將現代資訊系統（例如人工智慧、大數據和雲端服務）應用於業務創新的知識和技能。他們可以參加為期一周的史丹佛大學智慧商業考察之旅，參觀矽谷的 AAAF 公司（蘋果、亞馬遜、Alphabet 和 Facebook），或參加為期一個月的智慧商業計畫之旅，在離家較近的金融科技和/或 BAT 公司（百度、阿里巴巴和騰訊）進行參觀和工作體驗。
AIB 是智慧商業
我們的學生透過接觸新的資訊系統商業策略和網路商業模式來獲得商業思維。他們將獲得分析高成長科技公司並做出明智投資決策的知識和技能。他們還將獲得良好的溝通和專案管理技能，使他們有資格在跨國公司從事專案管理工作。
AIB 是明智的選擇
我們的學生有機會與香港最大的資訊系統系和世界上研究生產力最好的資訊系統系之一的教員一起進行本科研究或諮詢專案[1]。該系提供智慧商業獎學金，以支持我們的本科生參加地區和國際商業競賽。我們的學生利用資訊系統使商業變得智慧。
AIB是智慧未來
我們的畢業生在全球銀行、顧問和科技公司（如匯豐銀行、中國銀行、普華永道、蘋果、阿里巴巴、Facebook、谷歌和 IBM）開始他們的職業生涯，擔任業務分析師、資料科學家、IT 審計員、系統分析師和程式設計師。
2018年，99%的畢業生畢業後立即就業，1%的畢業生出國深造。 BBA資訊管理畢業生的最高、平均和最低月薪分別為24,000港元、18,000港元和13,000港元。
[1] 資訊系統協會研究排名（http://www.aisnet.org/）

d: Why BBA Business Decision Analytics?

The BBA Business Decision Analytics (BDAN) programme aims to develop students’ qualitative and quantitative ability to solve business problems and make decisions through DEEP data analysis. We consist of two study streams:
Decision Analytics Stream
• Provide professional training in business analytics, statistics, business intelligence (big data analysis), risk management, business knowledge and communication skills
• Develop students’ ability to manage and to analyze huge volume of business data using modern computer software which are popularly used in global business world
• Enable students to solve business problems by a judicious application of technical and practical skills
• Enable students to obtain internationally recognized professional qualifications such as SAS certification and Financial Risk Manager (FRM) Examinations
• Prepare students for a statistical and analyst position in the financial, commercial, and government sector
Data Informatics Stream
• Provide professional training in data analytics, information management, business knowledge and communication skills
• Enable students to acquire knowledge in two different industries: Management Sciences and Information Systems
• Enable students to obtain international professional qualifications (Base SAS)
• Prepare students to work in the areas which require both data analytics and information management knowledge
BBA Business Decision Analytics students are eligible to apply for the following joint degree programme:
• Joint Bachelor's Degree Program between City University of Hong Kong and Columbia University
Career Prospects
Our graduates are prepared to work in the areas which require data analytics, statistics and information management knowledge.
Direct Admission to Joint Bachelor’s Degree Programme with Columbia University

Starting in 2026/27, JUPAS applicants can directly apply for Year 1 entry to the prestigious Joint Bachelor’s Degree Programme offered by CityUHK and Columbia University. Graduates will earn degrees from both institutions. A separate application to Columbia University is required after submitting the JUPAS application.

z: 為什麼選擇 BBA 商業決策分析？
BBA商業決策分析（BDAN）課程旨在培養學生透過深度資料分析解決商業問題和做出決策的定性和定量能力。我們由兩個研究方向組成：
決策分析流
• 提供商業分析、統計、商業智慧（大數據分析）、風險管理、商業知識和溝通技巧的專業培訓
• 培養學生使用全球商業世界廣泛使用的現代電腦軟體管理和分析大量商業數據的能力
• 使學生能夠明智地應用技術和實務技能來解決商業問題
• 使學生能夠獲得國際認可的專業資格，例如SAS認證和金融風險管理師（FRM）考試
• 為學生在金融、商業和政府部門擔任統計和分析師職位做好準備
數據資訊學流
• 提供數據分析、資訊管理、業務知識和溝通技巧的專業培訓
• 使學生獲得兩個不同行業的知識：管理科學和資訊系統
• 使學生能夠獲得國際專業資格（Base SAS）
• 幫助學生做好在需要數據分析和資訊管理知識的領域工作的準備
BBA 商業決策分析學生有資格申請以下聯合學位課程：
• 香港城市大學與哥倫比亞大學聯合學士課程
職業前景
我們的畢業生準備在需要數據分析、統計和資訊管理知識的領域工作。
直接入讀哥倫比亞大學聯合學士學位課程
由2026/27學年起，聯招申請者可直接申請入讀香港城市大學與哥倫比亞大學合辦學士學位課程一年級。畢業生將獲得這兩個機構的學位。提交聯招申請後，需另行向哥倫比亞大學提出申請。

d: Why BBA Global Operations Management?

The BBA Global Operations Management (GOM) programme aims to enable students to develop their analytical abilities, problem-solving skills, and technical competence in operations management, operations strategy, and supply chain management in a global context. Many companies are multi-national corporations and serve multiple global markets with products sourced and produced across many continents. In this increasingly interconnected and interdependent global economy, the process of delivering supplies and goods from one place to another is accomplished through technological innovation. The programme provides students with an integrated curriculum combining general business foundation and advanced management topics to prepare them for managerial positions in a global economy. Students will develop a critical appreciation of the roles and impact of operations and supply chain management on the success and growth of an organization. A strategic understanding of how global operations and supply chain, through planning, sourcing, making, delivering, and returning products and services to global businesses and their customers, can achieve competitive advantages. The programme enables students to diagnose operational and business problems, develop and implement solutions for various kinds of multi-national organizations in the financial, commercial, and service sectors.
Career Prospects

BBA GOM graduates are prepared for careers as management trainees, operations managers, operations analysts, project managers, etc. They typically begin in areas such as consulting, financial operations, health care operations, procurement and sourcing, retail management and supply chain management.

z: 為什麼選擇 BBA 全球營運管理？

BBA全球營運管理（GOM）課程旨在培養學生在全球背景下的營運管理、營運策略和供應鏈管理方面的分析能力、解決問題的能力和技術能力。許多公司都是跨國公司，透過在多個大洲採購和生產的產品來服務多個全球市場。在這個日益相互關聯和相互依存的全球經濟中，將物資和貨物從一個地方運送到另一個地方的過程是透過技術創新來完成的。該課程為學生提供結合一般商業基礎和高階管理主題的綜合課程，為他們在全球經濟中擔任管理職位做好準備。學生將對營運和供應鏈管理對組織的成功和發展的作用和影響有一個批判性的認識。對全球營運和供應鏈如何透過規劃、採購、製造、交付和返回產品和服務給全球企業及其客戶實現競爭優勢的策略性理解。該計畫使學生能夠診斷營運和業務問題，為金融、商業和服務領域的各種跨國組織開發和實施解決方案。
職業前景
BBA GOM 畢業生為管理培訓生、營運經理、營運分析師、專案經理等職業做好準備。他們通常從諮詢、財務營運、醫療保健營運、採購、零售管理和供應鏈管理等領域開始。

d: The ACT stream option stands as a pioneering initiative in data science, computer science and AI education. It aims to offer exceptional students a comprehensive education in these fields, and unparalleled opportunities to gain valuable international exposure and practical experience through overseas exchanges and elite work placements at renowned universities and leading worldwide companies. Admitted students will have the flexibility to select their preferred major upon accepting the offer. The available majors for the ACT stream option are:
• BSc Computer Science (stream: ACT)
• BSc Cybersecurity (stream: ACT)
• BSc Data Science (stream: ACT)
• BSc Data and Systems Engineering (stream: ACT)
Flagship Programme

This is one of the CityUHK’s Flagship Programmes, which equip students with essential knowledge and skills, cultivate their global leadership abilities, and connect them with leading professionals. The Flagship Scholarships, which cover tuition and hall fees, a guaranteed berth, and a one-off exchange sponsorship of up to HK$500,000, will be awarded to local JUPAS talents who meet the criteria.

z: ACT 流選項是數據科學、電腦科學和人工智慧教育領域的一項開創性舉措。它旨在為優秀學生提供這些領域的全面教育，以及透過海外交流以及在著名大學和全球領先公司的精英工作實習獲得寶貴的國際接觸和實踐經驗的無與倫比的機會。被錄取的學生在接受錄取通知後可以靈活地選擇自己喜歡的專業。 ACT 流選項的可用專業有：
• 電腦科學理學士（學派：ACT）
• 網路安全理學士（學派：ACT）
• 資料科學理學士（學派：ACT）
• 資料與系統工程學士（學派：ACT）
旗艦計劃
這是香港城市大學的旗艦課程之一，旨在為學生提供必要的知識和技能，培養他們的全球領導能力，並將他們與領先的專業人士聯繫起來。旗艦獎學金將頒發給符合資格的本地聯招人才，涵蓋學費和宿舍費、保證床位以及高達港幣50萬的一次性交換生贊助。

d: City University of Hong Kong offers two unique undergraduate programmes, BSc Data Science and BSc Data and Systems Engineering, which are designed to cultivate data science professionals capable of applying and creating the data science knowledge required to support social and economic development in Hong Kong and beyond. Data science, as a rapidly growing field, focuses on solving problems and furthering social progress using vast amounts of data collected in various industries, commerce and applied sciences. A data science professional is trained to use and extract insights from these data, apply to and solve real-world problems in the data realm responsibly.

BSc Data Science cultivates data scientists and data science professionals with rigorous theoretical and methodological knowledge of data science along with in- depth analysis and evaluation for applied problems.

BSc Data and Systems Engineering cultivates data scientists and advanced data engineers with a solid understanding of the tools and techniques, with a focus on managing data and applying data science techniques to solve social, business and industrial problems.
Admission Arrangements

JUPAS applicants will be considered for admission to first-year studies at the Department of Data Science. Students will have a free choice of majors [current major options: BSc Data Science; BSc Data and Systems Engineering] offered by the Department after one year of study.

z: 香港城市大學提供兩個獨特的本科課程：數據科學理學士和數據與系統工程理學士，旨在培養能夠應用和創造支持香港及其他地區社會和經濟發展所需的數據科學知識的數據科學專業人士。數據科學作為一個快速發展的領域，專注於利用在各行業、商業和應用科學中收集的大量數據來解決問題並促進社會進步。數據科學專業人員經過培訓，可以使用這些數據並從這些數據中提取見解，負責任地應用於和解決數據領域的現實問題。
資料科學理學士培養具有嚴謹的資料科學理論和方法論知識以及對應用問題進行深入分析和評估的資料科學家和資料科學專業人員。
數據與系統工程理學士培養對工具和技術有深入了解的數據科學家和高級數據工程師，重點是管理數據和應用數據科學技術來解決社會、商業和工業問題。
入學安排
聯招申請人將被考慮入讀資料科學系一年級課程。學生可以自由選擇專業[目前的專業選擇：數據科學理學學士；數據與系統工程理學士]由該系經過一年的學習後提供。

d: The BSc Data Science aims to provide data science graduates with essential training in the quantitative methods, statistical analysis techniques, data mining technology and computing tools required for the effective use and analysis of big and complex data for real-world applications that involve making sense of complex data to realize planning and decision making. The programme develops strong and interdisciplinary training in the ability to build data analysis reasoning, communication skills and ethic awareness in realistic inter-professional settings for commercial or public policy problems in various disciplines.
The programme provides three flexible modules of advanced knowledge:
• Artificial Intelligence
• Social Media Analytics
• Statistical Learning

z: 資料科學理學士課程​​旨在為資料科學畢業生提供定量方法、統計分析技術、資料探勘技術和計算工具的基本培訓，以便有效使用和分析大而複雜的數據，以實現實際應用，包括理解複雜資料以實現規劃和決策。該計畫開展強大的跨學科培訓，培養學生在現實的跨專業環境中建立數據分析推理、溝通技巧和道德意識的能力，以解決各個學科的商業或公共政策問題。

• 社群媒體分析

d: Offering a solid foundation in data science and intelligent systems, the BSc Data and Systems Engineering programme equips students with strong analytical and decision-making skills, enabling them to analyse, manage and improve enterprise- class systems. The enterprises considered may be businesses, governmental institutions or service-oriented engineering organisations. Main data science application subjects in this program covers data-driven financial technologies, smart city, artificial intelligence, and industrial internet of things.

BSc Data and Systems Engineering students are nurtured to become analytically minded and versatile graduates capable of collecting, analysing and interpreting big data. With such skills, they are proficient at transforming vast amounts of information into actionable insights, enhancing decision-making in their organisations.
The programme provides four flexible categories of advanced knowledge:
• FinTech
• Industrial AI
• Smart City
• Internet of Things (IoT)

z: 數據與系統工程理學士課程​​為數據科學和智慧系統奠定了堅實的基礎，使學生具備強大的分析和決策技能，使他們能夠分析、管理和改進企業級系統。所考慮的企業可以是企業、政府機構或服務型工程組織。本計畫主要數據科學應用學科涵蓋數據驅動的金融科技、智慧城市、人工智慧、工業物聯網等。
數據與系統工程理學士學生被培養成為具有分析頭腦和多才多藝的畢業生，能夠收集、分析和解釋大數據。憑藉這些技能，他們能夠熟練地將大量資訊轉化為可行的見解，從而增強組織的決策能力。
該計劃提供四種靈活的高級知識：
• 金融科技
• 工業人工智慧
• 智慧城市
• 物聯網 (IoT)

d: The Department of Computer Science was established in 1984, and has evolved from a teaching-oriented department into one that excels in both teaching and research. The Department launched its first BSc in Computer Studies in 1987 (renamed and restructured as the BSc in Computer Science in 2000), followed by the MSc in Computer Science in 1991. The Department produced its first PhD graduate in 1994. In addition to offering traditional courses such as the foundations of computer science, computer architecture and software engineering, our curriculum exposes students to the latest advances in cloud computing, data science, machine learning and bioinformatics. Students have the opportunity to undertake a major design and development project in an area such as data science, virtual reality, multimedia, computer vision, cloud computing and information security. All teaching within the Department is subject to stringent quality assurance procedures.

The Department maintains state-of-the-art computing facilities, including a private cloud infrastructure to support teaching activities and a high-throughput computing cluster for computationally intensive tasks involved in various research activities. The Department’s research foci include bioinformatics, cloud computing, data science, evolutionary computation and metaheuristics, information security, machine learning, mobile computing, multimedia computing, software engineering, computer vision and graphics. Our staff members have contributed intellectually and professionally to the advancement of these fields.
The Department currently offers the following major:
• BSc Computer Science

HKDSE students will be considered for direct admission to the BSc in Computer Science programme offered by the Department of Computer Science. This is one of the leading Computer Science programmes in Hong Kong, providing students with a well-balanced curriculum and solid education in both the theoretical and practical aspects of computing. This foundation enables students to lead successful careers as professional software developers, system architects, system analysts and technology officers. Besides acquiring a broad knowledge of Computer Science, students may elect to specialise in various technology streams such as artificial intelligence, cybersecurity, multimedia, software engineering/project management and data science. In addition, our one-year Information Technology Professional Placement provides students with the opportunity to put their learning and skills into practice and to gain valuable real-world work experience, thus giving them a head start in their careers.
BSc Computer Science students are eligible to apply for the following joint degree programme:
• Joint Bachelor's Degree Program between City University of Hong Kong and Columbia University
For more information, please visit the Department of Computer Science.
Direct Admission to Joint Bachelor’s Degree Programme with Columbia University

Starting in 2026/27, JUPAS applicants can directly apply for Year 1 entry to the prestigious Joint Bachelor’s Degree Programme offered by CityUHK and Columbia University. Graduates will earn degrees from both institutions. A separate application to Columbia University is required after submitting the JUPAS application.

z: 電腦科學系成立於1984年，已從一個以教學為主的系所發展成為教學科研並重的系所。該系於 1987 年推出第一個電腦研究學士學位課程（2000 年更名為電腦科學學士學位課程），隨後於 1991 年推出電腦科學碩士學位課程。該系於 1994 年培養出第一位博士研究生。除了提供電腦科學基礎、電腦體系結構和軟體工程等傳統課程外，我們的課程還讓學生了解雲端運算、資料科學、機器學習和生物資訊學的最新進展。學生有機會承擔資料科學、虛擬實境、多媒體、電腦視覺、雲端運算和資訊安全等領域的重大設計和開發專案。該系內的所有教學均受到嚴格的品質保證程序的約束。
該系擁有最先進的運算設施，包括支援教學活動的私有雲基礎設施和用於各種研究活動中涉及的運算密集型任務的高吞吐量運算群集。該系的研究重點包括生物資訊學、雲端運算、數據科學、進化計算和元啟發式、資訊安全、機器學習、行動計算、多媒體計算、軟體工程、電腦視覺和圖形學。我們的員工為這些領域的進步做出了智力和專業的貢獻。
該系目前開設以下專業：
• 電腦科學理學士

香港中學文憑考試學生將被考慮直接入讀計算機科學系提供的計算機科學理學士學位課程。這是香港領先的電腦科學課程之一，為學生提供均衡的課程以及電腦理論和實踐方面的紮實教育。該基礎使學生能夠成為專業軟體開發人員、系統架構師、系統分析師和技術官員，以取得成功的職業生涯。除了獲得廣泛的電腦科學知識外，學生還可以選擇專注於各種技術流，例如人工智慧、網路安全、多媒體、軟體工程/專案管理和資料科學。此外，我們為期一年的資訊科技專業實習為學生提供了將所學知識和技能付諸實踐的機會，並獲得寶貴的實際工作經驗，從而為他們的職業生涯提供了良好的開端。
電腦科學理學學士學生有資格申請以下聯合學位課程：
• 香港城市大學與哥倫比亞大學聯合學士課程
欲了解更多信息，請訪問計算機科學系。

d: The Department of Architecture and Civil Engineering (ACE), one of the founding departments at City University of Hong Kong, offers professional education at both undergraduate and postgraduate degree levels. Our programmes are academically rigorous and professionally focused. Adopting an inter-disciplinary approach, our programmes are delivered by a professional team that includes civil and structural engineers, architectural / building services engineers, construction engineers, material technologists, environmental scientists, architects, urban planners, building surveyors and quantity surveyors. Our graduates are therefore uniquely placed to serve the architecture, engineering and construction (AEC) industry.

The AEC industry in Hong Kong is flourishing. Infrastructure and building developments, and the maintenance and refurbishment of existing facilities, have contributed to Hong Kong's growing economy. There are notable opportunities for innovations and career development. In addition to the Hong Kong market, the local AEC industry can expect to participate actively in the markets of the People’s Republic of China. The Department has established close collaborations with universities and professional bodies both locally and internationally.

This programme aims to provide students a multi-disciplinary knowledge and skills in the area of architectural engineering, civil engineering, architecture and surveying. The programme features a flexible structure with the following majors:
• Bachelor of Engineering in Architectural Engineering
• Bachelor of Engineering in Civil Engineering1
• Bachelor of Science in Architecture and Surveying2
Admission Arrangements

Students admitted into the programme will study a common curriculum for the first year and pursue a major (Architectural Engineering, Civil Engineering or Architecture and Surveying) in the second year. The top 40% of students# will have a free choice of majors while the remaining 60% will be allocated a major within the Department, subject to the availability of places and the selection criteria set by individual majors.

1 Students whose major is Civil Engineering can opt for the Structural Engineering stream or Infrastructure and Smart City stream in the second year according to the selection criteria set by the programme team. Students whose major in Civil Engineering with stream in Structural Engineering are eligible to apply for the Joint Bachelor's Degree Program between City University of Hong Kong and National Taiwan University.

2 Students whose major is Architecture and Surveying can opt for the Architecture stream or Surveying and Urban Informatics stream in the second year according to the selection criteria set by the programme team.
# based on CGPA with no failed grades and completion of at least 30 credit units including College/Department required courses

z: 建築與土木工程系（ACE）是香港城市大學的創始系之一，提供本科和研究生學位的專業教育。我們的課程學術嚴謹且專注於專業。我們的課程採用跨學科方法，由專業團隊提供，其中包括土木和結構工程師、建築/建築服務工程師、建築工程師、材料技術專家、環境科學家、建築師、城市規劃師、建築測量師和工料測量師。因此，我們的畢業生在為建築、工程和施工 (AEC) 行業服務方面擁有獨特的優勢。
香港的AEC行业蓬勃发展。基礎設施和建築發展，以及現有設施的維護和翻新，為香港經濟的成長做出了貢獻。这里有显着的创新和职业发展机会。除香港市場外，本地AEC產業也可望積極參與中華人民共和國市場。該系與本地和國際的大學和專業機構建立了密切的合作關係。
該課程旨在為學生提供建築工程、土木工程、建築和測量領域的多學科知識和技能。此專案結構靈活，設有以下專業：
• 建築工程學士學位
• 土木工程學士學位1
•建築與測量理學士2
入學安排
被錄取的學生將在第一年學習共同課程，並在第二年攻讀專業（建築工程、土木工程或建築與測量）。排名前40%的學生#將可以自由選擇專業，而其餘60%的學生將根據名額的情況和各個專業設定的選擇標準，在系內分配一個專業。
1 土木工程專業的學生第二年可根據專案小組制定的選拔標準選擇結構工程專業或基礎設施與智慧城市專業。土木工程系結構工程系學生，可報讀香港城市大學與台灣大學聯合學士學位課程。
2 建築與測量專業的學生第二年可根據專案小組制定的選拔標準選擇建築學專業或測量與城市資訊學專業。
# 基於 CGPA，無不及格成績並完成至少 30 個學分，包括學院/系必修課程

d: In today’s interconnected world, technology is at the heart of how we live, work, and play. Whether you’re streaming your favorite show, navigating with GPS, chatting with friends across continents, or using AI-powered applications, electrical engineering is the driving force behind it all. From wired and wireless communication to cutting-edge innovations like artificial intelligence, renewable energy, and autonomous vehicles, electrical engineers are shaping the technologies that connect and improve our lives.

The Department of Electrical Engineering offers dynamic and future-ready programs that equip students with the knowledge and skills to thrive in a fast-evolving, technology-driven world. Our majors are designed to ensure seamless functionality of technologies across continents, empowering students to contribute to transformative advancements in areas such as AI, robotics, circuit design, the Internet of Things (IoT), and 5G communications. Whether you aspire to design revolutionary hardware, develop intelligent systems, or create groundbreaking software, our programs provide the expertise you need to succeed.

We offer four specialized majors that provide depth for mastering core technologies while offering the flexibility to explore diverse career paths. The first two years of study feature a common curriculum that builds a strong foundation in essential areas such as:
• Mathematics and Physics: The building blocks of engineering problem-solving.
• Electronics and Circuits: Understanding the principles behind modern devices.
• Computer Programming: Developing the skills to design software and systems
• Information Technology: Exploring the technologies driving our digital world.
This foundational training prepares students for advanced courses in their third and final years, where they can specialize and apply their knowledge to real-world challenges.
The Department offers the majors:
• BEng Computer and Data Engineering
• BEng Electronic and Electrical Engineering
• BEng Information Engineering
• BEng Microelectronics Engineering

Our strong partnerships with industry leaders ensure that our programs remain relevant and practical, addressing the needs of Hong Kong and beyond. Through internships, collaborative projects, and exposure to cutting-edge technologies, students gain valuable hands-on experience and insights into the latest innovations. These connections not only enhance learning but also open pathways to exciting careers in fields like AI, smart cities, renewable energy, financial technology (FinTech), and telecommunications.
Admission Arrangements

JUPAS applicants will apply for admission to first-year studies in the Department of Electrical Engineering. Students will enter a major (major options: Computer and Data Engineering; Electronic and Electrical Engineering; Information Engineering; Microelectronics Engineering) after one year of study. The top 40% of students# will have a free choice of majors offered by the Department. The other 60% of students will be allocated a major within the Department, subject to the availability of places and the selection criteria set by individual majors.
# based on CGPA with no failed grades and completion of at least 30 credit units including College/Department required courses

z: 在當今互聯的世界中，科技是我們生活、工作和娛樂的核心。無論您是在串流上喜愛的節目、使用 GPS 導航、與各大洲的朋友聊天，還是使用人工智慧應用程序，電氣工程都是這一切背後的驅動力。從有線和無線通訊到人工智慧、再生能源和自動駕駛汽車等尖端創新，電氣工程師正在塑造連接和改善我們生活的技術。
電機工程系提供動態且面向未來的課程，為學生提供在快速發展、技術驅動的世界中茁壯成長的知識和技能。我們的專業旨在確保各大洲技術的無縫功能，使學生能夠為人工智慧、機器人、電路設計、物聯網 (IoT) 和 5G 通訊等領域的變革性進步做出貢獻。無論您渴望設計革命性的硬體、開發智慧系統還是創建突破性的軟體，我們的計劃都能為您提供成功所需的專業知識。
我們提供四個專業專業，為掌握核心技術提供深度，同時提供探索不同職業道路的靈活性。前兩年的學習以共同課程為特色，為以下重要領域奠定堅實的基礎：
• 數學與物理：解決工程問題的基石。
• 電子與電路：了解現代設備背後的原理。
• 電腦程式設計：培養設計軟體和系統的技能
• 資訊科技：探索驅動數位世界的科技。
這種基礎培訓為學生在第三年和最後幾年的高級課程做好準備，他們可以在其中專業化並將他們的知識應用於現實世界的挑戰。
該系開設的專業有：
• 電腦與資料工程工學士
• 電子電機工程工學士
• 資訊工程工學士
• 微電子工程工學士
我們與行業領導者的牢固合作關係確保我們的課程保持相關性和實用性，滿足香港及其他地區的需求。透過實習、合作專案和接觸尖端技術，學生可以獲得寶貴的實務經驗和對最新創新的見解。這些連結不僅可以增強學習，還可以為人工智慧、智慧城市、再生能源、金融技術 (FinTech) 和電信等領域的令人興奮的職業開闢道路。
入學安排
聯招申請者將申請入讀電機工程學系一年級課程。學生學習一年後進入主修（主修：電腦與資料工程；電子電機工程；資訊工程；微電子工程）。排名前40%的學生#將可以自由選擇系裡提供的專業。其餘60%的學生將根據名額的情況和各個專業設定的選擇標準，在系內分配一個專業。
# 基於 CGPA，無不及格成績並完成至少 30 個學分，包括學院/系必修課程

d: Mechanical Engineering is a highly popular degree programme that offers students a wide range of career opportunities. At City University of Hong Kong, we provide a comprehensive Mechanical Engineering programme designed to equip you with the essential skills and knowledge necessary to excel in any technology-related field. Our programme includes three majors, Aerospace Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Nuclear and Risk Engineering, offering students a range of options based on their interests. With an almost 100% employment rate, a degree in Mechanical Engineering from City University of Hong Kong ensures you a promising future with excellent job opportunities. Join us today and embark on your journey towards a successful career in Mechanical Engineering.
Taught by over 30 academic staff members, the Department currently offers the following majors:
• BEng Aerospace Engineering
• BEng Mechanical Engineering
• BEng Nuclear and Risk Engineering
Please refer to the Department’s website for more information about the Department.
Admission Arrangements

JUPAS applicants will be considered for admission to first-year studies at the Department of Mechanical Engineering. Students will enter a major (current major options: Aerospace Engineering; Mechanical Engineering; Nuclear and Risk Engineering) after one year of study. The top 40% of students# will have a free choice of majors offered by the Department. The other 60% of students will be allocated a major within the Department, subject to the availability of places and the selection criteria set by individual majors.
# based on CGPA with no failed grades and completion of at least 30 credit units including College/Department required courses

z: 機械工程是一個非常受歡迎的學位課程，為學生提供廣泛的職業機會。在香港城市大學，我們提供全面的機械工程課程，旨在幫助您掌握在任何技術相關領域中脫穎而出所需的基本技能和知識。我們的課程包括航空航天工程、機械工程以及核子與風險工程三個專業，為學生提供根據他們的興趣提供的一系列選擇。香港城市大學機械工程學位的就業率接近100%，可確保您擁有良好的就業機會和光明的未來。今天就加入我們，踏上您在機械工程領域邁向成功職涯的旅程。
該係由 30 多名學術人員授課，目前提供以下專業：
• 航空航太工程工學學士
• 機械工程學士學位
• 核子與風險工程工學學士
有關該部門的更多信息，請參閱該部門的網站。
入學安排
聯招申請者將被考慮入讀機械工程學系一年級課程。學生學習一年後將進入主修（目前專業選擇：航空航天工程；機械工程；核子與風險工程）。排名前40%的學生#將可以自由選擇系裡提供的專業。其餘60%的學生將根據名額的情況和各個專業設定的選擇標準，在系內分配一個專業。
# 基於 CGPA，無不及格成績並完成至少 30 個學分，包括學院/系必修課程

d: Short DescriptionUpdated

As the first of its kind in Hong Kong, the Department of Materials Science and Engineering was established to develop internationally competitive and cutting-edge research and provide a professional curriculum that equips graduates to contribute to materials science and engineering and related sectors in Hong Kong, greater China and the rest of the world.

The Department serves as a collaboration platform for developing cross-disciplinary academic programmes and interdisciplinary research projects with other academic units in the University. Further, it aspires to become a world-leading department in research and professional education with a focus on the following four target areas:
• Biomaterials
• Computational materials science
• Function materials
• Structural materials
The Department also serves as an international platform to encourage collaboration among the leading institutes in the world and to enhance our global research reputation.
BEng Materials Science and Engineering

In the Materials Science and Engineering major, students acquire knowledge that can be used to solve materials problems in engineering processes. Graduates of this major can seek jobs in engineering companies and join the Hong Kong Institution of Engineers as graduate members. They can become professional engineers after receiving the relevant on-the-job training and completing the professional assessment.
BEng Materials Science and Engineering students are eligible to apply for the following joint degree programme:
Joint Bachelor's Degree Program between City University of Hong Kong and National Taiwan University

作為香港首個此類學科，材料科學與工程系的成立旨在發展具有國際競爭力的前沿研究，並提供專業課程，使畢業生能夠為香港、大中華區乃至世界其他地區的材料科學與工程及相關領域做出貢獻。
該係作為與大學其他學術單位開發跨學科學術計畫和跨學科研究計畫的合作平台。此外，它立志成為世界領先的研究和專業教育部門，並專注於以下四個目標領域：
• 生物材料
• 計算材料科學
• 功能性材料
• 結構材料
該系還充當一個國際平台，鼓勵世界領先機構之間的合作並提高我們的全球研究聲譽。
材料科學與工程工學學士
在材料科學與工程專業，學生獲得可用於解決工程過程中材料問題的知識。該專業的畢業生可在工程公司謀職，並可加入香港工程師學會成為畢業生會員。經過相關在職訓練並完成專業評鑑後，即可成為專業工程師。
材料科學與工程學士學位學生有資格申請以下聯合學位課程：
香港城市大學與台灣大學聯合學士學位課程

d: BEng Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering aims to develop the abilities of our students in integrating intelligent manufacturing systems with: (i) Industrial Internet-of-Things, (ii) Automation and Robotics, (iii) Logistics and Supply Chain, (iv) Artificial Intelligence, (v) Industrial Big Data, (vi) Smart City Engineering and (vii) Electronics and Semiconductor Manufacturing. This multi-disciplinary program aims to produce graduates who are capable of using cutting-edge engineering knowledge, computational, experimental and analytical techniques to plan, design, implement and improve technology-based manufacturing and operations systems.

d: Short DescriptionUpdated

The Pathway for Research, Innovation, and Multinational Engineering (PRIME) is a flagship programme of the College of Engineering designed to provide exceptional students with a comprehensive education in engineering and opportunities to gain valuable experience through research internships and work placements in top universities and companies worldwide. It is intended to equip students with the skills and knowledge needed to excel in the field of engineering and to prepare them for successful careers in the global engineering industry. The PRIME programme is open to talented and motivated students with a passion for engineering and a commitment to excellence.
Key features

Free Choice of Major: Students admitted to the PRIME programme are free to choose any major in the College of Engineering upon accepting the offer. They will be enrolled in one of the departments* before starting their first year of study.

One-on-One Mentorship: Each student will be paired with a faculty member who will provide personalized guidance and support throughout the programme. The faculty mentor will help the student identify their academic and professional goals, develop a plan to achieve them, and provide feedback and guidance along the way.
Overseas Experience in Year 3 or Year 4

• Research Internship: Selected students will have the opportunity to work with leading researchers in top overseas universities. This will provide students with hands-on experience in cutting-edge research and will help them develop essential skills in data analysis, experimental design, and scientific communication.

• Global Work Placement: Selected students may also have the opportunity to be placed in an international company in North America (US, Canada), Europe (France, Germany, Switzerland, etc.), and other developed countries (Singapore, South Korea, Japan, etc.) to gain work experience and apply their engineering skills in a real-world setting. This will enable students to build their professional network, develop communication skills, and gain invaluable industry experience.

Interdisciplinary Final-year Project: Leveraging faculty members' diverse research expertise and state-of-the-art research facilities, students will receive support to conduct interdisciplinary research in their final-year projects, offering valuable experience for their future professional endeavours.

Guaranteed admission to CityUHK PhD programme: Providing a clear pathway for students interested in furthering their academic and research career. (Upon meeting the entrance requirements for PhD programme when the student graduates from PRIME.)
Other features
With the mission to foster the career development of students and promote impactful innovations, students of the College of Engineering will also benefit from the following optional schemes.

Undergraduate plus Master’s Degree Programmes: Students in an “Undergraduate plus Master’s Degree Programme” will receive a conditional offer for a Master's degree programme when they join CityUHK as undergraduate students. They can benefit from higher-level courses, such as those with research elements and normally taught at the postgraduate level, during their undergraduate study. On completion of their study at CityUHK, students will be awarded two degrees (Bachelor's degree + Master's degree).

Entrepreneurial Training: The College offers a Minor in Engineering Entrepreneurship, which aims to provide entrepreneurial training to help students develop the skills and knowledge needed to start and operate their engineering businesses. It also helps students broaden their multi-disciplinary perspectives, integrating management, marketing, finance, and engineering.

Global Challenges: CityUHK X Sino Grand Challenges Scholars Program(CityUHK X Sino GCSP) is a combined curricular and extracurricular element to prepare students to be the future engineers and scientists that address and solve the global challenges facing the world in this century. CityUHK X Sino GCSP would give students a sense of purpose and enable them to positively impact the world through their engineering work.

Cross-Cultural Competence: Through student exchange programmes, study tours and the Cultural & Language Immersion Scheme (CALIS), students are provided with opportunities to develop cross-cultural competence through activities such as language training, cultural immersion experiences, or international service projects. This would help students to become global citizens and to develop the skills needed to work effectively in diverse and multicultural environments.
Flagship Programme

This is one of the CityUHK’s Flagship Programmes, which equip students with essential knowledge and skills, cultivate their global leadership abilities, and connect them with leading professionals. The Flagship Scholarships, which cover tuition and hall fees, a guaranteed berth, and a one-off exchange sponsorship of up to HK$500,000, will be awarded to local JUPAS talents who meet the criteria.

z: 簡短說明已更新
研究、創新和跨國工程銜接課程 (PRIME) 是工程學院的旗艦課程，旨在為優秀學生提供全面的工程教育，並提供透過在全球頂尖大學和公司進行研究實習和工作實習來獲得寶貴經驗的機會。它旨在為學生提供在工程領域脫穎而出所需的技能和知識，並為他們在全球工程行業的成功職業生涯做好準備。 PRIME 项目向才华横溢、积极进取、对工程充满热情并致力于追求卓越的学生开放。
主要特點
自由選擇專業：被PRIME課程錄取的學生在接受錄取通知書後可以自由選擇工程學院的任何專業。他們將在開始第一年的學習之前入讀其中一個系*。
一對一指導：每個學生將與一名教職人員配對，教職人員將在整個課程中提供個人化的指導和支持。教師導師將幫助學生確定他們的學術和職業目標，制定實現這些目標的計劃，並在過程中提供回饋和指導。
第三年或第四年的海外經驗
• 研究實習：入選的學生將有機會與海外頂尖大學的頂尖研究人員一起工作。這將為學生提供前沿研究的實務經驗，並幫助他們培養數據分析、實驗設計和科學交流的基本技能。
• 全球工作實習：入選的學生還有機會在北美（美國、加拿大）、歐洲（法國、德國、瑞士等）和其他已開發國家（新加坡、韓國、日本等）的國際公司工作，獲得工作經驗並在現實環境中應用他們的工程技能。這將使學生能夠建立自己的專業網絡、培養溝通技巧並獲得寶貴的行業經驗。
跨學科最後一年計畫：利用教師多樣化的研究專業知識和最先進的研究設施，學生將獲得在最後一年計畫中進行跨學科研究的支持，為他們未來的專業努力提供寶貴的經驗。
保證進入香港城市大學博士課程：為有興趣進一步發展學術和研究生涯的學生提供清晰的途徑。 （當學生從 PRIME 畢業時，滿足博士課程的入學要求。）
其他特點
工程學院的使命是促進學生的職業發展和促進有影響力的創新，工程學院的學生也將受益於以下可選計劃。
本科加碩士學位課程：「本科加碩士學位課程」的學生在以本科生身份加入香港城市大學時將獲得碩士學位課程的有條件錄取通知書。他們可以在本科學習期間從更高水平的課程中受益，例如具有研究成分且通常在研究生水平教授的課程。在香港城市大學完成學業後，學生將獲得兩個學位（學士+碩士學位）。
創業培訓：學院提供工程創業輔修課程，旨在提供創業培訓，幫助學生培養啟動和經營工程業務所需的技能和知識。它還幫助學生拓寬多學科視角，整合管理、行銷、金融和工程。
全球挑戰：城市大學 X 信和大挑戰學者計畫（CityUHK X 信和 GCSP）是一個結合了課內和課外活動的項目，旨在幫助學生成為未來的工程師和科學家，應對和解決本世紀世界面臨的全球挑戰。 CityUHK X 中國 GCSP 將為學生帶來使命感，使他們能夠透過工程工作對世界產生積極影響。
跨文化能力：透過學生溝通計畫、遊學和文化和語言沉浸計畫（CALIS），學生有機會透過語言培訓、文化沉浸體驗或國際服務計畫等活動來發展跨文化能力。這將有助於學生成為全球公民，並培養在多元化和多元文化環境中有效工作所需的技能。
旗艦計劃
這是香港城市大學的旗艦課程之一，旨在為學生提供必要的知識和技能，培養他們的全球領導能力，並將他們與領先的專業人士聯繫起來。旗艦獎學金將頒發給符合資格的本地聯招人才，涵蓋學費和宿舍費、保證床位以及高達港幣50萬的一次性交換生贊助。

d: BEng in Innovation and Enterprise Engineering (IEEG) is an unique undergraduate programme in Hong Kong which covers elements of systems design and process, engineering innovation and entrepreneurship. The programme prepares our students for successful careers in engineering innovation and enterprise which are identified as a key component for Hong Kong’s future planning and growth. Our curriculum allows students to further specialize in different areas of expertise including industrial Internet-of-Things, smart city, logistics and supply chain, robotics and automation. Our programme also has a placement component that allows students to gain real world experience, which will provide a significant edge when students look for employment after graduation.
This programme will cover the following components over the first two-year span:
• Understanding of the scientific principles and applications of innovation and enterprise engineering.
• A solid foundation in science subjects for the preparation of engineering exploration.
• Basic knowledge in relevant areas, including engineering enterprise, logistics and supply chain management, management science, technology innovation, optimisation, statistics and reliability.
• Ability to formulate and solve real intelligent system and enterprise engineering problems and provide high-quality solutions.
• Work-related experience and effective communication skills.
Upon completing the initial two-year period, students have the option to pursue one of the following paths:
• to complete the remaining required courses of the IEEG, offered by SYE and other departments in the College of Engineering (CENG) and graduate with a Bachelor of Engineering degree in IEEG
• to select other BEng programmes or obtain double major degrees in the College of Engineering if the student wishes to specialise in other engineering disciplines.
There will be an academic advisor mentoring each student in the programme on selecting required elective courses for achieving their goals upon completion of the programme.

z: 創新與企業工程學士學位（IEEG）是香港獨特的本科課程，涵蓋系統設計和流程、工程創新和創業等要素。该计划帮助我们的学生在工程创新和企业领域取得成功的职业生涯，这被认为是香港未来规划和发展的关键组成部分。我们的课程允许学生进一步专注于不同的专业领域，包括工业物联网、智慧城市、物流和供应链、机器人和自动化。我们的课程还有一个实习部分，可以让学生获得现实世界的经验，这将为学生毕业后寻找工作提供显着的优势。
該計劃將在前兩年涵蓋以下組成部分：
• 了解創新和企業工程的科學原理和應用。
• 為工程探索的準備奠定堅實的科學基礎。
• 相關領域的基礎知識，包括工程企業、物流與供應鏈管理、管理科學、技術創新、最佳化、統計與可靠性。
• 能夠制定和解決真實的智慧系統和企業工程問題並提供高品質的解決方案。
• 工作相關經驗和有效的溝通技巧。
完成最初的兩年課程後，學生可以選擇選擇以下途徑之一：
• 完成由SYE和工程學院（CENG）其他部門提供的IEEG其餘必修課程，並獲得IEEG工程學士學位
• 如果學生希望專攻其他工程學科，可選擇其他工程學士學位課程或獲得工程學院的雙學位。
將有一名學術顧問指導該計劃中的每個學生選擇所需的選修課程，以在計劃完成後實現他們的目標。

d: The Bachelor of Social Sciences in International Relations and Global Affairs program explores Asia’s place in the contemporary world and Hong Kong’s strategic position in the region and the world. It aims to develop students’ knowledge of socio-political, economic, and cultural processes of change occurring in Asia and to situate them in the broader international context, reflecting the increasing significance of Asia in world affairs. Through its interdisciplinary curriculum and training in social research, the International Relations and Global Affairs major seeks to equip students with analytic skills of value to organizations in diverse economic sectors in Hong Kong, Asia and beyond. The program is taught by faculty members from diverse disciplines of sociology, anthropology and political science. It enhances students’ critical reasoning and problem-solving skills, and extends and deepens their regional and global perspectives. Four-year degree students enrolled at the City University of Hong Kong have a chance to apply for admission to the Joint Bachelor’s Degree Program between City University of Hong Kong and Columbia University during their second year. Students admitted to the Joint Program will earn two bachelor degrees, awarded by the two universities. Upon graduation, students are well equipped to pursue careers in both public and private sectors in a variety of fields, including business, project-planning and management, public relations, politics, research and education, mass media, politics, social enterprises and non-governmental and community organizations.
Direct Admission to Joint Bachelor’s Degree Programme with Columbia University

Starting in 2026/27, JUPAS applicants can directly apply for Year 1 entry to the prestigious Joint Bachelor’s Degree Programme offered by CityUHK and Columbia University. Graduates will earn degrees from both institutions. A separate application to Columbia University is required after submitting the JUPAS application.

z: 国际关系及全球事务社会科学学士课程探讨亚洲在当代世界的地位，以及香港在区内及世界的策略地位。它旨在培養學生對亞洲發生的社會政治、經濟和文化變革進程的了解，並將其置於更廣泛的國際背景中，反映亞洲在世界事務中日益重要的地位。透過跨學科課程和社會研究培訓，國際關係和全球事務專業致力於為學生提供對香港、亞洲及其他地區不同經濟領域的組織有價值的分析技能。该项目由来自社会学、人类学和政治学等不同学科的教师教授。它提高学生的批判性推理和解决问题的能力，并扩展和深化他们的区域和全球视角。在香港城市大學就讀的四年制學位學生有機會在第二年申請入讀香港城市大學與哥倫比亞大學聯合學士學位課程。被联合项目录取的学生将获得由两所大学颁发的两个学士学位。畢業後，學生有能力在公共和私營部門的各個領域從事職業，包括商業、專案規劃和管理、公共關係、政治、研究和教育、大眾媒體、政治、社會企業以及非政府和社區組織。
直接入讀哥倫比亞大學聯合學士學位課程
由2026/27學年起，聯招申請者可直接申請入讀香港城市大學與哥倫比亞大學合辦學士學位課程一年級。畢業生將獲得這兩個機構的學位。提交聯招申請後，需另行向哥倫比亞大學提出申請。
