d: Founded in 2014 with a view to establishing excellent tertiary education, world-class research and an international reputation in Hong Kong, the Department of Chinese and History offers the major in Chinese and History with two streams - a) Chinese & b) History and Cultural Heritage. It aims to equip students with advanced and professional knowledge and a wide range of analytical and writing skills.
Students will enter a stream (current stream options: Chinese, History and Cultural Heritage) after one year of study.

The Chinese Stream strives to provide students with a solid and comprehensive training in Chinese language, Chinese literature, history and philosophy. The knowledge is both ancient and modern, and can be widely used in daily life. The training equips students with both in-depth knowledge and research skills for further academic work as well as for career development in the education, public affairs, administration, literature studies, media, editing and creative industries involving the use of Chinese. The Chinese Stream consists of four specialized areas of study, which are (1) Chinese language and literature, (2) Classical and modern Chinese literature, (3) Chinese classics and philosophy, and (4) Language use and writing.

History and Cultural Heritage Stream equips the students with comprehensive and in-depth knowledge of history, particularly Chinese history knowledge. It also aims to provide the students with the necessary training as cultural professionals with historical background. History seeks to provide the student knowledge on past events, memories, collections, and interpretations of the past. It also trains the students to examine the cause-and-effect relationships in human affairs and addresses the complexity of the past in shaping contemporary society. Although Chinese history is the primary focus of the stream, it also offers the students courses related to world history and public history to acquire historical knowledge to understand other nations’ different histories and cultures.

History as a discipline is in their very process to synthesize other fields of social sciences, including anthropology, sociology, and economics, not to mention cultural history, to which Cultural Heritage belongs. Without a relatively systematic knowledge of History, it is difficult for a student to master the knowledge of Cultural Heritage well. On the other hand, locating Cultural Heritage within and with History, Cultural Heritage can provide a cultural perspective for students of History in return. This stream is designed based on these two inseparable and interactive parts of “History” and “Cultural Heritage”.

History and Cultural Heritage Stream provides the professional training necessary to nurture high caliber history-related professionals with cultural perspective and cultural professionals with historical knowledge. It meets the growing workforce needs resulting from the rapidly expanding capacity in history-related industries including education, libraries, publishing, mass-media, etc., and culture-and-heritage-related industries, including cultural tourism, museum management, exhibition industries, commercial galleries and archives, community heritage programs, entertainment and arts-related professions, cultural and creative industries, in the Greater Bay Area, particularly Hong Kong. It educates students to become historical and cultural professionals who are culturally literate and competent in managing and marketing culture and heritage, with extensive knowledge of Chinese history and Chinese cultural heritage, including knowledge of Hong Kong’s history and cultural heritage. It also educates the students to understand Hong Kong’s unique position in integrating the East and West cultures. For this goal, this stream also strives to educate the students to become cultural professionals with highly proficient English-language ability to promote one’s culture and heritage and understand and respect the historical and cultural differences of other nations. Last but not least, History and Cultural Heritage Stream promotes professionalism in History and Culture and Heritage in support of maintaining Hong Kong’s leading role in culture- and heritage-related professions and provides expert advice on the promotion of culture and the protection and preservation of heritage in the context of Hong Kong both as part of China and as an international city.

Students who choose to major in Chinese and History will enjoy the significant advantages of integrating the two streams and our interdisciplinary emphasis, and may go on to pursue a wide range of careers after graduation.

z: 中文及歷史學系於2014年成立，旨在在香港建立卓越的高等教育、世界級的研究和國際聲譽，提供中文及歷史專業，分兩個方向：a)中文及b)歷史及文化遺產。它旨在為學生提供先進的專業知識以及廣泛的分析和寫作技能。
學習一年後，學生將進入一個流派（當前流派選項：中文、歷史和文化遺產）。
中文班致力於為學生提供紮實、全面的漢語言、中國文學、歷史、哲學等方面的訓練。這些知識既古老又現代，並且可以廣泛應用於日常生活中。培訓為學生提供深入的知識和研究技能，以供進一步的學術工作以及涉及漢語使用的教育、公共事務、行政管理、文學研究、媒體、編輯和創意產業的職業發展。中文學科包括四個專業領域，分別是（1）中國語言文學、（2）中國古典與現代文學、（3）中國古典與哲學、以及（4）語言使用與寫作。
歷史文化遺產專業使學生掌握全面、深入的歷史知識，特別是中國歷史知識。它還旨在為學生提供作為具有歷史背景的文化專業人員的必要培訓。歷史旨在為學生提供有關過去事件、記憶、收藏和對過去的解釋的知識。它也訓練學生檢視人類事務中的因果關係，並解決過去塑造當代社會的複雜性。雖然中國歷史是該課程的主要重點，但它也為學生提供與世界歷史和公共歷史相關的課程，以獲取歷史知識以了解其他國家的不同歷史和文化。
歷史作為一門學科正在綜合其他社會科學領域，包括人類學、社會學和經濟學，更不用說文化遺產所屬的文化史了。如果學生沒有相對系統的歷史知識，就很難很好地掌握文化遺產知識。另一方面，將文化遺產置於歷史之中並與歷史一起定位，文化遺產可以為歷史系學生提供文化視角作為回報。該溪流是根據“歷史”和“文化遺產”這兩個不可分割且互動的部分來設計的。

歷史與文化遺產專業提供必要的專業培訓，以培養具有文化視野的高素質歷史相關專業人才和具有歷史知識的文化專業人才。滿足大灣區特別是香港歷史相關行業（包括教育、圖書館、出版、大眾傳媒等）以及文化和遺產相關行業（包括文化旅遊、博物館管理、展覽業、商業畫廊和檔案館、社區遺產項目、娛樂和藝術相關行業、文化創意產業）迅速擴大的勞動力需求。它培養學生成為具有文化素養、有能力管理和行銷文化和遺產、具有廣泛的中國歷史和中國文化遺產，包括香港歷史和文化遺產知識的歷史文化專業人士。它也教育學生了解香港在融合東西方文化方面的獨特地位。為此，該專業也致力於教育學生成為具有高度熟練英語能力的文化專業人士，以弘揚自己的文化和遺產，理解和尊重其他國家的歷史和文化差異。最後但並非最不重要的一點是，歷史及文化遺產組旨在促進歷史及文化和遺產的專業精神，以支持維持香港在文化和遺產相關專業中的領先地位，並就香港作為中國的一部分和國際城市的背景下推廣文化以及保護和保存遺產提供專家意見。
選擇中文和歷史專業的學生將享受到融合兩個流派和我們的跨學科重點的顯著優勢，並可以在畢業後繼續從事廣泛的職業。

d: The Department of English at City University of Hong Kong is an international leader in research on and the teaching of English Studies. The Department is one of the most creative and dynamic English departments in the Asia-Pacific region, and is committed to providing an innovative undergraduate programme that prepares students for their professional careers in: management and administration; editing and publishing; teaching; public relations and advertising; and entertainment and the arts.
The Department currently offers the following major:
• BA English

The programme equips students with theoretical and practical knowledge in English language, literature, and professional communication. Our courses develop students’ ability to analyse critically the English language and its use in a variety of genres, modes, and media. Upon completion of the programme, students will have acquired the skills and attitudes essential for successful communication in linguistically and culturally diverse contexts.

To achieve academic excellence and to promote whole person development, the major adopts a global perspective that emphasises the importance of intercultural knowledge and understanding. All students are encouraged to participate in overseas learning experiences to improve their awareness of intercultural communication and enhance their English communication skills. In addition, internships provide students with valuable experience and skills within professional, academic, and creative contexts.
All students will choose to do either a Research Final Year Project or a Professional English Final Year Project as the capstone experience of their university education.
JS1104.r: BA English is a qualification recognised for exemption from the Language Proficiency Requirement (LPR) (English Language). For details, please visit EDB website. BA English (Language and Literature stream) is listed as one of the Recognised English Major Degree Programmes for the Scholarship for Prospective English Teachers run by the Education Bureau (EDB). Please refer to the EDB website for details. z: 香港城市大學英語系在英語研究和教學方面處於國際領先地位。該係是亞太地區最具創造力和活力的英語系之一，致力於提供創新的本科課程，為學生在以下領域的職業生涯做好準備：管理和行政；編輯和出版；教學;公共關係和廣告；以及娛樂和藝術。
該系目前開設以下專業：
• 英語學士
該課程為學生提供英語語言、文學和專業傳播方面的理論和實踐知識。我們的課程培養學生批判性分析英語及其在各種流派、模式和媒體中的使用的能力。完成課程後，學生將獲得在不同語言和文化背景下成功溝通所需的技能和態度。
為了實現學術卓越並促進全人發展，該專業採用全球視角，強調跨文化知識和理解的重要性。鼓勵所有學生參與海外學習經歷，以提高跨文化交流意識，並提升英語溝通能力。此外，實習為學生提供了專業、學術和創意領域的寶貴經驗和技能。
所有學生都將選擇進行研究期末專案或專業英語期末專案作為大學教育的頂峰經驗。
JS1104.zr: 英語文學學士是公認的可免除語言能力要求 (LPR)（英語語言）的資格。詳情請瀏覽教育局網站。英語文學學士（語言及文學組別）被列為教育局準英語教師獎學金認可英語主修學位課程之一。詳情請參閱教育局網站。有用連結： 聯招申請人的實用資料 申請評估 面試安排 聯招申請人的彈性入學安排 聯招申請人的特別考慮 香港城市大學 香港人才獎學金 城市大學老虎計劃 聯招入學成績參考

d: Housed in the landmark Run Run Shaw Creative Media Centre, the Department of Media and Communication offers innovative academic programmes that focus on media convergence. Unlike traditional curricula that segregate different modes of mass communication, we aim to train professional communicators capable of working in an environment of media convergence and information integration – an environment that spans journalism, broadcasting and TV, advertising, public relations and new media. To that end, we integrate new technologies, media skills, communication theories and creativity in our education.

The Department’s teaching and research activities are supported by a state-of-the-art integrated and inter-compatible digital multimedia platform. Our facilities include digital TV shooting/editing studios, 3D virtual TV/audio recording studios, advertising shooting/design studios, and new media and eye-tracking laboratories.

During their undergraduate studies, our students have many opportunities to travel abroad on study trips, participate in student exchanges and engage in overseas internships. Our graduates are rapidly employed after graduation and enter a wide range of professions and careers, such as media industries, telecommunications, advertising/public relations, and business and education.
The Department currently offers the following two majors:
• BA Digital Television and Broadcasting
• BA Media and Communication
Admission Arrangements

JUPAS applicants will be considered for admission to first-year studies at the Department of Media and Communication. Students will enter a major (current major options: Digital Television and Broadcasting; Media and Communication) after one year of study. The top 40% of students# will have a free choice of majors offered by the Department. The other 60% of students will be allocated a major within the Department, subject to the availability of places and the selection criteria set by individual majors.
# based on CGPA with no failed grades and completion of at least 30 credit units including College/Department required courses

z: 媒體與傳播系坐落於地標建築邵逸夫創意媒體中心，提供專注於媒體融合的創新學術課程。與傳統課程劃分不同大眾傳播模式不同，我們的目標是培養能夠在媒體整合和資訊融合的環境中工作的專業傳播者，即新聞、廣播電視、廣告、公共關係和新媒體的環境。為此，我們將新技術、媒體技能、傳播理論和創造力融入我們的教育中。
該系的教學和研究活動由最先進的整合且相互兼容的數位多媒體平台支援。我們的設施包括數位電視拍攝/編輯工作室、3D虛擬電視/錄音工作室、廣告拍攝/設計工作室以及新媒體和眼動追蹤實驗室。
我校學生在本科學習期間有很多出國遊學、參加學生交流、海外實習的機會。我們的畢業生畢業後迅速就業，進入廣泛的專業和職業領域，如媒體行業、電信、廣告/公共關係、商業和教育。
該系目前開設以下兩個專業：
• 數位電視與廣播文學學士
• 媒體與傳播學士
入學安排
聯招申請者將被考慮入讀媒體與傳播系一年級課程。學生學習一年後將進入專業（目前專業選擇：數位電視與廣播；媒體與傳播）。排名前40%的學生#將可以自由選擇系裡提供的專業。其餘60%的學生將根據名額的情況和各個專業設定的選擇標準，在系內分配一個專業。
# 基於 CGPA，無不及格成績並完成至少 30 個學分，包括學院/系必修課程

d: Short DescriptionUpdated

The Department of Public and International Affairs is a multidisciplinary department with a multinational faculty and a strong international orientation. With faculty members graduating from many of the world’s top universities and with a commitment to leading edge research and high quality teaching, the Department can lay a strong claim to be the leading department in its field in the region.
The Department currently offers the following major:
• BSocSc Public Affairs and Management
This major aims to:
• provide students with a comprehensive education in the common core theories, concepts, and knowledge bases of public policy, public management, and political science;

• enable students to specialize in public policy, public management, or political science for gaining an understanding of the essential theories, principles, dynamics, and analytic approaches of these bodies of knowledge;

• equip students with the theoretical, conceptual, and analytical tools to understand comprehensively public policy, public management, and political developments in Hong Kong, China, and the contemporary global world; and

• produce graduates who can meet effectively the human resources needs of a wide range of public and private sector employers in administrative, management, and policy and political analysis positions, as well as in the media and non-governmental organizations.
BSocSc Public Affairs and Management students are eligible to apply for the following joint degree programme:
• Joint Bachelor's Degree Program between City University of Hong Kong and Columbia University
Direct Admission to Joint Bachelor’s Degree Programme with Columbia University*

Starting in 2026/27, JUPAS applicants can directly apply for Year 1 entry to the prestigious Joint Bachelor’s Degree Programme offered by CityUHK and Columbia University. Graduates will earn degrees from both institutions. A separate application to Columbia University is required after submitting the JUPAS application.
*Only applicable to students of the Public Affairs and Governance streamRemarks:

公共和國際事務係是一個多學科系，擁有多國師資和強烈的國際定位。該系的教職人員畢業於許多世界頂尖大學，並致力於前沿研究和高品質教學，因此可以強有力地宣稱自己是該地區該領域的領先系。
該系目前開設以下專業：
• 社會科學學士公共事務與管理
該專業旨在：
• 為學生提供公共政策、公共管理和政治學共同核心理論、概念和知識基礎的全面教育；
• 使學生能夠專攻公共政策、公共管理或政治學，以了解這些知識體系的基本理論、原則、動態和分析方法；
• 提供學生理論、概念和分析工具，以全面了解中國香港和當代全球世界的公共政策、公共管理和政治發展；和
• 培養的畢業生能夠有效地滿足公共和私部門雇主在行政、管理、政策和政治分析職位以及媒體和非政府組織中的人力資源需求。
社會科學學士公共事務和管理學生有資格申請以下聯合學位課程：
• 香港城市大學與哥倫比亞大學聯合學士課程
直接入讀哥倫比亞大學聯合學士學位課程*

d: This major aims to educate students so that they will become language professionals who are familiar with linguistics and language-related applications. Students will also develop an analytical, critical and creative mind and an open attitude towards people from different cultures.

This major provides students with a solid foundation in the scientific study of human language. Students will be prepared for careers that require language expertise and language-related computing skills. In addition to opportunities in advanced studies, graduates will have employment prospects in education and research, as well as in administrative and executive positions in various public and private sectors. They will have an important role to play in language and information service sectors of Hong Kong, Greater China, and world-wide. Moreover, this major is recognized by the Education Bureau as an English language major degree for the purpose of teaching in Hong Kong.
There are two main subject areas: Linguistics and Language Applications.

• Core courses in Linguistics include: Fundamentals of Linguistics, Introduction to Linguistic Research, Language in Society, Language and Mind, Phonetics, Phonology, Morphology and Syntax, and Semantics and Pragmatics.
• Core courses in Language Applications include: Introduction to Language Technology, Computational Linguistics, and Project 1.

At a more advanced level, students may choose from among courses such as Computational Lexicography, Computer-Assisted Language Learning, Conversation Analysis, Corpus Linguistics, Experimental Phonetics, First/Second Language Acquisition, Psycholinguistics, Sociolinguistics, and Project II.
Participating in the internships and other co-curricular activities offered provides valuable job experience in fields that require knowledge of languages, linguistics, and language applications.
Exchange programmes provide students with opportunities to gain experience of studying and living abroad for a semester, by paying the local tuition fees.

The Department of Linguistics and Translation (LT) also offers two Joint Bachelor's Degree Programmes with National Taiwan University and Columbia University. Students can get 2 degrees by studying two years in LT and two years at a partner university. For detailed information, please visit https://lt.cityu.edu.hk/programmes-courses/cityu-talents-programme-hk-tech-tiger/joint-bachelors-degree-programmes.
Direct Admission to Joint Bachelor’s Degree Programme with Columbia University

Starting in 2026/27, JUPAS applicants can directly apply for Year 1 entry to the prestigious Joint Bachelor’s Degree Programme offered by CityUHK and Columbia University. Graduates will earn degrees from both institutions. A separate application to Columbia University is required after submitting the JUPAS application.

Students may also opt for double majors within CityUHK and major plus minor programme or CityUHK Talents Programme (HK TECH Tiger) https://lt.cityu.edu.hk/programmes-courses/cityu-talents-programme-hk-tech-tiger).

z: 本專業旨在培養學生成為熟悉語言學和語言相關應用的語言專業人士。學生還將培養分析性、批判性和創造性的思維，以及對來自不同文化的人的開放態度。
該專業為學生對人類語言的科學研究奠定了堅實的基礎。學生將為需要語言專業知識和語言相關計算技能的職業做好準備。除了深造的機會外，畢業生還將在教育和研究領域以及各個公共和私營部門的行政和行政職位上擁有就業前景。他們將在香港、大中華區乃至全球的語言和資訊服務領域發揮重要作用。此外，該專業獲得教育局認可為以香港教學為目的的英語語言專業學位。
有兩個主要學科領域：語言學和語言應用。
• 語言學核心課程包括：語言學基礎、語言學研究導論、社會中的語言、語言與心靈、語音學、音韻學、形態學與句法學、語義學與語用學。
• 語言應用核心課程包括：語言科技概論、計算語言學和項目1。
在更高級的層面上，學生可以選擇計算詞典編纂、電腦輔助語言學習、對話分析、語料庫語言學、實驗語音學、第一/第二語言習得、心理語言學、社會語言學和專案 II 等課程。
參加實習和其他課外活動可以在需要語言、語言學和語言應用知識的領域提供寶貴的工作經驗。
交換計畫為學生提供一個學期在國外學習和生活的機會，只需支付當地學費。

語言學與翻譯系（LT）也與國立台灣大學和哥倫比亞大學提供兩個聯合學士學位課程。學生可以透過在 LT 學習兩年並在合作大學學習兩年獲得 2 個學位。欲了解詳細信息，請訪問https://lt.cityu.edu.hk/programmes-courses/cityu-talents-programme-hk-tech-tiger/joint-bachelors- Degree-programmes。
直接入讀哥倫比亞大學聯合學士學位課程
由2026/27學年起，聯招申請者可直接申請入讀香港城市大學與哥倫比亞大學合辦學士學位課程一年級。畢業生將獲得這兩個機構的學位。提交聯招申請後，需另行向哥倫比亞大學提出申請。
學生還可以選擇香港城市大學的雙主修課程和主修加輔修課程或香港城市大學人才計劃（HK TECH Tiger）https://lt.cityu.edu.hk/programmes-courses/cityu-talents-programme-hk-tech-tiger）。

d: The Department of Social and Behavioural Sciences prides itself on a long track record in offering quality learning in academic programmes delivered by a multi-disciplinary team of brilliant and committed scholars who bring real world experience into the learning environment. The mission of the Department is to provide quality learning and professional training in the disciplines of Applied Sociology, Counselling, Crime Science, Psychology, and Social Work, excel in related research areas, and promote the betterment of life. Our faculty and students strive to undertake research that leads to technological, economic and social impact. This research translates into a learning centric environment that promotes inspirational learning, interactive learning and innovative learning.

Crime Science is an interdisciplinary approach for developing practical solutions to real world crime problems. This programme aims to equip students with a comprehensive understanding of this approach, including the use of scientific theories, methods and strategies for preventing crime. With a specific focus on safeguarding the public and upholding Hong Kong's reputation as one of the safest cities globally, this programme offers students the opportunity to contribute to societal progress through innovative approaches. The programme considers the prevention of many forms of both small-scale and transnational organised criminal activity – ranging from residential burglaries to cybercrime. It is ideally suited for practical-minded students with a passion for discovery and a commitment to utilizing scientific analytical methods to benefit society and promote social development.

z: 社會與行為科學係以其在學術課程中提供優質學習的長期記錄而自豪，該團隊由才華橫溢、忠誠的學者組成的多學科團隊提供，他們將現實世界的經驗帶入學習環境。該系的使命是提供應用社會學、諮詢、犯罪科學、心理學和社會工作等學科的優質學習和專業培訓，在相關研究領域取得優異成績，並促進生活的改善。我們的教師和學生努力進行能夠產生技術、經濟和社會影響的研究。這項研究轉化為一個以學習為中心的環境，促進靈感學習、互動學習和創新學習。

犯罪科學是一種跨學科方法，旨在為現實世界的犯罪問題制定實用的解決方案。本課程旨在讓學生全面了解此方法，包括運用科學理論、方法和策略來預防犯罪。該計劃特別注重保護公眾和維護香港作為全球最安全城市之一的聲譽，為學生提供透過創新方法為社會進步做出貢獻的機會。該計劃考慮預防多種形式的小規模和跨國有組織犯罪活動——從入室盜竊到網路犯罪。它非常適合具有探索精神並致力於利用科學分析方法造福社會並促進社會發展的務實學生。

d: Short DescriptionUpdated

The Department of Social and Behavioural Sciences prides itself on a long track record in offering quality learning in academic programmes delivered by a multi-disciplinary team of brilliant and committed scholars who bring real world experience into the learning environment. The mission of the Department is to provide quality learning and professional training in the disciplines of Applied Sociology, Counselling, Crime Science, Psychology, and Social Work, excel in related research areas, and promote the betterment of life. Our faculty and students strive to undertake research that leads to technological, economic and social impact. This research translates into a learning centric environment that promotes inspirational learning, interactive learning and innovative learning.

Psychology is a scientific study of thoughts, feelings, and behaviors. Students are provided with comprehensive education in major fields of psychology, including biological, clinical, cognitive, developmental, educational, health, personality, and social psychology. They are also offered opportunities to design and conduct psychological research.
Why BSocSc Psychology?

The Psychology major provides students with comprehensive training in psychology with an emphasis on experimental and research competencies, and prepares students for professional development in human service careers and advanced training in professional psychology and related fields.
Our programme provides:
• Strong theoretical & scientific training in psychological studies to equip all graduates with essential skills and knowledge to conduct research and to apply learning to daily life
• Individual research project in the final year to work with a faculty
• Lab-based training in eye-tracking system, EEG system, tDCS and TMS system
• Opportunities to work on empirical research under academic staff (e.g., voluntary research schemes)
• Option for students to declare either stream of specialization in Health & Development or Mind & Brain
Key Features
Overseas Experience

Students will be provided with opportunities for overseas exchange, research attachment or internship in a prestigious university/organization (upon fulfilling conditions). This experience is intended to equip psychology students with the expertise for establishing cross-cultural research skills and global professional networks, thus enhancing their competitiveness in further studies and in the international job market.
Individualized Mentorship

Each student will also be provided with individualized mentorship where they will be paired with a faculty member to meet for academic advising in study, internship, and career plan. This individualized mentorship helps closely monitor student learning and progress in the BSSPSY programme.
After graduation, students are eligible:
• To apply for graduate membership of professional associations in Hong Kong Psychological Society (HKPS), British Psychological Society (BPS), and American Psychological Association (APA)

• To pursue advanced training in Master’s or Doctoral level degrees in research & applied psychology, Clinical Psychology, Educational Psychology, Counselling Psychology, and Industrial & Organizational Psychology in local and oversea universities.
Start Your Career Here

Our graduates are particularly suited for people-oriented jobs, such as human resources, public relations, customer services, children and youth services, education and training, counselling and guidance, health-related services, family and community work, etc. Students are also well-prepared for jobs that require strong research skills and competence, critical analysis and communication abilities, such as scientific or applied research, research and development, project management and so on. Students who aspire to practice as professional psychologists will be able to pursue advanced education at the Master's or doctoral level in Hong Kong or overseas with training in pursuing scientific research or applied psychological training such as health, forensic, clinical, educational, counselling and occupational psychology.
Professional Recognition

Graduates who satisfy the requirements stipulated by the Hong Kong Psychological Society (HKPS) can apply for Graduate Membership of the Society (Note: Graduate Membership of the HKPS is normally regarded as an entrance requirement for advanced training in professional psychology).
Joint Bachelor's Degree Programme

BSocSc Psychology students are also eligible to apply for the Joint Bachelor’s Degree Program between City University of Hong Kong and Columbia University. Students study at CityUHK in year 1 and 2, and at Columbia University, New York, USA in year 3 and 4. Two bachelor’s degrees will be awarded, one awarded by CityUHK and one awarded by Columbia University.
Flagship Programme

This is one of the CityUHK’s Flagship Programmes, which equip students with essential knowledge and skills, cultivate their global leadership abilities, and connect them with leading professionals. The Flagship Scholarships, which cover tuition and hall fees, a guaranteed berth, and a one-off exchange sponsorship of up to HK$500,000, will be awarded to local JUPAS talents who meet the criteria.
Direct Admission to Joint Bachelor’s Degree Programme with Columbia University

Starting in 2026/27, JUPAS applicants can directly apply for Year 1 entry to the prestigious Joint Bachelor’s Degree Programme offered by CityUHK and Columbia University. Graduates will earn degrees from both institutions. A separate application to Columbia University is required after submitting the JUPAS application.

社會與行為科學係以其在學術課程中提供優質學習的長期記錄而自豪，該團隊由才華橫溢、忠誠的學者組成的多學科團隊提供，他們將現實世界的經驗帶入學習環境。該系的使命是提供應用社會學、諮詢、犯罪科學、心理學和社會工作等學科的優質學習和專業培訓，在相關研究領域取得優異成績，並促進生活的改善。我們的教師和學生努力進行能夠產生技術、經濟和社會影響的研究。這項研究轉化為一個以學習為中心的環境，促進靈感學習、互動學習和創新學習。
心理學是一門關於思想、情感和行為的科學研究。為學生提供心理學主要領域的全面教育，包括生物心理學、臨床心理學、認知心理學、發展心理學、教育心理學、健康心理學、人格心理學和社會心理學。他們也獲得設計和進行心理學研究的機會。
為什麼選擇社會科學學士心理學？
心理學專業為學生提供以實驗和研究能力為重點的全面心理學訓練，為學生在人類服務職業中的專業發展以及專業心理學及相關領域的高級培訓做好準備。
我們的計劃提供：
• 心理學研究的強大理論和科學培訓，使所有畢業生具備進行研究並將所學應用到日常生活中的基本技能和知識
• 最後一年與教師合作的個人研究項目
• 眼動追蹤系統、EEG 系統、tDCS 和 TMS 系統的實驗室培訓
• 在學術人員的指導下從事實證研究的機會（例如，自願研究計劃）
• 學生可以選擇選擇健康與發展或思考與大腦專業方向
主要特點
海外經歷
學生將獲得海外交流、研究實習或著名大學/機構實習的機會（在符合條件的情況下）。這項經驗旨在讓心理學學生具備建立跨文化研究技能和全球專業網絡的專業知識，從而增強他們在進一步學習和國際就業市場上的競爭力。
個性化指導
每個學生還將獲得個人化的指導，他們將與一名教職人員配對，在學習、實習和職業規劃方面提供學術建議。這種個人化的指導有助於密切監控學生在 BSSPSY 計畫中的學習和進步。
畢業後，學生有資格：
• 申請成為香港心理學會（HKPS）、英國心理學會（BPS）和美國心理學會（APA）專業協會的研究生會員
• 在本地和海外大學攻讀研究與應用心理學、臨床心理學、教育心理學、諮商心理學以及工業與組織心理學的碩士或博士學位高級培訓。
在這裡開始你的職業生涯
我們的畢業生特別適合以人為本的工作，如人力資源、公共關係、客戶服務、兒童和青少年服務、教育和培訓、諮詢和指導、健康相關服務、家庭和社區工作等。學生也為需要強大研究技能和能力、批判性分析和溝通能力的工作做好了充分準備，如科學或應用研究、研究與發展、專案管理等。立志成為專業心理學家的學生，可在香港或海外攻讀碩士或博士學位，接受科學研究或應用心理學培訓，如健康、法醫、臨床、教育、諮商和職業心理學。
專業認可
符合香港心理學會（HKPS）規定要求的畢業生可申請成為該會的研究生會員（註：HKPS的研究生會員通常被視為專業心理學高級培訓的入學條件）。
聯合學士學位課程
社會科學學士心理學學生亦有資格申請香港城市大學與哥倫比亞大學聯合學士課程。學生第一年和第二年在香港城市大學學習，第三年和第四年在美國紐約哥倫比亞大學學習。學生將獲得兩個學士學位，一個由香港城市大學頒發，一個由哥倫比亞大學頒發。
旗艦計劃
這是香港城市大學的旗艦課程之一，旨在為學生提供必要的知識和技能，培養他們的全球領導能力，並將他們與領先的專業人士聯繫起來。旗艦獎學金將頒發給符合資格的本地聯招人才，涵蓋學費和宿舍費、保證床位以及高達港幣50萬的一次性交換生贊助。
直接入讀哥倫比亞大學聯合學士學位課程
由2026/27學年起，聯招申請者可直接申請入讀香港城市大學與哥倫比亞大學合辦學士學位課程一年級。畢業生將獲得這兩個機構的學位。提交聯招申請後，需另行向哥倫比亞大學提出申請。

d: The Department of Social and Behavioural Sciences prides itself on a long track record in offering quality learning in academic programmes delivered by a multi-disciplinary team of brilliant and committed scholars who bring real world experience into the learning environment. The mission of the Department is to provide quality learning and professional training in the disciplines of Applied Sociology, Counselling, Crime Science, Psychology, and Social Work, excel in related research areas, and promote the betterment of life. Our faculty and students strive to undertake research that leads to technological, economic and social impact. This research translates into a learning centric environment that promotes inspirational learning, interactive learning and innovative learning.

Social Work is a helping profession to promote human and community well-being, with a commitment to upholding human dignity, social equality, and diversity. It aims to enable students to evaluate and align personal values with the value base of the social work profession, and acquire knowledge, skills, understanding, and practice competence in the profession. Throughout the course of study, students will receive solid foundation training in social sciences and social work related to their professional practice.

z: 社會與行為科學係以其在學術課程中提供優質學習的長期記錄而自豪，該團隊由才華橫溢、忠誠的學者組成的多學科團隊提供，他們將現實世界的經驗帶入學習環境。該系的使命是提供應用社會學、諮詢、犯罪科學、心理學和社會工作等學科的優質學習和專業培訓，在相關研究領域取得優異成績，並促進生活的改善。我們的教師和學生努力進行能夠產生技術、經濟和社會影響的研究。這項研究轉化為一個以學習為中心的環境，促進靈感學習、互動學習和創新學習。
社會工作是一個促進人類和社區福祉的幫助性職業，致力於維護人類尊嚴、社會平等和多樣性。它旨在使學生能夠評估個人價值觀並將其與社會工作專業的價值基礎相結合，並獲得專業知識、技能、理解和實踐能力。在整個學習過程中，學生將接受與其專業實踐相關的社會科學和社會工作的堅實基礎培訓。

d: This GREAT option aims to nurture students who are interested in pursuing a career in scientific research or starting business ventures that involve the use of new scientific discoveries and innovative technologies. Students will be admitted to the College of Science and study a tailored common first-year curriculum. After one year of study, students will have a free choice of GREAT streams offered by the Departments of Chemistry, Mathematics and Physics.
Admission Arrangements

JUPAS applicants will be considered for admission to first-year studies at the College of Science. Students will have a free choice of their preferred research discipline offered by our departments after one year of study. The GREAT streams are designed for students who have a good and solid foundation in Chemistry / Mathematics / Physics. The three research stream options are:
• BSc Chemistry (stream: GREAT)
• BSc Computing Mathematics (stream: GREAT)
• BSc Physics (stream: GREAT)
Flagship Programme

This is one of the CityUHK’s Flagship Programmes, which equip students with essential knowledge and skills, cultivate their global leadership abilities, and connect them with leading professionals. The Flagship Scholarships, which cover tuition and hall fees, a guaranteed berth, and a one-off exchange sponsorship of up to HK$500,000, will be awarded to local JUPAS talents who meet the criteria.

z: 這個偉大的選擇旨在培養有興趣從事科學研究或創業，涉及使用新的科學發現和創新技術的學生。學生將被科學學院錄取並學習量身定制的一年級通用課程。經過一年的學習，學生將可以自由選擇化學系、數學系和物理系所提供的優秀課程。
入學安排
聯招申請者將被考慮入讀理學院一年級課程。學習一年後，學生可以自由選擇我們系所提供的自己喜歡的研究學科。 GREAT 課程專為在化學/數學/物理方面擁有良好且紮實基礎的學生而設計。三個研究方向選項為：
• 化學理學士（分類：優）
• 計算數學理學士（學派：優）
• 物理理學士（類別：優）
旗艦計劃
這是香港城市大學的旗艦課程之一，旨在為學生提供必要的知識和技能，培養他們的全球領導能力，並將他們與領先的專業人士聯繫起來。旗艦獎學金將頒發給符合資格的本地聯招人才，涵蓋學費和宿舍費、保證床位以及高達港幣50萬的一次性交換生贊助。

d: The Department of Chemistry offers one undergraduate major, BSc in Chemistry. This major focuses on the application of knowledge, enabling students to understand important scientific issues, current technologies and the future challenges facing Hong Kong, its immediate region and the world.

The major aims to provide students with a firm foundation in chemical sciences with a focus on analytical chemistry, environmental chemistry, inorganic chemistry, organic chemistry and physical chemistry. It is designed to train and produce graduates who are able to pursue a developing career in local and regional industrial, commercial, government, education, and research sectors.
Four stream options for students to choose from:
• Comprehensive Chemistry (accredited by the Royal Society of Chemistry (RSC))
• Cosmetic Chemistry
• Forensic Chemistry
• Global Research Enrichment and Technopreneurship (GREAT)
Talented students can select one of the programmes to complete two degrees with an accelerated pace:
• Undergraduate plus Taught Postgraduate Degree Programme; or
• Joint Bachelor’s Degree Programme with the University of Manchester

z: 化學系開設1個本科專業，化學學士。此專業注重知識的應用，讓學生了解重要的科學問題、當前技術以及香港、週邊地區和世界未來面臨的挑戰。
該專業旨在為學生提供化學科學的堅實基礎，重點關注分析化學、環境化學、無機化學、有機化學和物理化學。它旨在培養和培養能夠在當地和地區工業、商業、政府、教育和研究部門尋求職業發展的畢業生。
四個串流選項供學生選擇：
• 綜合化學（經英國皇家化學學會（RSC）認可）
• 化妝品化學
• 法醫化學
• 全球研究豐富與科技創業（優）
有才華的學生可以選擇其中一個課程來加速完成兩個學位：
• 本科加授課型研究生學位課程；或者
• 與曼徹斯特大學聯合學士學位課程

d: The Bachelor of Science in Computing Mathematics programme was introduced in 1994. This major is unique in Hong Kong. It emphasizes the balance between theories and their applications to practical problems, with a special focus on applied mathematics linked to computational aspects.

The major aim at equipping students and producing graduates with a strong background in data analysis, mathematical modelling, scientific computing and technical computer software. Students are trained to think quantitatively and analyse problems critically. Our graduates contribute to the commercial, financial and industrial sectors in Hong Kong and throughout Greater China. The programme focuses on linking the applied areas of mathematics and computing.
BSc Computing Mathematics students are eligible to apply for the following joint degree programmes:
Joint Bachelor's Degree Program between City University of Hong Kong and Columbia University
Joint Bachelor's Degree Program between City University of Hong Kong and The University of Edinburgh
Direct Admission to Joint Bachelor’s Degree Programme with Columbia University

Starting in 2026/27, JUPAS applicants can directly apply for Year 1 entry to the prestigious Joint Bachelor’s Degree Programme offered by CityUHK and Columbia University. Graduates will earn degrees from both institutions. A separate application to Columbia University is required after submitting the JUPAS application.

z: 電腦數學理學士課程​​於1994年開辦，此專業在香港獨一無二。它強調理論及其對實際問題的應用之間的平衡，特別關注與計算方面相關的應用數學。
該專業旨在為學生和畢業生提供數據分析、數學建模、科學計算和技術電腦軟體的強大背景。學生接受的訓練是定量思考和批判性分析問題。我們的畢業生為香港乃至整個大中華區的商業、金融和工業領域做出貢獻。該計劃側重於將數學和計算的應用領域聯繫起來。
電腦數學理學士學生有資格申請以下聯合學位課程：
香港城市大學與哥倫比亞大學聯合學士課程
香港城市大學與愛丁堡大學聯合學士課程
直接入讀哥倫比亞大學聯合學士學位課程
由2026/27學年起，聯招申請者可直接申請入讀香港城市大學與哥倫比亞大學合辦學士學位課程一年級。畢業生將獲得這兩個機構的學位。提交聯招申請後，需另行向哥倫比亞大學提出申請。

d: The BSc Physics programme covers fundamental topics in physics and specialised topics such as financial engineering, biophysics, medical physics, computational physics, and optics, leading to diverse career paths in medical and healthcare, engineering, education, commercial and industrial sectors. Graduates also have the opportunity to pursue postgraduate studies. In addition, students may take part in the research attachment scheme, which provides them with early exposure to discovery and innovation.
BSc Physics students are eligible to apply for the following degree programme options under the Talents Programme (HK TECH Tiger):
• Joint Bachelor's Degree Program between City University of Hong Kong and Columbia University
• Undergraduate plus Taught Postgraduate Degree Programme (BSc Physics + MSc Applied Physics)
Direct Admission to Joint Bachelor’s Degree Programme with Columbia University

Starting in 2026/27, JUPAS applicants can directly apply for Year 1 entry to the prestigious Joint Bachelor’s Degree Programme offered by CityUHK and Columbia University. Graduates will earn degrees from both institutions. A separate application to Columbia University is required after submitting the JUPAS application.

z: 物理學理學士課程​​涵蓋物理學的基礎主題和金融工程、生物物理學、醫學物理學、計算物理學和光學等專業主題，為醫療保健、工程、教育、商業和工業領域帶來多樣化的職業道路。畢業生還有機會攻讀研究生課程。此外，學生可以參加研究實習計劃，這使他們能夠儘早接觸發現和創新。
物理理學士學生有資格申請人才計劃（HK TECH Tiger）下的以下學位課程選擇：
• 香港城市大學與哥倫比亞大學聯合學士課程
• 本科加授課式研究生學位課程（物理學學士 + 應用物理學理學碩士）
直接入讀哥倫比亞大學聯合學士學位課程
由2026/27學年起，聯招申請者可直接申請入讀香港城市大學與哥倫比亞大學合辦學士學位課程一年級。畢業生將獲得這兩個機構的學位。提交聯招申請後，需另行向哥倫比亞大學提出申請。

d: The BVM Programme has been internationally accredited by both the Australasian Veterinary Boards Council (AVBC) and the Royal College of Veterinary Surgeons (RCVS). Our BVM Programme is the only programme in Asia to be directly accredited by AVBC and RCVS.

With dual accreditation of our BVM Programme by AVBC and RCVS, our graduates can register to practise in Hong Kong, the United Kingdom, Australia and New Zealand or any other country recognising one of these bodies, without the need to sit further examinations. For further information, please refer to the JCC website.
Flagship Programme

This is one of the CityUHK’s Flagship Programmes, which equip students with essential knowledge and skills, cultivate their global leadership abilities, and connect them with leading professionals. The Flagship Scholarships, which cover tuition and hall fees, a guaranteed berth, and a one-off exchange sponsorship of up to HK$500,000, will be awarded to local JUPAS talents who meet the criteria.

z: BVM 計劃已獲得澳洲獸醫委員會理事會 (AVBC) 和皇家獸醫學院 (RCVS) 的國際認可。我們的 BVM 專案是亞洲唯一獲得 AVBC 和 RCVS 直接認證的專案。
我們的 BVM 課程獲得 AVBC 和 RCVS 的雙重認證，我們的畢業生可以註冊在香港、英國、澳洲和紐西蘭或認可這些機構之一的任何其他國家執業，而無需參加進一步的考試。欲了解更多信息，請參閱 JCC 網站。
旗艦計劃
這是香港城市大學的旗艦課程之一，旨在為學生提供必要的知識和技能，培養他們的全球領導能力，並將他們與領先的專業人士聯繫起來。旗艦獎學金將頒發給符合資格的本地聯招人才，涵蓋學費和宿舍費、保證床位以及高達港幣50萬的一次性交換生贊助。

d: Short DescriptionUpdated

The CREATE stream aims to nurture top-level talented and motivated students who are keen to develop their artistic excellence. Students admitted to this stream will take 3 extra credits mentoring course Leadership & Creativity that is exclusively tailored to foster creative leadership. They will also involve substantial international exposure and professional mentoring training during their study.
Students enrolled to the CREATE stream will be attached to either the School-based programme or any of the major after major declaration.
BA Creative Media and BAS New Media students are eligible to apply for the following joint degree programme:
• Joint Bachelor's Degree Programme between City University of Hong Kong and Leuphana University
Admission Arrangements

JUPAS applicants can choose either the School-based programme or any of the majors: Creative Media (BA); Creative Media (BSc); New Media (BAS) at the beginning of Year 1, or declare their majors at the end of Year 1, and be enrolled on the CREATE stream.
Flagship Programme

This is one of the CityUHK’s Flagship Programmes, which equip students with essential knowledge and skills, cultivate their global leadership abilities, and connect them with leading professionals. The Flagship Scholarships, which cover tuition and hall fees, a guaranteed berth, and a one-off exchange sponsorship of up to HK$500,000, will be awarded to local JUPAS talents who meet the criteria.

CREATE課程旨在培養有才華、積極進取、熱衷於發展藝術卓越的頂尖學生。被該類別錄取的學生將額外修讀 3 個學分的領導力與創造力輔導課程，該課程專為培養創造性領導力而量身定制。他們在學習期間也將參與大量的國際接觸和專業指導培訓。
註冊 CREATE 流的學生將在專業聲明後附加到校本課程或任何專業。

d: The School of Creative Media (SCM) is the region's pioneering institution, first of its kind, dedicated to nurturing the next generation of interdisciplinary artists and creative media professionals. Our mission is to inspire innovative ideas and technologies that will shape the creative industries in Hong Kong, mainland China, across the world.

At SCM, students receive comprehensive training that spans various fields, including computer science, fine arts, visual design, creative writing, cultural studies, and digital technology. We bridge the boundaries between art and science and integrate traditional and new media. We value applied creativity, cultural awareness and critical thinking as much as business sense and entrepreneurial success.

Our internationally recruited faculty members are among the foremost artists and researchers in the field, bringing a global perspective and forging many institutional partnerships for the School. Our graduates consistently demonstrate high employability, with the majority now working as independent artists and professionals in the creative industries, film, television, advertising, publishing, media production and information technology. Many have won prestigious international and local awards for creative and technical innovation.

With strengths arising from a unique mix of East and West, Hong Kong has seen a major expansion in its creative economy and has emerged as a thriving hub of new media culture in Asia and the world. The CityUHK School of Creative Media has played an instrumental role in this development as the leading force in creative media education and research in Hong Kong.
BA Creative Media and BAS New Media students are eligible to apply for the following joint degree programme:
• Joint Bachelor's Degree Programme between City University of Hong Kong and Leuphana University
Admission Arrangements

JUPAS applicants will be considered for admission to first-year studies at the School of Creative Media. Students will have a free choice of majors [current major options: Creative Media (BA); Creative Media (BSc); New Media (BAS)] offered by the School after one year of study.

z: 創意媒體學院（SCM）是該地區首個此類機構，致力於培養下一代跨學科藝術家和創意媒體專業人士。我們的使命是激發創新理念和技術，塑造香港、中國大陸甚至世界各地的創意產業。
在SCM，學生接受跨越各個領域的全面培訓，包括電腦科學、美術、視覺設計、創意寫作、文化研究和數位技術。我們彌合藝術與科學之間的界限，整合傳統媒體與新媒體。我們重視應用創造力、文化意識和批判性思維，就像商業意識和創業成功一樣。
我們在國際上招募的教職人員都是該領域最重要的藝術家和研究人員，他們為學院帶來了全球視野並建立了許多機構合作夥伴關係。我們的畢業生始終表現出很高的就業能力，其中大多數現在是創意產業、電影、電視、廣告、出版、媒體製作和資訊科技領域的獨立藝術家和專業人士。許多人因創意和技術創新而贏得了享有盛譽的國際和當地獎項。
憑藉著東西方獨特融合的優勢，香港的創意經濟大幅擴張，並成為亞洲乃至世界蓬勃發展的新媒體文化中心。香港城市大學創意媒體學院作為香港創意媒體教育和研究的主導力量，在這一發展中發揮了重要作用。
BA創意媒體和BAS新媒體學生有資格申請以下聯合學位課程：
• 香港城市大學與Leuphana大學聯合學士課程
入學安排
聯招申請者將被考慮入讀創意媒體學院一年級課程。學生可以自由選擇專業【目前專業選擇：創意媒體（BA）；創意媒體（理學學士）；新媒體（BAS）]由學院經過一年的學習後開設。

d: This major is an innovative programme that advocates inter-medial creative practices. The programme fuses art, culture and media technology, covering a wide range of subjects such as cinema, animation, photography, sound, installation, interactive media, video games and new media art. The curriculum strongly focuses on applied learning and integrated training in creativity and technology. Students are expected to develop professional competency and creative and critical thinking via hands-on learning and studio practice.

This major is designed to train creative talents and practitioners who not only possess cultural sensibility but are also equipped with strong technological literacy, ready and adaptable for the cultural sphere, creative industries and media sector of the 21st century.
BA Creative Media students are eligible to apply for the following joint degree programme:
• Joint Bachelor's Degree Programme between City University of Hong Kong and Leuphana University

z: 本專業是一門提倡跨媒體創意實踐的創新項目。該項目融合了藝術、文化和媒體技術，涵蓋電影、動畫、攝影、聲音、裝置、互動媒體、電玩遊戲和新媒體藝術等廣泛學科。本課程重點在於應用學習以及創造力和技術的綜合培訓。學生應透過實踐學習和工作室實踐來培養專業能力以及創造性和批判性思維。
本專業旨在培養既具有文化敏感性，也具有較強技術素養，適應21世紀文化領域、創意產業和傳媒領域的創意人才和從業人員。
創意媒體文學學士學生有資格申請以下聯合學位課程：

d: Short DescriptionUpdated

This major produces creative media professionals who are proficient in computing technology. It combines core courses from the School of Creative Media and the Department of Computer Science to produce graduates who are able to bridge the gap between the technical and artistic sides of the media field.

Students also gain a solid foundation in creative processes, including video, sound, photography, storytelling, game design, animation, computer graphics, installation and interactive digital media production. Graduates use the latest computing and media technologies in the creation of various media including computer games, UI/UX, animation, special effects, sound, wireless and mobile media, internet application, virtual/augmented/mixed reality and interactive installation.

該專業培養精通計算技術的創意媒體專業人士。它結合了創意媒體學院和電腦科學系的核心課程，培養能夠彌合媒體領域技術和藝術方面差距的畢業生。

d: Media creators are increasingly using scientific concepts in their work. Games, for instance, use ideas from physics, biology and mathematics. Multimedia artists are also learning to collaborate with scientists when producing their work. This ground-breaking major is a response to this cutting-edge trend in the creative world.

This major emphasises lateral thinking and understanding across professions to prepare graduates for an increasingly interdependent and integrated world. Students use technology as an artistic medium, generating learning in a progressive and interdisciplinary context that bridges art, science, technology and the humanities. The curriculum encourages creative and critical thinking in the domain of digital content, together with the successful expression of a socially engaged personal vision through various digital media formats. Graduates receive professional training in state-of-the-art facilities to prepare them for future careers in the use of art, science and technology in the creative industries, innovative education and cultural management.
This major is especially designed for students who are not afraid to break down the barriers between the arts and the sciences.
BAS New Media students are eligible to apply for the following joint degree programme:
Joint Bachelor's Degree Programme between City University of Hong Kong and Leuphana University

z: 媒體創作者在他們的工作中越來越多地使用科學概念。例如，遊戲就使用了物理、生物學和數學的想法。多媒體藝術家在創作作品時也正在學習與科學家合作。這個開創性的專業是對創意界這一前沿趨勢的回應。
該專業強調跨專業的橫向思維和理解，讓畢業生為日益相互依賴和一體化的世界做好準備。學生使用科技作為藝術媒介，在進步和跨學科的背景下學習，連結藝術、科學、技術和人文學科。該課程鼓勵數位內容領域的創造性和批判性思維，以及透過各種數位媒體格式成功表達社會參與的個人願景。畢業生在最先進的設施中接受專業培訓，為他們未來在創意產業、創新教育和文化管理中運用藝術、科學和技術的職業做好準備。
該專業是專為那些敢於打破藝術與科學之間障礙的學生而設計的。
BAS新媒體學生有資格申請以下聯合學位課程：
香港城市大學與Leuphana大學聯合學士課程

d: The INSPIRE programme offers a comprehensive and globally focused education in energy and environmental engineering. It expands on the existing Energy Science and Engineering (ESE) and Environmental Science and Engineering (EVE) programmes by incorporating enhanced overseas study experiences, internships, research components, mentorship support and entrepreneurial training. Students will benefit from the specialized existing curriculum in energy, environment and sustainability, along with extensive training in global perspectives, innovative mindset and research. The INSPIRE programme aims to prepare students for success in the field and contributes to sustainable development.
Flagship Programme

This is one of the CityUHK’s Flagship Programmes, which equip students with essential knowledge and skills, cultivate their global leadership abilities, and connect them with leading professionals. The Flagship Scholarships, which cover tuition and hall fees, a guaranteed berth, and a one-off exchange sponsorship of up to HK$500,000, will be awarded to local JUPAS talents who meet the criteria.

z: INSPIRE 計畫提供全面且面向全球的能源和環境工程教育。它透過整合增強的海外學習經驗、實習、研究部分、指導支援和創業培訓，擴展了現有的能源科學與工程（ESE）和環境科學與工程（EVE）計畫。學生將受益於能源、環境和永續發展的專業現有課程，以及全球視角、創新思維和研究方面的廣泛培訓。 INSPIRE 計畫旨在幫助學生為在該領域取得成功做好準備，並為永續發展做出貢獻。
旗艦計劃
這是香港城市大學的旗艦課程之一，旨在為學生提供必要的知識和技能，培養他們的全球領導能力，並將他們與領先的專業人士聯繫起來。旗艦獎學金將頒發給符合資格的本地聯招人才，涵蓋學費和宿舍費、保證床位以及高達港幣50萬的一次性交換生贊助。

d: The School of Energy and Environment (SEE) performs cutting-edge research and provides professional education in energy- and environment-related issues. The School is designed to tackle interactive relationship between energy and environment through the development of new scientific understanding and new technologies as well as the training of new professionals with broad knowledge in the areas of energy and environment.

We have a highly internationalised and experienced faculty from various countries specialising in atmospheric and climate science, biological science, chemistry, chemical engineering, energy economics, environmental engineering, environmental policy, mechanical engineering and materials science. SEE endeavours to produce a new breed of engineers and professionals capable of solving energy and environmental problems.
We currently offer the following majors:
• Bachelor of Engineering in Energy Science and Engineering
• Bachelor of Engineering in Environmental Science and Engineering

Students start with a common year of foundation study. The content of our programmes covers a wide spectrum of areas, allowing students to explore knowledge in a number of environments. At the beginning of their studies, they develop a broad scientific foundation by studying courses in basic science, covering mathematics, computer science, physics, chemistry and biology before they are guided through an in-depth exploration of environment and energy issues. Students declare their majors after completing the foundation courses in the first year.
Admission Arrangements

JUPAS applicants will be considered for admission to first-year studies at the School of Energy and Environment. Students will enter a major (current major options: Energy Science and Engineering; Environmental Science and Engineering) after one year of study. The top 40% of students# will have a free choice of majors offered by the School. The other 60% of students will be allocated a major within the School, subject to the availability of places and the selection criteria set by individual majors.
# based on CGPA with no failed grades and completion of at least 30 credit units including School required courses

z: 能源與環境學院（SEE）進行前沿研究並提供能源和環境相關議題的專業教育。該學院旨在透過發展新的科學認識和新技術以及培訓在能源和環境領域具有廣泛知識的新專業人員來解決能源與環境之間的互動關係。
我們擁有一支高度國際化、經驗豐富的師資隊伍，來自不同國家，專業領域包括大氣與氣候科學、生物科學、化學、化學工程、能源經濟學、環境工程、環境政策、機械工程和材料科學。阿拉善SEE致力於培養能夠解決能源和環境問題的新型工程師和專業人才。
我們目前提供以下專業：
• 能源科學與工程學士學位
• 環境科學與工程學士學位
學生從共同的一年基礎學習開始。我們的課程內容涵蓋廣泛的領域，使學生能夠在多種環境中探索知識。在學習之初，他們透過學習基礎科學課程（涵蓋數學、電腦科學、物理、化學和生物學）打下廣泛的科學基礎，然後深入探索環境和能源議題。學生在完成第一年的基礎課程後即可申報專業。
入學安排
聯招申請者將被考慮入讀能源與環境學院一年級課程。學生學習一年後進入主修（目前專業選擇：能源科學與工程；環境科學與工程）。排名前40%的學生#將可以自由選擇學校提供的專業。其餘60%的學生將根據名額的情況和各個專業設定的選擇標準，在學院內分配一個專業。
# 基於 CGPA，無不及格成績並完成至少 30 個學分，包括學校必修課程

d: The Bachelor of Science in Environment and Sustainable Business is a four-year undergraduate programme jointly offered by the School of Energy and Environment (SEE) and the College of Business (CB). This programme is designed to equip students with strong foundations in environmental science and technologies, and business knowledge to tackle climate change-related challenges and to achieve sustainability goals. At the same time, the students will stay abreast with the latest trends and technologies, including renewable energy integration and circular economy initiatives, that underpin investment decision-making for sustainable finance. Distinguished industry experts, hailing from prominent organizations in Hong Kong, will share their expertise through guest lectures, fostering experiential learning and industry connections. Students will actively participate in real-world sustainable business projects, cultivating practical skills in sustainability assessment, Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) integration, and impact investing. Graduates of the programme will possess a comprehensive understanding of sustainability in practice, equipped to navigate the challenges and seize the business opportunities created by more climate change related regulations and policies.

z: 環境與永續商業理學士課程​​是由能源與環境學院（SEE）和商學院（CB）共同開設的四年制學士課程。該計劃旨在為學生提供堅實的環境科學和技術基礎以及商業知識，以應對與氣候變遷相關的挑戰並實現永續發展目標。同時，學生將了解最新的趨勢和技術，包括再生能源整合和循環經濟舉措，這些都是永續金融投資決策的基礎。來自香港知名組織的傑出行業專家將透過客座講座分享他們的專業知識，促進體驗式學習和行業聯繫。學生將積極參與現實世界的永續商業項目，培養永續發展評估、環境、社會和治理（ESG）整合以及影響力投資方面的實務技能。該計畫的畢業生將對實踐中的永續發展有全面的了解，有能力應對挑戰並抓住更多與氣候變遷相關的法規和政策所創造的商機。

d: The School of Law aspires to be an internationally renowned centre for legal research and teaching in the Asia-Pacific region. The School's mission is to provide students with an excellent education and to contribute to the advancement of knowledge. Through cooperation with other law schools and professional organisations, the School aims to foster an environment in which both students and staff can develop and use their legal knowledge, professional skills and expertise for the benefit of the entire Hong Kong community.

The Bachelor of Laws (LLB) programme is delivered over four years and emphasises the acquisition and development of wide-ranging legal and intellectual skills. Learning and teaching are interactive and aligned with intended learning outcomes. Students are trained to apply laws and legal principles to solve real-life problems. The LLB programme provides a firm foundation for a career in law and law-related fields, public service and post-graduate studies in Hong Kong and overseas.

Students receive a well-rounded legal education from our staff, all of whom are distinguished teachers and scholars from Hong Kong, the Chinese Mainland, the UK, Australia, India, Malaysia, etc. In addition, students have the opportunity to be taught by visiting faculty from law schools all around the world.

Our LLB programme guides students to develop the skills, knowledge and attitude required to put them within the best and brightest minds applying for jobs in law, business, civil service, banking and other fields.
Flagship Programme

This is one of the CityUHK’s Flagship Programmes, which equip students with essential knowledge and skills, cultivate their global leadership abilities, and connect them with leading professionals. The Flagship Scholarships, which cover tuition and hall fees, a guaranteed berth, and a one-off exchange sponsorship of up to HK$500,000, will be awarded to local JUPAS talents who meet the criteria.

z: 法學院立志成為亞太地區國際知名的法律研究與教學中心。學校的使命是為學生提供優質的教育並為知識的進步做出貢獻。透過與其他法學院和專業組織合作，學院旨在創造一個環境，​​讓學生和教職員能夠發展和運用他們的法律知識、專業技能和專業知識，造福整個香港社會。

The Bachelor of Laws (LLB) programme is delivered over four years and emphasises the acquisition and development of wide-ranging legal and intellectual skills.學習和教學是互動的，並與預期的學習成果保持一致。學生接受訓練應用法律和法律原則來解決現實生活中的問題。 The LLB programme provides a firm foundation for a career in law and law-related fields, public service and post-graduate studies in Hong Kong and overseas.
我們的教職員都是來自香港、中國內地、英國、澳洲、印度、馬來西亞等地的傑出教師和學者，學生可以接受全面的法律教育。此外，學生還有機會接受來自世界各地法學院的客座教授的授課。
我們的法學學士學位課程指導學生培養所需的技能、知識和態度，使他們成為申請法律、商業、公務員、銀行和其他領域工作的最優秀和最聰明的人才。
旗艦計劃
這是香港城市大學的旗艦課程之一，旨在為學生提供必要的知識和技能，培養他們的全球領導能力，並將他們與領先的專業人士聯繫起來。旗艦獎學金將頒發給符合資格的本地聯招人才，涵蓋學費和宿舍費、保證床位以及高達港幣50萬的一次性交換生贊助。

d: As the demand for professionals with expertise in environmental engineering, green finance, and Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) continues to rise, it has become increasingly apparent that there is a shortage of local financial professionals with expertise in ESG. Given Hong Kong’s strength as an international financial centre, it is imperative to further establish its status as a preferred ESG investment hub. Investors will likely shift their priority to companies with high ESG performance and commitment towards carbon neutrality. Moreover, areas like green finance and carbon emission trading are gaining importance in the financial field.

Therefore, the School of Energy and Environment (SEE), in collaboration with the Department of Economics and Finance, offers the double degree programme, the Bachelor of Engineering in Environmental Science and Engineering and Bachelor of Business Administration in Finance. Through this double degree programme, students will receive a rigorous and comprehensive education in both environmental engineering and finance. They will acquire the necessary skills and knowledge to address the challenges of sustainable finance, not just in Hong Kong but also in the global context. By bridging the gap between these two fields, graduates of this programme will be well-prepared to tackle complex sustainability issues from a multidisciplinary perspective.

z: 隨著對環境工程、綠色金融、環境、社會和治理（ESG）專業人才的需求持續上升，本地具有ESG專業知識的金融專業人才短缺的情況日益明顯。鑑於香港作為國際金融中心的實力，有必要進一步確立其作為首選ESG投資中心的地位。投資者可能會優先考慮 ESG 績效高且致力於碳中和的公司。此外，綠色金融、碳排放交易等領域在金融領域的重要性日益凸顯。
因此，能源與環境學院與經濟與金融系合作，開設環境科學與工程工學士和金融學工商管理學士雙學位課程。透過這個雙學位課程，學生將接受環境工程和金融方面嚴格而全面的教育。他們將獲得必要的技能和知識，以應對永續金融的挑戰，不僅在香港，而且在全球範圍內。透過彌合這兩個領域之間的差距，該計畫的畢業生將為從多學科的角度解決複雜的永續發展問題做好充分準備。

d: The School of Law and the Department of Accountancy are internationally renowned for the strengths of their respective disciplines. Their work is linked with the financial and corporate sectors, which often have legal disputes that can only be solved by those with a detailed knowledge of accounting. Students in the double degree programme will acquire wide-ranging legal knowledge and skills that will enable them to progress to professional legal training, and will also acquire foundational knowledge that can assist them to qualify as accountants. The graduates of the double degree programme, the Bachelor of Laws and Bachelor of Business Administration in Accountancy, benefit from a rigorous legal education combined with solid academic training in accounting within a global business mindset. It is thus expected that they will be highly sought after for positions in the commercial and financial sectors.

The double degree will prepare students for a career in the legal and financial sectors, and they will also have the option to become a legal professional. Students will receive a well-rounded education from our staff, which includes distinguished teachers and scholars from Hong Kong, Chinese Mainland, the UK, Australia, India, and Malaysia. In addition, students will have the opportunity to be taught by visiting faculty from law schools all around the world.

z: 法學院和會計係因其各自學科的優勢而享譽國際。他們的工作與金融和企業部門相關，這些部門經常存在法律糾紛，只能由具有詳細會計知識的人來解決。雙學位課程的學生將獲得廣泛的法律知識和技能，使他們能夠繼續接受專業法律培訓，並將獲得基礎知識，幫助他們獲得會計師資格。雙學位課程（會計學法學學士和工商管理學士）的畢業生受益於嚴格的法律教育以及全球商業思維下紮實的會計學術培訓。因此，預計他們在商業和金融領域的職位將受到高度追捧。
雙學位將為學生在法律和金融領域的職業生涯做好準備，他們也可以選擇成為法律專業人士。學生將從我們的教職員那裡獲得全面的教育，其中包括來自香港、中國大陸、英國、澳洲、印度和馬來西亞的傑出教師和學者。此外，學生將有機會接受來自世界各地法學院的訪問教師的授課。

d: The double degree programme between the Department of Social and Behavioural Sciences in the College of Liberal Arts and Social Sciences and the School of Law aims to equip degree-level graduates with broad knowledge of crime science and laws; and analytical competence to conduct scientific and legal research to develop practical and ethical ways to reduce crime and increase security in society.
In particular with respect to the Law degree the major aims to:
• provide a liberal education in the theory and practice of law at the level and rigour appropriate for an undergraduate degree;
• equip students with a critical understanding of law and legal institutions so as to enable them to serve the needs of Hong Kong and the international community; and

• facilitate the development of a range of intellectual skills, in particular the ability to think analytically and critically, to solve problems, and to communicate effectively both orally and in writing.

z: 人文社會科學學院社會與行為科學系與法學院之間的雙學位課程旨在為學位畢業生提供犯罪科學和法律方面的廣泛知識；和分析能力進行科學和法律研究，以開發實用和道德的方法來減少犯罪和增強社會安全。
特別是在法律學位方面，該專業的目標是：
• 提供適合本科學位程度和嚴格程度的法律理論和實踐自由教育；
• 培養學生對法律和法律機構的批判性理解，使他們能夠滿足香港和國際社會的需要；和
• 促進一系列智力技能的發展，特別是分析性和批判性思考、解決問題以及有效口頭和書面溝通的能力。

d: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Bachelor of Science in Computational Finance and Financial Technology aims to educate a new generation of professionals with a unique combination of expertise from the important areas of computer science, computational finance, and financial technology. Finance is one of the pillars supporting the economy of Hong Kong, and the use of computational technologies has become pervasive in different business sectors. With recent significant advances in artificial intelligence (AI) and blockchain technologies and their increasing applications in every aspect of the financial industry, the programme, which comprises a broad set of courses from the Department of Computer Science and College of Business, will train students with a distinctive and interdisciplinary blend of knowledge across the complete spectrum of computer science/computational finance/financial technology areas, from AI, big data analytics, derivatives pricing, financial econometrics, portfolio management to software engineering.

z: 電腦科學理學士和計算金融和金融技術理學學士旨在教育新一代專業人士，他們具有電腦科學、計算金融和金融技術重要領域的獨特專業知識組合。金融是支撐香港經濟的支柱之一，計算技術的應用已廣泛應用於不同的商業領域。隨著人工智慧（AI）和區塊鏈技術最近的重大進展及其在金融行業各個方面的日益增長的應用，該項目由計算機科學系和商學院的廣泛課程組成，將培養學生在計算機科學/計算金融/金融技術的整個領域（從人工智能、大數據分析、衍生品定價、金​​融計量學、投資組合管理到軟體工程）擁有獨特的跨學科知識融合。
