d: Anthropology is the study of human variability and diversity, as informed by the four sub-fields of biological anthropology, archaeology, cultural anthropology, and linguistic anthropology. The Anthropology programme at The Chinese University of Hong Kong has strengths in cultural anthropology – defined by the methods of in-depth interviewing and immersive participant-observation, and also offers courses in archaeology and cultural heritage studies.

Anthropology students come from both Arts and Science backgrounds, and they learn to think independently. Learning to appreciate and understand the various ways in which cultures may be organised, students will learn to see their own in a new light. Students learn how to conduct research, how to analyse evidence, and acquire strong verbal and written communication skills.

Anthropology provides a broad humanities and social science training that prepares students for a wide variety of careers in cultural heritage management, liberal studies, business, journalism, and other cross-cultural work.
JS4006.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 人類學是對人類變異性和多樣性的研究，包括生物人類學、考古學、文化人類學和語言人類學四個子領域。香港中文大學人類學課程的優點在於文化人類學，即深度訪談和沈浸式參與觀察的方法，並提供考古學和文化遺產研究課程。
人類學學生來自藝術和科學背景，他們學會獨立思考。學習欣賞和理解文化的各種組織方式，學生將學習以新的眼光看待自己的文化。學生學習如何進行研究，如何分析證據，並獲得強大的口頭和書面溝通技巧。
人類學提供廣泛的人文和社會科學培訓，幫助學生為文化遺產管理、自由研究、商業、新聞和其他跨文化工作等各種職業做好準備。
JS4006.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: The Department of Chinese Language and Literature, which has the longest history at CUHK, is renowned for its excellence in preserving tradition and striving for innovation. The Department offers rigorous training in Chinese language and literature. The curriculum affords a close examination of the characteristic features of the Chinese language, an in-depth introduction to theories of language and linguistics, and critical study of classical and modern Chinese literature. Students are expected to acquire solid understanding of the field in general while specialising in their own areas of interest, such as Chinese phonology and grammar, Qin-Han textual studies, Tang-Song poetry, modern Chinese fiction, and creative writing— all under the guidance of our erudite faculty members. The Department has long been emphasising diversified learning. We are collaborating with the Department of Chinese Language and Literature at Peking University to offer a dual undergraduate degree programme starting from 2019/20, which could combine the advantages of the both institutions to strengthen the learning experience of our students. In the academic year 2022/23, a double major programme in partnership with the Department of Translation (CHLL&TRANS) was introduced. This programme caters to students with a keen interest in both the theory and practice of C to E (Chinese to English) and E to C (English to Chinese) translation.
JS4018.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 中國語言文學係是中大歷史最悠久的系，以其傳承傳統、銳意創新而聞名。該系提供嚴格的中國語言和文學培訓。本課程深入探討漢語的特點，深入介紹語言和語言學理論，並對中國古典和現代文學進行批判性研究。學生應在對自己感興趣的領域有紮實的了解的同時，在我們博學的教師的指導下，專注於自己感興趣的領域，如漢語音韻學和語法、秦漢考據研究、唐宋詩、中國現代小說和創意寫作。該系長期以來一直強調多元化學習。我們與北京大學中文系合作，從2019/20學年開始提供雙學士學位課程，可以結合兩所院校的優勢，加強學生的學習體驗。 2022/23學年，與翻譯系（CHLL&TRANS）合作推出了雙主修課程。本課程適合對C to E（漢譯英）和E to C（英譯漢）翻譯的理論和實踐有濃厚興趣的學生。
JS4018.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: The English Major is a four-year programme that covers all the basic aspects of English language and literature, as well as offering an opportunity to pursue a particular area of study in depth. The first year consists of three components: communicative skills, linguistics, and literature. This will provide the groundwork for more specialized studies in the remaining three years, in which you may choose between courses in linguistics and/or literature. Our Applied English Linguistics courses explore the dimensions of English language through a variety of topics including phonetics, grammar, rhetoric, society and culture. These courses will not only offer you a theoretical perspective on the language, but also improve your own practical uses of English. Our English Literary Studies courses follow the development of English literature from the Renaissance to the present, and show how literary histories are connected across geographical borders. These courses range from those which cover more canonical literature such as Shakespeare, Romanticism, Modernism, to those which cover contemporary media such as film and graphic novels, to courses such as Creative Writing and Drama in Performance in which you can show off your own artistic flair. Additionally, in your fourth year, you will work on an independent research project of your own choice which will be supervised by a professor in the department.
Some of our more popular courses include: Literature and Film; Crime Fiction; Forensic Linguistics: Language as Evidence in Legal Processes; Hong Kong English; Reading Poetry.

Our professors put a high value on meeting regularly with students, providing instructive feedback, and resolving any concerns students might have. Our lectures engage with up-to-the-minute developments in literary analysis and applied linguistics, and our tutorials are conducted in a spirit of open, interactive, and respectful dialogue.
For more information about individual courses, the composition of the English Major, or employment opportunities after graduation, please visit our website.
JS4032.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 英語專業是一個為期四年的課程，涵蓋英語語言和文學的所有基本方面，並提供深入研究特定領域的機會。第一年由三個部分組成：溝通技巧、語言學和文學。這將為剩餘三年內更專業的學習奠定基礎，您可以在語言學和/或文學課程之間進行選擇。我們的應用英語語言學課程透過語音、文法、修辭、社會和文化等各種主題探索英語語言的各個維度。這些課程不僅會為您提供語言的理論視角，還會提高您自己的英語實際使用能力。我們的英語文學研究課程跟隨英國文學從文藝復興時期到現在的發展，並展示文學史如何跨越地理邊界聯繫起來。這些課程涵蓋莎士比亞、浪漫主義、現代主義等經典文學，到電影和圖像小說等當代媒體，再到創意寫作和表演戲劇等課程，您可以在其中展示自己的藝術天賦。此外，在第四年，您將從事自己選擇的獨立研究項目，該項目將由系裡的教授監督。
我們一些比較受歡迎的課程包括：文學和電影；犯罪小說；法庭語言學：法律程序中作為證據的語言；香港英語；讀詩。
我們的教授非常重視定期與學生會面、提供指導性回饋並解決學生可能存在的任何疑慮。我們的講座涉及文學分析和應用語言學的最新發展，我們的教程本著開放、互動和尊重對話的精神進行。
有關個別課程、英語專業構成或畢業後就業機會的更多信息，請訪問我們的網站。
JS4032.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: With a mission to advance traditional Chinese culture, bridge Chinese and Western art, and nurture local art professionals, the Department of Fine Arts offers a comprehensive and balanced undergraduate programme that prepares students for future careers as artists, art historians, museum curators, among other art-related professions. The programme achieves this mission in the following ways:
1. Focus on Chinese Art in a Global Context

A wide range of courses in Chinese art practices and history are offered alongside Western art history and studio training. Whenever possible, cross-field interactions are encouraged. Such an integrated approach reflects Hong Kong’s position as an advanced, multi-cultural city.
2. Emphasis on Both the Practice and the History of Art
The Department places equal emphasis on studio and art history courses. As a result, our graduates are well-rounded and well-equipped for professional careers in the arts.
3. Career Preparation

The Department constantly revises its existing courses and introduces new courses that cater to the prevailing trends and needs of society. It also organises professional training courses and internship programmes to equip students with practical experience, thereby laying a solid foundation for their future careers as professional artists, art educators, and art administrators.
JS4044.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 美術係以弘揚中國傳統文化、溝通中西藝術、培養本地藝術專業人才為使命，提供全面、平衡的本科課程，為學生未來成為藝術家、藝術史學家、博物館館長等藝術相關職業做好準備。該計劃透過以下方式實現這項使命：
1. 關注全球背景下的中國藝術
除了西方藝術史和工作室培訓之外，還提供廣泛的中國藝術實踐和歷史課程。只要有可能，就鼓勵跨領域互動。這種綜合方針反映了香港作為先進、多元文化城市的地位。
2. 藝術實踐與歷史並重
該系並重工作室和藝術史課程。因此，我們的畢業生全面發展，為藝術職業生涯做好了準備。
3. 職業準備
該係不斷修訂現有課程並引入新課程，以迎合社會的流行趨勢和需求。學院也組織專業培訓課程和實習項目，為學生提供實務經驗，為他們未來成為職業藝術家、藝術教育家和藝術管理者奠定堅實的基礎。
JS4044.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: The curriculum offered by the Department of History is designed to cultivate students’ interest in human civilisations and to equip them with the ability to apply historical knowledge to their lives and careers.

The curriculum embraces diversity and applicability as its guiding principles. Hong Kong is an international city in which the cultures of East and West meld seamlessly. CUHK has promoted international academic exchange from its inception, which has favoured and given rise to the Department’s adoption of a comparative, interdisciplinary approach to curriculum design with public history as its research focus. Students are encouraged to analyse history from multiple and interdisciplinary perspectives. Courses are grouped into National/Regional History, Comparative History, Public History and Topic Studies, and students write a graduation thesis in their final year.

In their first two years of study, students are required to take a number of basic courses, including Tradition and Transformation in Chinese History, Tradition and Transformation in Western History, Historiography, and Introduction to World History, as well as History for Today, a course offered by the History Department as part of the Arts Faculty’s Core Package.

Our Department has worked actively to nurture talented students. We have many scholarships supporting students, including the Wang Teh-chao Memorial Prizes, Professor Tsang Shui-lung Memorial Scholarship, the Sin Wai Kin Scholarship and the Professor So Hing-bun Scholarships. The Department has also introduced a series of internship programmes that give students opportunities to gain practical experience working in a variety of organisations. The Department also arranges overseas study tours to broaden students’ perspectives. In addition, students have opportunities to participate in a variety of University-organised exchange programmes, including short visits to or study at universities in the UK, the US, Japan and elsewhere.
JS4056.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 歷史系課程旨在培養學生對人類文明的興趣，並培養學生將歷史知識運用在生活和事業上的能力。
課程以多樣性和適用性為指導原則。香港是個東西方文化完美融合的國際城市。中大自成立以來一直推動國際學術交流，有利於並促使該系採用比較、跨學科的方法設計課程，並以公共歷史為研究重點。鼓勵學生從多個跨學科的角度分析歷史。課程分為國家歷史、比較歷史、公共歷史和主題研究，學生在最後一年撰寫畢業論文。
學生在前兩年的學習中，需要選修多門基礎課程，包括《中國歷史的傳統與變遷》、《西方歷史的傳統與變遷》、《史學》、《世界史概論》，以及由歷史系開設的作為文學院核心課程一部分的《今日歷史》。
我係積極致力於培養優秀學生。我們設有多項獎學金支持學生，包括王德超紀念獎、曾水龍教授紀念獎學金、冼為堅獎學金及蘇慶彬教授獎學金。該系還推出了一系列實習計劃，為學生提供在各種組織工作的實踐經驗的機會。本係也安排海外遊學，以拓展學生的視野。此外，學生還有機會參加大學組織的各種交流項目，包括到英國、美國、日本等地的大學進行短期訪問或學習。
JS4056.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: The Department of Japanese Studies provides academic and professional training in the study of Japan and the Japanese language. The programme is designed to meet the growing demand for globally aware citizens, promote cultural and academic exchange, and facilitate communication and cooperation between Hong Kong and Japan.

The programme provides training in critical approaches to Japanese society and culture, and is geared towards mastery of the Japanese language. All third-year students are required to spend one academic year in Japan and take unit-bearing courses at a Japanese exchange partner university. A key theme of the programme is a field research project. Second-year students are trained in research methodologies that they then implement in their third year of study in Japan, when they conduct research in the field. In the fourth year of study, students use the material collected during their field research to write an academic research paper.

The programme offers three optional streams: (1) Business and Management; (2) Japan in Global Perspective; and (3) Japanese Language and Linguistics. Each stream provides specialised training in the named area and allows students to take courses from other relevant departments, including the Departments of Management, Sociology, Anthropology and Linguistics and Modern Languages. Students who select one of these streams must choose a relevant topic for their final-year project.
JS4068.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 日本研究系提供日本研究和日語語言的學術和專業訓練。該計劃旨在滿足公民日益增長的全球意識需求，促進文化和學術交流，並促進香港與日本之間的交流與合作。
該計畫提供日本社會和文化批判性方法的培訓，旨在掌握日語。所有三年級學生都必須在日本度過一學年，並在日本交換夥伴大學學習含學分的課程。該計劃的一個關鍵主題是實地研究項目。二年級學生接受研究方法的培訓，然後在日本學習的第三年在該領域進行研究時實施這些方法。在第四年的學習中，學生利用在實地研究中收集的資料撰寫學術研究論文。
本課程提供三個選修方向：（1）商業與管理； (2) 全球視野中的日本； (3)日語及語言學。每個方向都提供指定領域的專門培訓，並允許學生學習其他相關系所的課程，包括管理學、社會學、人類學、語言學和現代語言學系。選擇其中一個方向的學生必須為其最後一年的專案選擇一個相關主題。
JS4068.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: The Linguistics programme offers basic training in contemporary theories of language, and addresses such issues as the universal properties of natural language and the human mind, language acquisition in different modes and modalities, and language in different contexts of use. Students are encouraged to apply linguistic theories to the investigation of a wide variety of languages, including endangered languages, minority languages and sign languages. They will gain an appreciation of linguistics as an interdisciplinary field which crosses the traditional boundary between the arts and the humanities, drawing ideas and tools from various disciplines of cognitive science. At the practical level, linguistics training raises students’ bilingual and multilingual awareness and sharpens their sensitivity towards the complexity of human language. Such training builds the linguistic resources necessary for students’ careers and postgraduate study, and enables them to make informed judgments about the language issues of their own speech community. Students are offered an option to participate in a dual degree programme with Peking University, studying for two years in each campus. Upon successful completion of graduation requirements at both universities, students will be awarded the Bachelor of Arts in Linguistics by CUHK and the Bachelor of Arts in Chinese Language by Peking University. Students will not only benefit from the strengths of the two programmes, enriching their training in linguistics, but also widen their horizons through immersing in a different learning environment, enhancing their competitive edge for their further studies and career development. Students are also provided with possibilities to double major in Linguistics and Translation or Linguistics and Psychology.
The Linguistics programme at CUHK includes the following areas of study.
• Foundation and language awareness training: • Invitation to Linguistics, Phonetics I, Phonology I, Syntax I, Semantics, Exploring Grammar (Mandarin, Cantonese and English), and Modern Languages.

• Core, applied and interdisciplinary electives: • Core Linguistics: Morphology, Phonetics II, Phonology II, Syntax II, Comparative Grammar, Language Survey in the Field, Sign Linguistics I: Phonetics and Phonology, and Sign Linguistics II: Morphology and Morpho-syntax, Sign Linguistics III: Syntax, Semantics and Pragmatics and Special Topics in Linguistics.

• Language and Mind: First Language Acquisition, Second Language Acquisition, Language Acquisition of Deaf Children, Sign Language and the Mind, Bilingualism, Bilingual Acquisition, Psycholinguistics, Neurolinguistics and Special Topics in Language and Mind.

• Language and Culture, and Linguistic Applications: Sociolinguistics, Language Disorders, Linguistics and Information Technology, Introduction to Sign Language and Bimodal Bilingualism, Sign Language in Education, Introduction to Sign Language Interpreting, Special Topics in Sign Language Studies and Special Topics in Applied Linguistics.
• Research capability development: • Linguistic Argumentation I and II, Quantitative Methods for Linguistics, Research Practicum I and II, and Research Project I and II.
Upon completing the programme, students will have:
• attained a body of knowledge about theories of language and language acquisition as well as the associated methods of analysis;
• attained a body of knowledge about the relationship between theoretical linguistics and linguistics applied to other disciplinary studies;

• attained a sharpened awareness of the languages used in the local community through their abilities in analysing, primarily but not exclusively, English, Cantonese, and Mandarin, in particular how these languages are structured and acquired as a linguistic system, and how they function socio-linguistically in the local community, the region and the world;
• attained analytical and critical thinking capabilities and a sufficient set of research skills for work and postgraduate study;

• attained high proficiency in English, Cantonese and written Chinese for the purpose of effective communication in academic discourse and the professional workplace, and at least functional proficiency in Putonghua;
• developed an appreciation and knowledge of Modern Languages for intercultural communication; and
• gained regional and/or international experience, nurturing their personal, intellectual and professional acumen.
JS4070.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 語言學課程提供當代語言理論的基礎培訓，並解決諸如自然語言和人類思維的普遍屬性、不同模式和方式的語言習得以及不同使用環境中的語言等問題。鼓勵學生應用語言學理論來研究各種語言，包括瀕危語言、少數民族語言和手語。他們將認識到語言學是一個跨學科領域，它跨越了藝術和人文學科之間的傳統界限，從認知科學的各個學科中汲取思想和工具。在實踐層面，語言學訓練提高學生的雙語和多語意識，增強他們對人類語言複雜性的敏感度。這種培訓為學生的職業生涯和研究生學習建立了必要的語言資源，並使他們能夠對自己的語言社群的語言問題做出明智的判斷。學生可以選擇參加北京大學的雙學位課程，在每個校區學習兩年。學生成功完成兩所大學的畢業要求後，將分別獲得香港中文大學語言學文學學士學位和北京大學中國語言文學學士學位。學生不僅能汲取兩個課程的優勢，豐富語言學訓練，更能透過沉浸在不同的學習環境中擴大視野，增強升學及職業發展的競爭優勢。學生也可以選擇雙修語言學和翻譯或語言學和心理學。
香港中文大學的語言學課程包括以下研究領域。
• 基礎與語言意識訓練： • 語言學、語音學I、音韻學I、句法I、語意學、文法探索（國語、粵語和英語）和現代語言。
• 核心、應用和跨學科選修課： • 核心語言學：形態學、語音學 II、音系學 II、句法 II、比較語法、現場語言調查、手語語言學 I：語音學和音系學、手語語言學 II：形態學和形態句法、手語語言學 III：句法、語義和語用以及語言學專題。
• 語言與心智：第一語言習得、第二語言習得、聾啞兒童語言習得、手語與心智、雙語、雙語習得、心理語言學、神經語言學、語言與心智專題。
• 語言與文化、語言應用：社會語言學、語言障礙、語言學與資訊科技、手語與雙模雙語概論、手語教育、手語翻譯概論、手語研究專題與應用語言學專題。
• 研究能力發展： • 語言論證I 與II、語言學量化方法、研究實習I 與II、以及研究計畫I 與II。
完成該課程後，學生將擁有：
• 獲得語言和語言習得理論以及相關分析方法的知識體系；
• 獲得理論語言學和應用於其他學科研究的語言學之間關係的知識體系；
• 透過分析（主要但不限於）英語、粵語和普通話的能力，對當地社區使用的語言有更深入的了解，特別是這些語言作為語言系統的結構和習得方式，以及它們如何在當地社區、區域和世界中發揮社會語言作用；
• 獲得分析和批判性思考能力以及足夠的工作和研究生學習研究技能；
• 具備較高的英語、廣東話和中文書寫能力，以便在學術演講和專業工作場所進行有效溝通，並至少具備普通話的實用能力；
• 培養對跨文化交流現代語言的欣賞和知識；和
• 獲得區域和/或國際經驗，培養他們的個人、智力和專業敏銳度。
JS4070.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: The BA in Music programme at CUHK provides instruction in the study of music as a humanistic discipline and offers extensive opportunities for the development of practical skills. The Music Department’s teaching team offers a wide range of expertise and has for decades nurtured important musicians of Chinese and Western music traditions. The Department’s library and archival collections are among the most important in Asia. It has its own symphony orchestra, wind orchestra, and choir, in addition to ensembles devoted to Chinese music, jazz, early music, and new music.
JS4082.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 香港中文大學的音樂學士學位課程提供音樂作為人文學科的研究指導，並提供廣泛的實踐技能發展機會。音樂系的教學團隊擁有廣泛的專業知識，幾十年來培養了中西音樂傳統的重要音樂家。該部門的圖書館和檔案館藏是亞洲最重要的。它擁有自己的交響樂團、管樂團和合唱團，此外還有致力於中國音樂、爵士樂、早期音樂和新音樂的樂團。
JS4082.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: The Department of Philosophy offers a diverse, balanced curriculum incorporating Eastern and Western philosophical traditions that meets international standards while maintaining national and regional relevance. The undergraduate curriculum aims to give students a strong liberal arts education, prepare them for advanced work in philosophy, and train them in critical thinking and communication skills applicable to a wide variety of professions. Students majoring in philosophy must complete a minimum of 72 course units. The core courses consist of Introduction to Philosophy, Logic, History of Chinese Philosophy I & II, History of Western Philosophy I & II, Philosophy and Human Conditions, Ethics, Epistemology and Metaphysics, and a capstone course in which students write an undergraduate thesis. In addition to these, students are required to take at least two courses in each of the three main areas, namely Chinese/Eastern Philosophy, Western Philosophy, and Philosophical Problems. The objective of this requirement is to ensure a well-rounded and balanced academic experience.
JS4094.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 哲學系提供多元化、平衡的課程，融合了東西方哲學傳統，符合國際標準，同時保持國家和地區的相關性。本科課程旨在為學生提供強有力的文科教育，為他們從事哲學領域的高級工作做好準備，並訓練他們適用於各種職業的批判性思維和溝通技巧。哲學專業的學生必須至少完成 72 個課程單元。核心課程包括哲學概論、邏輯學、中國哲學史I&II、西方哲學史I&II、哲學與人情、倫理學、知識論和形而上學，以及學生撰寫本科論文的頂點課程。除此之外，學生還必須在中國/東方哲學、西方哲學和哲學問題這三個主要領域中各選修至少兩門課程。這項要求的目的是確保全面且平衡的學術體驗。
JS4094.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: The Bachelor of Arts in Public Humanities integrates the critical skills of Cultural Studies and practical know-how of Cultural Management, focusing not only on research and theories, but also on cultural practices, knowledge transfer, and public engagement. We aim to nurture a new generation of cultural mediators, producers, and professionals to meet the needs and challenges of contemporary society. We also aim to transform cultural practices for better community building.

This programme fosters students’ critical and creative thinking, deepens their understanding of culture, heritage, and the arts; it also enhances their ability to communicate and collaborate with the public. We are committed to training students in research skills, cultural sensitivity, media literacy, curating, and policy-making, bringing the knowledge and values of the humanities into the cultural life of the general public. We also promote global citizenship and civic participation, and support sustainable development of various cultural enterprises in society.
JS4100.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 公共人文學士學位課程融合了文化研究的關鍵技能和文化管理的實踐知識，不僅注重研究和理論，還注重文化實踐、知識轉移和公眾參與。我們的目標是培養新一代的文化調解者、製作人和專業人士，以滿足當代社會的需求和挑戰。我們也致力於改變文化習俗，以實現更好的社區建設。
該計畫培養學生的批判性和創造性思維，加深他們對文化、遺產和藝術的理解；它也增強了他們與公眾溝通和合作的能力。我們致力於培養學生的研究技能、文化敏感度、媒體素養、策展和政策制定能力，將人文學科的知識和價值觀帶入大眾的文化生活。我們也提倡全球公民意識和公民參與，支持社會各類文化企業的永續發展。
JS4100.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: Religious Studies considers religion to be an integral part of human life, thought and activity. It advocates an objective and academic approach to the study of religious phenomena and a critical yet sympathetic understanding of people’s religious life. Students are able to explore numerous religious traditions, including Buddhism, Taoism, Christianity, Hinduism, Islam, and Judaism. Students can take courses in the following areas: (1) Approaches to Religious Studies (2) Religious Traditions and Classics (3) Religion, Culture and Society (4) Classical Languages (5) Seminars.
JS4109.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 宗教研究認為宗教是人類生活、思想和活動不可分割的一部分。它提倡以客觀和學術的方式來研究宗教現象，並對人們的宗教生活進行批判性但富有同情心的理解。學生能夠探索眾多的宗教傳統，包括佛教、道教、基督教、印度教、伊斯蘭教和猶太教。學生可以選修以下領域的課程：(1) 宗教研究方法 (2) 宗教傳統與經典 (3) 宗教、文化與社會 (4) 古典語言 (5) 研討會。
JS4109.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: The Department of Translation provides a coherent and comprehensive curriculum covering translation studies, literary and specialised translation, interpreting, and computer-aided translation. The programme places equal emphasis on practical and theoretical components - it is designed to prepare students for a variety of professions as well as postgraduate studies. The Department is committed to quality teaching and research. International scholars are invited to teach and conduct seminars and workshops for students. Double major and double degree options are offered in conjunction with the Department of Chinese Language and Literature, the Department of Linguistics and Modern Languages, and the Faculty of Law. The Department’s teaching and learning are supported by two language labs equipped with state-of-the-art audio-visual facilities, conference interpreting systems and up-to-date software for computer-aided translation.
JS4123.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 翻譯系提供連貫且全面的課程，涵蓋翻譯研究、文學和專業翻譯、口譯和電腦輔助翻譯。該計畫並重實踐和理論部分——旨在幫助學生為各種職業和研究生學習做好準備。該系致力於高品質的教學和研究。邀請國際學者為學生授課並舉辦研討會和工作坊。與中國語言文學系、語言學與現代語言系、法學院共同開設雙主修、雙學位課程。該系的教學由兩個語言實驗室提供支持，配備了最先進的視聽設施、會議口譯系統和最新的電腦輔助翻譯軟體。
JS4123.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: BA in Chinese studies is a multi-disciplinary, primarily English-taught undergraduate programme which offers an integrated exploration of the complexities of Chinese history, economy, governance, business, culture, literature and contemporary society. With an emphasis on interactive teaching, international exchange, and immersive study, our programme is ideal for students intent on becoming globally-oriented China experts, cross-cultural communicators and network-builders. This major is designed for two streams of students distinguished by Chinese language fluency, i.e. 1) International Stream (IS) and 2) Chinese Native-Speaker Stream (CNSS). Students in each stream pursue a subset of learning offerings tailored to their language capacities while completing most of their course work in a shared learning environment in which international and Chinese-native speaker students learn from each other and pursue collaborative projects together.

Special features of the programme include 1) adopting an interdisciplinary approach to exploring Greater China; 2) training students to gain an integrated understanding of China’s past, present, and future; 3) offering interactive instruction in a “liberal arts” mode and immersive learning through “on-the-ground” sociocultural experience in Greater China; 4) emphasizing intensive empirical research to equip students with strong analytical and communication skills; 5) providing an international-oriented network for developing careers in Hong Kong, mainland China, and abroad.
JS4136.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 中國研究學士學位是一個多學科、主要以英語授課的本科課程，對中國歷史、經濟、治理、商業、文化、文學和當代社會的複雜性進行綜合探索。我們的課程著重互動教學、國際交流和沈浸式學習，非常適合那些立志成為面向全球的中國專家、跨文化傳播者和網路建構者的學生。該專業針對漢語流利程度不同的兩類學生而設計，即1）國際流（IS）和2）中文母語流（CNSS）。每個流派的學生都會追求適合自己語言能力的一部分學習課程，同時在共享學習環境中完成大部分課程作業，在這種環境中，國際學生和中文母語學生可以互相學習並共同開展協作專案。
該計畫的特色包括1）採用跨學科方法探索大中華區； 2）培養學生對中國的過去、現在和未來的綜合理解； 3）以「文科」模式提供互動教學，透過大中華區「實地」社會文化體驗提供沉浸式學習；4) 強調深入的實證研究，使學生具備較強的分析和溝通能力；
JS4136.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: The Integrated BBA programme (IBBA) is the most popular business programme, providing students with the greatest flexibility to pursue comprehensive, integrated and high-quality business education. Under the IBBA programme, there are multiple options students can choose from to complete the 4-year degree.
9 concentrations:
Among all specialised options within the programme, students can freely choose one to two concentrations from the following 9 concentration areas:
• Business Analytics
• Business Economics
• Finance
• Entrepreneurship
• Management of International Business
• Human Resource Management
• Marketing
• Big Data and Quantitative Marketing
• General Business

There is no quota limitation on each individual concentration, and students choose their concentrations based on their interests, strengths and aspirations. They can also adjust their areas of concentration along the academic journey. Students will only be required to declare their concentration(s) in their final year of study.

Global experiential learning is an essential component to the IBBA curriculum. Since 2018-19, IBBA students have to complete global experiential learning before graduation. In general, more than 80% IBBA students participated in an overseas exchange programme before they graduate. CUHK Business School also provides ample internship opportunities for students to gain valuable on-the-job training and in-depth understanding of their targeted professions. More than 95% of IBBA students take up internships before they graduate and many of them receive return offers and become permanent employees of the companies where they have served as interns.
Transfer-in option:

Last but not least, students may opt for International Business and Chinese Enterprise (IBCE), which is a stream under IBBA. IBCE is a joint programme between CUHK Business School and the Darla Moore School of Business at the University of South Carolina (USC) that students will spend a year in USC among 4 years of study. It is the first and only undergraduate programme in Hong Kong with an emphasis on international business activities between the United States and China. It aims at training a group of future business leaders who are equipped with comprehensive knowledge about the complex yet delicate business environment in China and the United States. In IBCE, students are offered exclusive opportunities to explore the world and business by study trips, as well as the rare chances to train up their transnational mindset by working abroad.
Double Degree, Double Major and Minor options:

Students can also plan their double degree with the School of Journalism and Communication as a 5-year programme. They may also explore double majors with another business programme such as Professional Accountancy (JS4240), Quantitative Finance (JS4252), Insurance, Financial and Actuarial Analysis (JS4238) and also our newly introduced Financial Technology (JS4428) or minor programmes such as Entrepreneurship and Innovation and any other programmes offered by the University.
JS4202.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 綜合工商管理學士課程​​（IBBA）是最受歡迎的商業課程，為學生提供最大的靈活性來追求全面、全面和高品質的商業教育。根據 IBBA 課程，學生可以選擇多種方式來完成 4 年制學位。
9個濃度：
在該課程的所有專業選項中，學生可以從以下 9 個專業領域中自由選擇一到兩個專業：
• 業務分析
• 商業經濟學
• 金融
• 創業精神
• 國際業務管理
• 人力資源管理
• 行銷
• 大數據與量化行銷
• 一般業務
每個專業沒有名額限制，學生可以根據自己的興趣、優勢和願望選擇專業。他們還可以在學術旅程中調整自己的重點領域。學生只需申報最後一年學習的專業。
全球體驗式學習是 IBBA 課程的重要組成部分。自2018-19學年起，IBBA學生必須在畢業前完成全球體驗式學習。整體而言，超過80%的IBBA學生在畢業前曾參加海外交流計畫。中國大商學院也提供充足的實習機會，讓學生獲得寶貴的在職培訓並深入了解其目標專業。超過95%的IBBA學生在畢業前都會進行實習，其中許多人獲得了回聘機會，並成為實習公司的正式員工。
轉入選項：

最後但並非最不重要的一點是，學生可以選擇國際商務與中國企業（IBCE），這是 IBBA 下的一個類別。 IBCE是香港中文大學商學院與南卡羅來納大學達拉摩爾商學院（USC）的聯合課程，學生將在四年的學習中在南加州大學度過一年。它是香港第一個也是唯一一個專注於美國和中國之間的國際商業活動的本科課程。旨在培養一群全面了解中美兩國複雜而微妙的商業環境的未來商業領袖。 IBCE為學生提供了透過遊學探索世界和商業的獨特機會，以及透過海外工作培養跨國思維的難得機會。
雙學位、雙主修和輔修選項：
學生還可以將新聞與傳播學院的雙學位課程作為為期 5 年的課程。他們還可以探索雙主修與其他商業課程，如主修會計（JS4240）、定量金融（JS4252）、保險、財務和精算分析（JS4238）以及我們新推出的金融科技（JS4428）或輔修課程，如創業與創新以及大學提供的任何其他課程。
JS4202.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: Launched in 2005, Global Business Studies (GBS), as one of the most competitive programmes in Hong Kong, has been attracting the cream of secondary school graduates both from the local and non-local systems. GBS is a pioneer in the undergraduate business education in Hong Kong and has earned its reputation in the international education arena. Through an internationally oriented curriculum, we are committed to empowering highly aspiring students with distinct business acumen, cultural fluency and entrepreneurial mindset to become leaders who create meaningful impact in the global community. We offer expanded opportunities in top-notch university partners across Europe and North America.

Our programme is enriched with expanded capabilities and personalised learning pathway, which will bring a myriad of cultural experiences, experiential learning and networking opportunities in the major economic hubs across the regions. Students will be equipped with effective tools to develop real-world competencies and knowledge, as well as personal and professional attributes that will prepare them for success in their future careers. We are confident that these new features will provide students with more flexibility to tailor their learning experience to their own needs and help them stay ahead of the dynamic global business environment.
JS4214.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 全球商業研究（GBS）於2005年開辦，作為香港最具競爭力的課程之一，一直吸引著本地和非本地系統的精英中學畢業生。 GBS是香港本科商科教育的先驅，在國際教育領域享有盛名。透過面向國際的課程，我們致力於培養具有獨特商業頭腦、流利文化和創業思維、有抱負的學生成為對全球社會產生有意義影響的領導者。我們為歐洲和北美的頂尖大學合作夥伴提供更多機會。
我們的計畫豐富了擴展的能力和個人化的學習途徑，這將為各地區的主要經濟中心帶來無數的文化體驗、體驗式學習和交流機會。學生將配備有效的工具來發展現實世界的能力和知識，以及個人和專業素質，為他們未來職業的成功做好準備。我們相信，這些新功能將為學生提供更大的靈活性，讓他們可以根據自己的需求量身定制學習體驗，並幫助他們在動態的全球商業環境中保持領先地位。
JS4214.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: Business Degree with Hospitality and Real Estate Focus

The Hospitality and Real Estate programme (HRE) is positioned as a business programme with an industry focus on hospitality and real estate. Our school is the first in the Asia-Pacific region to integrate hospitality and real estate research and education. HRE offers two major streams (Hospitality or Real Estate) and prepares students to work in diversified industries in lodging, MICE, theme parks and attractions, travel and tourism, valuation, leasing and transaction, consultancy, real estate development, finance and asset management.

The HRE programme offers a rich curriculum integrating theory with experiential learning opportunities, HRE puts students right in the heart of the fast-paced hospitality and real estate industries. Our teaching hotel-Hyatt Regency Shatin, the Hyatt Learning Center, demonstration kitchen, and the two SHTM-managed restaurants provide an ideal learning environment for theory-practice integration.
Professional accreditation & 6-months Internship experience

The HRE programme is accredited by AACSB, UNWTO and RICS. RICS is a globally recognized professional institution of chartered surveyors. All our students are required to take 6 months of internship before graduation.
Global Exposures

To enhance students’ global perspective, the programme arranges extensive student exchange opportunities and study tours. Our students have exclusive opportunities to participate in exchange programme with Ivy-League Cornell University, a tri-lateral exchange with the University of Queensland and Mahidol University International College under the Asia-Pacific Hospitality Management Programme, the National University of Singapore and Ritsumeikan Asia-Pacific University in Japan. This creates a wide range of possibilities for students to gain international experience, which is a vital element in the curriculum.
JS4226.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 以酒店和房地產為重點的商業學位
酒店和房地產項目（HRE）定位為一個以酒店和房地產行業為重點的商業項目。我校是亞太地區第一所將飯店和房地產研究與教育融為一體的學校。 HRE 提供兩個主要方向（酒店業或房地產），幫助學生做好在住宿、會展、主題公園和景點、旅遊、評估、租賃和交易、諮詢、房地產開發、金融和資產管理等多元化行業工作的準備。
HRE 計畫提供豐富的課程，將理論與體驗式學習機會相結合，HRE 讓學生處於快節奏的酒店和房地產行業的中心。我們的教學酒店－沙田凱悅酒店、凱悅學習中心、示範廚房以及兩間SHTM管理的餐廳，為理論與實踐結合提供了理想的學習環境。
專業認證和6個月的實習經驗
HRE 專案獲得了 AACSB、UNWTO 和 RICS 的認可。 RICS 是全球公認的特許測量師專業機構。我們所有的學生在畢業前都必須進行6個月的實習。
全球曝光
為了增強學生的全球視野，該計畫安排了廣泛的學生交流和遊學機會。我們的學生有獨家機會參加與常春藤盟校康乃爾大學的交換計畫、與昆士蘭大學和瑪希隆大學國際學院亞太酒店管理計畫、新加坡國立大學和日本立命館亞太大學的三邊交流計畫。這為學生獲得國際經驗創造了廣泛的可能性，這是課程中的重要組成部分。
JS4226.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: The Insurance, Financial and Actuarial Analysis programme provides students with a conceptual understanding of, and the analytical skills necessary for a career in insurance, financial and actuarial analysis. It also gives them a sound knowledge of the structure, practices and business functions of the insurance industry. In response to the needs of the market, the programme is rooted in Hong Kong’s institutional environment, supplemented with topics related to international issues and practices. Students in the programme receive training in actuarial and statistical techniques in both life and non-life insurance risk, as well as insurance operations, financial markets, portfolio management and financial derivatives. This paves students’ way to managerial positions in the insurance and finance sectors.
JS4238.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 保險、財務和精算分析課程為學生提供保險、財務和精算分析職業所需的概念性理解和分析技能。它也使他們對保險業的結構、實踐和業務功能有深入的了解。應對市場需求，節目紮根香港的製度環境，輔以國際議題和實踐的議題。該計畫的學生接受壽險和非壽險風險以及保險營運、金融市場、投資組合管理和金融衍生性商品的精算和統計技術培訓。這為學生在保險和金融領域擔任管理職位鋪平了道路。
JS4238.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: The BBA in Professional Accountancy (PACC) programme emphasises that accounting is an information system used to collect, measure, report, and analyse information for the purpose of reflecting operating performance and financial position, improving firm management, and creating firm value.

With this mindset, the PACC programme offers a comprehensive and cutting-edge curriculum for students to develop a strong foundation in accounting, finance, data analytics, and general business. Furthermore, the programme offers enriched extracurricular activities, interactive workshops and a vibrant environment to cultivate visionary business leaders equipped with a leadership mindset, advanced communication skills and outstanding professional conduct.

Our graduates have achieved remarkable careers across diverse industries, including accounting, banking, consulting, education, public service, and technology industries, thriving in roles such as accountants, bankers, data analysts, investment advisors, educators, project managers, public servants, and entrepreneurs.

The PACC programme is globally renowned and endorsed by leading professional accreditation bodies. Graduates gain a competitive edge with exemptions from multiple subjects in various qualification exams, such as those offered by the Hong Kong Institute of Certified Public Accountants (HKICPA) and the Association of Chartered Certified Accountants (ACCA), paving the way for a successful career in the business world.

PACC students can choose to specialise in various streams in addition to the core accounting courses, including Global Accounting, Finance for Accountants, Accounting Analytics, and Global Tax and Governance.
Global Accounting

This highly selective stream is designed for elite accounting students who aspire to become business leaders with a global mindset as well as comprehensive understanding of international accounting and business practices. Students may apply for this stream after completing their first year of study. Students in this stream will sharpen their skills and gain global insights through a range of specialised workshops and overseas study trips. They will also be awarded with scholarships for academic excellence. This exclusive programme provides a gateway to a global career in accounting, finance and business leadership, preparing students to excel in a globalised economy.
Finance for Accountants Stream

As a premier global financial hub, Hong Kong has seen a rising demand for talented professionals capable of integrating accounting and financial knowledge. The PACC programme responds to this growing demand by offering the Finance for Accountants stream. Students in this stream are expected to take core accounting courses alongside a comprehensive set of finance courses. By integrating their expertise in both accounting and finance, students are well-prepared for careers in the financial sector, specialising in areas such as banking, corporate finance, portfolio management, international finance, and financial market regulation.
Accounting Analytics Stream

With the rapid expansion of data volumes and advanced computational tools, deriving deep insights from diverse business data has become increasingly important for decision-making. Consequently, various organisations, including banks, firms, and regulators, are actively seeking accountants with solid skills in big data analytics to help them deepen their insights into their business through accounting and other related data. The PACC programme offers the Accounting Analytics stream to meet this increasing demand for professionals capable of analysing big data with expertise in accounting knowledge. Students in this stream will take multiple data analytics courses in addition to core accounting courses. Graduates are equipped with both accounting expertise and proficiency in data analytics, positioning them for success in accounting, finance, consulting and other business roles that demand advanced data analysis.
Global Tax and Governance Stream

With tax regulations and monitoring becoming increasingly complex on a global scale, the demand for skilled tax professionals with accounting expertise has been growing significantly. The Global Tax and Governance stream addresses the increasing demand for accounting graduates with proficiency in accounting, taxation, compliance, and governance. Students in this stream will take core accounting courses with additional specialised tax courses. In addition to the paper exemptions from several accounting professional qualification exams, students in this stream can also receive paper exemptions for the Chartered Tax Adviser (CTA) qualifying examination offered by the Taxation Institute of Hong Kong (TIHK). Graduates typically pursue career in tax advisory and compliance.
JS4240.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: BBA專業會計（PACC）課程強調會計是一個資訊系統，用於收集、衡量、報告和分析信息，以反映經營績效和財務狀況，改善企業管理，創造企業價值。
秉承這種理念，PACC 計畫為學生提供全面且前沿的課程，為學生在會計、財務、數據分析和一般商業方面打下堅實的基礎。此外，該計畫還提供豐富的課外活動、互動工作坊和充滿活力的環境，培養具有領導思維、先進溝通技巧和傑出職業操守的有遠見的商業領袖。
我們的畢業生在會計、銀行、諮詢、教育、公共服務和技術行業等不同行業取得了卓越的職業生涯，在會計師、銀行家、數據分析師、投資顧問、教育工作者、專案經理、公務員和企業家等職位上蓬勃發展。
PACC 計畫享譽全球，並獲得領先專業認證機構的認可。畢業生可在各種資格考試中獲得多個科目的豁免，例如香港會計師公會（HKICPA）和特許公認會計師公會（ACCA）提供的考試，從而獲得競爭優勢，為在商界取得成功的職業生涯鋪平道路。
除了核心會計課程外，PACC 學生還可以選擇專攻各種課程，包括全球會計、會計師財務、會計分析以及全球稅務和治理。
全球會計
這個高度選擇性的課程專為那些渴望成為具有全球思維以及對國際會計和商業慣例有全面了解的商業領袖的精英會計學生而設計。學生可以在完成第一年的學習後申請此類別。該類別的學生將透過一系列專業研討會和海外學習旅行來提高他們的技能並獲得全球見解。他們也將因學業優異而獲得獎學金。這門獨特的課程為學生提供了通往會計、金融和商業領導領域全球職業生涯的門戶，幫助學生做好在全球化經濟中脫穎而出的準備。
會計財務流
作為首要的全球金融中心，香港對能夠整合會計和金融知識的專業人才的需求不斷增長。 PACC 計劃透過提供會計師財務流來滿足這一不斷增長的需求。該類別的學生預計將學習核心會計課程以及一套全面的金融課程。透過整合會計和金融方面的專業知識，學生為金融領域的職業做好充分準備，專門從事銀行、企業融資、投資組合管理、國際金融和金融市場監管等領域。
會計分析流

隨著資料量和先進運算工具的快速擴展，從不同的業務資料中獲得深刻的見解對於決策變得越來越重要。因此，包括銀行、公司和監管機構在內的各種組織都在積極尋找具有紮實的大數據分析技能的會計師，以幫助他們透過會計和其他相關數據加深對業務的洞察。 PACC 計畫提供會計分析課程，以滿足對能夠利用會計知識專業知識分析大數據的專業人員日益增長的需求。除了核心會計課程之外，該類別的學生還將參加多個數據分析課程。畢業生具備會計專業知識和數據分析能力，使他們能夠在會計、金融、諮詢和其他需要高級數據分析的業務職位中取得成功。
全球稅收和治理流
隨著全球範圍內稅務法規和監管變得日益複雜，對具有會計專業知識的熟練稅務專業人員的需求大幅增長。全球稅務和治理方向滿足了對精通會計、稅務、合規和治理的會計畢業生日益增長的需求。該類別的學生將學習核心會計課程和額外的專業稅務課程。除了多項會計專業資格考試的紙本豁免外，該類別的學生還可以獲得香港稅務學會（TIHK）提供的特許稅務顧問（CTA）資格考試的紙質豁免。畢業生通常從事稅務諮詢和合規工作。
