d: The Quantitative Finance program has been designed to address the growing demand for highly skilled individuals who possess exceptional quantitative abilities and analytical abilities in today's globalized economy. This program equips students with a comprehensive understanding of the latest developments in the financial industry through specialized courses in finance, economics, Applied Mathematics, statistics, Artificial Intelligence and information technology.

By completing this program, graduates will acquire a strong grasp of financial investment instruments and will be highly qualified for employment in various sectors, including investment banking, corporate and commercial banking, consulting, accounting and financial services, as well as general management roles in both financial and non-financial corporations.

To ensure a well-rounded education, the program places a strong emphasis on experiential learning beyond the confines of the classroom. Practical courses serve as a bridge between theoretical knowledge and real-world applications in banking and finance. Additionally, a guest speaker series provides ample opportunities for students to engage with industry experts and discuss current finance-related issues of interest.

Students will have opportunities to participate in overseas exchanges and internships to broaden their horizons. The program has established robust networks and partnerships within the financial industry, and the positive experiences gained through internships have instilled confidence in companies to offer positions to students upon graduation.
JS4252.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 定量金融課程旨在滿足當今全球化經濟中對具有卓越定量能力和分析能力的高技能人才不斷增長的需求。該計畫透過金融、經濟學、應用數學、統計學、人工智慧和資訊科技等專業課程，使學生全面了解金融業的最新發展。
透過完成課程，畢業生將深入掌握金融投資工具，並具備在投資銀行、企業和商業銀行、諮詢、會計和金融服務以及金融和非金融公司的綜合管理等各個領域就業的高素質。
為了確保全面的教育，該計劃非常重視課堂外的體驗式學習。實踐課程充當銀行和金融領域理論知識與實際應用之間的橋樑。此外，客座演講系列為學生提供了與行業專家交流並討論當前感興趣的金融相關問題的充足機會。
學生將有機會參加海外交流和實習，並開闊視野。該計畫在金融業內建立了強大的網絡和合作夥伴關係，透過實習獲得的積極經驗為企業在畢業後為學生提供職位注入了信心。
JS4252.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: Hong Kong has emerged as a major global financial hub. There is thus growing demand for finance professionals who possess knowledge of global economic and financial affairs and competence in carrying out financial analyses and operations.

The Interdisciplinary Major Programme in Global Economics and Finance (GLEF) strives to provide students with solid interdisciplinary training in economics and finance in a global context, caters to societal needs by preparing graduates with strong research and analytical skills, as well as on-the-job experience and the requisite global mindset to overcome challenges in the banking and finance industry. Graduates are expected to embrace the virtues of integrity, honesty, and a sense of responsibility.
This programme covers non-conventional major topics. Some examples are:
• Stabilization mechanisms such as the International Monetary Fund (IMF) and European Central Bank (ECB)
• The emergence of China and its impact on the international economic and financial order
• Corporate social responsibility and sustainability of financial institutions in a global context
The GLEF programme places heavy emphasis on internship and global experiential learning experience, from which students can further develop their potential and consolidate their knowledge.
Graduates can develop promising careers in multinational firms in the banking, finance and business consulting sectors or engage in financial research in public or private organisations.
JS4254.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 香港已成為全球主要金融中心。因此，對具有全球經濟和金融事務知識以及進行財務分析和操作能力的金融專業人士的需求不斷增長。
全球經濟與金融跨學科專業課程（GLEF）致力於為學生提供全球背景下經濟和金融方面紮實的跨學科培訓，透過培養具有強大研究和分析技能、在職經驗和克服銀行和金融業挑戰所需的全球思維的畢業生來滿足社會需求。畢業生應具備正直、誠實和責任感的美德。
該計劃涵蓋非常規的主要主題。一些例子是：
• 國際貨幣基金組織（IMF）與歐洲中央銀行（ECB）等穩定機制
• 中國的崛起​​及其對國際經濟與金融秩序的影響
• 全球背景下金融機構的企業社會責任與永續性
GLEF計畫非常重視實習和全球體驗式學習經歷，學生可以從中進一步發展自己的潛力並鞏固自己的知識。
畢業生可以在銀行、金融和商業諮詢領域的跨國公司發展有前途的職業，或在公共或私人組織從事金融研究。
JS4254.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: Combining the strengths of CUHK Business School and CUHK LAW, the BBA-JD Double Degree Programme prepares students to assume leading roles in a variety of work sectors including but not limited to the legal profession, commerce, business and government service.

The BBA-JD is a through-train and well-structured programme that allows students to graduate with an undergraduate and a postgraduate degrees in 5 years (as opposed to the 6 years for completion of an undergraduate degree and a JD degree separately). At the same time, students have flexibility to opt out and graduate with either a BBA degree, or a BBA degree with a Minor in Law. The rigorous but flexible approach gives students to customise their study options according to their interests, strengths and needs.
JS4264.r: The BBA-JD Double Degree is a 5-year full-time programme. Under this programme structure, students are required to: • Take both business and undergraduate law courses in the first 3 years; • Take both business and JD courses in year 4*; and • Fully engage with JD programme and take JD courses in year 5. *Students are provided with an option to opt out from the BBA-JD Double Degree Programme and complete a BBA degree or a BBA degree with a Minor in Law in a 4-year time.
z: 結合香港中文大學商學院和香港中文大學法律學院的優勢，工商管理學士-法學博士雙學位課程幫助學生做好準備，在不同的工作領域擔任領導角色，包括但不限於法律專業、商業、商業和政府服務。
BBA-JD 是一個結構完善的一條龍課程，允許學生在 5 年內獲得本科學位和研究生學位（而不是分別完成本科學位和法學博士學位需要 6 年）。同時，學生可以靈活地選擇退出並畢業時獲得 BBA 學位或輔修法律的 BBA 學位。嚴格且靈活的方法讓學生可以根據自己的興趣、優勢和需求量身定制學習選擇。
JS4264.zr: BBA-JD 雙學位是一個為期 5 年的全日制課程。在此課程架構下，學生必須： • 在前 3 年修讀商業和本科法律課程； • 在第 4 年同時學習商業和法學博士課程*； • 充分參與 JD 課程，並在第 5 年參加 JD 課程。 *學生可以選擇退出 BBA-JD 雙學位課程，並在 4 年內完成 BBA 學位或輔修法律的 BBA 學位。

d: The BSc in Quantitative Finance and Risk Management Science programme (QFRM) is jointly administered by the Department of Finance and the Department of Statistics and Data Science at The Chinese University of Hong Kong. It combines the strengths and features of two well-established and highly successful programmes from the respective departments: the Quantitative Finance programme and the Risk Management Science programme. The programme is consistently ranked at the top in terms of admission credentials among all quantitatively related programmes in Hong Kong and together with programmes like Global Business Studies and Medicine in CUHK.

As a major financial service centre, Hong Kong has a growing demand for professionals with both quantitative finance and risk management science background. The programme provides state-of-the-art training in business and finance, risk management science, mathematics and statistics, and computing applications. By offering comprehensive academic and professional training, the programme aims to nurture competent finance and risk management professionals who can work in investment banking, corporate and commercial banking, consulting, accounting and financial services, as well as in general management in the financial and government sectors. In addition to our tailor-made coaching schemes, students are also encouraged to participate in overseas exchanges and internships.

The programme has established strong networks and partnerships with the finance industry over the years. Outstanding performance during internship renders strong motives for companies to offer our students permanent positions upon graduation. The programme also enables students to build up a solid theoretical background for pursuing further study at the Master or PhD levels in economics, finance, actuarial science and insurance, mathematics, statistics and risk management science.

The School of Mathematics at University of Edinburgh (UoE) has an agreement with the Department of Statistics and Data Science at CUHK, which allows students to study mathematics at the undergraduate level for two years at CUHK and then transfer to UoE to complete two additional years of study. The QFRM programme is one of the programmes under the ‘2+2’ agreement, and eligible students may apply for the dual degree programme. On successful completion of the fourth year at Edinburgh, students will graduate with two bachelor’s degrees, one each from CUHK and UoE.
JS4276.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 計量金融與風險管理科學理學士課程​​（QFRM）由香港中文大學金融系及統計與資料科學系共同管理。它結合了各自部門兩個成熟且​​非常成功的專案的優勢和特點：定量金融專案和風險管理科學專案。該課程的入學資格在香港所有定量相關課程中一直名列前茅，並與中大的全球商業研究和醫學等課程一起排名第一。
作為主要的金融服務中心，香港對具有數量金融和風險管理科學背景的專業人士的需求不斷增長。該計畫提供商業和金融、風險管理科學、數學和統計學以及計算應用方面最先進的培訓。透過提供全面的學術和專業培訓，該計畫旨在培養能夠在投資銀行、企業和商業銀行、諮詢、會計和金融服務以及金融和政府部門的綜合管理工作的有能力的財務和風險管理專業人員。除了量身訂製的輔導計畫外，我們還鼓勵學生參加海外交流和實習。
多年來，該計劃與金融業建立了強大的網絡和合作夥伴關係。實習期間的出色表現使企業有強烈的動機在學生畢業後為他們提供永久職位。該計畫還使學生能夠建立紮實的理論背景，以便在經濟學、金融學、精算科學和保險、數學、統計學和風險管理科學領域繼續攻讀碩士或博士學位。
愛丁堡大學數學學院與香港中文大學統計及資料科學系達成協議，學生可在香港中文大學本科階段學習兩年數學，然後轉學到愛丁堡大學完成兩年額外的學習。 QFRM計畫是「2+2」協議下的計畫之一，符合資格的學生可以申請雙學位計畫。在愛丁堡成功完成第四年的學業後，學生將獲得兩個學士學位，分別來自香港中文大學和英格蘭大學。
JS4276.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: This interdisciplinary undergraduate programme is designed for talented students who would like to develop a career in biotechnology entrepreneurship, business analysis, and/or healthcare management, to capture the emerging opportunities in Hong Kong, the Greater Bay Area, and beyond. The programme brings together the Faculties of Science, Medicine, and Business Administration at The Chinese University of Hong Kong to co-develop a brand-new, integrated curriculum with active learning as the core. In addition to a compilation of complementary courses in Biomedical Sciences, Business Administration, Molecular Biotechnology, and Public Health, capstone courses will be co-taught by the professors in different Faculties to upgrade students’ problem-solving ability using cross-disciplinary knowledge. Opportunities of mentorships and internships from the relevant industrial, service, and venture capital sectors will be sought to allow the students to learn through connecting knowledge with real-world problems.
Missions
The programme aims to develop talents with a broad base of complementary knowledge, who shall demonstrate the following essential attributes:
• an entrepreneurial mindset with ground-breaking ideas to translate the advancement of biotechnology, biomedical sciences, and healthcare into commercial opportunities
• an ability to integrate a broad base of knowledge in biotechnology, biomedical & health sciences, data analytics, and business management to provide innovative and cross-disciplinary solutions
• an ability to communicate with collaborators of diverse backgrounds and participate in the management of healthcare operations and development.
Highlights
• Cross-disciplinary training by Faculties of Science, Medicine, and Business Administration
• Biotechnology knowledge with an emphasis on the applications on biomedical and environmental issues
• Analytical skills to connect scientific knowledge to “real-world” business
• Sense and skills in entrepreneurship and healthcare management
Career Prospects
• Leaders in the start-ups in advanced life science, health-technology, and environment solutions
• Business consultants and analysts for science and technology firms
• Management in healthcare and medical institutes
JS4725.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 這個跨學科本科課程專為那些希望在生物技術創業、商業分析和/或醫療保健管理領域發展職業的才華橫溢的學生而設計，以抓住香港、大灣區及其他地區的新興機會。該計劃匯集香港中文大學理學院、醫學院及工商管理學院，共同開發以主動學習為核心的全新綜合課程。除了生物醫學、工商管理、分子生物技術和公共衛生等補充課程外，頂點課程將由不同系的教授共同教授，以提升學生利用跨學科知識解決問題的能力。將尋求相關工業、服務和創投領域的指導和實習機會，讓學生透過將知識與現實問題聯繫起來進行學習。
使命
該計劃旨在培養具有廣泛互補知識基礎的人才，他們應表現出以下基本素質：
• 具有突破性想法的創業心態，將生物技術、生物醫學和醫療保健的進步轉化為商業機會
• 能夠整合生物技術、生物醫學和健康科學、數據分析和企業管理方面的廣泛知識，提供創新和跨學科的解決方案
• 能夠與不同背景的合作者溝通並參與醫療保健營運和開發的管理。
亮點
• 科學、醫學和工商管理學院的跨學科培訓
• 生物技術知識，重點在於生物醫學和環境問題的應用
• 將科學知識與「現實世界」業務連結起來的分析能力
• 創業和醫療保健管理的意識和技能
職業前景
• 先進生命科學、健康科技與環境解決方案新創企業的領導者
• 科技公司的商業顧問和分析師
• 醫療保健和醫療機構的管理
JS4725.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: The Bachelor of Science in Interdisciplinary Data Analytics & X is a comprehensive Collaborative Double Major Programme jointly offered by The Chinese University of Hong Kong (CUHK) and The Chinese University of Hong Kong (Shenzhen) (CUHK (SZ)).

Students will pursue a first major in Interdisciplinary Data Analytics offered by CUHK, and a second major among specific academic disciplines (business, engineering and science) offered by either CUHK or CUHK(SZ).
Major programmes offered by CUHK:
• Information Engineering
• Integrated BBA
• Mathematics
• Statistics
• Systems Engineering and Engineering Management
Major programmes offered by CUHK(SZ):
• Computer Science and Engineering
• Electrical and Computer Engineering
• Financial Engineering
• Marketing and Communication
• Mathematics and Applied Mathematics
• Statistics

The programme encompasses a wide spectrum of subject knowledge and skills in business, engineering and science, with real-life application of big data and business analytics for innovation and development, and in-depth study of a chosen subject. It offers exposure to the Greater Bay Area (GBA) cities, and is ideally suited for students interested in pursuing a career in leading national organizations and multi-national enterprises committed to developing markets in the GBA or Mainland China.
JS4760.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 跨學科資料分析理學士是香港中文大學（CUHK）與香港中文大學（深圳）（CUHK（SZ））共同開設的綜合性雙主修課程。
學生將攻讀香港中文大學提供的第一主修跨學科數據分析，以及香港中文大學或香港中文大學（深圳）提供的特定學科（商業、工程和科學）中的第二專業。
香港中文大學提供的主要課程：
• 資訊工程
• 綜合BBA
• 數學
• 統計數據
• 系統工程及工程管理
香港中文大學（深圳）的主要課程：
• 電腦科學與工程
• 電機與電腦工程
• 金融工程
• 行銷與傳播
• 數學與應用數學
• 統計數據
該課程涵蓋商業、工程和科學領域廣泛的學科知識和技能，並在現實生活中應用大數據和商業分析來促進創新和發展，並對所選學科進行深入研究。它提供了接觸大灣區（GBA）城市的機會，非常適合有興趣在致力於發展大灣區或中國大陸市場的領先國家組織和跨國企業工作的學生。
JS4760.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: The programme aims to provide an interdisciplinary learning experience to students who are interested in the scientific and medical aspects of human movement, coaching, health and rehabilitation, and research-oriented activities in academia. The Human Movement Science explores the causes and consequences of human movement across the lifespan, including the prevention and treatment of acute and chronic conditions that cause disorders of movement. The Health Studies teach students to develop and apply principles of exercise-based preventative intervention, management of health and wellbeing, and rehabilitation to individuals who are injured or physically impaired. Students will examine human movement from different perspectives, including injury prevention, exercise rehabilitation, biomechanics, exercise physiology, health and fitness, motor control and motor development to equip themselves to contribute to major medical advances and more effective models of health care. This programme prepares students for professional career in coaching, rehabilitation, sports therapy, health-related sector, sport-related industrial, or exercise scientist.
JS4320.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 該計畫旨在為對人體運動、教練、健康和復健以及學術界研究活動的科學和醫學方面感興趣的學生提供跨學科的學習體驗。人體運動科學探索人體在整個生命週期中運動的原因和後果，包括預防和治療導致運動障礙的急性和慢性疾病。健康研究教導學生製定和應用以運動為基礎的預防性介入、健康和福祉管理以及受傷或身體受損的個人復原的原則。學生將從不同角度研究人體運動，包括損傷預防、運動復健、生物力學、運動生理學、健康與健身、運動控制和運動發展，以裝備自己為重大醫學進步和更有效的醫療保健模式做出貢獻。該計畫幫助學生為教練、復健、運動治療、健康相關領域、體育相關工業或運動科學家的職業生涯做好準備。
JS4320.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: The aim of the BEd Programme in Physical Education, Exercise Science and Health is to train physical education teachers, coaches, sports management and health promotion personnel for local academic institutions and government and private organisations. Completion of the programme leads to the award of a BEd degree, a qualification recognised as equivalent to a Postgraduate Diploma in Education, thereby entitling graduates to enter the teaching profession immediately after graduation. There is increasing recognition of the importance of health improvement through physical education and exercise. The Programme has four core components: health, physical education, exercise science and advanced professional skills, as well as capstone experience such as Teaching Practice, Internships and Research Project. Students must take 147 credits (including 104 units in their major programme) within five years to graduate. The programme trains students as generalists in sports and physical education or as specialists in the areas of exercise physiology, sports biomechanics, sports psychology, sports sociology, physical education pedagogy, health and fitness, and testing and measurement. Students may choose any of the aforementioned specialised topics as their graduation research project.
z: 體育、運動科學與健康學士課程的目的是為當地學術機構以及政府和私人組織培訓體育教師、教練、體育管理和健康促進人員。完成該課程後將獲得教育學士學位，該資格被認為相當於教育學研究生文憑，從而使畢業生有權在畢業後立即進入教學行業。人們越來越認識到透過體育教育和運動來改善健康的重要性。該計畫有四個核心組成部分：健康、體育、運動科學和高級專業技能，以及教學實踐、實習和研究計畫等頂點經驗。學生必須在五年內修完 147 個學分（包括主修課程的 104 個學分）才能畢業。該計畫將學生培養為運動和體育教育的通才，或運動生理學、運動生物力學、運動心理學、運動社會學、體育教育學、健康與健身以及測試和測量領域的專家。學生可以選擇上述任何一個專業課題作為畢業研究專案。

d: This 5-year co-terminal double-degree programme offered by the Faculty integrates academic and professional training over the course of five years, and prepares students to become professional Chinese language teachers. The courses offered by the Department of Chinese Language and Literature enrich students’ knowledge of Chinese language and literature, while the educational studies courses offered by the Faculty of Education develop their pedagogical content knowledge, teaching skills and ability to conduct educational research. The programme also includes school experience and teaching practice in local schools to ensure that students are able to put theories into practice.

Students also have the opportunity to join an eight- to ten-week overseas language immersion programme. Partially subsidised by the HKSAR Government, this immersion programme helps students improve their Chinese language proficiency, sample Chinese culture and expand their experience of overseas educational practices.

Upon fulfilment of the programme requirements, students are simultaneously awarded two degrees—a Bachelor of Arts (BA) and a Bachelor of Education (BEd)—which together is recognised as equivalent to a Postgraduate Diploma in Education (PGDE), ensuring that students meet the professional requirements needed to obtain qualified teacher status. Graduates of the programme are fully qualified to teach Chinese in local primary and secondary schools.
z: 該學院提供的為期五年的聯合終端雙學位課程將為期五年的學術和專業培訓融為一體，為學生成為專業的漢語教師做好準備。漢語言文學系開設的課程豐富學生的漢語文學知識，教育學院開設的教育研究課程則培養學生的教學內容知識、教學技能和教育研究能力。該計劃還包括學校經驗和當地學校的教學實踐，以確保學生能夠將理論付諸實踐。
學生還有機會參加為期八到十週的海外語言沉浸課程。此沉浸式課程由香港特別行政區政府提供部分資助，幫助學生提升中文程度、體驗中國文化並擴大海外教育實務經驗。
滿足課程要求後，學生將同時獲得兩個學位——文學學士 (BA) 和教育學士 (BEd)——這兩個學位一起被認為相當於教育研究生文憑 (PGDE)，確保學生滿足獲得合格教師資格所需的專業要求。該計畫畢業生完全具備在當地中小學任教漢語的資格。

d: The co-terminal double degree programme is a five-year full-time undergraduate programme offered by the Faculty of Education, in collaboration with the Department of English and the English Language Teaching Unit of the Faculty of Arts. We aim at nurturing effective and qualified English language teachers for local primary and secondary schools.

The programme focuses on three major disciplines: the study of English language and literature, educational issues, and English language teaching methodology. Students are afforded opportunities to integrate theories and classroom practices in school experiences and teaching practicums in both primary and secondary schools. Students will participate in an 8-week overseas immersion programme with the financial support of the HKSAR Government to further enhance students’ English language proficiency, enrich their understanding of the cultures of English-speaking communities, and expand their experience of overseas educational practices. The two research-based courses embedded in the programme will help students synthesise subject knowledge and independent inquiry, and equip students with informed decisions in their future classroom.

Graduates of the programme will be awarded two degrees: Bachelor of Arts and Bachelor of Education, including a recognition as equivalent to a Postgraduate Diploma in Education qualification. They are also considered to have met the HKSAR Government’s Language Proficiency Requirement, and are recognized as subject trained teachers of English in local primary and secondary schools by the Education Bureau.
z: 聯合終端雙學位課程是教育學院與英語系和文學院英語教學組合作開設的五年全日製本科課程。我們的目標是為當地中小學培養高效率、合格的英語教師。
該計畫專注於三個主要學科：英語語言和文學研究、教育問題和英語教學方法。學生有機會將理論和課堂實踐融入中小學的學校經驗和教學實踐中。學生將在香港特別行政區政府的資助下參加為期8週的海外沉浸式課程，以進一步提高學生的英語水平，豐富他們對英語社區文化的了解，並擴大他們的海外教育實踐經驗。該計劃中嵌入的兩門基於研究的課程將幫助學生綜合學科知識和獨立探究，並讓學生在未來的課堂上做出明智的決定。
該課程的畢業生將獲得兩個學位：文學學士和教育學士，包括相當於教育研究生文憑資格的認可。他們亦被視為符合香港特別行政區政府的語文能力要求，並獲教育局認可為本地中小學經過學科培訓的英語教師。

d: This double-major programme is offered by the Faculty of Education in collaboration with the Department of Mathematics. It aims to nurture professional Mathematics teachers by providing them with broad-based and subject-specific knowledge and sound pedagogical skills. Upon fulfilment of the programme requirements, graduates are awarded a Bachelor of Education (BEd) degree—with a dual major in Mathematics and Mathematics Education—which is recognised as equivalent to a Postgraduate Diploma in Education (PGDE), and are qualified to teach in secondary schools.
z: 此雙學位課程由教育學院與數學系合作提供。它旨在培養專業數學教師，為他們提供廣泛的、特定學科的知識和良好的教學技能。滿足課程要求後，畢業生將獲得教育學士學位（BEd），主修數學和數學教育雙專業，該學位被認為相當於教育研究生文憑（PGDE），並有資格在中學任教。

d: This programme is a five-year full-time undergraduate programme for students who aspire to pursue a career in Early Childhood Education field. Through a multi-disciplinary approach, it aims to nurture students to be professional, creative and ethical early childhood educators in future. This programme will not only equip students with solid disciplinary knowledge on child development and pedagogical skills to foster the holistic development of children, but will also with the necessary knowledge and skills to work with parents, families and communities to foster children’s development, parent-teacher relationships and school effectiveness, as well as the competence and sensitivity to identify characteristics of children with diverse needs for early intervention, and to plan and implement a responsive curriculum to facilitate the physical and psychological development of children with various learning, emotional and behavioral needs.
z: 該項目是一個為期五年的全日製本科項目，適合有志於從事幼兒教育領域職業的學生。透過多學科的方法，它旨在培養學生成為未來專業、富有創造力和道德的幼兒教育者。本課程不僅使學生具備紮實的兒童發展學科知識和教學技能，以促進兒童的全面發展，還將具備與家長、家庭和社區合作促進兒童發展、親師關係和學校效能所需的知識和技能，以及識別具有不同需求的兒童特徵進行早期幹預的能力和敏感性，並規劃和促進響應式課程，以具有不同學習、情感和行為需求的兒童的身心發展。

d: The BSc in Learning Design and Technology is a 4-year integrative programme jointly offered by the Faculties of Education, Engineering and Science. Its design is based on the latest re-formulation of the science of education in which education is cast as "a metadiscipline or discipline of disciplines" to equip learners with knowledge, competencies, and leadership to facilitate learning and development in and beyond the formal education settings. Graduates of the programme will be equipped with multi-disciplinary knowledge in education, technology, and science with education and learning sciences serving as the unifying threads. Not only will students be provided with internship opportunities to consolidate theory-practice integration, but they will also carry out research projects to synthesize multi-disciplinary knowledge and action-science competencies.
Programme features:
• Integrative, multi-disciplinary programme in education, technology and science
• Theory driven, action-science oriented, and lab-based learning approach
• Integrated STEM education with technology-based and multi-media instruction in multicultural contexts
• Service learning competencies through education and community engagement
• Research in technology, science and transdisciplinary studies in and beyond STEM education
• Articulation with the PGDE in technology- and/or science-related teaching and other research-based postgraduate programmes in education and/or technology-related disciplines
JS4386.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 學習設計與技術理學學士課程是由教育學院、工程學院和科學學院聯合提供的為期 4 年的綜合課程。其設計基於教育科學的最新重新表述，其中教育被視為“一門元學科或學科的學科”，旨在為學習者提供知識、能力和領導力，以促進正規教育環境內外的學習和發展。該計畫的畢業生將具備以教育和學習科學為統一主線的教育、技術和科學方面的多學科知識。學生不僅將獲得實習機會，鞏固理論與實踐的結合，還將開展研究項目，以綜合多學科知識和行動科學能力。
方案特點：
• 教育、科技與科學領域的綜合、多學科項目
• 理論驅動、行動科學導向、實驗室為基礎的學習方法
• 在多元文化背景下將 STEM 教育與以科技和多媒體為基礎的教學結合
• 透過教育和社區參與培養服務學習能力
• STEM 教育內外的科技、科學和跨學科研究
• 與 PGDE 銜接技術和/或科學相關教學以及教育和/或技術相關學科的其他研究型研究生課程
JS4386.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: The Mechanical and Automation Engineering (MAE) Programme of CUHK aims at offering solid education and cutting-edge research opportunities around two aspects of engineering: (1) the proper physical interaction of engineering systems with the physical world through force, heat, and energy ("Mechanical"); and (2) the self-operability of the systems demanding minimum intervention from humans ("Automation"). MAE seeks to design and control such interaction based upon fundamental knowledge on rigid body mechanics, fluid mechanics, thermodynamics, and conservation of mass and energy. It is also desired that engineering systems do not just do what is instructed but exhibit certain degree of autonomy in their operations, based upon knowledge on mechatronics, robotics and control.
JS4408.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 中大機械與自動化工程（MAE）課程旨在圍繞工程的兩個方面提供紮實的教育和前沿研究機會：（1）工程系統透過力、熱和能量（「機械」）與物理世界進行適當的物理相互作用； (2) 系統的自我操作性要求最少的人類幹預（「自動化」）。 MAE 尋求基於剛體力學、流體力學、熱力學以及質量和能量守恆的基礎知識來設計和控制這種相互作用。也希望工程系統不僅按照指示行事，而且基於機電一體化、機器人技術和控制知識，在其操作中表現出一定程度的自主性。
JS4408.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: Computer Engineering (CENG) and Computer Science (CSCI) are four-year programmes offered by The Department of Computer Science and Engineering (CSE), which is the first computer science department in Hong Kong that started to launch its undergraduate major programme in 1978.

While both CENG and CSCI are rigorously founded on problem solving by programming, data structure, and algorithm design, CENG distinguishes itself from others by offering specialized training for students in areas such as mobile embedded systems, microprocessors, VLSI design, hardware-aided security, and super-computing. On the other hand, CSCI focuses more on software innovation and offers diverse specialized areas such as artificial intelligence, bioinformatics, big data analytics, cloud computing, computer and network security, database and information systems, graphics and computer vision, and machine learning.

Students will first be admitted to the CSE department through the department-based Computer Science and Engineering programme. After the first year of study, eligible students will be invited to declare their major in CENG or CSCI. Students with outstanding HKDSE results and good academic performance in the first year of study are guaranteed their first choice of major.
JS4412.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 電腦工程（CENG）與電腦科學（CSCI）皆為四年課程，由電腦科學與工程系（CSE）開設，是香港第一個電腦科學系，於1978年開始開設大學專業課程。
雖然 CENG 和 CSCI 都嚴格建立在透過程式設計、資料結構和演算法設計解決問題的基礎上，但 CENG 的與眾不同之處在於為學生提供行動嵌入式系統、微處理器、VLSI 設計、硬體輔助安全和超級運算等領域的專門培訓。另一方面，CSCI更注重軟體創新，提供人工智慧、生物資訊學、大數據分析、雲端運算、電腦和網路安全、資料庫和資訊系統、圖形和電腦視覺以及機器學習等多樣化的專業領域。
學生將首先透過電腦科學與工程系課程被 CSE 系錄取。第一年學習結束後，符合資格的學生將被邀請申報 CENG 或 CSCI 專業。文憑試成績優異且第一年學業表現良好的學生可保證其首選專業。
JS4412.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: The Computational Data Science (CDASN) programme is designed to manufacture mathematical, technical, and analytical skills to create solutions to lead data-driven decision-making. Data scientists build intelligent systems to understand, interpret, manage and derive key knowledge from big data sets. It aims to equip students with the latest in large-scale data processing, computational statistics, machine learning, data mining, and data visualisation, while also developing the skills to effectively communicate data insights to key stakeholders, etc. Such capabilities enable students to develop cutting-edge massive data analytics and management solutions that are of practical interest to academics, industry, and society.
JS4416.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 計算數據科學 (CDASN) 計畫旨在培養數學、技術和分析技能，以創建解決方案來引導數據驅動的決策。資料科學家建立智慧系統來理解、解釋、管理和從大數據集中獲取關鍵知識。它旨在讓學生掌握最新的大規模資料處理、計算統計、機器學習、資料探勘和資料視覺化方面的知識，同時培養向關鍵利害關係人等有效傳達資料見解的技能。這些能力使學生能夠開發出對學術界、工業界和社會都有實際意義的尖端海量資料分析和管理解決方案。
JS4416.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: The Financial Technology (FinTech) programme aims at providing students with essential knowledge to apply new technology, especially information technology and data science techniques, to a variety of financial services. After four years of all-round education, students are expected to be able to derive and develop financial and managerial insights from big data, design and engineer innovative solutions to meet financial service needs, optimize financial decisions in complex business environments, and understand and analyze the social, economic, security, and legal impact of their solutions. Students admitted by the FinTech programme can also apply for the double major programme in FinTech and IBBA as well as the dual degree programmes.
JS4428.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 金融科技（FinTech）課程旨在為學生提供將新技術（特別是資訊科技和數據科學技術）應用於各種金融服務的基本知識。經過四年的全面教育，學生將能夠從大數據中獲取和發展財務和管理見解，設計和設計創新解決方案以滿足金融服務需求，在複雜的商業環境中優化財務決策，並理解和分析其解決方案的社會、經濟、安全和法律影響。金融科技專業錄取的學生還可以申請金融科技和IBBA雙主修課程以及雙學位課程。
JS4428.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: The CUHK Electronic Engineering (EE) programme was established in 1970 and is accredited by The Hong Kong Institution of Engineers (HKIE). The EE programme provides the broadest and most foundational engineering training for modern society. The courses offered are designed not only to convey fundamental knowledge in mathematics, science, and engineering but also to focus training on one or more advanced EE subject areas. Students will have strong hands-on skills in circuit design, programming, and development of electronic components, systems, and networks, which will prepare them to advance the state-of-the-art technologies and to break new grounds.
JS4434.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 香港中文大學電子工程（EE）課程成立於1970年，並獲香港工程師學會（HKIE）認可。 EE 計畫為現代社會提供最廣泛、最基礎的工程培訓。所提供的課程不僅旨在傳達數學、科學和工程方面的基礎知識，而且還專注於培訓一個或多個高級 EE 學科領域。學生將在電路設計、程式設計以及電子元件、系統和網路開發方面擁有強大的實踐技能，這將為他們推進最先進的技術並開闢新天地做好準備。
JS4434.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: Information Engineering discipline deals with the generation, transmission, analysis, and use of information, data, and knowledge in systems for building a smart and secure information society. The comprehensive yet flexible curriculum unlocks a broad spectrum of career opportunities in various sectors to our students, such as:
• Data generation/coordination: Internet-of-things/Cyber-physical systems
• Transmission: Wireless and optical (beyond-5G) communications, computer networks
• Analysis: Artificial intelligence, big-data analytics, computer vision
• Processing: Multimedia, cloud computing
• Protection: Cybersecurity, cryptography, privacy, blockchain, e-payment
• Theoretical aspects: Information theory, signal processing, machine learning, control theory
Details at: https://www.ie.cuhk.edu.hk/ierg/
JS4446.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 資訊工程學科涉及系統中資訊、數據和知識的生成、傳輸、分析和使用，以建立智慧、安全的資訊社會。全面而靈活的課程為我們的學生提供了各個領域的廣泛職業機會，例如：
• 資料產生/協調：物聯網/網路物理系統
• 傳輸：無線和光纖（5G 以上）通訊、電腦網絡
• 分析：人工智慧、大數據分析、電腦視覺
• 處理：多媒體、雲端運算
• 保護：網路安全、密碼學、隱私、區塊鏈、電子支付
• 理論方面：資訊理論、訊號處理、機器學習、控制理論
詳情請見：https://www.ie.cuhk.edu.hk/ierg/
JS4446.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: The programme integrates cutting-edge technology and quantitative skills with management. With a mission to nurture talents for pillar industries in Hong Kong, the programme equips students with essential methodologies to derive managerial insights for optimal decision-making in complex environments in industries like finance, logistics and the service sector.

The programme features a well-rounded education so that students acquire both a range of useful technical skills and a broad perspective in technology and management. Graduates from the programme are able to work in a variety of industries and pursue senior management positions requiring engineering training and background.
JS4458.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 該計劃將尖端技術和定量技能與管理相結合。本課程以培養香港支柱產業人才為使命，為學生提供必要的方法論，讓他們在金融、物流和服務業等行業的複雜環境中獲得最佳決策的管理見解。
該計劃以全面的教育為特色，使學生獲得一系列有用的技術技能和技術和管理方面的廣闊視野。該課程的畢業生能夠在各個行業工作，並擔任需要工程培訓和背景的高階管理職位。
JS4458.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: Biomedical Engineering (BME) is a fast-growing interdisciplinary field in which engineering and technology are innovatively applied to solve biological and medical problems for mankind. Our BEng (Hons) programme in BME is jointly supported by Faculty of Engineering and Faculty of Medicine, and coherently organized under BME Department to facilitate student learning on campus, in hospitals, and with internships local and overseas.
The specialty areas of the programme are:
• Medical Instrumentation and Biosensors;
• Biomedical Imaging, Informatics and Modeling; and
• Molecular, Cell and Tissue Engineering.

Our BME graduates work in hospitals, universities, government departments, healthcare companies, medical device companies, other public organisations as well as industries. The careers available to graduates include innovation and entrepreneurship, research and development, manufacturing, technical marketing and sales, clinical engineering and regulatory affairs.

In addition, our graduates also pursue further studies in various engineering and medical disciplines in local and overseas institutions, some all the way to PhD. Our top students with interest and track record in research are eligible for potential enrollment in the CUHK MBChB programme on an accelerated track.
JS4460.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 生物醫學工程（BME）是一個快速發展的跨學科領域，工程和技術被創新地應用於解決人類的生物和醫學問題。我們的 BME 工程學士（榮譽）課程由工程學院和醫學院共同支持，並在 BME 系下協調組織，以促進學生在校園、醫院以及本地和海外實習的學習。
該計劃的專業領域是：
• 醫療儀器和生物感測器；
• 生物醫學影像、資訊學和建模；和
• 分子、細胞和組織工程。
我們的 BME 畢業生在醫院、大學、政府部門、醫療保健公司、醫療器材公司、其他公共組織以及產業工作。畢業生可以從事的職業包括創新與創業、研究與開發、製造、技術行銷和銷售、臨床工程和監管事務。
此外，我們的畢業生也在本地和海外機構繼續深造各種工程和醫學學科，有些甚至一直在攻讀博士學位。我們對研究有興趣且有良好記錄的優秀學生有資格以加速方式入讀香港中文大學醫學學士學位課程。
JS4460.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: The Energy and Environmental Engineering programme at CUHK provides the engineering knowledge and training for its graduates to tackle a broad spectrum of energy issues pertaining to renewable, environmental and building technologies. The programme puts forth a strong platform and broad-based perspective for learning and understanding the relations and trade-offs between energy and environment, and the ensuing engineering challenges in attaining viable solutions. The programme provides three focused study streams including Sustainable Energy Technology, Green Building Technology (involving courses from the School of Architecture) and Environmental Engineering (involving courses from the Geography and Resource Management programme and Earth and Environmental Sciences programme).
JS4462.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 香港中文大學的能源與環境工程課程為畢業生提供工程知識和培訓，以解決與再生能源、環境和建築技術相關的廣泛能源問題。該計劃提供了一個強大的平台和廣泛的視角，用於學習和理解能源與環境之間的關係和權衡，以及在獲得可行解決方案時隨之而來的工程挑戰。該專業提供三個重點研究方向，包括永續能源技術、綠色建築技術（涉及建築學院的課程）和環境工程（涉及地理與資源管理專業和地球與環境科學專業的課程）。
JS4462.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: AIST aims to equip students with the capabilities of designing and implementing AI systems and technologies that can analyse, reason about, and infer knowledge from massive information, backed by rigorous foundations of mathematics, basic sciences, data structures, statistics, algorithms, distributed computing, etc. Such capabilities enable students to develop cutting-edge AI solutions that are of practical interest to academia, industry and society.
Four optional specialised streams are offered for students to choose according to their own interests:
• Biomedical Intelligence
• Intelligent Multimedia Processing
• Large-scale Artificial Intelligence – Theory and Systems
• Intelligent Manufacturing and Robotics
JS4468.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: AIST旨在讓學生以嚴格的數學、基礎科學、資料結構、統計學、演算法、分散式運算等基礎為支撐，具備設計和實現能夠從海量資訊分析、推理和推斷知識的人工智慧系統和技術的能力。這些能力使學生能夠開發出對學術界、工業界和社會都有實際意義的尖端人工智慧解決方案。
提供四個可選專業方向供學生根據自己的興趣進行選擇：
• 生物醫學智能
• 智慧多媒體處理
• 大規模人工智慧—理論與系統
• 智慧製造與機器人
JS4468.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: Materials are the underpinning component of almost all kinds of technologies. Innovative materials are critical to the advancement of microelectronics, advanced manufacturing, new energy and green technology, biomedicine and biotechnology, aviation and aerospace engineering. In the Government’s I&T Development Blueprint, advanced manufacturing, new energy vehicles, and semiconductor chips are particularly highlighted as the focused technology industries to be promoted for their strategic significance in Hong Kong.

The Materials Science and Engineering programme (MASE) is intended to be untraditional and forward-looking to anticipate the future need in targeted technology areas. It aims to provide comprehensive education on scientific knowledge and engineering skills across multiple disciplines related to advanced materials and their innovative applications. Observing the high demand for scientists and engineers in the areas of advanced materials, the MASE major curriculum emphasizes on emerging materials with new functions, including nanomaterials, energy materials, electronic materials, smart materials, biomaterials, etc.

Students admitted will pursue the MASE offered by The Chinese University of Hong Kong (CUHK) as the first Major. They would also have the option of choosing one of the following Majors offered by either CUHK or The Chinese University of Hong Kong (Shenzhen) (CUHK(SZ)) as their second Major. Students could attend classes and participate in learning and research activities at both campuses.
Major programmes offered by CUHK:
• Electronic Engineering
• Energy and Environmental Engineering
• Mechanical and Automation Engineering
• Chemistry
• Physics
Major programmes offered by CUHK(SZ):
• Chemistry
• New Energy Science and Engineering
• Physics
• Biomedical Science and Engineering
JS4470.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 材料幾乎是所有技術的基礎組成部分。創新材料對於微電子、先進製造、新能源與綠色技術、生物醫藥與生物技術、航空工程等領域的進步至關重要。在政府的創科發展藍圖中，特別強調先進製造、新能源車、半導體晶片等對香港具有戰略意義的重點科技產業。
材料科學與工程專案（MASE）旨在非傳統且具有前瞻性，以預測目標技術領域的未來需求。它旨在提供與先進材料及其創新應用相關的跨多個學科的科學知識和工程技能的全面教育。鑑於先進材料領域對科學家和工程師的高需求，MASE專業課程強調具有新功能的新興材料，包括奈米材料、能源材料、電子材料、智慧材料、生物材料等。
被錄取的學生將修讀香港中文大學（中大）開設的MASE作為第一專業。他們也可以選擇香港中文大學或香港中文大學（深圳）（CUHK(SZ)）提供的以下專業之一作為第二專業。學生可以在兩個校區上課並參與學習和研究活動。
香港中文大學提供的主要課程：
• 電子工程
• 能源與環境工程
• 機械與自動化工程
• 化學
• 物理
香港中文大學（深圳）的主要課程：
• 化學
• 新能源科學與工程
• 物理
• 生物醫學科學與工程
JS4470.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: Mathematics and Information Engineering is an interdisciplinary programme designed to equip gifted students with solid fundamental knowledge in mathematics as well as information and computer sciences. This selective programme provides a strong foundation for further studies in the broad area of EECS (Electrical Engineering and Computer Science) and Math. It also equips students to pursue careers in related sectors. This programme, jointly offered by Faculty of Engineering and Faculty of Science, is managed by the Department of Information Engineering and the Department of Mathematics.
For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here. https://www.ie.cuhk.edu.hk/mieg
JS4733.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 數學與資訊工程是一門跨學科課程，旨在為有天賦的學生提供紮實的數學、資訊和電腦科學基礎知識。該選擇性課程為 EECS（電機工程和計算機科學）和數學廣泛領域的進一步學習奠定了堅實的基礎。它還使學生能夠在相關領域從事職業。課程由工學院和理學院合辦，由資訊工程系和數學繫管理。
有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。 https://www.ie.cuhk.edu.hk/mieg
JS4733.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: The Bachelor of Science in Aerospace Science and Earth Informatics & X is a comprehensive Collaborative Double Major Programme jointly offered by The Chinese University of Hong Kong (CUHK) and The Chinese University of Hong Kong (Shenzhen) (CUHK (SZ)).

The programme aims to unravel the mysteries of outer space and our own planet. This highly interdisciplinary undergraduate major combines the realms of aerospace science and Earth informatics, equipping students to harness the power of data and invent innovative solutions to explore the outer space and to safeguard our planet Earth.

Students will pursue a major in Aerospace Science and Earth Informatics at CUHK along with another major from among specific academic disciplines (Engineering, Science and Social Science) offered by either CUHK or CUHK(SZ). They will attend classes and participate in learning and research activities at both campuses.
Major programmes offered by CUHK:
• Earth and Environmental Sciences
• Energy and Environmental Engineering
• Geography and Resource Management
(in collaboration with the Institute of Space and Earth Information Science)
• Mechanical and Automation Engineering
• Physics
Major programmes offered by CUHK(SZ):
• Data Science and Big Data Technology
• Electrical and Computer Engineering
• New Energy Science and Engineering
• Physics
• Urban Management

Students will be prepared to step into a world of ample career opportunities, with skills and knowledge sought after by aerospace companies, space agencies, environmental consulting firms, geographic information system (GIS) companies, government agencies, research institutes, and NGOs. Students will also be ready for advanced studies in the Earth and planetary sciences, space physics, climate science, aerospace engineering, information technology, and data science.
JS4750.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 航空航太科學與地球資訊學理學士&X是香港中文大學（CUHK）與香港中文大學（深圳）（CUHK（SZ））共同開設的綜合性雙專業合作課程。
該計劃旨在揭開外太空和我們星球的奧秘。這個高度跨學科的本科專業結合了航空航天科學和地球資訊學領域，使學生能夠利用數據的力量並發明創新的解決方案來探索外層空間並保護我們的地球。
學生將在香港中文大學攻讀航空航天科學和地球資訊學專業，以及香港中文大學或香港中文大學（深圳）提供的特定學科（工程、科學和社會科學）中的另一個專業。他們將在兩個校區上課並參加學習和研究活動。
香港中文大學提供的主要課程：
• 地球與環境科學
• 能源與環境工程
• 地理與資源管理
（與太空與地球資訊科學研究所合作）
• 機械與自動化工程
• 物理
香港中文大學（深圳）的主要課程：
• 資料科學與大數據技術
• 電機與電腦工程
• 新能源科學與工程
• 物理
• 城市管理
學生將準備好踏入一個擁有充足職業機會的世界，掌握航空航太公司、航太機構、環境顧問公司、地理資訊系統 (GIS) 公司、政府機構、研究機構和非政府組織所尋求的技能和知識。學生還將為地球和行星科學、太空物理學、氣候科學、航空航天工程、資訊技術和數據科學的高級研究做好準備。
JS4750.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: The Bachelor of Laws (LLB) is a four-year programme that offers intellectual and personal development through the medium of law. Students will explore a range of engaging and important subjects, while developing their critical analysis and creative problem-solving skills and enhancing their ability to construct detailed, well-reasoned, compelling arguments. These are life-long skills that will support graduates in whatever careers they choose, be they in law or other fields.

The first two years are almost entirely focused on compulsory subjects, grouped into the themes of Foundations of Law, Public Law (which governs relations between the state and citizens) and Obligations (which governs relations between citizens). In their final two years, students will combine a few remaining compulsory subjects with courses they select from a range of electives, allowing students to develop further expertise in legal areas of their choice. Students may also choose to specialize in the Global Law or Chinese Law streams, indicated a degree of specialization in that particular area that will be reflected on their transcripts.
LLB students have a few opportunities to obtain double degrees. Please visit the Faculty website for further details.
JS4903.r: For details of the undergraduate curriculum, please click here.
z: 法學學士 (LLB) 是一個為期四年的課程，透過法律媒介提供智力和個人發展。學生將探索一系列引人入勝且重要的主題，同時發展他們的批判性分析和創造性解決問題的技能，並增強他們構建詳細、合理、令人信服的論點的能力。這些是終身技能，將支持畢業生選擇任何職業，無論是在法律還是其他領域。
前兩年幾乎完全集中在必修科目上，主題分為法律基礎、公法（管理國家與公民之間的關係）和義務（管理公民之間的關係）。在最後兩年，學生將把一些剩餘的必修科目與他們從一系列選修課中選擇的課程結合起來，使學生能夠在自己選擇的法律領域進一步發展專業知識。學生還可以選擇專門研究全球法或中國法，並表明該特定領域的專業程度將反映在他們的成績單上。
法學學士學生有一些獲得雙學位的機會。請造訪學院網站以了解更多詳情。
JS4903.zr: 有關本科課程的詳細信息，請點擊此處。

d: The 6-year full-time programme adopts a unique SMART medical curriculum, allowing us to nurture competent and compassionate doctors who are amply qualified both to meet the challenges of modern-day health care and to serve the community with clinical excellence and passion.
The SMART curriculum:
• Student-centred
• Mentorship-based
• Assured knowledge acquisition
• Robust clinical teaching
• Teaching ethics and professionalism

Students admitted on the basis of the HKDSE or a recognised HKDSE-equivalent qualification are required to complete six years of study to qualify for the degrees of Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBChB).
After the successful completion of a one-year internship in an approved hospital in Hong Kong, graduates become registered medical practitioners.
JS4501.r: 1. High-achieving students with outstanding HKDSE results may be offered an option of admission to Year 2 as well as an intercalated enrichment year.
z: 為期6年的全日制課程採用獨特的SMART醫學課程，使我們能夠培養有能力和富有同情心的醫生，他們有足夠的資格應對現代醫療保健的挑戰，並以臨床卓越和熱情為社區服務。
SMART課程：
• 以學生為中心
• 以指導為基礎
• 有保障的知識獲取
• 強大的臨床教學
• 教學道德與專業精神
以香港中學文憑考試或認可的香港中學文憑考試同等學歷取錄的學生必須完成六年的學習，才有資格獲得醫學學士學位和外科學士學位（MBChB）。
畢業生在香港認可的醫院成功完成一年的實習後，成為註冊醫生。
JS4501.zr: 1. 香港中學文憑考試 (HKDSE) 成績優異的優秀學生可選擇入讀二年級以及插讀強化課程。

d: In addition to MBChB curriculum, students admitted to the Global Physician-Leadership Stream will attend leadership skills training courses to nourish their global perspectives and leadership competencies, as well as become future physician leaders in health policy, education, research or other promising fields in medical and health sciences.
GPS training emphasizes on the following:
• Professional medical training of the MBChB curriculum
• International and inter-professional exposures through overseas exchange, internship and graduate studies
• Leadership skills on research, humanitarian and social services, and public health administration
• Enhanced Academic Mentorship
After successful completion of a one-year internship, graduates become registered medical practitioners in Hong Kong.
JS4502.r: 1. High-achieving students with outstanding HKDSE results may be offered an option of admission to Year 2 as well as an intercalated enrichment year.
z: 除了MBChB課程外，被全球醫師領導力流錄取的學生還將參加領導技能培訓課程，以培養他們的全球視野和領導能力，並成為衛生政策、教育、研究或醫療和健康科學其他有前景領域的未來醫師領導者。
GPS訓練強調以下幾點：
• MBChB 課程的專業醫學培訓
• 透過海外交流、實習和研究生學習進行國際和跨專業接觸
• 研究、人道主義和社會服務以及公共衛生管理的領導技能
• 加強學術指導
成功完成一年實習後，畢業生成為香港註冊醫生。
JS4502.zr: 1. 香港中學文憑考試 (HKDSE) 成績優異的優秀學生可選擇入讀二年級以及插讀強化課程。

d: The five-year Bachelor of Nursing Programme prepares students for registration as a general registered nurse with the Nursing Council of Hong Kong. Graduates of the Programme are qualified to promote health of people and provide quality care for patients in today’s increasingly technological and complex health-care field. The main subjects of study include biological and behavioural sciences, health promotion and maintenance, nursing practice and theory, nursing research and information technology. Students also gain experience in the care of clients in both community and hospital settings.
The Programme offers the following advantages:
• Internationally-recognised reputation
• Full clinical supervision by teachers from the University and clinical mentors from hospitals
• Strong theory-practice link through integrated clinical block practice
• Shared teaching by internationally renowned medical experts and clinical nurse specialists of the Faculty of Medicine
• Support from territory-wide hospitals and community agencies
Learning Outcomes:
Upon completion of the programme, students are able to:

• provide evidence-based care that supports physical and homeostatic functioning, promotes psychosocial functioning and life-style changes, protects against harm, recognizes the patients as a member of the family unit and community, and leverages on effective use of the health-care delivery system.
• apply appropriate clinical and nursing therapeutic techniques unsupervised.
• apply the principles of health promotion in meeting the health needs of individuals, groups, families and communities.
• demonstrate effective skills in communicating with patients, carers, peers and the health care team.
• coordinate the care of clients in hospital and community settings.
• apply technology in the processing of information for nursing practice and research.
• provide patient-centred care using the nursing process as a problem solving approach.
• recognize, explain and manage health problems using basic social, behavioural, clinical sciences and managerial principles.
• display appropriate professional attitudes and apply relevant ethical and legal principles in the practice of nursing.
• demonstrate competent decision-making, clinical reasoning and judgment skills to make decisions and take actions.
• demonstrate understanding of self and engage in ongoing lifelong personal development.
• recognize the roles of nurses within a health service institution and their influences on its development, and engage in the development of nursing as a health-care profession.
• uphold the professional code of conduct.
• incorporate cultural factors into the practice of nursing.
Course Titles:
• Anatomy
• Application of Behavioural and Social Sciences in Nursing
• Application of Public Health and Epidemiology in Nursing
• Clinical Practice I
• Clinical Practice II
• Clinical Practice III
• Clinical Practice IV
• Clinical Practice V
• Clinical Practice VI
• Clinical Practice VII
• Complementary and Alternative Medicine
• Coordinating Nursing Practice
• Culture and Nursing
• Development of Nursing
• Disaster Nursing
• Ethical and Legal Issues in Nursing
• Fundamentals of Genetic and Genomic Nursing
• Fundamentals of Nursing I
• Fundamentals of Nursing II
• Fundamentals of Nursing III
• Health Promotion
• Infectious Diseases and Their Control
• Introduction to Behavioural and Social Sciences
• Microbiology
• Nursing for Complex Health Needs
• Nursing in the Community
• Nursing in the Hospital I
• Nursing in the Hospital II
• Nursing in Clinical Specialties I
• Nursing in Clinical Specialties II
• Nursing in Clinical Specialties III
• Nursing Research
• Physiology
• Scholarly Inquiries in Nursing
• Student Exchange Programme
• The Hong Kong Health Care System
• Traditional Chinese Medicine Nursing
• Trends and Professional Issues in Nursing
z: 為期五年的護理學士學位課程幫助學生為在香港護士管理局註冊成為普通註冊護士做好準備。該計劃的畢業生有資格在當今技術日益先進和複雜的醫療保健領域促進人們的健康並為患者提供優質的護理。主要學習科目包括生物和行為科學、健康促進和維護、護理實踐和理論、護理研究和資訊科技。學生還可以獲得在社區和醫院環境中護理客戶的經驗。
該計劃具有以下優勢：
• 國際公認的聲譽
• 由大學教師和醫院臨床導師進行全面臨床監督
• 透過綜合臨床模組實踐建立強有力的理論與實務聯繫
• 國際知名醫學專家及醫學院臨床護理專家共同授課
• 全港醫院及社區機構的支持
學習成果：
完成該課程後，學生能夠：
• 提供實證護理，支持身體和體內平衡功能，促進社會心理功能和生活方式改變，防止傷害，承認病人是家庭單位和社區的成員，並充分利用醫療保健服務系統。
• 在無人監督的情況下應用適當的臨床和護理治療技術。
• 應用健康促進原則來滿足個人、團體、家庭和社區的健康需求。
• 展現與病人、照護人員、同儕和醫療團隊溝通的有效技能。
• 協調醫院和社區環境中服務對象的照護。
• 將科技應用於護理實務和研究的資訊處理。
• 使用護理過程作為解決問題的方法，提供以病人為中心的照護。
• 使用基本的社會、行為、臨床科學和管理原則來認識、解釋和管理健康問題。
• 在護理實務中表現出適當的專業態度並應用相關的道德和法律原則。
• 表現出有能力做出決定並採取行動的決策、臨床推理和判斷能力。
• 表現出對自我的理解並參與持續的終身個人發展。
• 認識護理人員在健康服務機構中的角色及其對其發展的影響，並參與護理作為衛生保健職業的發展。
• 維護專業行為準則。
• 將文化因素納入護理實務。

d: The Bachelor of Pharmacy (Honours) degree is awarded by CUHK upon satisfactory completion of at least four years of full-time study. To be considered for registration by the Pharmacy and Poisons Board as a practising pharmacist in Hong Kong, graduates must complete a one-year pharmacy internship training approved by the Board.

The fundamental theme of this programme is the science and practice of pharmacy in relation to the health care needs of Hong Kong. The Pharmacy Programme aims at preparing graduates to become integral members of the health-care team with primary responsibility in managing the safe and cost-effective use of medications and other therapies for the treatment and prevention of disease.
The following areas are covered in the curriculum:
• Biomedical Sciences (Anatomy/Physiology/Biochemistry/Microbiology)
• Pharmaceutical Chemistry
• Pharmaceutics, Dosage Form Science, Pharmacokinetics
• Pharmaceutical Research Techniques
• Pharmacogenomics
• Contemporary Pharmacy Practice and Management
• Herbal and Traditional Chinese Medicine
• Pharmacology and Therapeutics
• Pharmacy Clerkships and Research Project
Upon the completion of the Pharmacy programme, the graduate is:
• prepared with scientific and professional knowledge and skills for contemporary pharmaceutical practice;
• able to adopt a systematic approach in analyzing and solving problems in the manufacture and quality assurance of pharmaceutical products;
• able to communicate effectively with patients, peers, other health professionals and the public;
• confident and competent in counselling patients and clients on prescription, non-prescription and consumer health products;
• able to identify and appropriately utilize drug information resources to assist with patient-specific drug therapy monitoring;
• confident in making decisions on patients’ drug therapy and recommending appropriate treatment; and
• able to build upon his/her knowledge and skills and engage in lifelong continuing education and professional development

z: 圓滿完成至少四年全日制學習後，香港中文大學可頒發藥劑學（榮譽）學士學位。畢業生必須完成經藥劑業及毒藥管理局批准的為期一年的藥劑實習培訓，方可考慮在香港註冊為執業藥劑師。
該計劃的基本主題是與香港醫療保健需求相關的藥學科學和實踐。藥學課程旨在培養畢業生成為醫療保健團隊的重要成員，主要負責管理藥物和其他療法的安全和成本效益的使用，以治療和預防疾病。
課程涵蓋以下領域：
• 生物醫學科學（解剖學/生理學/生物化學/微生物學）
• 藥物化學
• 藥劑學、劑型科學、藥物動力學
• 藥物研究技術
• 藥物基因體學
• 當代藥局實務與管理
• 草藥和傳統中藥
• 藥理學和治療學
• 藥局見習與研究項目
完成藥學課程後，畢業生：
• 具備現代製藥實務的科學和專業知識和技能；
• 能夠採用系統性的方法分析和解決藥品生產和品質保證中的問題；
• 能夠與病人、同儕、其他健康專業人員和公眾進行有效溝通；
• 有信心並有能力為病人和客戶提供有關處方藥、非處方藥和消費者健康產品的諮詢；
• 能夠辨識並適當地利用藥物資訊資源協助病人特定的藥物治療監測；
• 對患者的藥物治療做出決定並建議適當的治療有信心；和
• 能夠利用自己的知識和技能並參與終身繼續教育和專業發展

d: With the emergence of SARS, MERS, Ebola and recent COVID-19, all people dedicated to working in a public health discipline play an important role in providing advice to the government for public health measures and public education in mitigating the risk of infection spread locally and globally. At the vanguard of public health education, the JC School of Public Health and Primary Care of the Faculty of Medicine launched the first public health undergraduate programme in Hong Kong, Bachelor of Science in Public Health (BSc in Public Health), in 2009.

Besides infectious diseases, there is a range of public health issues threatening our health and the health system including climate changes, increasing epidemiology of chronic diseases, challenges with the ageing population, occupational safety, drug abuse, internet addiction, mental health, unhealthy lifestyle, and sustainability of healthcare financing and service provision, etc. The BSc in Public Health Programme curriculum provides students who have an interest in public health with the latest knowledge and valuable insights into population health issues. Concepts that students will learn and experience include the following: social determinants of health, environmental impact on health, healthy lifestyles, public health law and ethics, biostatistics and epidemiology, emergency preparedness and disaster response, infectious diseases, and health care system and policy.

z: 隨著 SARS、MERS、伊波拉病毒和最近的 COVID-19 的出現，所有致力於公共衛生學科工作的人員都在向政府提供公共衛生措施和公共教育建議以減輕本地和全球感染傳播風險方面發揮著重要作用。身為公共衛生教育的先鋒，醫學院賽馬會公共衛生及基層醫療學院於2009年開設全港首個公共衛生學士課程－公共衛生理學士課程​​（BSc in Public Health）。

除了傳染病之外，還有一系列公共衛生問題威脅著我們的健康和衛生系統，包括氣候變遷、慢性病流行病學的增加、人口老化的挑戰、職業安全、藥物濫用、網路成癮、心理健康、不健康的生活方式以及醫療融資和服務提供的可持續性等。公共衛生理學士課程​​為對公共衛生感興趣的學生提供有關人口健康問題的最新知識和寶貴見解。學生將學習和體驗的概念包括以下內容：健康的社會決定因素、環境對健康的影響、健康的生活方式、公共衛生法律和道德、生物統計學和流行病學、緊急準備和災難應變、傳染病以及醫療保健系統和政策。

d: This six-year programme consists of pre-clinical study (4.5 years) and clinical practice (1.5 years).

The pre-clinical programme extends over four and a half academic years. Students are required to complete courses including subjects in basic medical and life sciences, principles of Chinese medicine applications, Chinese medical concepts and theories, Chinese medicine classics, and various specialties in Chinese medicine (such as internal medicine, gynaecology, paediatrics, orthopaedics and acupuncture).

The last one and a half years of study is devoted to bedside training. Students will spend time at Chinese medicine hospitals practicing in various specialty wards. Considering the lack of Chinese medicine hospitals in Hong Kong at the moment, we have obtained full support from the Guangzhou University of Traditional Chinese Medicine, and the Shenzhen Hospital of Traditional Chinese Medicine, which will provide clinical training programmes and hospital facilities for our students.

In addition to the training in hospital settings, students will attend out-patient clinics of Chinese medicine in Hong Kong in order to gain practical experience as general practitioners in treating common diseases. Each student will attach to a clinic under mentorship by qualified Chinese medicine practitioners.

Graduates of this programme are qualified to take the Chinese Medicine Practitioners Licensing Examination conducted by the Hong Kong Chinese Medicine Council and become registered Chinese Medicine Practitioners if they pass the examination.
z: 該計畫為期六年，包括臨床前研究（4.5 年）和臨床實踐（1.5 年）。
臨床前計畫持續四個半學年。學生需完成基礎醫學與生命科​​學、中醫應用原理、中醫概念與理論、中醫經典、中醫各專業（如內科、婦科、兒科、骨傷科、針灸科）等課程。
最後一年半的學習致力於床邊訓練。學生將在中醫醫院的各個專科病房實習。鑑於目前香港缺乏中醫醫院，我們得到了廣州中醫藥大學和深圳中醫院的全力支持，為我們的學生提供臨床培訓課程和醫院設施。
除了在醫院接受培訓外，學生還將前往香港的中醫門診，並獲得作為全科醫生治療常見疾病的實務經驗。 Each student will attach to a clinic under mentorship by qualified Chinese medicine practitioners.
本課程畢業生有資格參加香港中醫藥物管理委員會舉辦的中醫執業資格考試，合格後即可成為註冊中醫。

d: This programme aims to provide graduates with an integrated and holistic training in biomedical sciences. Adopting a multi-disciplinary approach and coupling theories with practical and hands-on training, the programme will produce solidly trained graduates for diversified career paths in scientific research, health system policy and management, or clinical, pharmaceutical, diagnostics and healthcare related professions, as well as leaders with global perspective.
Upon completion of the Programme, graduates will have:
• had a strong, broad-based foundation and advanced specialised knowledge in selected areas of biomedical sciences and research;
• developed a broad range of skills and values, including a capacity for lifelong learning and conducting biomedical research;
• acquired skills to apply critical and creative thinking to analyse problems, to identify ethical dilemmas relating to biomedical sciences and research, and to offer feasible solutions;
• demonstrated good understanding of the policy issues and strategic management pertaining to public health, pharmaceutical industry, diseases and medicine;
• been equipped with practical and hands-on training and exposure to real-life scenarios through experiences in a biomedical research laboratory or within an industrial setting;
• developed effective interpersonal and communication skills.

z: 該計劃旨在為畢業生提供生物醫學科學的全面全面培訓。該計畫採用多學科方法，將理論與實踐和實踐培訓相結合，將為科學研究、衛生系統政策和管理或臨床、製藥、診斷和醫療保健相關專業的多元化職業道路培養訓練有素的畢業生，以及具有全球視野的領導者。
完成該計劃後，畢業生將擁有：
• 在生物醫學科學和研究的選定領域擁有堅實、廣泛的基礎和先進的專業知識；
• 發展了廣泛的技能和價值觀，包括終身學習和進行生物醫學研究的能力；
• 獲得運用批判性和創造性思維來分析問題、識別與生物醫學科學和研究相關的倫理困境並提供可行解決方案的技能；
• 對公共衛生、製藥業、疾病和醫學相關的政策議題和策略管理表現出良好的理解；
• 透過在生物醫學研究實驗室或工業環境中的經驗，接受過實際操作訓練並接觸現實生活場景；
• 培養有效的人際溝通和溝通技巧。

d: The Faculty of Science offers a flexible, broad-based admission scheme that allows students to explore their interests in 11 science major programmes during their first year of study before declaring a major. The 11 participating major programmes are:
• Biochemistry
• Biology
• Biology and Chemistry (Double Major Programme)
• Cell and Molecular Biology
• Chemistry
• Earth and Environmental Sciences
• Food and Nutritional Sciences
• Mathematics
• Molecular Biotechnology
• Physics
• Statistics
Students admitted to SCIENCE can declare any one of these programmes as their major. The characteristics of the SCIENCE broad-based admission scheme are as follows:
• The scheme offers extensive academic advice to assist students in the selection of their major.
• There is no quota for a specific major, and students are guaranteed admission to their programme of choice.
• Depending on their preparation, students may declare their Major at the time of entry or at the end of Year 1 or 2 #.
To better prepare students to select a major, a flexible first-year curriculum and Faculty Package of courses have been designed to equip them with:
• a broader view and better appreciation of various science subjects;
• better preparation for studies in a science major programme; and
• the ability to tackle problems in a comprehensive and integrative manner.

In their first year, students take courses from the Faculty Package, which contains five subject groups, including Chemistry, Life Sciences, Mathematics, Physics and Statistics. Each group consists of several courses that are available to students with different science backgrounds and interests. Students generally study at least three 3-unit courses from the Faculty Package, the first of which is typically chosen from their desired major programme. The second course is chosen from a relevant subject area and the third from one of the remaining groups.
Science Technology and Research Stream (STARS)
https://www.sci.cuhk.edu.hk/STARS

Undergraduate research is an integral part of our curriculum. The Science Technology and Research Stream (STARS) is a research-oriented stream designed for students with strong academic ability and interest to gain wider exposure and research experience during their undergraduate studies. Students in STARS are offered research and training opportunities starting from their 1st year, under the supervision of our professors. Students can obtain broader exposure to relevant topics by joining international conferences, seminars and outgoing exchange. The STARS designation will be officially recorded on the academic transcripts for those who successfully complete all of the requirements.
# Students interested in the Biology and Chemistry Double Major Programme should declare their major at the time of entry or at the end of Year 1.

z: 理學院提供靈活、基礎廣泛的錄取計劃，讓學生在學習的第一年在宣布專業之前探索自己對 11 個科學專業課程的興趣。參與的11個主要項目是：
• 生物化學
• 生物學
• 生物學和化學（雙主修課程）
• 細胞與分子生物學
• 化學
• 地球與環境科學
• 食品與營養科學
• 數學
• 分子生物技術
• 物理
• 統計數據
被科學錄取的學生可以將這些課程中的任何一個列為他們的專業。科學廣泛錄取計劃的特點如下：
• 本計劃提供廣泛的學術建議，幫助學生選擇專業。
• 特定專業沒有名額限制，保證學生被他們選擇的課程錄取。
• 根據他們的準備情況，學生可以在入學時或第一年或第二年結束時宣布自己的專業#。
為了更好地為學生選擇專業做好準備，我們設計了靈活的第一年課程和教師課程包，以使他們具備：
• 對各種科學科目有更廣闊的視野和更好的理解；
• 為科學專業課程的學習做好更好的準備；和
• 以全面、全面的方式解決問題的能力。
在第一年，學生學習學院套餐中的課程，其中包含五個學科組，包括化學、生命科學、數學、物理和統計學。每組由幾門課程組成，可供具有不同科學背景和興趣的學生選擇。學生通常至少學習學院課程中的三門 3 單元課程，其中第一門通常從他們想要的專業課程中選擇。第二門課程從相關學科領域中選擇，第三門課程從其餘組中選擇。
科學技術與研究流（STARS）
https://www.sci.cuhk.edu.hk/STARS
本科生研究是我們課程的一個組成部分。科學技術與研究流（STARS）是一個以研究為導向的流，專為具有強大學術能力和興趣的學生而設計，以便在本科學習期間獲得更廣泛的接觸和研究經驗。 STARS 的學生從第一年開始就在我們教授的監督下獲得研究和培訓機會。學生可以透過參加國際會議、研討會和外出交流來更廣泛地接觸相關主題。成功完成所有要求的學生的 STARS 頭銜將正式記錄在成績單上。
# 對生物和化學雙專業課程感興趣的學生應在入學時或第一年結束時申報專業。

d: Global climate change, environmental pollution, natural hazards, biodiversity loss, and the current energy and food crisis are all critical issues of public concern. The Earth and Environmental Sciences Programme (EESC) will equip students with the latest knowledge and technical skills to observe, understand, analyse, and model the systems and processes that drive natural and anthropogenic global environmental changes.
Highlights

In this programme, particular emphasis is placed on multidisciplinary and combined theoretical observational approaches to understand the aforementioned problems and formulating potential solutions. Students will acquire a strong comprehensive foundation in the dynamics of the Earth and its environment, with options to specialize in the following streams to suit their background, interests and career objectives such as Atmospheric Science, Geology and Geophysics, and Environmental Science and Technology. Students will be given opportunities to gain valuable quantitative and analytical skills, and build their capabilities via laboratory work, field studies, numerical modeling and programming experience, seminars, workshops and research projects. Further enhancing these are exchange opportunities at overseas universities as well as internship opportunities in the Hong Kong Observatory and other government agencies, geotechnical firms, and environmental organisations.
Career Prospects

Upon graduation, students are well prepared for jobs in the government, NGOs, and industries including, but not limited to, geotechnical survey and engineering, meteorological and marine services, as well as climate, energy and environmental consulting. Students can also pursue further studies or embark on careers in the educational sector.

z: 全球氣候變遷、環境污染、自然災害、生物多樣性喪失以及當前的能源和糧食危機都是公眾關注的重大議題。地球與環境科學課程（EESC）將為學生提供最新的知識和技術技能，以觀察、理解、分析和模擬驅動自然和人為全球環境變化的系統和過程。
亮點

在該計劃中，特別強調多學科和組合的理論觀察方法，以理解上述問題並制定潛在的解決方案。学生将在地球及其环境动力学方面获得坚实的综合基础，并可以选择专攻以下方向，以满足他们的背景、兴趣和职业目标，例如大气科学、地质学和地球物理学以及环境科学与技术。学生将有机会获得宝贵的定量和分析技能，并通过实验室工作、实地研究、数值建模和编程经验、研讨会、讲习班和研究项目来培养自己的能力。进一步增强这些机会的是海外大学的交流机会以及香港天文台和其他政府机构、岩土工程公司和环保组织的实习机会。
職業前景
畢業後，學生為政府、非政府組織和產業的工作做好充分準備，包括但不限於岩土勘測和工程、氣象和海洋服務以及氣候、能源和環境諮詢。學生也可以繼續深造或從事教育行業的職業。

After finishing the first year of study in the programme, students with satisfactory performance or fulfill all necessary requirements can switch to the Mathematics and Information Engineering programme.
