Those admitted to JS5300 may apply to enter OM or other business majors via the major selection exercises held at the end of the first three terms. Students interested in OM should include either or both JS5317 and JS5300 in their program choices. Please click here for details of JS5300 Business and Management. Band A applicants who show talents and potentials for business study will be invited to engagement activities organized by HKUST Business School in May–June 2026.
z: BBA 營運管理 (OM) 計畫著重於對為各種組織生產和交付商品和服務的資源和業務流程進行有效管理。我們的課程強調管理概念和定量分析在業務運營的設計、規劃、控制和改進中的實際業務應用。
OM 學生在學習之初就獲得跨商業學科的基礎知識，為追求先進的管理理念以及在複雜的業務流程和供應鏈運營中管理和做出正確決策所必需的技術做好準備。對於想要深入研究該主題或為相關職業做好更好準備的人來說，有兩個選擇：業務分析和供應鏈管理。
BBA OM 計劃認識到基於應用的學習的重要性。我們的課程中經常納入商業案例研究和公司項目，要求學生將概念與真實的商業實踐聯繫起來。我們部門在與企業啟動專案方面有著廣泛的聯繫。 OM 學生可以從這種聯繫中受益，因為他們可以存取真實的業務資料和組織中的人員來進行分析並提出建議。
技術能力、分析能力、溝通能力和領導能力的培訓使我們的學生能夠在快速成長的 OM 就業領域中茁壯成長。 OM 專家通常從品質管理、規劃和控制、專案管理和物流等領域開始他們的職業生涯。
延伸專業
OM學生如果符合擴展專業要求，可以在第三學期學習結束時申請人工智慧、數位媒體和創意藝術或永續發展專業擴展專業。完成擴展專業的學生畢業時將獲得包含他們選擇的傳統專業科目和擴展專業的頭銜。詳情請參閱《JS5300商業與管理》。
JS5317.zr: JS5317 OM 和 JS5300 B&M 的第一年課程相同。 JS5317允許對BBA OM特別有興趣的學生直接進入該專業。被JS5300錄取的學生可以透過前三學期末舉行的專業選拔活動申請進入OM或其他商科專業。對 OM 有興趣的學生應在其課程選擇中包括 JS5317 和 JS5300 之一或兩者。請按此了解JS5300業務及管理詳情。展現商科學習才能和潛力的A級申請人將獲邀參加科大商學院於2026年5月至6月舉辦的參與活動。

d: Short DescriptionUpdated

The HKUST BBA in Professional Accounting (ACCT) is designed to develop future-ready accounting professionals who can lead in a business environment transformed by data, digitalization, and Artificial Intelligence (AI). The program positions accounting beyond traditional accountancy. We recognize it as a strategic discipline that integrates analytical thinking, professional judgment, and digital capability—skills essential for modern finance functions and global business leadership.

The curriculum provides rigorous training in financial reporting, managerial decision-making, business assurance, and taxation. Students gain a strong foundation through core courses while benefiting from a wide range of electives that allow them to explore specialized interests. The program is further strengthened by three main flexible study pathways.
The HKICPA Qualification Program (QP) route:
• The HKICPA QP route is designed for students who plan to pursue the Hong Kong CPA designation and require comprehensive preparation aligned with both international and local professional standards.
The Accounting Analytics (AA) academic option:

• The AA academic option equips students with data-driven analytical skills, enabling them to apply statistical tools and visualization techniques to support financial reporting, managerial decision-making, auditing, fraud detection, and business analysis.
The Emerging Technologies in Accounting (ETA) academic option:

• It prepares students to navigate and lead digital transformation by understanding technologies such as cryptocurrencies, blockchain, and their multidimensional business applications, modern AI applications, Large Language Model (LLM), and agentic systems in accounting practice and analysis.

Depending on students’ academic commitment and aspirations, we permit students to pursue an additional major in another business discipline. They may also pursue a minor program offered by other Schools within the University.

Moreover, the program provides students with ample opportunities to enrich their lives during their undergraduate years, e.g., internships and cadet programs offered by professional firms; student exchange programs; and various case competitions organized by various professional organizations. Scholarships and subject prizes are available for qualified applicants.

The program is fully accredited by the HKICPA and recognized by major international professional bodies, including ACCA and CPA Australia. These accreditations reflect the program’s strong alignment with global professional standards and its reputation for producing highly capable graduates.

Graduate employability is consistently outstanding. Employer surveys and graduate statistics show near-full employment, with students securing positions at professional services firms, business corporations, financial institutions, and consulting practices. Our graduates also pursue advanced studies or international professional qualifications, further demonstrating the program’s strong academic and professional foundation.
Extended Major

ACCT students may apply for the extended major in Artificial Intelligence, Digital Media and Creative Arts or Sustainability at the end of the 3rd term of study, if they satisfy the extended major requirement. Students completing the extended major will graduate with a title bearing both the traditional major subject they selected and the extended major. For details, please refer to "JS5300 Business & Management".
JS5318.r: The Year 1 curricula of JS5318 ACCT and JS5300 B&M are identical. JS5318 allows students who have a special interest in BBA ACCT to directly enter the major. Those admitted into JS5300 may apply to enter ACCT or other business majors via the major selection exercises held at the end of the first three terms. Students interested in ACCT should include either or both JS5318 and JS5300 in their program choices. Please click here for details of JS5300 Business and Management. Band A applicants who show talents and potentials for business study will be invited to engagement activities organized by HKUST Business School in May–June 2026.
z: 簡短說明已更新
香港科技大學專業會計工商管理學士課程​​（ACCT）旨在培養面向未來的會計專業人士，他們可以在數據、數位化和人工智慧（AI）轉變的商業環境中發揮領導作用。該計劃將會計定位於傳統會計之外。我們認為它是一門策略學科，融合了分析思維、專業判斷和數位能力——這些技能對於現代財務職能和全球商業領導至關重要。
該課程提供財務報告、管理決策、業務保證和稅務方面的嚴格培訓。學生透過核心課程打下堅實的基礎，同時受益於廣泛的選修課，使他們能夠探索專業興趣。該計劃透過三個主要的靈活學習途徑進一步加強。
香港會計師公會資格課程（QP）途徑：
• HKICPA QP 課程專為計劃取得香港註冊會計師資格並需要符合國際和本地專業標準的全面準備的學生而設計。
會計分析 (AA) 學術選項：
• AA 學術選項為學生提供數據驅動的分析技能，使他們能夠應用統計工具和視覺化技術來支援財務報告、管理決策、審計、詐欺檢測和業務分析。
會計新興技術 (ETA) 學術選項：
• 它透過了解加密貨幣、區塊鏈及其多維業務應用程式、現代人工智慧應用、大型語言模型（LLM）以及會計實踐和分析中的代理系統等技術，幫助學生做好導航和領導數位轉型的準備。
根據學生的學術承諾和願望，我們允許學生攻讀另一個商業學科的額外專業。他們還可以攻讀大學內其他學院提供的輔修課程。
此外，該計劃還為學生提供充足的機會豐富本科期間的生活，例如專業公司提供的實習和學員項目；學生交換項目；以及各專業機構舉辦的各類案例競賽。合格的申請者可以獲得獎學金和學科獎項。
該課程獲得香港會計師公會的全面認可，並得到主要國際專業機構的認可，包括ACCA和澳洲會計師公會。這些認證反映了該計畫與全球專業標準的緊密結合及其在培養高能力畢業生方面的聲譽。
畢業生就業能力始終表現優異。雇主調查和畢業生統計數據顯示，學生幾乎實現了充分就業，在專業服務公司、商業公司、金融機構和顧問公司找到了職位。我們的畢業生也繼續深造或獲得國際專業資格，進一步證明了該課程強大的學術和專業基礎。
延伸專業
ACCT學生如果符合擴展專業要求，可以在第三學期學習結束時申請人工智慧、數位媒體和創意藝術或永續發展專業擴展專業。完成擴展專業的學生畢業時將獲得包含他們選擇的傳統專業科目和擴展專業的頭銜。詳情請參閱《JS5300商業與管理》。
JS5318.zr: JS5318 ACCT 和 JS5300 B&M 第一年課程相同。 JS5318允許對BBA ACCT特別有興趣的學生直接進入該專業。被JS5300錄取的學生可以透過前三個學期末舉行的專業選拔活動申請進入ACCT或其他商科專業。對 ACCT 感興趣的學生應在其課程選擇中包括 JS5318 和 JS5300 之一或兩者。請按此了解JS5300業務及管理詳情。展現商科學習才能和潛力的A級申請人將獲邀參加科大商學院於2026年5月至6月舉辦的參與活動。

d: The BSc Economics and Finance (ECOF) program provides a solid training in both economics and finance, with a strong emphasis on the use of quantitative methods and techniques. Compare to BBA Economics program, ECOF requires fewer business core courses.

Enjoying the synergy between economics and finance, students will be furnished with solid economic knowledge and essential quantitative skills to form an in-depth understanding of the modern economy and public policies. Students interested in economic research may enroll in the Honors Thesis Courses in their final year to further develop their research skills and take the opportunity to work closely with a faculty member on their own research project.

Economics is a social science that studies people's decisions under constraints. It offers expertise in topics such as behavior of consumers and firms, efficiency and equity of markets, economic growth, business cycles, international trade and finance, taxation and public policies, etc. Important finance topics covered in the program include corporate finance, corporate valuation, investment analysis and portfolio management, derivative securities, financial markets and institutions, financial accounting, and international finance.

This program is suitable for students who aspire to enter into the fields that require strong analytical and quantitative skills, such as investment banks, consulting, data analysis, economists. The sophisticated analytical training and quantitative research also prepare students to pursue further studies.
Extended Major

ECOF students may apply for the extended major in Artificial Intelligence, Digital Media and Creative Arts or Sustainability at the end of the 3rd term of study, if they satisfy the extended major requirement. Students completing the extended major will graduate with a title bearing both the traditional major subject they selected and the extended major. For details, please refer to "JS5300 Business & Management".
JS5331.r: The Year 1 curricula of JS5331 ECOF and JS5300 B&M are identical. JS5331 allows students who have a special interest in BSc ECOF to directly enter the major. Those admitted into JS5300 may apply to enter ECOF or other business majors via the major selection exercise held at the end of the first three terms. Students interested in ECOF should include either or both JS5331 and JS5300 in their program choices. Please click here for details of JS5300 Business and Management. Interview is compulsory for admissions. Band A applicants who show talents and potentials for ECOF study will be invited to engagement activities and interviews in May–July 2026.
z: 經濟學與金融理學學士 (ECOF) 課程提供經濟學和金融方面的紮實培訓，重點是定量方法和技術的使用。與 BBA 經濟學課程相比，ECOF 所需的商業核心課程較少。
享受經濟學和金融學的協同作用，學生將獲得紮實的經濟學知識和必要的定量技能，以深入了解現代經濟和公共政策。對經濟研究有興趣的學生可以在最後一年報名參加榮譽論文課程，以進一步發展他們的研究技能，並藉此機會與教職員在自己的研究計畫上密切合作。
經濟學是一門研究人們在約束條件下的決策的社會科學。它提供消費者和企業行為、市場效率和公平、經濟成長、商業週期、國際貿易和金融、稅收和公共政策等主題的專業知識。該項目涵蓋的重要金融主題包括公司金融、公司估值、投資分析和投資組合管理、衍生性證券、金融市場和機構、財務會計和國際金融。
該課程適合那些渴望進入需要強大分析和定量技能的領域的學生，例如投資銀行、諮詢、數據分析、經濟學家。複雜的分析訓練和定量研究也為學生繼續深造做好了準備。
延伸專業
ECOF學生如果符合擴展專業要求，可以在第三學期學習結束時申請人工智慧、數位媒體和創意藝術或永續發展專業擴展專業。完成擴展專業的學生畢業時將獲得包含他們選擇的傳統專業科目和擴展專業的頭銜。詳情請參閱《JS5300商業與管理》。

d: The BSc in Quantitative Finance (QFIN) program is designed for students with a strong desire to pursue a career in the finance industry.

Students will follow an integrated curriculum covering areas in finance, mathematics, statistics, data analytics and computer programming. Students will acquire knowledge and skills to solve complex financial problems. Important topics covered in the program include investment analysis, portfolio management, risk management, derivative securities, and quantitative trading.

Our graduates are well prepared for professional qualifications such as the Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA), the Certified Financial Planner (CFP), the Financial Risk Manager (FRM) and the Professional Risk Manager (PRM). Meanwhile, our curriculum is also flexible enough to accommodate students’ interest in choosing their additional majors or minors. The BSc in Computer Science (COSC) is one of the most popular additional majors for QFIN students. Available minors include, but not limited to, Actuarial Mathematics, Big Data Technology, Entrepreneurship, Information Technology, and Mathematics.

Our program offers a wide range of training and enrichment activities, such as Career Mentorship Program, QFIN Speaker Series, Undergraduate Research Opportunities Program (UROP), International Exchange Program, Bloomberg Market Concepts Certification, business case competitions, personal development training, and company visits.

It is common for our students to take one or two semesters of study leave to work as full-time interns at financial firms. The connection with the industry and the experiences from multiple internships give them a significant advantage in the job market upon graduation. QFIN graduates are highly sought after by employers from the finance industry and across different business sectors.
Extended Major

QFIN students may apply for the extended major in Artificial Intelligence, Digital Media and Creative Arts or Sustainability at the end of the 3rd term of study, if they satisfy the extended major requirement. Students completing the extended major will graduate with a title bearing both the traditional major subject they selected and the extended major. For details, please refer to "JS5300 Business & Management".

Those admitted to JS5300 may apply to enter QFIN or other business majors via the major selection exercises held at the end of the first three terms. Students interested in QFIN should include either or both JS5332 and JS5300 in their program choices. Please click here for details of JS5300 Business and Management. Interview is compulsory for admissions. Band A applicants who show talents and potentials for QFIN study will be invited to engagement activities and interviews in May–July 2026.
z: 量化金融理學士 (QFIN) 課程專為有強烈願望在金融業從事職業的學生而設計。
學生將學習涵蓋金融、數學、統計學、數據分析和電腦程式設計領域的綜合課程。學生將獲得解決複雜財務問題的知識和技能。該計劃涵蓋的重要主題包括投資分析、投資組合管理、風險管理、衍生性證券和量化交易。
我們的畢業生為特許金融分析師（CFA）、註冊財務規劃師（CFP）、金融風險經理（FRM）和專業風險經理（PRM）等專業資格做好了充分準備。同時，我們的課程也足夠靈活，可以滿足學生選擇額外主修或輔修的興趣。電腦科學理學士 (COSC) 是 QFIN 學生最受歡迎的附加專業之一。可選輔修主修包括但不限於精算數學、大數據科技、創業學、資訊科技和數學。
我們的計劃提供廣泛的培訓和豐富活動，例如職業指導計劃、QFIN 演講者係列、本科生研究機會計劃 (UROP)、國際交流計劃、彭博市場概念認證、商業案例競賽、個人發展培訓和公司參觀。
我們的學生休一、兩個學期的學習假到金融公司當全職實習生是很常見的。與行業的聯繫以及多次實習的經驗使他們在畢業後在就業市場上具有顯著的優勢。 QFIN 畢業生深受金融業和不同商業領域雇主的追捧。
延伸專業
QFIN學生如果符合擴展專業要求，可以在第三學期學習結束時申請人工智慧、數位媒體和創意藝術或永續發展專業擴展專業。完成擴展專業的學生畢業時將獲得包含他們選擇的傳統專業科目和擴展專業的頭銜。詳情請參閱《JS5300商業與管理》。
JS5332.zr: JS5332 QFIN 和 JS5300 B&M 第一年課程相同。 JS5332允許對BSc QFIN特別有興趣的學生直接進入該專業。被JS5300錄取的學生可以透過前三學期末舉行的專業選拔活動申請進入QFIN或其他商科專業。對 QFIN 有興趣的學生應在其課程選擇中包括 JS5332 和 JS5300 之一或兩者。請按此了解JS5300業務及管理詳情。入學必須進行面試。展現 QFIN 學習天賦和潛力的 A 級申請人將被邀請參加 2026 年 5 月至 7 月的參與活動和麵試。

d: Combining the world-class expertise of HKUST School of Business and Management, School of Engineering, and School of Science, the BSc program in Risk Management and Business Intelligence (RMBI) integrates risk management and business intelligence studies in one single undergraduate program to equip graduates with quantitative techniques and business knowledge to assess and mitigate risks effectively with the analysis and management of the ever-growing volume of business data. The curriculum encompasses:
• Understanding of risks in financial institutions and other firms, including market risks, credit risks, operational risks, and other business risks;
• Mathematical models and methods for assessing and managing risks; and
• Data/text mining methods and advanced technologies to analyze and manage the increasingly large volume of business data available for decision-making.

RMBI students are required to take courses in four key areas: (a) integration of risk management and business intelligence; (b) financial investment, accounting and business; (c) risk assessment and modelling; and (d) business intelligence tools and technologies. A wide range of disciplinary elective courses are offered.

An academic option "Financial Technology" is provided to students who wish to pursue a deeper understanding of financial technology and its engineering foundations, crypto ventures and the latest development in the area.

The Dual Degree 4+1 Pathway (BScRMBI + MScFintech) allows motivated RMBI students to pursue more in-depth exposure and development in Fintech. Selected students will start taking MSc Fintech courses in their UG year 4, and be admitted to the MSc program as full-time students in the following year. Students in this 4+1 pathway will complete both degrees in 5 years and might save up to 40% MSc tuition fee.

The corporate-sponsored capstone projects connect students with leading companies such as Bloomberg L.P., Ernst & Young, PricewaterhouseCoopers, Hospital Authority, Insurance Authority and WeBank. The in-depth study of business cases allow students to apply the classroom learning to real-world situations, cultivate creativity and critical thinking, and develop project management skills.

RMBI students enjoy the opportunities to join a variety of enrichment activities including overseas exchange, seminars, internship, Mentorship Program, RMBI Symposium, International Business Case Competitions, and various professional training and workshops to enhance their learning through hands-on practice, enrich their problem-solving and communication ability, and excel in their career and personal development.

RMBI students are well educated for a wide range of roles and industries, including positions as analysts and consultants in the banking sector, asset management, accounting and audit firms, management consultancies, IT advisory, etc.

RMBI students may apply for the extended major in Digital Media and Creative Arts or Sustainability at the end of the 3rd term of study, if they satisfy the extended major requirement. RMBI students completing the extended major will graduate with a title bearing both the RMBI major and the extended major. For details, please refer to "JS5300 Business & Management".
JS5814.r: Students may directly apply for JS5814 BSc RMBI program in JUPAS if they have a special interest in risk management and business intelligence. For students who would like to take time to explore their academic interest, they may apply to enter the School of Business and Management, the School of Engineering or the School of Science first and then join the RMBI program via the major selection exercise after completing the first year of study. Interview is compulsory for admissions. Shortlisted Band A applicants will be invited to program-specific interviews or engagement activities in May–July 2026.
z: 風險管理與商業智慧（RMBI）理學士學位課程結合了科大工商管理學院、工程學院和理學院的世界級專業知識，將風險管理和商業智慧研究整合在一個本科課程中，讓畢業生掌握定量技術和商業知識，透過分析和管理不斷增長的商業數據，有效評估和降低風險。課程內容包括：
• 了解金融機構和其他公司的風險，包括市場風險、信用風險、操作風險和其他業務風險；
• 評估和管理風險的數學模型和方法；和
• 資料/文字探勘方法和先進技術，用於分析和管理越來越多的可用於決策的商業資料。
RBI 學生必須修讀四個關鍵領域的課程： (a) 風險管理與商業智慧的整合； (b) 財務投資、會計與商業； (c) 風險評估與建模； (d) 商業智慧工具與技術。提供廣泛的學科選修課程。
為希望更深入了解金融科技及其工程基礎、加密貨幣企業和該領域最新發展的學生提供「金融科技」學術選項。
雙學位4+1銜接課程（BScRMBI + MScFintech）讓積極進取的RMBI學生能夠在金融科技領域追求更深入的接觸與發展。入選的學生將在大學本科四年級開始修讀金融科技理學碩士課程，並於次年以全職學生身分入讀理學碩士課程。走這條 4+1 途徑的學生將在 5 年內完成兩個學位，並可節省高達 40% 的理學碩士學費。
企業贊助的頂點專案將學生與彭博有限合夥、安永會計師事務所、普華永道會計師事務所、醫院管理局、保險監理局和微眾銀行等領先公司聯繫起來。對商業案例的深入研究使學生能夠將課堂學習應用到現實世界中，培養創造力和批判性思維，並發展專案管理技能。
RBI學生有機會參加各種豐富的活動，包括海外交流、研討會、實習、導師計劃、RBI研討會、國際商業案例競賽以及各種專業培訓和工作坊，透過實踐提高他們的學習能力，豐富他們解決問題和溝通的能力，並在他們的職業和個人發展中取得優異的成績。
RBI的學生受過良好的教育，適合各種職位和行業，包括銀行業、資產管理、會計和審計公司、管理諮詢、IT諮詢等領域的分析師和顧問職位。
RBI學生如果符合擴展專業要求，可以在第三學期學習結束時申請數位媒體與創意藝術或永續發展專業擴展專業。完成擴展專業的 RBI 學生畢業時將獲得同時具有 RBI 專業和擴展專業的頭銜。詳情請參閱《JS5300商業與管理》。
JS5814.zr: 如果學生對風險管理和商業智慧有特別興趣，可以直接申請JUPAS的JS5814 BSc RBI課程。對於想花時間探索自己學術興趣的學生，可以先申請進入工商管理學院、工程學院或理學院，完成第一年的學習後，透過專業選拔加入RBI計畫。入學必須進行面試。入圍 A 級申請人將被邀請參加 2026 年 5 月至 7 月的特定計畫面試或參與活動。

d: The BSc in Sustainable and Green Finance (SGFN) program is at the forefront of undergraduate education in Hong Kong to equip students with interdisciplinary knowledge and skills in both Business & Finance and Environment & Sustainability areas. The program is jointly offered by the School of Business and Management and the Division of Environment and Sustainability, designed for students who would like to pursue a career in the sustainable and green finance industry.

Investing in sustainability has been a global megatrend in recent years driven by the collective effort among governments and businesses around the world to address climate risks. The global net-zero transition requires business and political leaders to better manage sustainability-related risks and reprioritize the economic activities and investment portfolios toward sustainable development. It creates tremendous opportunities in different areas within economies, including carbon pricing and trading market, sustainability-linked debt market, green financial product development, sustainable supply chain financing, environment, social, and governance (ESG) management and strategy development, etc.

SGFN program nurtures students to be effective leaders in the sustainable and green finance industry. The curriculum overlays business and finance topics with sustainability significance, which covers the latest sustainable and green finance development at national and global levels to provide students with a global perspective in the field with local relevance. Some courses are newly designed to address the growing attention on sustainable finance issues, important topics include ESG investing, governing green finance, sustainable supply chain management, risk management, circular economy, and so on. The learning experience in the SGFN program is across the spectrum of theory and practice. Wide range of co-curricular activities are provided for students to connect with the industry and to support students’ personal development.

Sustainable and green finance professionals are highly desirable globally. SGFN graduates will be able to develop careers in different sectors, including investment/retail banking, asset management, corporate finance, risk management, ESG consulting, capable in conducting sustainable investment analyses, ESG analyses, sustainability consulting, sustainable finance product development and so on.
JS5822.r: JS5822 allows students who have a special interest in BSc SGFN to directly enter the major. For students who would like to take time to explore their academic interest, they may also apply to JS5300 Business and Management and join the SGFN program via the major selection exercise after completing the first year of study. Please click here for details of JS5300 Business and Management. Interview is compulsory for admissions. Band A applicants will be invited to program interviews and engagement activities in May-July 2026.
z: 永續與綠色金融理學士（SGFN）課程處於香港本科教育的前沿，旨在為學生提供商業與金融以及環境與永續發展領域的跨學科知識和技能。該課程由工商管理學院和環境與永續發展學部共同開設，專為有志於從事永續和綠色金融業的學生而設計。
近年來，在世界各國政府和企業應對氣候風險的集體努力的推動下，永續投資已成為全球大趨勢。全球淨零轉型要求商界和政治領導人更好地管理與永續發展相關的風險，並重新調整經濟活動和投資組合的優先順序，以實現永續發展。它在經濟體的不同領域創造了巨大的機遇，包括碳定價和交易市場、永續發展相關債務市場、綠色金融產品開發、永續供應鏈融資、環境、社會和治理（ESG）管理和策略制定等。

SGFN 計畫培養學生成為永續和綠色金融產業的有效領導者。該課程涵蓋了具有永續發展意義的商業和金融主題，涵蓋了國家和全球層面最新的永續和綠色金融發展，為學生提供了該領域與當地相關的全球視角。有些課程是針對人們日益關注的永續金融議題而全新設計的，重要主題包括ESG投資、綠色金融治理、永續供應鏈管理、風險管理、循環經濟等。 SGFN 計畫的學習經驗涵蓋理論和實務。學校提供廣泛的課外活動，讓學生與產業建立聯繫並支持學生的個人發展。
永續和綠色金融專業人士在全球範圍內非常受歡迎。 SGFN畢業生將能夠在不同領域發展職業，包括投資/零售銀行、資產管理、企業融資、風險管理、ESG諮詢，能夠進行永續投資分析、ESG分析、永續諮詢、永續金融產品開發等。
JS5822.zr: JS5822允許對BSc SGFN特別有興趣的學生直接進入該專業。對於想要花時間探索自己學術興趣的學生，他們也可以在完成第一年的學習後透過專業選擇申請JS5300商業與管理並加入SGFN計畫。請按此了解JS5300業務及管理詳情。入學必須進行面試。 A 級申請人將被邀請參加 2026 年 5 月至 7 月的面試和參與活動。

d: The Bachelor of Arts in Architectural Studies [BA(AS)] is a four-year, full-time programme that introduces students to architecture as a cultural discipline. It is the first degree needed to qualify as an architect, and it provides an excellent general education that gives students the confidence to pursue related careers both within the design professions and further afield. The course of study is centred on research-based learning in the design studio and is structured to foster a sense of community, develop deep knowledge of the discipline, and encourage creativity. Design studios look at diverse contemporary issues relevant to Hong Kong and the world and are structured by thematic platforms that introduce students to a range of methodologies and approaches to the territorial, social, technological, urban and environmental issues that address architecture as a cultural discipline.

The BA(AS) programme offers numerous opportunities for knowledge exchange and international experience, such as semester exchanges with leading international schools of architecture, study trips to foundational sites of architecture and urbanism, and hands-on experience through summer field studies workshops. Courses in the programme are offered in the areas of Architectural Design, History and Theory of Architecture, Technology, and Visual Communication.
z: 建築研究文學學士 [BA(AS)] 是一個為期四年的全日制課程，向學生介紹建築作為一門文化學科。這是獲得建築師資格所需的第一個學位，它提供了優秀的通識教育，讓學生有信心在設計專業和更遠的領域追求相關職業。學習課程以設計工作室的研究性學習為中心，旨在培養社區意識，加深對學科的了解，並鼓勵創造力。設計工作室著眼於與香港和世界相關的各種當代問題，並透過主題平台構建，向學生介紹一系列解決領土、社會、技術、城市和環境問題的方法論和途徑，將建築作為一門文化學科來解決。
BA(AS) 課程提供大量知識交流和國際經驗的機會，例如與領先的國際建築學院進行學期交換、前往建築和城市化基礎場所的考察旅行以及通過夏季實地研究研討會獲得實踐經驗。此專案提供的課程涉及建築設計、建築歷史和理論、技術和視覺傳達等領域。

d: The BSc in Surveying is the first fully integrated undergraduate surveying programme worldwide and as such has led the way in surveying education.

As the world’s first fully accredited programme with professional recognition in land surveying, general practice, quantity surveying, building surveying, planning and development, and property and facility management surveying, it encompasses the entire spectrum of land development cycle. This includes, for example, land administration, real estate development, construction project management, real estate finance and investment, facility management, urban planning, conservation, and urban renewal. A key distinction of this programme, compared to more conventional offerings, is its greater emphasis on the comprehensive academic underpinning and perspective required by all real estate and construction professionals.

The BSc(Surveying) programme promotes interdisciplinary learning. Our students undertake studies in the economic, law, management, technology and innovation, geospatial analytics, conservation, and research aspects of the entire land development cycle. The programme has two major components: lecture courses and surveying studios. The lecture courses define the academic core of the programme whilst the studios provide an environment within which the interdisciplinary nature of the programme can be more fully explored and boundaries tested through the extensive use of real-life case studies and student-centred project works.

The BSc(Surveying) programme allows students in their third year of study to take a credit bearing course, Professional Practice, which requires students to gain professional experience during their internship in companies within the real estate and construction sector. In addition, under normal circumstances, around 70-80% of our students would participate in a semester-long exchange programme, visiting universities all around the world and exchanging knowledge and practices. Since credits taken in the exchange programme can be transferred, students who participate in overseas exchange can graduate as scheduled. All these provide experiential learning platforms for students to enhance their personal, academic and professional development.
z: 測量學學士學位是全球第一個完全整合的本科測量課程，因此在測量教育領域處於領先地位。
作為世界上第一個在土地測量、一般實踐、工料測量、建築測量、規劃和開發以及財產和設施管理測量方面獲得專業認可的完全認可的項目，它涵蓋了土地開發週期的整個範圍。例如，這包括土地管理、房地產開發、建設專案管理、房地產金融和投資、設施管理、城市規劃、保護和城市更新。與更傳統的課程相比，該課程的一個主要區別是它更加強調所有房地產和建築專業人士所需的全面學術基礎和觀點。
理學士（測量）課程促進跨學科學習。我們的學生從事整個土地開發週期的經濟、法律、管理、技術和創新、地理空間分析、保護和研究方面的研究。該計劃有兩個主要組成部分：講座課程和測量工作室。講座課程定義了該計畫的學術核心，而工作室則提供了一個環境，​​透過廣泛使用現實生活中的案例研究和以學生為中心的計畫工作，可以更充分地探索該計畫的跨學科性質並測試邊界。
理學學士（測量）課程允許學生在第三年學習學分課程“專業實踐”，該課程要求學生在房地產和建築行業的公司實習期間獲得專業經驗。此外，在正常情況下，大約70-80%的學生會參加為期一個學期的交換項目，訪問世界各地的大學，交流知識和實踐。由於交換生學分可以轉移，參加海外交流的學生可以如期畢業。所有這些都為學生提供了體驗式學習平台，以提高他們的個人、學術和專業發展。

d: The Bachelor of Arts in Landscape Studies [BA(LS)] is an internationally recognised undergraduate degree offered by the Division of Landscape Architecture. Our programme delivers a broadly comprehensive education in the landscape architecture discipline. We teach the knowledge, concepts and skills required to respond creatively, professionally and ethically to the urgent social and environmental challenges faced by our cities and regions today. Students graduating from our BA(LS) programme may continue their studies in the professionally-accredited Master of Landscape Architecture (MLA) programme at HKU, or apply for study in some of the world’s top postgraduate programmes.

Landscape architecture is an increasingly critical discipline that binds a core capacity in design and planning with fluency in ecology, civil engineering, and geography. This interdisciplinarity extends back to landscape architecture’s origins, where the profession and its antecedents engaged with the challenges of human settlement and environmental risk; planning for health, recreation, and conservation in the industrialising city; and remediating the landscapes of pollution that followed. Landscape architecture today faces challenges of rapid urbanisation, resource depletion, climate change, rising sea-levels, and declining biodiversity. Whether you end up engaging with a corporate client, informing a government body, or participating with an environmental non-profit, our degree will give you the critical, creative, and intellectual tools to advocate for just and sustainable change moving forward.
z: 景觀研究文學學士學位 [BA(LS)] 是由景觀建築系提供的國際認可的本科學位。我們的課程提供景觀設計學科的廣泛綜合教育。我們教授以創造性、專業和道德的方式應對當今城市和地區面臨的緊迫社會和環境挑戰所需的知識、概念和技能。從我們的文學士（LS）課程畢業的學生可以繼續在香港大學專業認可的景觀設計碩士（MLA）課程中學習，或申請一些世界頂尖的研究生課程的學習。

景觀設計是一門日益重要的學科，它將設計和規劃的核心能力與生態學、土木工程和地理學的熟練程度結合在一起。這種跨學科性可以追溯到景觀設計的起源，該行業及其前身致力於應對人類住區和環境風險的挑戰；工業化城市的健康、娛樂和保護規劃；並修復隨之而來的污染景觀。當今的景觀設計面臨著快速城市化、資源枯竭、氣候變遷、海平面上升和生物多樣性下降的挑戰。無論您最終是與企業客戶打交道、向政府機構通報情況，還是參與環境非營利組織，我們的學位都將為您提供批判性、創造性和智力工具，以倡導公正和可持續的變革。

d: The Bachelor of Arts in Urban Studies [BA(US)] is an interdisciplinary, studio-based and professionally-oriented programme offered by the Department of Urban Planning and Design. The BA(US) core curriculum covers the dynamics of cities and urban systems, as well as the way public policy, urban management and design interventions interact with the spontaneous social and economic processes that make up city life. It highlights research, applied statistical analysis, observation and communication, and introduce you to theories and methods, design thinking and design skills not only through regular lecture courses but also through integrated problem-based learning.

The BA(US) curriculum is also aligned to prepare students to become professional surveyors in the planning and development stream of the surveying profession, and more generally, future global urban leaders. Upon graduation, students will acquire skills in spatial, socioeconomic, and environmental analysis, and expertise in land/property development, which are applicable to Hong Kong and elsewhere. Overseas student exchange and professional training through internships are also strongly encouraged during the four years of study.

BA(US) graduates may go on to become professional urban planners after pursuing our Master of Science in Urban Planning, Hong Kong’s only professional postgraduate degree programme in planning accredited by the Hong Kong Institute of Planners (HKIP) and the Royal Town Planning Institute (RTPI). Alternatively, they can pursue other advanced postgraduate degrees in urban analytics, urban design, housing management, transport policy and planning, landscape architecture, conservation, environment and real estate, at HKU or other local/overseas universities.
z: 城市研究文學學士 [BA(US)] 是一個跨學科、以工作室為基礎、面向專業的課程，由城市規劃與設計系提供。 BA（美國）核心課程涵蓋城市和城市系統的動態，以及公共政策、城市管理和設計幹預與構成城市生活的自發性社會和經濟過程相互作用的方式。它強調研究、應用統計分析、觀察和交流，不僅透過常規講座課程，而且透過基於問題的綜合學習向您介紹理論和方法、設計思維和設計技能。
BA（美國）課程也旨在幫助學生成為測量專業規劃和發展領域的專業測量師，更廣泛地說，成為未來的全球城市領導者。畢業後，學生將獲得適用於香港和其他地方的空間、社會經濟和環境分析技能以及土地/房地產開發的專業知識。在四年的學習期間，我們也大力鼓勵透過實習進行海外學生交流和專業培訓。
學士學位（美國）畢業生在攻讀城市規劃理學碩士學位後，可以繼續成為專業城市規劃師，這是香港唯一獲得香港規劃師學會（HKIP）和皇家城市規劃研究所（RTPI）認可的專業規劃研究生學位課程。或者，他們可以在香港大學或其他本地/海外大學攻讀城市分析、城市設計、住房管理、交通政策和規劃、景觀建築、保護、環境和房地產等其他高級研究生學位。

d: Short DescriptionUpdated

The four-year Bachelor of Arts (BA) programme offers you with an opportunity to explore and enhance your knowledge and experience in the scope of arts and humanities. At the first year of exploration, students are encouraged to pursue their own special interests but also to explore disciplines that are new to them. There is a wide range of choices in different subjects, and students are required to take at least 3 introductory Arts courses, normally including the pre-requisite(s) of the programme(s) in which they may plan to major or minor.

At the end of Year 1, students will choose at least one out of sixteen Arts major. The liberal and flexible curriculum enables student to develop their individual study plan within a guided and academically coherent framework at Year 2-4. They can pursue an additional Arts / non-Arts major, or up to two minors. Throughout the entire undergraduate program, there are ample opportunities for internships, studying abroad, and field trips.
Arts Majors Available

Art History; Chinese History and Culture; Chinese Language and Literature; Comparative Literature; English Studies; Gender Studies; General Linguistics; Global and Area Studies; History; Hong Kong Studies; Japanese Studies; Korean Studies; Music; Philosophy; and Translation.
HKU Faculty of Arts Entrance Scholarship for Bachelor of Arts Programmes

The Faculty of Arts offers the Entrance Scholarship to students with outstanding HKDSE results. The award amount covers up to four years of full tuition for the BA studies. For details, please click here.
Dual Degree programmes at HKU Faculty of Arts

The Faculty offers two four-year dual BA degree programmes in collaboration with two highly respected international universities. For the one jointly offered with the Institut d’Etudes Politiques de Paris (Sciences Po), students will spend the first two years in France and the third and fourth year in Hong Kong. For the one jointly offered with the University of California, Berkeley, students will spend the first two years in Hong Kong and the third and fourth year in the USA.
z: 簡短說明已更新
四年製文學學士 (BA) 課程為您提供探索和增強藝術和人文領域知識和經驗的機會。在探索的第一年，我們鼓勵學生追求自己的特殊興趣，同時也探索對他們來說新的學科。不同科目有多種選擇，學生必須選修至少 3 門藝術入門課程，通常包括他們計劃主修或輔修課程的先決條件。
第一年結束時，學生將在十六個藝術專業中至少選擇一個。自由和靈活的課程使學生能夠在 2-4 年級的指導和學術連貫的框架內制定個人學習計劃。他們可以攻讀額外的藝術/非藝術專業，或最多兩個輔修專業。在整個本科課程中，有充足的實習、留學和實地考察的機會。
可選擇藝術專業
藝術史；中國歷史與文化；中國語言文學；比較文學；英語研究；性別研究；普通語言學；全球和區域研究；歷史;香港研究；日本研究；韓國研究；音樂;哲學;和翻譯。
香港大學文學院文學士學位課程入學獎學金
文學院為香港中學文憑考試成績優異的學生提供入學獎學金。獎學金金額涵蓋長達四年的學士學位學習全額學費。欲了解詳情，請點擊這裡。
香港大學文學院雙學位課程
該學院與兩所備受推崇的國際大學合作，提供兩個四年制雙學士學位課程。與巴黎政治學院（Sciences Po）共同開設的課程，學生將在法國度過前兩年，第三年和第四年在香港度過。與加州大學柏克萊分校聯合開設的課程，學生將在香港度過前兩年，第三年和第四年在美國度過。

d: The Bachelor of Arts in Global Creative Industries programme provides an interdisciplinary approach to understanding the intricate relationship between commerce and culture. It explores the fusion of cultural, economic, social, and political forces that drive the convergence of creativity and commerce on an industry-wide scale. With a global perspective, the programme inspires students to critically analyse the evolving roles of culture in today’s society, where commerce and culture increasingly intersect. This approach provides a platform to explore the interconnected nature of contemporary global creative sectors, transcending traditional boundaries and offering a holistic view of creative industry emergence, development, and future prospects on a global, regional, national, and local scale.

The programme presents four pathways for its majors: (1) Film & Media Communications, (2) Gaming & Digital Humanities, (3) Visual Arts, Heritage & Museum Studies, and (4) Music & Performing Arts. Each student selects a major within one of these pathways, fostering expertise in their chosen field while comprehending the interconnected nature of the creative industries. Additionally, the programme prepares students for diverse roles across industries, encompassing marketing, advertising, curation, customer relations, etc., in cultural sectors such as film, design, fashion, tourism, and heritage. Through supervised internships, industry experiences, field trips, and capstone projects, the curriculum provides practical, hands-on learning opportunities. By integrating theoretical knowledge with practical applications, the programme aims to cultivate profound understanding and practical skills, empowering students for success across various fields and preparing them to navigate the dynamic landscape of the creative industries and beyond.
z: 全球創意產業文學學士學位課程提供了一種跨學科的方法來理解商業與文化之間的複雜關係。它探索了文化、經濟、社會和政治力量的融合，推動了全行業範圍內的創造力和商業的融合。該計畫以全球視角出發，激勵學生批判性地分析文化在當今社會中不斷變化的角色，商業和文化日益交叉。這種方法提供了一個平台來探索當代全球創意產業的相互關聯性質，超越傳統界限，並提供全球、區域、國家和地方範圍內創意產業的出現、發展和未來前景的整體視角。

本計畫提供四個專業方向：(1) 電影與媒體傳播，(2) 遊戲與數位人文，(3) 視覺藝術、遺產與博物館研究，以及 (4) 音樂與表演藝術。每個學生都在這些途徑之一中選擇一個專業，培養其所選領域的專業知識，同時理解創意產業的相互關聯的性質。此外，該計畫也為學生在電影、設計、時尚、旅遊和遺產等文化領域的跨行業角色做好準備，包括行銷、廣告、策展、客戶關係等。透過監督實習、行業經驗、實地考察和頂點項目，該課程提供了實用的實踐學習機會。透過將理論知識與實際應用相結合，該計畫旨在培養深刻的理解和實踐技能，幫助學生在各個領域取得成功，並為他們駕馭創意產業及其他領域的動態景觀做好準備。

d: Short DescriptionUpdated

The BA(HDT) programme aims to recruit intellectually ambitious and talented students and equip them with training in humanities and digital technologies in order to tackle the world’s multi-faceted cultural and social problems, and to train future leaders by endowing them with innovative thinking, problem-solving skills and an interdisciplinary mindset.

The programme’s interdisciplinary structure combines a humanities focus (undertaken within a single Arts discipline) with a focus in interdisciplinary digital technologies. Through internship, experiential learning and project-based training, the programme brings students’ digital technology skills with their chosen humanities discipline together to create an individually-tailored learning experience.

In summary, the BA(HDT) offers both practical and theoretical training, providing students with unique skill sets in humanities and digital technologies. Students will be equipped with the skills to drive pioneering work in their humanities areas of specialisation, with the capacity to think in new ways about technological innovation, and with the ability to build a career in a wide array of fields.
HKU Faculty of Arts Entrance Scholarship for Bachelor of Arts Programmes

The Faculty of Arts offers the Entrance Scholarship to students with outstanding HKDSE results. The award amount covers up to four years of full tuition of four years for the BA(HDT) studies. For details, please click here.
Dual Degree programmes at HKU Faculty of Arts

The Faculty offers two four-year dual BA degree programmes in collaboration with two highly respected international universities. For the one jointly offered with the Institut d’Etudes Politiques de Paris (Sciences Po), students will spend the first two years in France and the third and fourth year in Hong Kong. For the one jointly offered with the University of California, Berkeley, students will spend the first two years in Hong Kong and the third and fourth year in the USA.
z: 簡短說明已更新
BA(HDT)課程旨在招募智力雄心勃勃、才華橫溢的學生，為他們提供人文和數位技術方面的培訓，以解決世界上多方面的文化和社會問題，並透過賦予他們創新思維、解決問題的能力和跨學科思維來培養未來的領導者。
該計劃的跨學科結構將人文學科重點（在單一藝術學科內進行）與跨學科數位技術重點結合起來。透過實習、體驗式學習和基於專案的培訓，該計劃將學生的數位技術技能與他們選擇的人文學科結合起來，創造出個人化的學習體驗。
總之，BA（HDT）提供實務和理論培訓，為學生提供人文和數位科技的獨特技能。學生將具備推動人文專業領域開創性工作的技能、以新方式思考科技創新的能力，以及在廣泛領域建立職業生涯的能力。
香港大學文學院文學士學位課程入學獎學金
文學院為香港中學文憑考試成績優異的學生提供入學獎學金。獎學金金額涵蓋 BA(HDT) 學習四年的全額學費。欲了解詳情，請點擊這裡。
香港大學文學院雙學位課程
該學院與兩所備受推崇的國際大學合作，提供兩個四年制雙學士學位課程。與巴黎政治學院（Sciences Po）共同開設的課程，學生將在法國度過前兩年，第三年和第四年在香港度過。與加州大學柏克萊分校聯合開設的課程，學生將在香港度過前兩年，第三年和第四年在美國度過。

d: Short DescriptionUpdated

The five-year BA & BEng in AI and Data Science double degree programme offers a unique opportunity to combine advanced technical training in AI and data science with critical insights from the humanities. From the first year, students are encouraged to explore both fields, pursuing their own interests while being introduced to core disciplines in AI, data science, and the humanities.

By the end of Year 1, students will have a solid foundation in AI and data science, the humanities, and their intersection. The interdisciplinary and flexible curriculum from Year 2 onward allows students to develop their individual study plan within a structured yet adaptable framework. Alongside the primary programme of study, students may also pursue additional minors or electives to broaden their academic experience.

Throughout the programme, students will have opportunities to engage in internships, research projects, and international exchanges, enhancing their understanding of how AI and emerging technologies intersect with human culture, ethics, and society.
HKU Faculty of Arts Entrance Scholarship for Bachelor of Arts Programmes

The Faculty of Arts offers the Entrance Scholarship to students with outstanding HKDSE results. The award amount covers up to four years of full tuition of five years for the BA & BEng studies. For details, please click here.
z: 簡短說明已更新
為期五年的人工智慧和數據科學學士雙學位課程提供了一個獨特的機會，將人工智慧和數據科學的高級技術培訓與人文學科的批判性見解相結合。從第一年開始，我們鼓勵學生探索這兩個領域，追求自己的興趣，同時了解人工智慧、資料科學和人文學科的核心學科。
到第一年結束時，學生將在人工智慧和數據科學、人文學科及其交叉領域打下堅實的基礎。從第二年開始，跨學科且靈活的課程允許學生在結構化且適應性強的框架內制定個人學習計劃。除了主要學習課程外，學生還可以選修其他輔修課程或選修課程，以擴大他們的學術經驗。
在整個計畫中，學生將有機會參與實習、研究計畫和國際交流，加深他們對人工智慧和新興技術如何與人類文化、道德和社會交叉的理解。
香港大學文學院文學士學位課程入學獎學金
文學院為香港中學文憑考試成績優異的學生提供入學獎學金。獎學金金額涵蓋 BA 和 BEng 學習的五年全額學費。欲了解詳情，請點擊這裡。

d: The BBA programme combines strong functional training with intensive training in communication skills, computer applications and other social science and/or science subjects. Students can choose to major in one of the following five majors:
• Entrepreneurship, design and innovation,
• Finance,
• Human resource management,
• Information systems and analytics, or
• Marketing.
(*Note: Candidates must undergo a selection process arranged by the Programme Coordinator for declaring the EDI major.)
Students can also declare a second major or minor(s) if they are able to meet the programme requirements.
Dual Degree Programmes
Students may choose to pursue one of the following two 4-year BBA dual degree programmes offered by HKU Business School in collaboration with leading international universities:

• Jointly offered with the Institut d’Etudes Politiques de Paris (Sciences Po). Students will spend the first two years at Sciences Po and the third and fourth years at HKU. Upon successful completion of the programme, students will be awarded a BBA degree from HKU, and a Bachelor of Arts (BA) from Sciences Po.

• Jointly offered with the University of British Columbia (UBC). Students will spend the first and final years at HKU and the second and third years at UBC. Upon successful completion of the programme, students will be awarded a BBA degree from HKU, and a Bachelor of Commerce (BCom) from UBC.
Separate application is required for applying to the dual degree programmes.
z: BBA 課程將強大的功能訓練與溝通技巧、電腦應用和其他社會科學和/或科學科目的密集訓練結合。學生可以選擇以下五個專業之一：
• 創業、設計與創新，
• 金融，
• 人力資源管理，
• 資訊系統與分析，或
• 行銷.
（*註：候選人必須經過專案協調員安排的選擇過程才能宣布 EDI 專業。）
如果學生能夠滿足課程要求，他們也可以聲明第二主修或輔修。
雙學位課程
學生可選擇修讀以下兩個由香港大學商學院與國際領先大學合作提供的四年制工商管理學士雙學位課程之一：
• 與巴黎政治學院（Sciences Po）共同開設。學生將在巴黎政治學院度過前兩年，第三年和第四年在香港大學度過。成功完成課程後，學生將獲得香港大學的工商管理學士學位和巴黎政治學院的文學學士學位。
• 與不列顛哥倫比亞大學(UBC) 共同開設。學生將在香港大學度過第一年和最後一年，在英屬哥倫比亞大學度過第二年和第三年。成功完成課程後，學生將獲得香港大學的工商管理學士學位和英屬哥倫比亞大學的商業學士學位（BCom）。
申請雙學位課程需要單獨申請。

d: The BEcon and BEcon&Fin programmes share the same programme code. Students are required to enrol in either one of the programmes on admission.

The BEcon programme trains students in economic theories, statistical tools, the application of theories to solve practical economic problems in trade, banking, the labour market and evaluation of the regional economic performances of China, Hong Kong and other economies. Students will be furnished with solid theoretical and empirical economic knowledge to analyse and understand human behaviour and social interactions. The programme allows students a high degree of flexibility in planning their future career specialisation. Students can also declare a second major or minor(s) if they are able to meet the programme requirements.

The BEcon&Fin programme is designed to meet the interests of students who are seeking a balanced study of both economics and finance. The programme recognises the significance of economics both in its own right and as a foundation for the study of finance, and the significance of finance as a career path for students in Hong Kong. Students will receive solid training in economic and financial theories and applications. They will be equipped with the skills to analyse human behaviour and social interaction, as well as to solve problems in financial institutions. The single-major curriculum structure enables students the flexibility to pursue a second major or minor(s).
HKU-PKU “Future Leaders” Dual Bachelor’s Degree in Economics, Finance and Management

Jointly offered with Peking University (PKU), the HKU-PKU “Future Leaders” Dual Bachelor’s Degree in Economics, Finance and Management integrates the strengths of two leading business schools in Hong Kong and Mainland China. Students will be awarded a Bachelor of Economics and Finance (BEcon&Fin) from HKU, and a Bachelor of Management (BMgmt) from PKU upon successful completion of the 4-year programme.

The economic development in Hong Kong and Mainland China is highly intertwined, yet the business environment in the two places is utterly disparate. This programme aims to instil students with a robust understanding of the business models in the two markets, and to help them familiarize with the different operation and management styles.

There are ample opportunities for students to participate in summer exchange programmes at world-class universities, and to gain internship experience from Hong Kong or Mainland China companies. With solid knowledge of economics, finance and management and interpersonal skills gained in multi-cultural and social contexts, graduates are expected to become competitive and capable business leaders with a global perspective.
Separate application is required for applying to this Dual Bachelor’s Degree programme.
z: BEcon 和 BEcon&Fin 程式共用相同的程式碼。學生在入學時必須註冊其中任一課程。
BEcon計畫培養學生經濟理論、統計工具、應用理論解決貿易、銀行、勞動力市場等實際經濟問題以及評估中國、香港和其他經濟體的區域經濟表現。學生將獲得紮實的理論和實證經濟知識，以分析和理解人類行為和社會互動。該計劃使學生能夠高度靈活地規劃未來的職業專業。如果學生能夠滿足課程要求，他們也可以聲明第二主修或輔修。
BEcon&Fin 課程旨在滿足尋求均衡學習經濟和金融的學生的興趣。本課程認識到經濟學本身和作為金融研究基礎的重要性，以及金融作為香港學生職業道路的重要性。學生將接受經濟和金融理論及應用的紮實培訓。他們將具備分析人類行為和社會互動以及解決金融機構問題的技能。單專業課程結構使學生能夠靈活地選擇第二主修或輔修。
香港大學-北大「未來領導者」經濟、金融及管理雙學士學位
與北京大學聯合開設的港大-北大「未來領袖」經濟、金融和管理雙學士學位課程，融合了香港和中國內地兩所領先商學院的優勢。成功完成四年課程後，學生將獲得香港大學經濟與金融學士學位（BEcon&Fin）和北京大學管理學士學位（BMgmt）。
香港與內地的經濟發展緊密相連，但兩地的營商環境卻截然不同。該計畫旨在讓學生深入了解兩個市場的商業模式，並幫助他們熟悉不同的營運和管理風格。

There are ample opportunities for students to participate in summer exchange programmes at world-class universities, and to gain internship experience from Hong Kong or Mainland China companies.憑藉著紮實的經濟、金融和管理知識以及在富有文化和社會背景下獲得多元文化和社會背景下的人具有紮實的經濟、金融和管理知識以及在全球具有競爭力和社會背景下獲得多元文化和社會背景的人具有競爭力、有能力的商業能力。
申請雙學士學位課程需另外申請。

d: The BBA(Acc&Fin) and BBA(ADA) programmes share the same programme code. Students are required to enrol in either one of these programmes before the commencement of their studies.

Both BBA(Acc&Fin) and BBA(ADA) programmes prepare students for a professional qualification in accounting. The BBA(Acc&Fin) programme provides the broad-based education in both accounting and finance which is necessary to progress towards a leadership role in the financial sector. Students are required to take professional core in accounting and a minor in finance, with an option to second major in finance. Tailor-made professional preparation programmes and internship opportunities with renowned accounting firms and financial institutions are available for talented students.

Launched in 2023-2024, the BBA(ADA) programme provides students with an option to focus on data analytics aspect in accounting instead of having a minor in finance. It is an excellent choice for students who are interested in STEM with accounting and business applications and wish to pursue their career in the related fields. The intensive accounting training enables BBA(ADA) students to distinguish themselves from students of other data analytics/STEM programmes. Students will be equipped with comprehensive accounting and business knowledge that prepares them to obtain professional qualifications in accounting. They will also acquire computer programming and data analytics skills to meet the needs of the accounting and business professions in today’s digital transformation economy.

Both BBA(Acc&Fin) and BBA(ADA) programmes are accredited by the Hong Kong Institute of Certified Public Accountants (HKICPA), the Association of Chartered Certified Accountants (ACCA), and the CPA Australia. These accreditations enable our graduates to obtain exemptions from certain papers of the professional qualification examinations conducted by the respective professional accounting accreditation bodies.
z: BBA(Acc&Fin) 和 BBA(ADA) 課程共享相同的課程代碼。學生必須在開始學習之前註冊其中任一課程。
BBA(Acc&Fin) 和 BBA(ADA) 課程都為學生準備會計專業資格。 BBA（Acc&Fin）課程提供會計和金融方面的廣泛教育，這是在金融領域取得領導地位所必需的。學生必須主修會計專業，輔修金融專業，並可選擇第二專業金融專業。為有才華的學生提供量身定制的專業準備課程以及知名會計師事務所和金融機構的實習機會。

BBA(ADA) 計畫於 2023-2024 年推出，為學生提供了專注於會計數據分析的選擇，而不是輔修金融。對於對 STEM 會計和商業應用感興趣並希望在相關領域發展的學生來說，這是一個絕佳的選擇。強化會計培訓使 BBA(ADA) 學生能夠將自己與其他數據分析/STEM 課程的學生區分開來。學生將具備全面的會計和商業知識，為獲得會計專業資格做好準備。他們還將獲得電腦程式設計和數據分析技能，以滿足當今數位轉型經濟中會計和商業專業的需求。
BBA(Acc&Fin) 和 BBA(ADA) 課程均獲得香港會計師公會 (HKICPA)、英國特許公認會計師公會 (ACCA) 和澳洲會計師公會的認可。這些認證使我們的畢業生能夠獲得各自專業會計認證機構進行的專業資格考試某些試卷的豁免。

d: The BBA(BA) programme is crafted to meet the growing industry demand for talents in the business analytics field. Its curriculum offers students a comprehensive coverage of both technical and managerial skill sets. Students will learn a wide spectrum of knowledge from the disciplines of information technology, data science, business statistics and management. Core courses include programming language, database management, introduction to business analytics, management information systems, decision and risk analysis, etc. They help students build the foundations for advanced topics in senior years. Students also have the option to choose from analytics technique courses and business application courses. The aim is to provide students with state-of-the-art experiences in artificial intelligence, big data, social media, and other latest development. Such design helps train well-rounded students who will be more adaptable in their career development.

Graduates of the BBA(BA) programme are expected to land on data and analytics related jobs in a wide variety of sectors such as IT, finance, supply chain, marketing, consulting, manufacturing, and so forth. They will also be competitive in pursuing post-graduate degrees in fields such as data science, information management, decision science, big data, etc.
Students from all backgrounds who have a passion for problem-solving through analytics, and who aim to develop their career path in analytics are welcome to apply for the BBA(BA) programme.
z: BBA(BA) 課程旨在滿足產業對商業分析領域人才不斷增長的需求。其課程為學生提供全面的技術和管理技能。學生將學習資訊科技、數據科學、商業統計和管理等學科的廣泛知識。核心課程包括程式語言、資料庫管理、商業分析概論、管理資訊系統、決策和風險分析等。它們幫助學生為高年級的高級主題打下基礎。學生還可以選擇分析技術課程和商業應用課程。目的是為學生提供人工智慧、大數據、社交媒體和其他最新發展領域的最先進體驗。這樣的設計有助於培養全面發展的學生，使他們在職業發展中更具適應性。
BBA(BA) 課程的畢業生預計將在 IT、金融、供應鏈、行銷、諮詢、製造等多個領域從事與數據和分析相關的工作。他們在攻讀數據科學、資訊管理、決策科學、大數據等領域的研究生學位方面也將具有競爭力。
歡迎來自各種背景、熱衷於透過分析解決問題並致力於在分析領域發展職業道路的學生申請 BBA(BA) 課程。

d: The BBA(Law)&LLB programme is designed to provide students with professional knowledge and intensive training in the fields of both business and law. It is jointly offered by HKU Business School and the Faculty of Law, and it integrates business and law courses.

The BBA(Law)&LLB double-degree programme blends two strategic disciplines into a single course for the bright and highly motivated students. It is a good choice for those seeking a broad education and flexibility in their career choices. Graduates of the programme will be awarded two degrees: BBA(Law) by HKU Business School, and LLB by the Faculty of Law. The LLB degree is the basic requirement for pursuing a legal career. After obtaining the LLB degree, students who meet the admission requirements can apply for the Postgraduate Certificate in Laws (PCLL) programme.
z: BBA（法律）&LLB課程旨在為學生提供商業和法律領域的專業知識和密集培訓。它由香港大學商學院和法律學院共同開設，融合商業和法律課程。
BBA（法律）和LLB雙學位課程將兩個策略學科融合為一門課程，適合聰明且積極進取的學生。對於那些尋求廣泛教育和職業選擇靈活性的人來說，這是一個不錯的選擇。該課程的畢業生將獲得兩個學位：香港大學商學院頒發的工商管理學士（法律）學位和法律學院頒發的法學學士學位。法學學士學位是從事法律職業的基本要求。獲得法學學士學位後，符合入學要求的學生可以申請法學研究生證書（PCLL）課程。

d: Digitization and data are fundamentally changing all businesses and industries. The BSc(MAT) equips students with quantitative skills, technology, and business marketing know-how to pursue a career in the digital economy and modern businesses. The programme targets both STEM students with an interest in business as well as business students interested in the technology space.

Students will gain a solid foundation in cutting-edge technical areas including computer programming, data science, digital platforms and marketing technology as well as business marketing know-how such as the design launch of new technology products, targeting consumers, digital marketing, forecast and predicting markets, and building a technology-focused strategy.

BSc(MAT) graduates will be well-prepared to join the workforce in digital marketing, entrepreneurship & start-ups, gaming, digital platforms, e-commerce, IT, consulting, finance, and other industries with a focus on analytics, data, and technology.
z: 數位化和數據正在從根本上改變所有企業和產業。 BSc(MAT) 為學生提供定量技能、技術和商業行銷知識，以在數位經濟和現代企業中追求職業生涯。該計畫既針對對商業有興趣的 STEM 學生，也針對對科技領域有興趣的商科學生。
學生將在尖端技術領域打下堅實的基礎，包括電腦程式設計、數據科學、數位平台和行銷技術，以及商業行銷知識，例如新技術產品的設計發布、瞄準消費者、數位行銷、預測和預測市場以及製定以技術為中心的策略。
BSc(MAT) 畢業生將為加入數位行銷、創業與新創公司、遊戲、數位平台、電子商務、IT、諮詢、金融和其他行業的勞動力做好充分準備，並專注於分析、數據和技術。

d: The Bachelor of Finance in Asset Management and Private Banking (BFin(AMPB)) programme is the first undergraduate programme of its kind in Hong Kong and Asia. The Programme aims to prepare students to enter the rapidly growing fields of asset management and private wealth management in Hong Kong and Asia Pacific, or in banking and finance generally.

During the first two years, students complete introductory courses in accounting, economics, mathematics, statistics, corporate finance, and investments and portfolio analysis. In subsequent years, students take more specified and industry related courses including equity valuation and investment in specific asset classes e.g. private equity, venture capital, hedge funds and digital assets, understanding of financial statements and doing financial analysis, lending and credit in private wealth and corporate bank, financial regulations and compliance, current issues in finance, ESG in investment, institutional consulting and family office.

The practical and career-oriented curriculum of the BFin(AMPB) programme provides our students with the necessary knowledge and skills for careers in asset management, private wealth management and banking & finance. Practical-oriented courses are taught by teachers with solid experience in the finance industry., including a final-year capstone course requiring students to apply their knowledge to real world situations by conducting analysis and managing a portfolio based on investment guidelines and risk policies of institutional or high net-worth clients.

BFin(AMPB) students will be given opportunities to apply for different enrichment activities specific to their studies, including overseas exchange study and industry-sponsored internships in either Year 2 or 3. Frequent networking activities with market practitioners are available, e.g. coffee chats and round table talks meeting seasoned industry practitioners in small groups, career seminars by professional bodies, and thematic visits to AMPB firms.
z: 資產管理及私人銀行金融學士（BFin(AMPB)）課程是香港及亞洲首個此類本科課程。該課程旨在幫助學生做好進入香港和亞太地區快速成長的資產管理和私人財富管理領域，或銀行和金融領域的準備。
在前兩年，學生完成會計、經濟、數學、統計學、公司財務、投資和投資組合分析等入門課程。在接下來的幾年中，學生將學習更具體的行業相關課程，包括股權估值和特定資產類別的投資，例如股票。私募股權、創投、對沖基金和數位資產、財務報表的理解和財務分析、私人財富和企業銀行的貸款和信貸、金融法規和合規性、當前金融問題、投資中的 ESG、機構諮詢和家族辦公室。
BFin(AMPB) 計畫的實用且以職業為導向的課程為我們的學生提供資產管理、私人財富管理以及銀行與金融職業所需的知識和技能。以實踐為導向的課程由在金融業擁有豐富經驗的教師教授，包括最後一年的頂點課程，要求學生根據機構或高淨值客戶的投資指南和風險政策進行分析和管理投資組合，將其知識應用到現實世界中。
BFin(AMPB) 學生將有機會申請針對其學習的不同豐富活動，包括第二年或第三年的海外交流學習和行業贊助的實習。可以與市場從業者進行頻繁的交流活動，例如與經驗豐富的行業從業者以小組形式會面的咖啡聊天和圓桌會談、專業機構舉辦的職業研討會以及對 AMPB 公司的專題訪問。

d: The Bachelor of Science in Quantitative Finance [BSc(QFin)] is a premium finance programme. Built on a solid foundation in economics and finance, the BSc(QFin) programme equips students with the essential quant skills, such as mathematics, statistics, and programming, that are required in more advanced and sophisticated analyses, such as valuation models of structured products, risk management, simulation and data analysis, financial engineering, and quantitative trading.

The programme goes beyond merely equipping students with quant skills. More importantly, it stresses on combining these skills with an understanding of the financial markets, the macro environment, and the practical situations where financial managers work. To this end, the curriculum offers a balanced mix of quant and business courses.

In the first two years students take basic finance courses such as accounting, corporate finance, macroeconomics, derivatives, and portfolio management. At the same time, they are introduced to a strong foundation in probability, statistics, calculus, linear algebra, and computer programming.

Students will apply the aforementioned quant skills in specialised QFin courses the third and fourth years of study, such as risk management, financial engineering, spreadsheet financial modelling, and mathematical finance. They can also choose from a wide selection of major elective courses such as time series analysis, big data and quant trading.

We believe that a broad knowledge base is essential for undergraduate students to understand the world in depth, absorb new ideas quickly, and think outside the box and from multiple perspectives. Hence the programme affords much flexibility to students to pursue other academic interests via second major or minor(s), whether they are mathematics, economics, or biochemistry.

To nurture students’ soft skills and market acumen, the programme provides a wide range of value-enhancing activities, such as Round Tables with Practitioners, Alumni Drinks, Executive Mentorship Scheme, Bloomberg training workshops, simulation trading workshops, and an international field trip to other international financial centres such as New York, London and Zurich.
z: 數量金融理學學士 [BSc(QFin)] 是一門優質金融課程。 BSc(QFin) 課程建立在堅實的經濟學和金融基礎之上，為學生提供基本的定量技能，如數學、統計學和編程，這些技能是結構性產品估值模型、風險管理、模擬和數據分析、金融工程和定量交易等更高級和復雜的分析所需的。
该计划不仅仅是为学生提供定量技能。更重要的是，它強調將這些技能與對金融市場、宏觀環境和財務經理工作實際情況的了解結合起來。為此，課程提供了定量和商業課程的平衡組合。
在头两年，学生学习基础金融课程，如会计、公司金融、宏观经济学、衍生品和投资组合管理。同時，他們在機率、統計、微積分、線性代數和電腦程式設計方面打下了堅實的基礎。

Students will apply the aforementioned quant skills in specialised QFin courses the third and fourth years of study, such as risk management, financial engineering, spreadsheet financial modelling, and mathematical 論文等課程可供選擇的課程

我們相信，廣泛的知識基礎對於本科生深入了解世界、快速吸收新想法、跳出框框、從多個角度思考至關重要。 Hence the programme affords much flexibility to students to pursue other academic interests via second major or minor(s), whether they are mathematics, economics, or biochemistry.
為了培養學生的軟技能和市場敏銳度，該計畫提供了廣泛的增值活動，如從業者圓桌會議、校友酒會、高階主管導師計畫、彭博培訓研討會、模擬交易研討會以及紐約、倫敦和蘇黎世等其他國際金融中心的國際實地考察。

d: BBA(IBGM) is an intensive premier programme in international business and global management featuring a unique curriculum designed to reflect the ever-changing demands of a globalising world.

Exclusive elements such as overseas exchange studies, international field trips and global enrichment opportunities are integrated into the curriculum, and students are given the flexibility to pursue an in-depth inquiry into another specialised area of study as a second major. This cross-functional, personalised approach aims to foster a select group of outstanding students to become the world's future leaders, equipped with global perspectives, cultural sensitivity, social responsibility and key competencies to succeed in the international business environment.
z: BBA（IBGM）是國際商務和全球管理的密集高階課程，其獨特的課程旨在反映全球化世界不斷變化的需求。
課程中融入了海外交流學習、國際實地考察和全球拓展機會等獨特元素，學生可以靈活地深入探究另一個專業學習領域作為第二專業。這種跨職能、個人化的方法旨在培養一群優秀的學生成為世界未來的領導者，具備全球視野、文化敏感度、社會責任感和在國際商業環境中取得成功的關鍵能力。

d: The intent of the BDS curriculum at the Faculty of Dentistry, The University of Hong Kong, is to educate and train students to become dentists in its mission of providing oral health care for individuals and the community in the Hong Kong context. The integrated Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) curriculum is outcomes- and competency-based and adopts a problem-based learning (PBL) approach in achieving this mission. The dental degree curriculum lasts six years.

Learning principally takes place in the Prince Philip Dental Hospital, the only dental teaching hospital in Hong Kong. There are also classes in the general medical and surgical wards of the University Departments of Medicine and Surgery, and with the ward and operating theatre of Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery in the Queen Mary Hospital. Learning also occurs at a variety of dental clinics and oral health education delivery settings throughout Hong Kong.
z: 香港大學牙科學院 BDS 課程的目的是教育和培訓學生成為牙醫，其使命是為香港個人和社區提供口腔保健服務。綜合牙科學士學位 (BDS) 課程以結果和能力為基礎，並採用基於問題的學習 (PBL) 方法來實現這一使命。牙科學位課程為期六年。
學習主要在菲利普親王牙科醫院進行，該醫院是香港唯一的牙科教學醫院。大學內科及外科系的一般內科及外科病房，以及瑪莉醫院口腔顎面外科病房及手術室亦設有課程。学习也在香港各地的各种牙科诊所和口腔健康教育机构进行。

d: This double-degree curriculum is jointly offered by the Faculty of Education and the Faculty of Arts. It allows students to obtain two degrees in five years and to meet the language requirements for English language teachers recommended by the HKSAR Government’s Standing Committee on Language Education and Research.

The curriculum integrates academic and professional studies in language education. Students pursue a programme of study in English language and linguistics in the Faculty of Arts, along with Education Professional Core courses in the Faculty of Education. Professional aspects of the double degree are phased in gradually over the five years, including pedagogy, psychology, sociology and philosophy of education courses, and teaching practice in Hong Kong primary and secondary schools.
z: 此雙學位課程由教育學院和文學院共同開設。它允許學生在五年內獲得兩個學位，並滿足香港特別行政區政府語文教育及研究常務委員會推薦的英語教師的語言要求。
该课程将语言教育的学术和专业研究融为一体。学生在文学院学习英语语言和语言学课程，并在教育学院学习教育专业核心课程。雙學位的專業方面將在五年內逐步展開，包括教育、心理學、社會學和教育哲學課程，以及在香港中小學的教學實踐。

d: This double-degree curriculum is jointly offered by the Faculty of Education and the Faculty of Arts. It allows students to obtain two degrees in five years and to meet the language requirements for Chinese Language teachers recommended by the HKSAR Government’s Standing Committee on Language Education and Research.

The curriculum integrates academic and professional studies in language education. Students pursue a programme of study in Chinese language, literature and culture in the Faculty of Arts, along with Education Professional Core courses in the Faculty of Education. Professional aspects of the double degree are phased in gradually over the five years, including pedagogical, psychological and sociological courses, and teaching practice in Hong Kong primary and secondary schools.
Note: Students are expected to be proficient in Cantonese and Putonghua, and are able to read and write Traditional Chinese.
z: 此雙學位課程由教育學院和文學院共同開設。它允許學生在五年內獲得兩個學位，並達到香港特別行政區政府語文教育及研究常務委員會推薦的中國語文教師的語言要求。
本課程將語言教育的學術和專業研究融為一體。學生在文學院學習中國語言、文學和文化課程，並在教育學院學習教育專業核心課程。雙學位的專業方面將在五年內逐步展開，包括教育、心理學和社會學課程，以及在香港中小學的教學實踐。
註：學生須精通粵語及國語，並能讀寫繁體中文。

d: The BED (ECE&SE) programme allows graduates to nurture and teach children from birth to six years in diverse early childhood settings (e.g., kindergartens, child care centres and special child care centres). It provides students with a strong foundation in the knowledge, skills and attitudes required for working with young children and their families. The programme fully integrates early childhood education with inclusive education hence students will be prepared to recognise children’s diverse needs and effectively support children with both typical and atypical development. The programme combines rigorous academic study with experiential learning, internship, and practical application.

Following graduation, students can apply for registration as a qualified kindergarten teacher, a child care worker and supervisor under the Child Care Services Regulations. They will be considered as having acquired training on the One-year In-service Course in Special Child Care Work recognised by the Social Welfare Department. Graduates will also be considered to have met the academic qualifications required as a kindergarten principal.
z: BED (ECE&SE) 課程讓畢業生在不同的幼兒教育環境（例如幼兒園、兒童保育中心和特殊兒童保育中心）中培養和教育從出生到六歲的兒童。它为学生提供了与幼儿及其家庭一起工作所需的知识、技能和态度的坚实基础。該計畫將幼兒教育與全納教育充分融合，使學生能夠認識到兒童的多樣化需求，並有效支持典型和非典型發展的兒童。该项目将严谨的学术研究与体验式学习、实习和实际应用相结合。

畢業後，學生可以根據《幼兒服務條例》申請註冊成為合格的幼兒園教師、幼兒工作員和主管。 They will be considered as having acquired training on the One-year In-service Course in Special Child Care Work recognised by the Social Welfare Department. Graduates will also be considered to have met the academic qualifications reduatesd as kinder.

d: The Faculty of Education in collaboration with the Faculty of Science offers an inter-disciplinary five-year honours degree focusing on the study and teaching of the science subjects in the local primary# and senior secondary school curriculum.

The double-degree curriculum integrates academic and professional studies at-depth in science education. Students complete a Science major programme in the Faculty of Science, and Education Professional Core courses in the Faculty of Education. Professional aspects of the double degree are phased in gradually over the five years, including pedagogical, psychological and sociological courses, and teaching practice in Hong Kong primary# and secondary schools. The curriculum focuses on the teaching of the science subjects in local mainstream schools.

#Subject to approval, the curriculum is undergoing a revamp to include training for teaching primary science in addition to the existing training for teaching secondary science. The proposed changes are planned to be implemented for the 2026-27 cohort. Under the revamped curriculum, the Year 4 Professional Practicum will be on primary science.
z: 教育學院與理學院合作提供跨學科的五年榮譽學位，重點是當地小學和高中課程中科學科目的研究和教學。
雙學位課程將學術和專業研究深入融入科學教育中。学生在科学学院完成科学专业课程，在教育学院完成教育专业核心课程。双学位的专业方面会在五年内逐步展开，包括教育学、心理学和社会学课程，以及在香港中小学的教学实践。课程重点是当地主流学校的科学科目教学。
#經批准，課程正在進行改革，除了現有的中學科學教學培訓外，還包括小學科學教學培訓。擬議的變更計劃在 2026-27 年期間實施。根据修改后的课程，四年级专业实习将是初级科学。

d: The Faculty of Education offers a five-year full-time Bachelor of Science in Speech-Language Pathology* (Honours) programme that prepares students to become professionally competent speech-language pathologists.

This intensive programme provides students with the knowledge, skills and practical experience necessary to become a scientific, effective and adaptive speech-language pathologist. Courses cover subject knowledge in acquisition, development and disorders in human communication, speech and language, and swallowing, as well as knowledge in other related disciplines, such as medical science, psychology, English and Cantonese linguistics and hearing sciences. The curriculum employs a student-centred translational learning approach. Students will be engaged in lectures, self-directed learning, case-based learning, small group learning, and clinical practice. Students will complete a final-year research project in the fifth year.

The programme emphasises integration and application of knowledge and scientific evidence in clinical practice. Clinical teaching is provided by both University staff and practicing clinicians from the community. Students receive over 300 hours of supervised clinical practicum, conducted predominately in Cantonese. Students may have opportunities to receive interdisciplinary and international service training.
Note: Students must be able to communicate fluently in Cantonese.
*Formerly known as Bachelor of Science in Speech and Hearing Sciences.
z: 教育學院提供五年全日制語言病理學理學士學位*（榮譽）課程，幫助學生成為專業的語言病理學家。

This intensive programme provides students with the knowledge, skills and practical experience necessary to become a scientific, effective and adaptive speech-language pathologist.课程涵盖人类沟通、言语和语言、吞咽等习得、发展和障碍的学科知识，以及其他相关学科的知识，如医学、心理学、英语和粤语语言学以及听力科学。本課程採用以學生為中心的轉化學習方法。學生將參與講座、自主學習、以案例為基礎的學習、小組學習和臨床實踐。学生将在第五年完成最后一年的研究项目。
該計劃強調知識和科學證據在臨床實踐中的整合和應用。临床教学由大学工作人员和社区执业临床医生提供。学生接受超过 300 小时的监督临床实习，主要以粤语进行。學生可能有機會接受跨學科和國際服務培訓。
注意：學生必須能夠用粵語流利溝通。
*以前稱為言語和聽力科學理學學士。

d: The Faculty of Engineering aims to nurture highly talented and top-performing engineering students to be future leaders in frontier technology developments and rapidly advancing industries. The training flexibility and curriculum elements for these students are beyond the traditional engineering education requirements to prepare them to take up new challenges in various highly competitive engineering fields, such as, but not limited to, robotics, artificial intelligence, material technology, nanofabrication, semiconductor, construction automation, and sustainable development. Through freely choosing an engineering major, receiving academic/industrial mentorship, and participating in overseas exchanges, students can aim to pursue the most competitive career paths in either academic or industrial direction. Applicants can use one single code, JS6303, to apply for the Bachelor of Engineering Elite Programme.
Features of the Elite programme are as follows:
• Freely Choose a BEng Programme from the Followings to Start in Year 2

To fully explore their unique potential, students can freely choose Civil Engineering, Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronic Engineering, Data and Systems Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence and Data Science of the School of Computer and Data Science (SCDS) as their BEng degree.
• Eligible for the BEng X + MScEng AIE Scheme

Elite Programme students are also eligible to choose to enroll in the Bachelor of Engineering and Master of Science in Engineering in Artificial Intelligence in Engineering (BEng X + MScEng AIE) scheme to obtain a BEng Degree and a Master Degree in AI in Engineering in 4+1 Years for more interdisciplinary training. All the details and requirements of BEng X + MScEng AIE scheme are mentioned under programme code JS6377.
• Special Academic Advisor and Industrial Mentor

The Faculty will provide special academic advisors to guide students in this programme through their curriculum design and overseas exchange choices. Each student will also be assigned an industrial mentor to assist them in learning from state-of-the-art practices in the corresponding industry.
• Entrance and Overseas Exchange Scholarships
Each student can receive an entrance scholarship of HKD100,000 and an overseas academic exchange scholarship of HKD50,000 to encourage them to pursue more challenging training opportunities.
z: The Faculty of Engineering aims to nurture highly talented and top-performing engineering students to be future leaders in frontier technology developments and rapidly advancing industries.這些學生的培訓靈活性和課程內容超出了傳統工程教育的要求，使他們能夠在各種競爭激烈的工程領域迎接新的挑戰，例如但不限於機器人、人工智慧、材料技術、奈米製造、半導體、建築自動化和永續發展。透過自由選擇工程專業、接受學術/工業指導、參與海外交流，學生可以在學術或工業方向追求最具競爭力的職業道路。申请人可以使用单一代码JS6303来申请工程学士学位精英计划。
精英計劃的特點如下：
• 從以下課程中自由選擇第 2 年開始的工程學士學位課程
為了充分發揮自己的獨特潛力，學生可以自由選擇土木工程、電腦工程、電機工程、電子工程、數據與系統工程、機械工程以及電腦與數據科學學院（SCDS）的電腦科學、人工智慧與數據科學作為學士學位。
• 有資格參加 BEng X + MSCEng AIE 計劃
精英計劃的學生還有資格選擇報讀人工智慧工程學士和工程理學碩士（BEng X + MScEng AIE）計劃，在4+1年內獲得人工智慧工程學士學位和碩士學位，進行更多跨學科的培訓。 BEng X + MScEng AIE 計畫的所有細節和要求均在程式碼 JS6377 中提及。
• 特別學術顧問與產業導師
學院將提供專門的學術顧問，指導該計畫的學生進行課程設計和海外交流選擇。每个学生还将被分配一名行业导师，帮助他们学习相应行业的最先进实践。
• 入學及海外交流獎學金
每位學生可獲得10萬元港幣入學獎學金及港幣5萬元海外學術交流獎學金，鼓勵他們追求更具挑戰性的培訓機會。

d: The programme is designed to fuse foundational knowledge and cutting-edge technologies for optimising real-world systems. Our curriculum encompasses a diverse range of fundamental system analytics and computing disciplines, including data-driven optimization and system simulation and modelling. Additionally, students are exposed to innovative artificial intelligence and intelligent systems technologies. Through rigorous coursework and hands-on experiences that seamlessly blend theoretical concepts with advanced technologies, the programme offers students rich opportunities to engage in real-world projects and research that push the boundaries of technology.

Equipped with in-depth skills in data analytics, decision-making, robotics and automation, and human-machine interfaces, our students are empowered to pursue advanced studies and explore diverse career paths across a wide range of industries, including construction, logistics and transportation, robotics, healthcare engineering, manufacturing, and more.
The main areas of expertise developed in this curriculum are as follows:

• Data Analytics and Computing – Big data analytics, data-driven optimisation, operations research, statistics analysis, system modelling and simulation, quality control and process optimisation, blockchain, and project management.
• Robotics and Intelligent Systems – Artificial intelligence, machine learning, computer vision, robotics, virtual reality, human-machine interface, internet of things, and manufacturing.
Entry Scholarship

In recognition of outstanding academic achievements by HKDSE students, the department will grant an entry scholarship to eligible students who are admitted to the programme via JUPAS. The scholarship award criteria are shown at https://www.dase.hku.hk/.
z: 該計劃旨在融合基礎知識和尖端技術來優化現實世界的系統。我们的课程涵盖各种基础系统分析和计算学科，包括数据驱动的优化以及系统模拟和建模。此外，学生还将接触到创新的人工智能和智能系统技术。 Through rigorous coursework and hands-on experiences that seamlessly blend theoretical concepts with advanced technologies, the programme offers students rich opportunities to engage in real-world projects and research that push the boundaries of technology.
我們的學生具備數據分析、決策、機器人和自動化以及人機介面方面的深入技能，能夠繼續深造並探索各行業的多樣化職業道路，包括建築、物流和運輸、機器人、醫療保健工程、製造等。
本課程發展的主要專業領域如下：
• 數據分析和計算——大數據分析、數據驅動優化、運籌學、統計分析、系統建模和模擬、品質控制和流程優化、區塊鏈和專案管理。
• 機器人和智慧系統－人工智慧、機器學習、電腦視覺、機器人、虛擬實境、人機介面、物聯網和製造。
入學獎學金

In recognition of outstanding academic achievements by HKDSE students, the department will grant an entry scholarship to eligible students who are admitted to the programme via JUPAS.獎學金授予標準詳見://www.dase.hku.hk/dase。

d: Mechanical engineering is a crucial field in the design and development of engineering systems with moving parts. The BEng degree in Mechanical Engineering equips graduates with the necessary expertise and skills to succeed in the profession. The program covers a broad range of engineering science knowledge, including thermodynamics, fluid mechanics, solid mechanics, materials technology, dynamics, and control. Students can specialize in areas of their interest, such as aeronautical engineering, biomedical engineering, control and robotics, energy and environment, mechanics and materials, nanotechnology, product design and manufacture, and thermo-fluids.

Graduates are prepared to pursue various career paths, including research and development, manufacturing, design, and consulting. They may also choose to pursue further education, such as a master's or doctoral degree, to specialize in a particular area of mechanical engineering. Mechanical engineering is a growing field with excellent career prospects. Graduates can work in industries such as aerospace, automotive, medical, and energy, as well as in emerging fields like nanotechnology, robotics, and renewable energy. The demand for mechanical engineers is high and expected to grow in the coming years.

The BEng degree in Mechanical Engineering provides students with hands-on experience in designing and testing mechanical systems. The program emphasizes problem-solving, critical thinking, and teamwork, which are essential skills in the field. Graduates are well-equipped to tackle real-world problems and contribute to the advancement of mechanical engineering.
z: Mechanical engineering is a crucial field in the design and development of engineering systems with moving parts. The BEng degree in Mechanical Engineering equips graduates with the necessary expertise and skills to succeed in the profession.該課程力學技術、技術控制學、技術學、技術學、技術學、技術學、技術學控制學、技術學控制學、技術學控制學、技術學、技術學知識，包括流體技術、技術控制課程。学生可以专注于他们感兴趣的领域，例如航空工程、生物医学工程、控制和机器人、能源和环境、力学和材料、纳米技术、产品设计和制造以及热流体。

Graduates are prepared to pursue various career paths, including research and development, manufacturing, design, and consulting.他们还可以选择继续深造，例如硕士或博士学位，以专门研究机械工程的特定领域。 Mechanical engineering is a growing field with excellent career prospects.畢業生可以在航空航天、汽車、醫療和能源等行業以及納米技術、機器人和可再生能源等新興領域工作。 The demand for mechanical engineers is high and expected to grow in the coming years.
机械工程学士学位为学生提供设计和测试机械系统的实践经验。該計畫強調解決問題、批判性思維和團隊合作，這些都是該領域的基本技能。毕业生有能力解决现实世界的问题，并为机械工程的进步做出贡献。

d: Civil Engineering is both a science and an art that involves the utilization of natural resources and power for the benefit of humankind. Civil Engineers are responsible for the design, construction, and management of our infrastructure and built environment, ensuring that our buildings, roads, railways, bridges, slopes, dams, and tunnels, are safe and sustainable. They also oversee stormwater drainage systems to prevent flooding, collect and properly treat wastewater to protect the environment, and ensure that all infrastructure components function in a safe, effective, and sustainable manner.

Our programme aims to equip students with a solid foundation in the modern civil engineering profession through five core areas: Structural Engineering, Geotechnical Engineering, Environmental Engineering, Transportation Engineering, and Infrastructure Construction Management. Contemporary technologies such as building information modeling, modular integrated construction, advanced building materials, and artificial intelligence are incorporated into the curriculum, enabling graduates to offer innovative solutions to practical problems through planning, design, construction, management, and control.

Our programme emphasizes active learning, capstone experiences, hands-on activities, internships, exchange and research-based studies. These opportunities allow students to develop lifelong learning skills that will help them excel in their careers as competent Civil Engineers.
z: Civil Engineering is both a science and an art that involves the utilization of natural resources and power for the benefit of humankind. Civil Engineers are responsible for the design, construction, and management of our infrastructure and built environment, ensuring that our buildings, roads, railways, bridges, slopes, dams, and tunnels, are safe and sustainable.他們還監督雨水排放系統以防止洪水，收集和妥善處理廢水以保護環境，並確保所有基礎設施組件以安全、有效和可持續的方式運作。

我們的課程旨在透過五個核心領域為學生提供現代土木工程專業的堅實基礎：結構工程、岩土工程、環境工程、交通工程和基礎設施建設管理。 Contemporary technologies such as building information modeling, modular integrated construction, advanced building materials, and artificial intelligence are incorporated into the curriculum, enabling graduis tos offerative, solutions), nion and control.
我們的課程強調主動學習、頂點體驗、實作活動、實習、交流和研究性學習。這些機會使學生能夠培養終身學習技能，幫助他們在作為有能力的土木工程師的職業生涯中脫穎而出。

d: Artificial intelligence (AI) has become a significant force worldwide, sparking transformation and revolutionary developments across many engineering industries. Combining various machine learning and automation methodologies in AI, engineers can substantially enhance safety, reliability, and productivity for their existing industries. Consequently, the Faculty of Engineering aims to combine the solid and existing Bachelor of Engineering (BEng) programmes to nurture highly interdisciplinary engineers equipped with modern AI Master-degree skills to overcome various future engineering challenges. Applicants can use one single code, JS6377, to apply for the Bachelor of Engineering and Master of Science in Engineering in Artificial Intelligence in Engineering (BEng X + MScEng AIE) programme.
Features of BEng X + MScEng AIE programme are as follows:
• Freely Choose a BEng Programme (X) from the Followings to Start in Year 2

To achieve the interdisciplinary training, students will choose Civil Engineering, Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronic Engineering, Data and Systems Engineering or Mechanical Engineering as their BEng degree.
• Obtain a BEng Degree and a Master of Science (MSc)Degree in AI in Engineering in 4+1 Years
