With the curriculum design, students are expected to obtain their chosen BEng degrees (X) and a Master of Science degree in Artificial Intelligence (AI) in Engineering in 4+1 years. By adopting different course schedules, students may also choose to complete them.
• Scholarship for MSc Degree Programme
Each student can receive a scholarship of HKD120,000 when enrolling in the Master of Science programme in AI in Engineering in their fifth year studies.
• Freely opt out of this BEng X + MScEng AIEscheme

Students can freely opt out of this BEng X + MScEng AIEscheme with no penalties, i.e. they can successfully earn their bachelor degree after completing the necessary requirements in their chosen major.
z: 人工智能 (AI) 已成为全球的一股重要力量，引发了许多工程行业的转型和革命性发展。 Combining various machine learning and automation methodologies in AI, engineers can substantially enhance safety, reliability, and productivity for their existing industries.因此，工程學院的目標是將現有的工程學士學位課程與現有的工程學士學位課程相結合，具備跨專業的工程學士學位。申請人可以使用單一代碼JS6377來申請人工智慧工程（BEng X + MScEng AIE）工程學士學位和工程理學碩士學位課程。
BEng X + MScEng AIE 課程特色如下：
• 從以下項目中自由選擇一個工學士課程 (X) 以從第 2 年開始
為了實現跨學科培訓，學生將選擇土木工程、電腦工程、電機工程、電子工程、數據與系統工程或機械工程作為其學士學位。
• 在 4+1 年內獲得人工智慧工程學士學位和理學碩士學位
通过课程设计，学生预计在4+1年内获得所选的工程学学士学位（X）和工程人工智能（AI）理学硕士学位。透過採用不同的課程安排，學生也可以選擇完成它們。
• 碩士學位課程獎學金
每位學生在第五年攻讀人工智慧工程理學碩士課程時，可獲得120,000元港幣獎學金。
• 自由選擇退出此 BEng X + MSCEng AIE 計劃
學生可以自由選擇退出 BEng X + MScEng AIE 計劃，不會受到任何處罰，即他們可以在完成所選專業的必要要求後成功獲得學士學位。

d: Short DescriptionUpdated

Jointly offered by the Faculty of Engineering and the HKU Business School, the Global Engineering and Business Programme (GEBP) will equip students with professional knowledge in both engineering and business within a global context. Upon completion of the five-year double degree programme, students will earn a Bachelor of Engineering (BEng) and a Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA). The programme features are as follows:
• This interdisciplinary programme empowers students to develop the mindset and skills for engineering excellence and business innovation.

• During their five years of study, students will enjoy full access to the comprehensive learning resources offered by both Faculties. For examples, scholarships, exchange opportunities, enrichment activities, career support, etc.
• Available Engineering Majors: • Civil Engineering
• Computer Engineering
• Data & Systems Engineering
• Electrical Engineering
• Electronic Engineering
• Mechanical Engineering
• Available Business Majors: • Entrepreneurship, Design and Innovation (Note: Candidates must undergo a selection process arranged by the Programme Coordinator for EDI)
• Finance
• Human Resource Management
• Information Systems and Analytics
• Marketing
• All GEBP students are required to complete at least one overseas exchange program prior to graduation.
• The fifth year is offered on self-financing basis (at a slightly higher tuition rate)*.
Professional Recognition
All BEng programmes now being offered under the code 6937 are accredited by the Hong Kong Institution of Engineers (HKIE).

Students of the BBA programme are eligible to enrol in the CGMA Finance Leadership Program and kickstart their journey to become a member of Chartered Institute of Management Accountants and a Chartered Global Management Accountant while they are studying at the University.
*Students enrolled in the fifth year may still apply for financial assistance under the Government Non-means Tested Loan Scheme, subject to the prevailing regulations of the Scheme.
z: 簡短說明已更新
全球工程與商業課程（GEBP）由工程學院與香港大學商學院合辦，旨在培養學生在全球範圍內掌握工程和商業方面的專業知識。完成五年雙學位課程後，學生將獲得工程學士學位（BEng）和工商管理學士學位（BBA）。 The programme features are as follows:
• 這個跨學科課程使學生能夠培養卓越工程和商業創新的思維和技能。
• 在五年的學習期間，學生將充分利用兩個學院提供的綜合學習資源。例如，獎學金、交流機會、豐富活動、職業支持等。
• 可選的工程專業： • 土木工程
• 電腦工程
• 資料與系統工程
• 電機工程
• 電子工程
• 機械工業
• 可用的商業專業： • 創業、設計與創新（註：候選人必須接受由 EDI 專案協調員安排的選拔過程）
• 金融
• 人力資源管理
• 資訊系統與分析
• 行銷
• 所有GEBP 學生在畢業前必須完成至少一項海外交換計畫。
• 第五年以自費方式提供（學費稍高）*。
專業認可
目前以代碼 6937 提供的所有工程學士課程均獲得香港工程師學會 (HKIE) 的認可。
BBA 課程的學生有資格參加 CGMA 財務領導力課程，並在大學學習期間開啟成為英國特許管理會計師公會會員和特許全球管理會計師的旅程。
*第五年就讀的學生仍可依政府免入息審查貸款計畫申請經濟援助，但須遵守本計畫的現行規定。

d: The Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering (ECE) (formerly the Department of Electrical and Electronic Engineering, renamed in 2026) was established in the late fifties and is the oldest ECE-related department in Hong Kong. Its graduates have served the society since 1961 and have been making tremendous impact to the well-being and development of Hong Kong in her infancy years. Over the years, power systems, electronic, computers and information processing have evolved at dazzling speed, and have permeated to every aspect of life and the society at large. The department has naturally progressed with time and has grown from the relatively obscured location along Pokfulam Road to the current modern high rise of the Chow Yei Ching Building, with numerous satellite laboratories.
The ECE Department is the only department comprising Computer Engineering (CE), Electrical Engineering (EE) and Electronic Engineering (ElecE) in Hong Kong.
Features of its BEng programmes are as follows:
• Contemporary education nurturing future leaders

The department offers contemporary curriculum and stimulating learning experience for educating future leaders in the fields of CE, EE and ElecE for Hong Kong, and to nurture well-rounded graduates with specialty expertise at the present time and beyond.
• Stimulating learning experience
Students will build solid foundations through active learning, capstone experience, hands-on activities, internship, exchanges studies and service learning.
• Innovation and entrepreneurship
The curriculum encourages students to be nurtured to be able to offer solutions to real life problems via design and innovation, and to foster and advocate entrepreneurship.
• Academic advising
Academic advising is in place to guide students for their course selection, programme selection and career planning.
• Options of minor programmes
Students can opt for minor options in other engineering disciplines offered by the Faculty of Engineering or those offered by other faculties, subject to the requirements of respective minor options.
z: 电机及电脑工程学系（ECE）（前电机及电子工程学系，2026年易名）成立于五十年代末，是香港历史最悠久的ECE相关院系。其畢業生自1961年起服務社會，對香港的福祉和發展產生了巨大影響。多年來，電力系統、電子、電腦和資訊處理以驚人的速度發展，並滲透到生活和社會的各個方面。隨著時間的推移，該係自然也在進步，從薄扶林道相對不起眼的地方，發展到現在擁有眾多衛星實驗室的現代化高層週亦正大廈。
ECE係是香港唯一包含電腦工程(CE)、電機工程(EE)及電子工程(ElecE)的系所。
其工學士課程的特點如下：
• 當代教育培養​​未來的領導者
該系提供現代課程和刺激的學習經驗，為香港教育CE、EE和ElecE領域的未來領導者，並培養具有當前及未來專業知識的全面發展的畢業生。
• 刺激的學習經驗
學生將透過主動學習、頂點體驗、實踐活動、實習、交流學習和服務學習打下堅實的基礎。
• 創新創業
該課程鼓勵培養學生能夠透過設計和創新為現實生活問題提供解決方案，並培養和倡導創業精神。
• 學術建議
學術建議可以指導學生的課程選擇、專案選擇和職業規劃。
• 輔修課程選項
學生可以選擇工程學院或其他系所提供的其他工程學科的輔修課程，但須符合相應輔修課程的要求。

d: This double degree programme in arts and law provides students with the opportunity to pursue their studies in arts and the law, and to explore the connections between the two. On completion of the five-year programme, students will be awarded two degrees - Bachelor of Arts and Bachelor of Laws. In addition to preparing students for legal practice, the programme cultivates an appreciation of the narrative dimensions and rhetoric of law and of the overlaps between literary and legal histories. The curriculum provides a solid foundation for legal practice as well as a wide variety of careers beyond the law, including journalism, media and communications, the arts and culture, and politics.
z: 这个艺术和法律双学位课程为学生提供了继续学习艺术和法律的机会，并探索两者之间的联系。 On completion of the five-year programme, students will be awarded two degrees - Bachelor of Arts and Bachelor of Laws.除了幫助學生為法律實踐做好準備外，該課程還培養對法律的敘事維度和修辭以及文學史和法律史之間重疊的欣賞。 The curriculum provides a solid foundation for legal practice as well as a wide variety of careers beyond the law, including journalism, media and communications, the arts and culture, and politics.

d: The four-year Bachelor of Laws (LLB) programme is the first local university qualification to be recognised for admission to legal practice in Hong Kong. It offers a range of distinctive features designed to ensure the competitiveness of our graduates, including:
• A solid foundation in legal knowledge, transferable critical and analytical skills, and broadening of intellectual horizons;
• Systematic honing of professional skills such as critical thinking, analytical and problem solving skills, research and writing skills, and bilingual language proficiency; and
• Integrated experiential learning and capstone experience through an integrated sequence of legal research and writing, mooting, internship and clinical legal education.

The LLB programme includes a professional core that equips students with a solid foundation in legal knowledge. It also offers the possibility of specialising in a particular area of law such as commercial law, Chinese law, or international trade and economic law. Students have the option to pursue a minor in a non-law discipline offered by the University.
In addition to the 4-year LLB programme, students may consider other enriching programmes:
• Integrated Double Degree Programmes offered in partnership with the Faculty of Arts, the HKU Business School, the Faculty of Social Sciences and the Faculty of Science; or

• Dual Degree Programmes offered with the University College London (UCL) in the UK or Peking University (PKU) in Mainland China, which enable graduates to obtain two LLB degrees from two top-ranking law schools and earn legal qualifications in both jurisdictions.
z: 四年制法學學士（LLB）課程是香港第一個獲承認進入法律執業的本地大學資格。它提供了一系列旨在確保畢業生競爭力的獨特功能，包括：
• 堅實的法律知識基礎、可轉移的批判和分析技能以及拓寬的知識視野；
• 有系統地磨練專業技能，如批判性思考、分析和解決問題的能力、研究和寫作能力以及雙語能力；和
• 透過法律研究和寫作、模擬、實習和臨床法律教育的綜合序列，綜合體驗式學習和頂點經驗。
法學學士學位課程包括一個專業核心課程，為學生提供堅實的法律知識基礎。它還提供了專門研究特定法律領域的可能性，例如商法、中國法或國際貿易和經濟法。學生可以選擇輔脩大學提供的非法律學科。
除了 4 年法學學士學位課程外，學生還可以考慮其他豐富的課程：
• 與文學院、香港大學商學院、社會科學院及理學院合作提供綜合雙學位課程；或者
• 與英國倫敦大學學院 (UCL) 或中國大陸北京大學 (PKU) 合作提供的雙學位課程，使畢業生能夠獲得兩所頂級法學院的兩個法學學士學位，並獲得兩個司法管轄區的法律資格。

d: The BASc(GHD) help students develop the foundational multidisciplinary and international perspectives, the core blocks of knowledge and the people and systems oriented competencies needed to succeed in modern health and development related fields.
The curriculum combines:
• Basic to intermediate level courses across multiple Faculties (Architecture, Business and Economics, Law, Medicine, Science, Social Sciences)
• Advanced seminars and case studies
• Placements in local/overseas health and development organisations
• Mentoring on career choices and leadership
• BASc courses on leadership and big data analytics

A distinctive feature of the programme is a compulsory capstone, during which students will be placed in leading health and development organisations such as UN agencies, Non-governmental Organisations (NGOs), contract research organization (CRO), philanthropic foundations, etc., for a 6-month experience facilitated by HKU.
z: BASc（GHD）幫助學生培養在現代健康和發展相關領域取得成功所需的基礎多學科和國際視角、核心知識塊以及以人員和系統為導向的能力。
該課程結合了：
• 跨多個學院的基礎到中級課程（建築、商業和經濟、法律、醫學、科學、社會科學）
• 進階研討會和案例研究
• 在當地/海外健康與發展組織的安置
• 職業選擇與領導力的指導
• 關於領導與大數據分析的 BASc 課程
該計劃的一個顯著特徵是強制性的頂峰，在此期間，學生將被安置在聯合國機構、非政府組織（NGO）、合約研究組織（CRO）、慈善基金會等領先的健康和發展組織中，在香港大學的協助下進行為期6個月的體驗。

d: The Advanced Leadership Track offered under the existing Bachelor of Nursing programme (BNurs-ALT) is designed for high achievers, who aspire to pursue an advanced and specialised nurse practice or a nurse-physician career in the healthcare sector across the local and global spectrums, to accomplish the professional curricula at an accelerated pace.
In addition to the 5-year BNurs curriculum, students will have the opportunity to articulate to either HKU Master of Nursing (MNurs) or HKU Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS).
Articulation to Master of Nursing (MNurs)

Students shall be admitted to the 1-year part-time MNurs study, upon successful completion of the 5-year BNurs programme, and shall be able to complete one Bachelor’s Degree and one Master’s Degree in Nursing in 6 years upon satisfactory completion of curricula concerned.
Articulation to Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS)

Students shall be admitted directly to MBBS Year 2 and exempted from the Year 3 enrichment year requirement, upon successful completion of the 5-year BNurs programme with first class honours, and shall be able to complete 2 professional degrees in 9 years.
Leadership Development Programme

A Leadership Development Programme, which is specifically designed for BNurs-ALT students, offers opportunities for them to acquire professional development skills for advanced performance and to cultivate leadership skill sets via experiential learning experience. Students will be mentored individually by a designated instructor from professoriate staff and an experienced nurse leader, who provide advice and guidance throughout the BNurs-ALT study. Under the mentorship of great minds, students can broaden their horizons and expand their personal networks.
z: 現有護理學士課程​​ (BNurs-ALT) 下提供的高級領導課程專為那些渴望在本地和全球範圍內的醫療保健領域追求高級和專業護士實踐或護士醫生職業的高成就者而設計，以加快完成專業課程的速度。
除了 5 年 BNurs 課程外，學生還有機會升讀香港大學護理碩士 (MNurs) 或香港大學醫學及外科學士學位 (MBBS)。
升學護理碩士 (MNurs)
學生在成功完成 5 年 BNurs 課程後，將被錄取進入為期 1 年的非全日制 MNurs 學習，並在圓滿完成相關課程後，能夠在 6 年內完成 1 個護理學士學位和 1 個護理碩士學位。
升讀醫學學士和外科學士 (MBBS)
學生在以一等榮譽成功完成 5 年 BNurs 課程後，將直接入讀 MBBS 二年級，並免除三年級強化課程的要求，並能夠在 9 年內完成 2 個專業學位。
領導力發展計劃
專為 BNurs-ALT 學生設計的領導力發展計劃為他們提供了獲得專業發展技能以提高績效的機會，並透過體驗式學習經驗培養領導技能。學生將接受由教授指定的講師和經驗豐富的護理師領導的單獨指導，他們在整個 BNurs-ALT 研究過程中提供建議和指導。在偉人的指導下，學生可以開拓視野，拓展人際網絡。

d: The MBBS curriculum is not only about training doctors but also personal development and fulfilment. Alongside learning that takes place within hospitals, students will gain first-hand experience in a wide variety of community-based settings that involve family physicians, maternal and child health services, hospices, and patient support groups.

Problem-based, small-group tutorials require every student to participate and be active in managing their learning, and to question both what and how they learn. These tutorials are also effective for developing their interpersonal communication and teamwork skills.

Ethical principles and humanitarian values are absolutely essential to training doctors. Students will learn how these principles and values underpin health care practice, as well as professional and legal obligations, through the medical ethics and medical humanities programmes.

Inter-professional education is an emerging and progressive area in modern health care. The Faculty has also taken the lead to introduce an inter-professional pathway so that medical, Chinese medical, nursing, and pharmacy students can have the opportunities to interact and to work with each other – much like the real-life situation after graduation.
z: MBBS課程不僅是為了培訓醫生，也是為了個人的發展和成就​​。除了在醫院內進行學習外，學生還將在各種社區環境中獲得第一手經驗，其中包括家庭醫生、婦幼保健服務、臨終關懷中心和患者支持團體。
以問題為基礎的小組輔導要求每個學生都參與並積極管理他們的學習，並質疑他們學習什麼以及如何學習。這些教程對於培養人際溝通和團隊合作技能也很有效。
道德原則和人道價值觀對於訓練醫生絕對重要。學生將透過醫學倫理和醫學人文課程了解這些原則和價值觀如何支撐醫療保健實踐以及專業和法律義務。
跨專業教育是現代醫療保健中一個新興且進步的領域。學院也率先引入跨專業途徑，讓醫學、中醫、護理和藥學專業的學生有機會相互交流和工作，就像畢業後的現實情況一樣。

d: The Bachelor of Nursing (BNurs) is a five-year full-time programme leading to an honours degree. The objective of the BNurs programme is to provide comprehensive and holistic nursing education and nurture generic nurses who will be able to work as competent practitioners in various health care settings.

Well-scoped with multidisciplinarity, our credit-based curriculum is designed to introduce the bio-psychosocial aspects of health and nursing care. It strikes a good balance between the broad areas of nursing, biological, behavioural and social sciences, enabling students to obtain knowledge through the study of different disciplines. The desired learning outcomes would be the production of nursing professionals with inquisitive mindsets, strong interpersonal skills, and high awareness of the socio-cultural context in Hong Kong where nursing is practised.

Our BNurs programme emphasises the integration of theory and practice. Students are exposed to a variety of clinical environments throughout the study, while comprehensive learning of clinical skills is delivered under the supervision of experienced teaching staff. The process of teaching and learning is directed by nursing academics from a wide range of expertise, with the support of excellent facilities in various departments of the Medical Faculty and clinical settings.
z: 護理學士 (BNurs) 是一個為期五年的全日制課程，可授予榮譽學位。 BNurs 計劃的目標是提供全面和整體的護理教育，並培養能夠在各種醫療保健機構中擔任合格從業人員的普通護理師。
我們的學分課程涵蓋多學科，旨在介紹健康和護理的生物心理社會方面。它在護理、生物、行為和社會科學等廣泛領域之間取得了良好的平衡，使學生能夠透過不同學科的學習來獲得知識。期望的學習成果是培養具有好奇心、強大的人際交往能力以及對香港護理實踐社會文化背景有高度認識的護理專業人士。
我們的 BNurs 計畫強調理論與實踐的結合。學生在整個學習過程中接觸到各種臨床環境，同時在經驗豐富的教學人員的監督下全面學習臨床技能。教學過程由具有廣泛專業知識的護理學者指導，並得到醫學院各部門和臨床環境的優良設施的支持。

d: Classical Chinese Medicine Supplemented with Biomedical Sciences

The programme covers comprehensive Chinese Medicine and biomedical sciences courses in a systematic manner, delivered by teachers from the School of Chinese Medicine and clinical departments under the Medical Faculty respectively.
Early and Comprehensive Clinical Training

Early clinical training is provided through clinical attachment (under teachers’ supervision) at the designated local Chinese Medicine Clinical Centres for Teaching and Research. In Year 4, students undergo a junior clerkship at the HKU-SZ Hospital, where they can integrate what they have learnt with the actual practice under hospital settings. In Year 6, students are required to undertake the clinical clerkship in the teaching hospitals affiliated to outstanding traditional Chinese medicine universities in Mainland China as arranged by the School.
Learning Experience Beyond Professional Core
Students are required to take Common Core Courses to attain broader perspective and develop critical thinking skills.
Cultivation of Interest in Scientific Research

Students are given the opportunity to undertake laboratory experiments in several Chinese Medicine and Biomedical Sciences courses. The School has also set up different research interest groups for students to participate during their studies.
Bi-literacy and Tri-lingualism

English is the medium of instruction for most of the Common Core Courses and all biomedical sciences courses. Both Putonghua and Cantonese are used in other core courses, dispensary practicum, clinical attachment, junior clerkship and clinical clerkship, etc.
Mode of Learning
An outcome-based approach to students’ learning and multi-disciplinary teaching approaches, such as problem-based learning (PBL) and clinical case discussion, are adopted.
z: 經典中醫輔以生物醫學科學
本計畫有系統地涵蓋中醫和生物醫學綜合課程，分別由中醫學院和醫學院臨床系的教師授課。
早期和全面的臨床培訓
早期臨床培訓是透過在指定的當地中醫臨床教學研究中心的臨床實習（在教師的監督下）提供的。第四年，學生在香港大學深圳醫院接受初級見習，在那裡他們可以將所學與醫院環境中的實際實踐相結合。六年級學生須依學院安排到內地優秀中醫藥大學附設教學醫院從事臨床見習。
超越專業核心的學習經驗
學生需要參加共同核心課程以獲得更廣闊的視野並培養批判性思考能力。
科學研究興趣的培養
學生有機會在一些中醫和生物醫學科學課程中進行實驗室實驗。學院也設立了不同的研究興趣小組供學生在學習期間參與。
雙識字和三語
英語是大多數公共核心課程和所有生物醫學科學課程的教學語言。其他核心課程、藥局實習、臨床實習、初級見員、臨床見員等均使用國語和粵語。
學習方式
採用基於結果的學生學習方法和多學科教學方法，例如基於問題的學習（PBL）和臨床案例討論。

d: The Bachelor of Pharmacy (BPharm) programme aims to nurture competent graduates with a solid knowledge of pharmacy alongside their abilities to apply the core knowledge and skills effectively, humanely and ethically when it comes to the delivery of pharmaceutical care. By adopting the highest standard of professional practice, our graduates will contribute tremendously to the pharmacy sector and its professionalism as well as the general health and well-being of the patient community.
Clinical Pharmacy

With the support of Queen Mary Hospital, not only do HKU undergraduates enjoy early clinical exposure but also benefit from the inter-professional collaboration of pharmacists and clinicians through on-site education in wards and outpatient clinics. Furthermore, Gleneagles Hong Kong Hospital also provides an additional training site exclusive to our HKU students.
New Learning Approaches

Diversified “fit-for-purpose” teaching pedagogies have been adopted to manifest the specific features of the curriculum, enhanced by the introduction of The Pharmacy Experiential Education Programme (PEEP) and the Enrichment Modules. Besides, as an area of strength in the Medical Faculty, the problem-based learning (PBL) approach in teaching is applied to encourage critical thinking and self-directed learning skills, encouraging interdisciplinary inquiry from students and fostering their lifelong learning skills.
Training in Industrial Pharmacy

Through gaining hands-on experience in this subspecialty, students have the opportunity to witness and spot the increasing demand of the local industry for professional pharmacy services. A wide spectrum of topics related to the practicality of industrial pharmacy is taught by the industry’s experts with extensive work experience.
Patient Counselling and Communication Skills

A key characteristic of the programme is to enhance students’ proficiency in providing primary healthcare services, particularly patient education. Students have various opportunities to acquire patient counselling and communication skills step-by-step while the level of mastery will gradually increase with the magnitude of complexity in a range of situations.
Exposure to Chinese Medicine plus Complementary and Alternative Medicine

The programme equips future pharmacists in Hong Kong with the knowledge of Chinese Medicine as well as Complementary and Alternative Medicines (CAM), including herbal medicines, nutraceuticals, healthcare products and cosmetics commonly used by local patients in conjunction with Western medicines.
Opportunity for Interprofessional Learning

The programme offers students invaluable opportunities for interprofessional learning, including a patient care project (PCP) and interprofessional education and a collaborative practice (IPECP) with students from the Medicine, Nursing and Chinese Medicine programmes. These interprofessional learning activities will utilise the expertise of students from diverse backgrounds and foster teamwork, cooperation, and communication between different healthcare professionals in the future.
z: 藥學學士 (BPharm) 課程旨在培養具有紮實藥學知識的有能力的畢業生，以及在提供藥學服務時有效、人道和合乎道德地應用核心知識和技能的能力。透過採用最高標準的專業實踐，我們的畢業生將為製藥業及其專業精神以及患者群體的整體健康和福祉做出巨大貢獻。
臨床藥學
在瑪麗醫院的支持下，港大本科生不僅可以儘早接觸臨床，還可以透過病房和門診的現場教育，受益於藥劑師和臨床醫生的跨專業合作。此外，港怡醫院也為港大學生提供額外的訓練場地。
新的學習方法
採用多元化的「切合目的」教學法來體現課程的具體特色，並透過引入藥學體驗教育計畫（PEEP）和濃縮模組來增強課程的特色。此外，作為醫學院的優勢領域，在教學中採用基於問題的學習（PBL）方法來鼓勵批判性思維和自主學習技能，鼓勵學生跨學科探究並培養他們的終身學習技能。
工業藥劑學培訓
透過獲得該專業的實務經驗，學生有機會見證和發現當地產業對專業藥學服務日益增長的需求。由具有豐富工作經驗的行業專家教授與工業製藥實用性相關的廣泛主題。
患者諮詢和溝通技巧
該計劃的一個關鍵特點是提高學生提供初級醫療保健服務的能力，特別是病患教育。學生有各種機會逐步獲得患者諮詢和溝通技巧，而掌握程度會隨著各種情況的複雜程度而逐漸提高。
接觸中醫以及補充和替代醫學
該計劃為香港未來的藥劑師提供中醫藥以及補充和替代藥物（CAM）的知識，包括本地患者常用的草藥、營養品、保健品和化妝品以及西藥。
跨專業學習的機會
該計畫為學生提供了寶貴的跨專業學習機會，包括病患照護計畫（PCP）以及與醫學、護理和中醫計畫學生的跨專業教育和協作實踐（IPECP）。這些跨專業學習活動將利用來自不同背景的學生的專業知識，並促進未來不同醫療保健專業人員之間的團隊合作、合作和溝通。

d: Biomedical sciences cover a wide range of scientific and allied disciplines, with the inclusion of molecular and cell biology, genetics and genome science, bioinformatics, anatomy, physiology, pharmacology, biological and medicinal chemistry, immunology and microbiology, as well as public and environmental health. The study of biomedical sciences focuses on the inter-relationships between humans, health, and disease, along with the translation of biomedical applications of basic sciences into the clinical practices of health services and healthcare industry.
The Faculty offers the Bachelor of Biomedical Sciences (BBiomedSc) programme with the aim of nurturing graduates with broad but core knowledge in key biomedical disciplines.

The BBiomedSc curriculum is designed with a good balance of structure and flexibility, allowing students to plan their study according to their individual interests and specialize in one of the following four majors:
• Biomedical Research: explores a wide range of scientific and allied disciplines
• Bioinformatics: focuses on high-impact biomedical big data applications
• Clinical Sciences: builds strong foundation in clinical research and healthcare sciences
• Health Technology: covers development of innovative clinically-oriented biomedical technology
Students will be exposed to a wide range of learning experiences, including traditional lectures, laboratory practicals, problem-based learning tutorials, web-based learning, and research projects.
z: 生物醫學涵蓋廣泛的科學和相關學科，包括分子和細胞生物學、遺傳學和基因組科學、生物資訊學、解剖學、生理學、藥理學、生物和藥物化學、免疫學和微生物學，以及公共和環境健康。生物醫學科學的研究重點是人類、健康和疾病之間的相互關係，以及將基礎科學的生物醫學應用轉化為健康服務和醫療保健產業的臨床實踐。
該學院提供生物醫學科學學士（BBiomedSc）課程，旨在培養具有關鍵生物醫學學科廣泛但核心知識的畢業生。
BBiomedSc課程的設計在結構和靈活性之間取得了良好的平衡，允許學生根據個人興趣規劃學習，並專攻以下四個專業之一：
• 生物醫學研究：探索廣泛的科學和相關學科
• 生物資訊學：專注於高影響力的生物醫學大數據應用
• 臨床科學：為臨床研究和醫療保健科學奠定堅實的基礎
• 健康技術：涵蓋創新的臨床導向生物醫學技術的開發
學生將接觸到廣泛的學習體驗，包括傳統講座、實驗室實踐、基於問題的學習教程、基於網路的學習和研究專案。

d: The double degree elite programme:
• Caters specifically to the needs of science-inclined students and incubates the next generation of scientists
• Allows students to learn from the best minds and be inspired by Science Masters (renowned scientists), enhancing their scholastic potential in science
• Equips students to translate scientific knowledge into practical applications with far- and wide-reaching impacts
Features
• Fast-track for completing 2 degrees at accelerated pace • A BSc plus a MRes
• Learning from Science Masters – Grand Masters through special tutorials and Masters as academic advisers
• Catering the needs of elite students • Disciplinary-based intensive study for research-aspired students
• Ample opportunities available in our flagship Young Scientist Scheme (YSS) including Summer Research Fellowship, Overseas Research Fellowship, Exchange Study
• Research-oriented • Research postgraduate courses and research projects to enhance the students’ frontier scientific knowledge and research skills
z: 雙學位精英課程：
• 專門滿足有科學傾向的學生的需求並培養下一代科學家
• 讓學生向最優秀的思想家學習並受到科學大師（著名科學家）的啟發，增強他們在科學方面的學術潛力
• 使學生能夠將科學知識轉化為具有深遠影響的實際應用
特徵
• 快速完成 2 個學位課程 • 理學士加研究型碩士
• 向科學大師學習－透過特別輔導的大師和作為學術顧問的大師
• 滿足菁英學生的需求 • 為有研究抱負的學生提供以學科為基礎的密集學習
• 我們的旗艦青年科學家計畫（YSS）提供充足的機會，包括暑期研究獎學金、海外研究獎學金、交流學習
• 以研究為導向 • 研究研究生課程和研究項目，提升學生的前沿科學知識和研究技能

d: The Programme:
• First of its kind in Hong Kong for students who intend to develop expertise in both science and law;
• Cultivates legal and scientific mindset for academic talents;
• Copes with the soaring demand of patent practitioners and legal professionals in the technology industry;
• Feeds into the development of STEM talents who are capable of handling a wide variety of innovation-related matters such as patent applications.
z: 該計劃：
• 香港首創，為有意發展科學和法律專業知識的學生提供服務；
• 培養學術人才的法律思維與科學思維；
• 因應科技業專利從業人員和法律專業人士不斷增長的需求；
• 促進STEM 人才的發展，使他們能夠處理專利申請等各種創新相關事務。

d: The Programme is a comprehensive training in science that:
• Develops students’ capabilities in quantitative and logical reasoning
• Cultivates students’ ability to tackle novel situations and solve complex problems
Features
• One entry in application for a choice of 11 Science Majors and 7 Intensive Majors
• Up to 2 years’ time to choose a Major
• Flexibility in changing Majors
• No quota for any Science Major
• Students may take a 2nd Major or a Minor or 2nd Minors in Science and non-Science disciplines
• One-on-one academic advising
Intensive Majors
• Allow students to specialise in a science discipline with enriched subject knowledge
• 7 intensive major programmes are offered • Biological Sciences (Intensive) (144 credits)
• Chemistry (Intensive) (144 credits)
• Ecology & Biodiversity (Intensive) (144 credits)
• Geology (Intensive) (150 credits)
• Mathematics (Intensive) (144 credits)
• Molecular Biology & Biotechnology (Intensive) (144 credits)
• Physics (Intensive) (144 credits)
Minor in Science Entrepreneurship
• Placing strong emphasis on practical experience and students are required to: • Acquire entrepreneurship-related internship experience and
• Carry out a capstone project
• Mentoring and internship opportunities offered by our Science alumni
• Taking new courses tailor-made for this Minor and related courses currently offered by other Faculties
Articulation Pathways
• To Taught Postgraduate programmes at HKU Science • An articulation pathway of attaching 6901 Bachelor of Science to the master programmes at HKU Science for outstanding students
• Students who are awarded the highest amount of scholarship will only need to pay 50% of tuition fee
• There is no quota for the aforementioned articulation pathway except for the one of Master of Data Science, of which a maximum of 2 places will be offered each year

• To Doctor of Veterinary Medicine (DVM) at University of Melbourne (UoMelb) • In collaboration with University of Melbourne (UoMelb) in Australia, HKU Science will provide a pathway to BSc 6901 students majoring in Biological Sciences, Molecular Biology & Biotechnology, Ecology & Biodiversity, Food & Nutritional Science, and Biochemistry to articulate into the DVM of the UoMelb

• Provides a new pathway to talented students who aspire to pursue a career in veterinary; students can obtain 2 degrees from the 2 universities – the HKU BSc degree and DVM in UoMelb in a minimum of 7 years
• Graduates can register as veterinary surgeons and practise in HK through Veterinary Surgeons Board of Hong Kong
z: 該計劃是一項全面的科學培訓：
• 培養學生的定量和邏輯推理能力
• 培養學生處理新情境和解決複雜問題的能力
特徵
• 一份申請，可選擇 11 個科學專業和 7 個強化專業
• 最多2年的時間選擇專業
• 改變專業的彈性
• 任何科學專業均無配額
• 學生可以選修科學和非科學學科的第二主修或輔修課程或第二輔修課程
• 一對一的學術建議
強化專業
• 讓學生專攻一門科學學科，豐富學科知識
• 提供 7 個密集專業課程 • 生物科學（強化）（144 學分）
• 化學（強化）（144 學分）
• 生態與生物多樣性（強化）（144 學分）
• 地質學（強化）（150 學分）
• 數學（強化）（144 學分）
• 分子生物學與生物技術（強化）（144 學分）
• 物理（增強）（144 學分）
輔修科學創業
• 高度重視實務經驗，要求學生： • 獲得與創業相關的實習經驗和
• 開展頂點項目
• 我們的科學校友提供的指導和實習機會
• 修讀專為此輔修課程量身打造的新課程以及其他系所目前提供的相關課程
升學途徑
• 在香港大學理學院教授研究生課程 • 提供優秀學生將6901理學士附加到香港大學理學院碩士課程的銜接途徑
• 獲得最高獎學金的學生只需支付50%的學費
• 除資料科學碩士外，上述銜接途徑沒有名額，每年最多提供 2 個名額
• 墨爾本大學 (UoMelb) 獸醫學博士 (DVM) • 與澳洲墨爾本大學 (UoMelb) 合作，香港大學理學院將為生物科學、分子生物學與生物技術、生態與生物多樣性、食品與營養科學以及生物化學專業的 BSc 6901 學生提供升讀 UoMelb 獸醫學博士課程的途徑
• 為有志從事獸醫職業的有才華的學生提供新的途徑；學生可以在至少7年內從兩所大學獲得2個學位——香港大學理學學士學位和墨爾本大學DVM學位
• 畢業生可透過香港獸醫管理局註冊成為獸醫並在香港執業

d: The BPsych Programme puts great emphasis on enhancing students’ understanding of psychological phenomenon and principles through first-hand practical experience, applying knowledge and skills to real-life situations, and research-intensive learning.

Students will be equipped with basic skills across all areas of Psychology, including the biological and cognitive bases of behaviour, developmental changes, social influence, and contemporary issues. They will also be provided with opportunities for tackling novel problems as well as experience of addressing issues that are ill-defined. Through the comprehensive training in the Programme, students’ skills in critical analysis, reasoning and self-reflection can be developed.

The Programme provides an internationally-recognised qualification in fundamental aspects of Psychology that allows students to pursue both professional training in applied aspects of Psychology (e.g. Educational or Clinical Psychology), and advanced research training in all related research areas of Psychology, including Cognitive Science and Neuroscience.

Apart from the Psychology major, students are given flexibility to explore their academic interests in a wide variety of disciplines across all faculties in the University. For example, students may opt to declare a second major in Social Sciences disciplines, such as Cognitive Science, Counselling, Criminology, Neuroscience, etc., if they are considering further study or work in the professions related to psychology and mental health.
z: BPsych計畫非常注重透過第一手的實務經驗、將知識和技能應用到現實生活中以及研究密集型學習來增強學生對心理現象和原則的理解。
學生將具備心理學所有領域的基本技能，包括行為的生物學和認知基礎、發展變化、社會影響和當代問題。他們還將獲得解決新問題的機會以及解決不明確問題的經驗。透過課程的全面訓練，培養學生批判性分析、推理和自我反思的能力。
該計劃提供國際認可的心理學基礎方面的資格，使學生能夠接受心理學應用方面（例如教育或臨床心理學）的專業培訓，以及心理學所有相關研究領域（包括認知科學和神經科學）的高級研究培訓。
除了心理學專業外，學生還可以靈活地探索大學所有系所的各種學科的學術興趣。例如，如果學生考慮在心理學和心理健康相關的專業進一步學習或工作，他們可以選擇選擇社會科學學科的第二專業，如認知科學、諮商、犯罪學、神經科學等。

d: If students are interested in studying human behaviour and society or wish to become a future leader in public service, education, industry and commerce, the Bachelor of Social Sciences should be the choice. The flexible programme structure provides students with freedom to decide which discipline they wish to major in after the first year of study, without any quota constraint or selection. Off-campus learning is emphasized through the participation in internships or overseas academic exchange to provide opportunities for students to apply the knowledge acquired to the practical environment and to enhance their international exposure.

Students may choose to major in one of the five core disciplines including Computational Social Science; Geography; Politics and Public Administration; Social Policy and Social Development; and Sociology. They may also opt for one of the following programmes as an additional second major, including Cognitive Science; Counselling; Criminology; Geospatial Data Science; Media and Cultural Studies; Neuroscience; Psychology; and Urban Governance. Alternatively, students may opt for a second major / a minor in a variety of disciplines from Faculties of Arts, Business and Economics, Engineering, Law and Science.
z: 如果學生有興趣研究人類行為和社會，或希望成為公共服務、教育、工業和商業領域的未來領導者，社會科學學士學位應該是選擇。靈活的課程結構使學生在第一年學習後可以自由決定他們希望主修的學科，沒有任何配額限製或選擇。校外學習強調透過參與實習或海外學術交流，提供學生將所學知識運用到實際環境中、增強國際視野的機會。
學生可以選擇主修五個核心學科之一，包括計算社會科學；地理;政治與公共管理；社會政策和社會發展；和社會學。他們還可以選擇以下課程之一作為額外的第二專業，包括認知科學；諮詢；犯罪學；地理空間數據科學；媒體和文化研究；神經科學；心理學;和城市治理。或者，學生可以選擇藝術、商業和經濟、工程、法律和科學學院等多個學科的第二主修/輔修課程。

d: This programme provides training that leads to a professionally recognised qualification in social work practice. The curriculum covers areas including social welfare and social policy, specialised social work theory and practice, human behaviour and the social environment, research, law, sociology and psychology. Students are required to complete social work practice laboratory courses, advanced courses using problem-based learning, and two fieldwork placements in local or overseas agencies under professional supervision.
z: 該計劃提供的培訓可讓您獲得社會工作實踐專業認可的資格。課程涵蓋的領域包括社會福利與社會政策、專業社會工作理論與實踐、人類行為與社會環境、研究、法律、社會學和心理學。學生必須完成社會工作實踐實驗室課程、基於問題的學習的高級課程，以及在專業監督下在本地或海外機構進行兩次實地考察。

d: This integrated programme, jointly offered by the Department of Politics and Public Administration and the Department of Law, is designed to provide students with a multi-disciplinary education in law and public affairs. Students will be able to study professional law subjects as well as social sciences courses in areas like comparative politics, political philosophy and ethics, international relations, and public administration.

This programme is considerably flexible. At the end of the second semester of the second year, students will be able to decide whether to finish a Bachelor of Social Sciences (Government and Laws) with double majors in politics and legal studies after completing the fourth year of study, or to complete the five-year double degree programme which leads to the award of a Bachelor of Laws (LLB) degree in addition to the Bachelor of Social Sciences (Government and Laws) degree. The LLB, in particular, enables students intending to pursue a legal career to apply for the Postgraduate Certificate in Laws (PCLL) programme.
Alumni pursue careers not only in law and public service but also business, banking, education, journalism, tertiary education and research, the non-profit sector, and so on.
z: 該綜合課程由政治與公共管理系和法律系共同開設，旨在為學生提供法律和公共事務的多學科教育。學生將能夠學習專業法律科目以及比較政治、政治哲學和倫理、國際關係和公共管理等領域的社會科學課程。
這個程式相當靈活。第二年第二學期結束時，學生可以決定是否在完成第四年的學習後完成政治和法律研究雙主修的社會科學學士（政府和法律）學位，或完成五年雙學位課程，在獲得社會科學（政府和法律）學士學位的同時獲得法學學士學位（LLB）。尤其是法學學士學位，可以讓有意從事法律職業的學生申請法律研究生證書（PCLL）課程。
校友不僅從事法律和公共服務領域的職業，也從事商業、銀行、教育、新聞、高等教育和研究、非營利部門等領域的職業。

d: The Bachelor of Journalism, Media and Artificial Intelligence programme is a technology-driven and communication-focused double-major curriculum for the digital age. The innovative programme integrates core journalistic training with cutting-edge technologies, equipping students to lead, adapt, create media across a wide range of industries.

Students use the journalism, media and AI components to build critical thinking, communication skills, and digital technology expertise. By the end of the four-year programme, they will be able to produce professional quality and deeply researched written work on a variety of subjects, and shoot and story-tell compelling video. Graduates are highly valued by employers in fields like public relations, business, education, government, and of course media.

In their second year, each student will choose another academic major to combine with the journalism, media and AI components, thus creating a bespoke degree that will enable the full exploration of their unique intellectual interests, whether in marketing, economics, finance, counselling, criminology, music, or English studies – to mention just a few of the choices recent graduates have made.

Throughout the programme, the emphasis is on experiential real-world learning. All students will complete at least one summer internship at a media outlet or communication organization. Students also can spend a semester abroad at one of six top overseas journalism and media schools or one of HKU’s partner institutions.

A diverse faculty and student body ensures a lively learning environment that feeds students’ curiosity about the world. Current faculty members of HKU’s Journalism & Media Studies Centre (JMSC) hail from North America, Europe, and Asia, while more than two dozen nationalities are represented among current students and recent graduates. Class size is kept small, to foster classroom discussion as well as the family feeling that makes the JMSC a very special place at HKU.
JS6822.r: Besides HKDSE result, reports of school principals, records of extra-curricular activities and campus journalism experience may be considered.
z: 新聞、媒體和人工智慧學士課程是數位時代的技術驅動和以傳播為重點的雙專業課程。該創新計畫將核心新聞培訓與尖端技術相結合，使學生能夠領導、適應和創造跨行業的媒體。
學生利用新聞、媒體和人工智慧組件來培養批判性思維、溝通技巧和數位技術專業知識。在四年的課程結束時，他們將能夠創作出專業品質和深入研究的各種主題的書面作品，並拍攝和講述引人入勝的影片。畢業生受到公共關係、商業、教育、政府，當然還有媒體等領域雇主的高度重視。
在第二年，每個學生將選擇另一個學術專業，與新聞、媒體和人工智慧部分相結合，從而創建一個客製化學位，使他們能夠充分探索他們獨特的智力興趣，無論是在行銷、經濟學、金融、諮詢、犯罪學、音樂還是英語研究方面——這只是最近畢業生所做的一些選擇。
在整個計劃中，重點是體驗式現實世界學習。所有學生將在媒體機構或傳播組織完成至少一次暑期實習。學生還可以在海外六所頂級新聞和媒體學院之一或香港大學的合作院校之一度過一個學期。
多元化的教師和學生群體確保了一個活躍的學習環境，滿足學生對世界的好奇心。香港大學新聞與媒體研究中心 (JMSC) 的現任教職人員來自北美、歐洲和亞洲，而在校學生和應屆畢業生則來自二十多個國家。班級人數保持較小，以促進課堂討論以及家庭感覺，這使得 JMSC 在香港大學成為一個非常特別的地方。
JS6822.zr: 除香港中學文憑考試成績外，學校校長的報告、課外活動記錄及校園新聞經驗亦可考慮。

d: The Bachelor of Engineering in Biomedical Engineering (BEng(BME)) (JS6925), offered by a newly-established School of Biomedical Engineering at HKU, is a unique interdisciplinary programme offered in partnership with the Faculties of Medicine, Engineering, Dentistry and Sciences. Building on our 20-year experience in delivering this curriculum, it is designed to nurture the next generation of biomedical engineers who will combine engineering rigor with biomedical innovation to improve health and quality of life.
The programme equips students to:
• Apply engineering solutions to advance biomedical research and transform healthcare;
• Innovate and translate cutting-edge technologies into real-world medical applications;
• Address global health challenges with ethical, professional and social responsibility.
z: 生物醫學工程工程學士 (BEng(BME)) (JS6925) 由香港大學新成立的生物醫學工程學院提供，是一個獨特的跨學科課程，與醫學院、工程學院、牙科學院和科學學院合作提供。基於我們 20 年提供課程的經驗，該課程旨在培養下一代生物醫學工程師，他們將工程嚴謹性與生物醫學創新相結合，以改善健康和生活品質。
該計劃使學生能夠：
• 應用工程解決方案推廣生物醫學研究並變革醫療保健；
• 創新尖端技術並將其轉化為現實世界的醫療應用；
• 以道德、專業和社會責任來應對全球健康挑戰。

d: The BASc(AppliedAI) programme emphasises the intellectual underpinning of AI applications in diverse areas, with a philosophical and ethical dimension. It aims to give students both fundamental and practical knowledge in the design and construction of intelligent systems so that they can apply their skills in a variety of career settings.

Supported by a wide range of courses in computer science, geography, mathematics, psychology, statistics, and urban studies, which emphasise problem-based learning, the programme features five concentrations: AI technology, AI in business and finance, AI in medicine, AI in smart city, or AI in neurocognitive science.

Students will learn to transfer interdisciplinary scientific knowledge into a wide range of integrated applications and technological innovations, so as to develop the intellectual capacity essential to meeting new challenges and resolve new problems in the future. Upon graduation, students will be exceptionally well-equipped to create artificial intelligence products with transformational impacts in different industries.
z: BASc（AppliedAI）課程強調人工智慧在不同領域的應用的智力基礎，具有哲學和倫理層面。它旨在為學生提供智慧系統設計和建構方面的基礎知識和實踐知識，以便他們能夠將自己的技能應用於各種職業環境。
該計畫由電腦科學、地理、數學、心理學、統計學和城市研究等廣泛課程支持，強調基於問題的學習，有五個重點：人工智慧技術、商業和金融中的人工智慧、醫學中的人工智慧、智慧城市中的人工智慧或神經認知科學中的人工智慧。
學生將學習如何將跨學科的科學知識轉化為廣泛的綜合應用和技術創新，從而發展未來迎接新挑戰、解決新問題所需的智力能力。畢業後，學生將具備出色的能力來創造對不同產業具有變革性影響的人工智慧產品。

d: Financial Technology (FinTech) refers to the application of Information and Communication Technology (ICT) in the field of financial services. It is a rapidly emerging inter‐disciplinary area with very high impact on the economy of every society.

The BASc(FinTech) degree is jointly offered by the School of Computing & Data Science and the HKU Business School. The objective of the programme is to nurture financial technologists and entrepreneurs with essential knowledge in both finance and technology for taking up a leading role in innovation and applications of Financial Technology. Being an inter-disciplinary effort, the programme combines subjects on computing, finance, and policies and regulations to give students a thorough grounding in the FinTech discipline.

The programme consists of foundation courses in mathematics, statistics, finance, computing, and law, as well as hard topics in FinTech and soft topics in Arts and Social Sciences. Hard topics in FinTech include courses in distributed ledger and blockchain technology, big data and data mining, computational finance and algorithmic trading, e-payment and crypto-currency, financial programming and databases, and mathematical finance etc. Soft topics are courses from Arts and Social Sciences, which serve for training students to have a broader mindset and allow them to apply their knowledge and skills adaptively and creatively in this fast-growing discipline.

The programme prepares graduates with knowledge in both finance and technology, allowing them to have a broad career pathway as they could take up positions in FinTech industry, finance industry, as well as IT industry. Graduates can also continue their studies by pursuing a master or doctoral degree in Hong Kong or overseas. Professionally, it is expected that graduates of the programme will become FinTech professionals, leaders in the FinTech industry, and researchers in the FinTech discipline.
z: 金融科技（FinTech）是指資訊通信技術（ICT）在金融服務領域的應用。它是一個迅速新興的跨學科領域，對每個社會的經濟都有很大的影響。
BASc(FinTech)學位由計算與資料科學學院和香港大學商學院共同提供。該計畫的目標是培養具備金融和科技基礎知識的金融科技專家和企業家，在金融科技的創新和應用中發揮主導作用。作為一個跨學科項目，該項目結合了計算、金融、政策和法規等學科，為學生提供金融科技學科的全面基礎。
該計畫包括數學、統計學、金融、電腦和法律的基礎課程，以及金融科技的硬主題和藝術和社會科學的軟主題。金融科技的硬主題包括分散式帳本和區塊鏈技術、大數據和資料探勘、計算金融和演算法交易、電子支付和加密貨幣、金融程式和資料庫、數學金融等課程。軟主題包括藝術和社會科學課程，旨在培養學生擁有更廣泛的思維，使他們能夠在這個快速發展的學科中適應性和創造性地應用他們的知識和技能。
該計畫為畢業生提供金融和技術方面的知識，讓他們擁有廣闊的職業道路，可以在金融科技業、金融業以及IT業擔任職位。畢業生亦可於香港或海外繼續攻讀碩士或博士學位。在專業上，預計該課程的畢業生將成為金融科技專業人士、金融科技行業的領導者和金融科技學科的研究人員。

d: The HKU BSc(ActuarSc) programme is the only actuarial science programme in Hong Kong accredited by the UK’s Institute and Faculty of Actuaries. HKU is also a Center of Actuarial Excellence designated by the Society of Actuaries of the US. The programme provides formal academic training to students who wish to join the actuarial profession. It is specifically designed to prepare students to sit the early actuarial examinations of the professional bodies for actuaries, thus allowing them to readily join the actuarial profession with internationally-recognised qualifications upon graduation.

Although actuarial science is a separate discipline with its own area of knowledge, modern actuarial training requires multidisciplinary knowledge in probability, statistics, big data analytics, economics, investment, finance, law, taxation and accounting. The HKU Actuarial Science curriculum reflects this requirement by incorporating various interdisciplinary courses into the basic yet comprehensive actuarial training.

The HKU BSc(ActuarSc) programme aims to equip students with a solid background in actuarial science, and enable them to develop the confidence and analytical skills needed to define and tackle problems in actuarial science and related fields. Students should also be able to evaluate and measure various kinds of risk using effective quantitative methods, and become proficient in formulating and communicating practicable business strategies with professionalism as well as accuracy.
JS6729.r: Under the current agreements with the Institute and Faculty of Actuaries of the UK and the Society of Actuaries of the US, students with a course or examination mark above a certain threshold in courses offered by the BSc(ActuarSc) programme may be exempted from taking specified professional actuarial examinations.
z: 香港大學理學士學位(ActuarSc)課程是香港唯一獲得英國精算師協會認可的精算科學課程。香港大學亦是美國精算師協會指定的精算卓越中心。該計劃為希望加入精算專業的學生提供正式的學術培訓。它是專門為學生準備參加精算師專業機構的早期精算考試而設計的，從而使他們能夠在畢業後以國際認可的資格輕鬆加入精算專業。
雖然精算學是一門獨立的學科，有自己的知識領域，但現代精算培訓需要機率、統計學、大數據分析、經濟學、投資、金融、法律、稅務和會計等多學科知識。香港大學精算科學課程反映了這一要求，將各種跨學科課程融入基礎而全面的精算培訓中。
香港大學理學士(ActuarSc)課程旨在為學生提供紮實的精算科學背景，並培養他們定義和解決精算科學及相關領域問題所需的信心和分析能力。學生還應能夠使用有效的定量方法評估和衡量各種風險，並熟練且專業、準確地制定和傳達切實可行的商業策略。
JS6729.zr: 根據與英國精算師協會和美國精算師協會目前簽訂的協議，在BSc(ActuarSc)計畫提供的課程中，課程或考試成績超過一定門檻的學生可以免除參加指定的專業精算考試。

d: Statistical Decision Sciences offers comprehensive training in quantitative analysis and statistical modeling to students, emphasizing both theory and practice. Upon admission, students can select one of the three specialized Professional Cores in Decision Analytics, Risk Management, and Statistics within the Bachelor of Statistics (BStat) degree for more in-depth education. They initially choose a Professional Core as an indication of their preferences upon entrance, with the flexibility to switch between cores based on their interests during their studies.

The Professional Core in Decision Analytics focuses on leveraging and managing big data in real time, emphasizing statistically guided AI techniques for strategic decision-making and resource allocation. It aims to blend data science and statistical reasoning to enhance artificial intelligence with human intelligence.

The Professional Core in Risk Management provides expertise in the theory and methodology of risk management, including quantitative modeling, financial risk analysis, and statistical methods, while promoting good risk management practices.

The Professional Core in Statistics emphasizes the study of statistics as a scientific discipline involving analytical and quantitative tools for logical thinking, problem-solving, probability reasoning, and data analysis to support decision-making.

Graduates from the Statistical Decision Sciences programme are eligible to become a Graduate Statistician (GradStat) designated by the Royal Statistical Society (RSS), UK, with accreditation ensuring high-quality teaching, learning, and assessment. Additionally, passing specific courses may qualify graduates for the RSS Data Analyst award.
z: 統計決策科學為學生提供定量分析和統計建模的全面培訓，並強調理論和實踐。入學後，學生可以在統計學學士學位（BStat）學位內選擇決策分析、風險管理和統計學三個專業核心課程之一，以獲得更深入的教育。他們最初選擇專業核心課程作為入學時的偏好，並在學習期間根據自己的興趣靈活地在核心課程之間切換。
決策分析專業核心著重於即時利用和管理大數據，強調統計指導的人工智慧技術用於策略決策和資源分配。它旨在融合數據科學和統計推理，以增強人工智慧和人類智慧。
風險管理專業核心課程提供風險管理理論和方法的專業知識，包括定量建模、金融風險分析和統計方法，同時促進良好的風險管理實踐。
統計學專業核心強調統計學作為一門科學學科的研究，涉及用於邏輯思考、解決問題、機率推理和數據分析以支持決策的分析和定量工具。
統計決策科學課程的畢業生有資格成為英國皇家統計學會 (RSS) 指定的研究生統計學家 (GradStat)，並獲得確保高品質教學、學習和評估的認證。此外，通過特定課程的畢業生可能有資格獲得 RSS 數據分析師獎。

d: The Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science and Bachelor of Engineering in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science programmes share the same programme code. Students shall make a preliminary choice as an indication of their preferences; and they may freely choose the final programme by the end of their first year.

The two professional degree programmes designed to equip students with the necessary skills and knowledge to excel in the rapidly evolving field of computing, AI, data science, and other transformative technologies.

The Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science provides students with a strong foundation in computer science and its applications. The programme covers a wide range of topics, including programming, algorithms, data structures, software engineering, computing infrastructures, and artificial intelligence technologies.

The Bachelor of Engineering in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, on the other hand, focuses on training students for careers in AI and data science. The programme provides students with solid training in artificial intelligence and data-driven computing technologies. It covers topics such as programming, data modeling, big data systems, AI & data ethics, AI technologies, and applications.

These programmes provide a comprehensive education that prepares students to be leaders in their field, driving innovation and shaping the future of technology-driven decision-making. Graduates of either programme will be at the forefront of technology innovations, making significant contributions to the development of cutting-edge solutions that leverage computing, AI, and data science technologies. They will be well-positioned to take up key roles such as machine learning engineers, software developers, data analysts/engineers, AI consultants, cybersecurity specialists, and more, in a wide range of industries.
z: 計算機科學工程學士學位和人工智慧和數據科學工程學士學位課程共享相同的課程代碼。學生應根據自己的喜好做出初步選擇；他們可以在第一年結束時自由選擇最終課程。
這兩個專業學位課程旨在讓學生具備必要的技能和知識，以便在快速發展的運算、人工智慧、數據科學和其他變革性技術領域中脫穎而出。
計算機科學工程學士學位為學生提供計算機科學及其應用的堅實基礎。該計劃涵蓋廣泛的主題，包括程式設計、演算法、資料結構、軟體工程、計算基礎設施和人工智慧技術。
另一方面，人工智慧和數據科學工程學士學位專注於培訓學生從事人工智慧和數據科學職業。該計劃為學生提供人工智慧和數據驅動計算技術的紮實培訓。它涵蓋程式設計、資料建模、大數據系統、人工智慧和資料倫理、人工智慧技術和應用等主題。
這些計畫提供全面的教育，幫助學生成為各自領域的領導者，推動創新並塑造技術驅動決策的未來。這兩個計畫的畢業生都將處於技術創新的最前沿，為利用計算、人工智慧和數據科學技術的尖端解決方案的開發做出重大貢獻。他們將有能力在各行各業中擔任機器學習工程師、軟體開發人員、資料分析師/工程師、人工智慧顧問、網路安全專家等關鍵角色。

d: The Bachelor of Science in Innovation and Technology [BSc(I&T)] is an interdisciplinary four-year programme that prepares students to tackle real-world challenges through technological innovations. This programme focuses on cultivating a new generation of socially-conscious innovators who are fluent in science, engineering, and design, and are able to apply these knowledge to create human-centred innovations that drive positive changes to the rapidly evolving world.

Through a project-led and problem-based curriculum, students engage in open-ended projects spanning a wide range of domains where they collaborate with partners ranging from non-profits to high-tech companies. From day one, students immerse themselves in hands-on projects, honing their problem-solving skills and gaining practical experience in the innovation process. The emphasis on interdisciplinary collaboration empowers students to work across academic fields, fostering their confidence and adaptability for their future. Furthermore, the programme offers flexibility for students to explore their interests and develop their own depth of study in a technology discipline.

During their co-op experience, students apply their problem-solving skills by working full-time at a startup company or leading a project solutions in a technology company or research lab. This opportunity allows students to incubate their ideas, potentially leading to the creation of their own ventures. In their final year, students culminate their comprehensive capstone experience by proposing their own venture, forming their own team, and pitching their ideas.
z: 創新與科技理學士 [BSc(I&T)] 是一個跨學科的四年制課程，旨在幫助學生透過科技創新來應對現實世界的挑戰。該計畫致力於培養新一代具有社會意識的創新者，他們精通科學、工程和設計，並能夠運用這些知識創造以人為本的創新，為快速發展的世界帶來積極的變化。
透過以專案為主導、以問題為基礎的課程，學生可以參與跨多個領域的開放式項目，並與從非營利組織到高科技公司等合作夥伴合作。從第一天起，學生就沉浸在實踐專案中，磨練解決問題的能力並在創新過程中獲得實務經驗。對跨學科合作的重視使學生能夠跨學術領域工作，培養他們對未來的信心和適應能力。此外，該計畫為學生提供了靈活性，讓他們探索自己的興趣並發展自己在技術學科中的學習深度。
在合作學習期間，學生透過在新創公司全職工作或在科技公司或研究實驗室領導專案解決方案來運用解決問題的技能。這個機會讓學生可以孵化他們的想法，並有可能創建自己的企業。在最後一年，學生們透過提出自己的企業、組建自己的團隊和提出自己的想法來獲得全面的頂點體驗。

d: The BBA (Hons) Scheme in Accounting and Finance comprises the following awards. It gives students the flexibility to decide on a final award in their first year of study.
BBA (Hons) in Accountancy

This programme provides students with a well-rounded business education and an opportunity to specialise in accounting. Students are provided with an integrated academic foundation for careers as accountants with the required competencies, independence of mind, objectivity and ethical awareness.
BBA (Hons) in Accounting and Finance

The aim of this programme is to exploit the synergy between accounting and finance and prepare students to become competent accountants with a sound knowledge of finance. The programme provides a well-rounded business education and an opportunity to specialise in accounting and finance. Students develop strong skills in accounting and finance, including accounting and financial analysis, control and risk management, and corporate governance and ethics.
BBA (Hons) in Digital Finance and Investment

This programme aims to provide students with a well-rounded business education and an opportunity to specialise in digital finance and investment management. The highly practical programme emphasises the application of professional finance and investment knowledge, together with hands-on experience of innovative financial technologies, to address the challenges faced by modern finance and investment professionals.

All admitted students embark on a Common Year One curriculum. Towards the end of year one, students can decide whether to continue with their initial choice or switch to another choice within the Faculty. Those who wish to change to another choice need to join a competitive process through a ranking assessment, which considers a combination of entrance qualification score, Year One GPA, and interview performance.
JS3060.r: • Students will gain one of the following awards upon successful completion of the programme: • BBA (Hons) in Accountancy • BBA (Hons) in Accounting and Finance • BBA (Hons) in Digital Finance and Investment • Students are subject to further assessment criteria in the selection of the award, such as GPA, towards the end of year one. • JUPAS applicants with a DSE score of 25.0 or above in their best 5 subjects are guaranteed to be admitted to their most preferred Major programme. • The option of a Secondary Major in AI and Data Analytics (AIDA) is available to students taking the BBA (Hons) Scheme in Accounting and Finance. Admission to the Secondary Major is competitive and subject to a different credit requirement for graduation. Entry Scholarship • To recognise the outstanding academic performance of HKDSE students, the School will grant entry scholarships to eligible HKDSE students admitted to the Scheme via JUPAS. Apart from the entry scholarships, additional scholarships may be available.
z: 會計與金融工商管理學士（榮譽）計劃包括以下獎項。它使學生可以靈活地決定第一年學習的最終獎項。
會計（榮譽）工商管理學士
該課程為學生提供全面的商業教育和專攻會計的機會。為學生提供會計師職業所需的綜合學術基礎，並具備所需的能力、獨立思想、客觀性和道德意識。
會計與金融（榮譽）工商管理學士
該計劃的目的是利用會計和金融之間的協同作用，讓學生成為具有豐富金融知識的合格會計師。該計劃提供全面的商業教育以及專門從事會計和金融的機會。學生培養強大的會計和金融技能，包括會計和財務分析、控制和風險管理以及公司治理和道德。
數位金融與投資（榮譽）工商管理學士
該計畫旨在為學生提供全面的商業教育以及專門從事數位金融和投資管理的機會。本課程高度實用，強調專業金融和投資知識的應用，以及創新金融技術的實務經驗，以解決現代金融和投資專業人士面臨的挑戰。
所有被錄取的學生都開始學習一年級通用課程。在第一學年結束時，學生可以決定是繼續他們最初的選擇還是轉向學院內的另一個選擇。那些希望改變其他選擇的人需要透過排名評估來參加競爭過程，排名評估會綜合考慮入學資格分數、一年級 GPA 和麵試表現。
JS3060.zr: • 成功完成課程後，學生將獲得以下獎項之一： • 會計學工商管理學士（榮譽） • 會計與金融工商管理學士（榮譽） • 數位金融與投資工商管理學士（榮譽） • 學生在第一學年結束時在選擇獎項時須遵守進一步的評估標準，例如 GPA。 • 聯招申請者在其最好的 5 個科目中取得 DSE 成績 25.0 或以上，可保證入讀他們最喜歡的主修課程。 • 參加會計和金融學工商管理學士（榮譽）計劃的學生可以選擇人工智慧和數據分析（AIDA）輔助專業。中學專業的入學具有競爭性，並且畢業時需要滿足不同的學分要求。入學獎學金 • 為表揚香港中學文憑考試學生的優異學業表現，學院將為經聯招取錄的合資格香港中學文憑考試學生頒發入學獎學金。除了入學獎學金外，還可能提供其他獎學金。

d: Short DescriptionUpdated

This scheme prepares students to become leaders in finance analytics, FinTech, and applied mathematics by providing a strong foundation in mathematical, statistical, and computing skills. It offers three major options after a common first year: BSc (Hons) in Investment Science and Finance Analytics, BSc (Hons) in Quantitative Finance and FinTech, and BSc (Hons) in Applied Mathematics. Upon completion of the Common Year One curriculum, students may choose their major based on their own preferences and ranking assessment.
JS3220.r: • Students will receive one of the following awards upon completion of the programme: • BSc (Hons) in Applied Mathematics • BSc (Hons) in Investment Science and Finance Analytics • BSc (Hons) in Quantitative Finance and FinTech • Students may enrol in any awards without being subject to further assessment. • The option of a Secondary Major in AI and Data Analytics (AIDA) is available to students taking the BSc (Hons) in Applied Mathematics and BSc (Hons) in Investment Science and Finance Analytics. Admission to the Secondary Major is on a competitive basis and is subject to a different credit requirement for graduation. • Students may also choose to pursue a Double Major, adding a Second Major from another department within the Faculty of Computer and Mathematical Sciences to their studies. This option gives students the chance to broaden their academic experience and earn two awards when they graduate. Admission to the Double Major is competitive and requires a different credit requirement for graduation. • In recognition of high academic attainment, the Department will grant entry scholarships to eligible students with outstanding HKDSE scores admitted to the Scheme via JUPAS. The award criteria for the scholarship are listed in the information sheet. The criteria are subject to change, and awardees will be announced on the same website in due course. • For more Scheme information, please visit https://www.polyu.edu.hk/ama/study/ug/amfa/
z: 簡短說明已更新
該計劃透過提供數學、統計和計算技能的堅實基礎，幫助學生成為金融分析、金融科技和應用數學領域的領導者。在共同的第一年之後，它提供三個主要選項：投資科學和金融分析理學學士（榮譽）、定量金融和金融科技理學學士（榮譽）以及應用數學理學學士（榮譽）。完成共同一年級課程後，學生可以根據自己的喜好和排名評估選擇專業。
JS3220.zr: • 完成課程後，學生將獲得以下獎項之一： • 應用數學（榮譽）理學學士 • 投資科學和金融分析（榮譽）理學學士 • 定量金融和金融科技（榮譽）理學學士 • 學生可以報名參加任何獎項，無需接受進一步評估。 • 攻讀應用數學（榮譽）理學學士以及投資科學和金融分析（榮譽）理學學士的學生可以選擇人工智慧和數據分析（AIDA）輔助專業。中學專業的入學是在競爭的基礎上進行的，並且畢業時有不同的學分要求。 • 學生也可以選擇攻讀雙專業，在其學習中添加電腦和數學科學學院另一個系的第二專業。此選項使學生有機會擴大學術經驗並在畢業時獲得兩項獎項。雙主修的入學競爭非常激烈，並且需要不同的畢業學分要求。 • 為表揚高學術成就，本署將向香港中學文憑考試成績優異、經聯招取錄的合資格學生頒發入學獎學金。獎學金的授予標準列於資訊表中。標準可能會發生變化，獲獎者將適時在同一網站上公佈。 • 如欲了解更多計畫詳情，請瀏覽https://www.polyu.edu.hk/ama/study/ug/amfa/

d: We prepare our students to be professionally competent, versatile, adaptive and reflective, equipping them to meet the fast-changing needs of society. The programme curriculum is designed to cultivate students’ humanistic values and to equip them with the knowledge and skills necessary to become competent human service professionals in their chosen fields. Through wide exposure to different domains of knowledge and interdisciplinary issues, students will develop the ability to think from different perspectives and solve complex problems in real-life situations. Our graduates show a strong commitment to the betterment of society and humankind and are competent in the flexible and creative use of information, resources, knowledge and practical skills in professional practice.
JS3250.r: • Students are initially admitted to the BA (Hons) Scheme in Applied Social Sciences programme and study a common curriculum in Year 1, with their target awards (one of the following awards) declared during their first year of study: • BA (Hons) in Social Work • BA (Hons) in Social Policy and Social Entrepreneurship • Students are subject to further assessment criteria - students’ own choice, academic and interview performance and quota in the selection of awards during their Year One study. • The options of Secondary Major in Innovation and Entrepreneurship, Dual Degree programme and Fast-track programme are available to students of BA (Hons) in Social Policy and Social Entrepreneurship. Admission to these options is on competitive basis and is subject to different credit requirements for graduation. Entry Scholarship • APSS Entry Scholarship is available for JUPAS applicants demonstrating outstanding academic achievement and interview performance. PolyU reserves the right to change or withdraw the scholarships at any time. In case of any dispute/disagreement, PolyU’s decision is final.
z: 我們培養學生成為專業能力強、多才多藝、適應力強、善於反思的人，使他們能夠滿足社會快速變化的需求。該計畫課程旨在培養學生的人文價值觀，並為他們提供成為所選領域合格的人類服務專業人員所需的知識和技能。透過廣泛接觸不同的知識領域和跨學科問題，學生將培養從不同角度思考並解決現實生活中複雜問題的能力。我們的畢業生表現出對社會和人類進步的堅定承諾，並有能力在專業實踐中靈活和創造性地利用資訊、資源、知識和實踐技能。
JS3250.zr: • 學生最初被錄取進入應用社會科學（榮譽）文學士課程，並在第一年學習共同課程，並在第一年的學習期間宣布其目標獎項（以下獎項之一）： • 社會工作（榮譽）文學士 • 社會政策和社會創業學（榮譽）文學士 • 學生須接受進一步的評估標準 - 學生自己的獎項選擇、學術和麵試表現以及一年級學習的標準選擇。 • 社會政策和社會創業學（榮譽）文學士學位學生可以選擇創新與創業學第二專業、雙學位課程和快速課程。這些選項的錄取是在競爭的基礎上進行的，並且需要滿足不同的畢業學分要求。入學獎學金 • APSS 入學獎學金適用於表現出傑出學術成就和麵試表現的聯招申請者。理大保留隨時更改或撤銷獎學金的權利。如有任何爭議/分歧，理大保留最終決定權。

d: The programme aims to train up architecture graduates who are able to adopt advanced technology and innovations in practice to support the growth of the construction industry. The designed programme to provide quality education to familiarize architectural students with the latest advanced technology such as Artificial Intelligence (AI), Building Information Modelling (BIM), and Geographic Information Systems (GIS) relating to architecture, construction, building materials, and building services to respond to the issues of sustainable development in the built environment. The uniqueness of this programme is the integration of knowledge and analytical tools, digital skills, and transferable skills with design capabilities for the needs of the architecture profession. Students will be able to cultivate critical thinking and a research spirit in architecture design and problem-solving skills, adopting advanced technology and innovation.

All admitted students will embark on a Common Year One curriculum. Towards the end of year one, students can decide whether to continue with their initial choice or switch to another choice within the Faculty. Those who wish to change to another choice need to join a competitive process through a ranking assessment, which considers a combination of entrance qualification score, Year One GPA, and interview performance.
JS3214.r: • The programme hosted by the Department of Building and Real Estate (BRE) and co-hosted by School of Design (SD). • Students will be awarded the following upon successful completion of the graduation requirements: • BSc (Hons) in Architectural Studies • To recognise high academic attainment, the Department will grant entry scholarships to eligible students with outstanding HKDSE scores admitted via JUPAS.
z: 該計劃旨在培養能夠在實踐中採用先進技術和創新來支持建築行業發展的建築學畢業生。該計畫旨在提供優質教育，讓建築學生熟悉與建築、施工、建築材料和建築服務相關的最新先進技術，如人工智慧（AI）、建築資訊模型（BIM）和地理資訊系統（GIS），以應對建築環境的可持續發展問題。該專案的獨特之處在於將知識和分析工具、數位技能以及可轉移技能與設計能力相結合，以滿足建築專業的需求。學生將能夠培養批判性思維和建築設計的研究精神以及解決問題的能力，採用先進的技術和創新。
所有被錄取的學生將開始共同一年級課程。在第一學年結束時，學生可以決定是繼續他們最初的選擇還是轉向學院內的另一個選擇。那些希望改變其他選擇的人需要透過排名評估來參加競爭過程，排名評估會綜合考慮入學資格分數、一年級 GPA 和麵試表現。
JS3214.zr: • 此專案由建築與房地產系（BRE）主辦，設計學院（SD）協辦。 • 成功完成畢業要求後，學生將獲頒以下學位： • 建築研究（榮譽）理學士學位 • 為表彰高學術成就，本系將向通過聯招取錄的香港中學文憑考試成績優異的合資格學生頒發入學獎學金。

d: The scheme has the following characteristics:
• It aims to equip students with vital engineering skills for careers as engineers, pilots, air traffic controllers, and more in the aviation sector.

• Students enjoy a deferred choice between the two award programmes without being subject to further assessment, starting from Year 2. • BEng (Hons) in Aeronautical Engineering, focusing on aircraft systems and design; or
• BEng (Hons) in Air Transport Engineering, emphasizing aviation operation and research.
• Some subjects are co-taught by PolyU academics and industry professionals to provide students with up-to-date knowledge in the aviation industry.
• Summer internships, technical visits, and career talks are arranged to provide valuable hands-on experience, enhancing students' readiness for the aviation industry.

All admitted students will embark on a Common Year One curriculum. Towards the end of year one, students can decide whether to continue with their initial choice or switch to another choice within the Faculty of Engineering. Those who wish to change to another choice need to join a competitive process through a ranking assessment, which considers a combination of entrance qualification score, Year One GPA, and interview performance.
JS3140.r: • The Bachelor of Engineering (Honours) Scheme in Aviation Engineering (AE Scheme) includes the following two awards: • BEng (Hons) in Aeronautical Engineering • BEng (Hons) in Air Transport Engineering • Students are allowed to enrol in any award programme without being subject to further assessment. • Students will pursue their preferred programme, normally from Year Two onwards, until graduation.
z: 此方案具有以下特點：
• 它旨在為學生提供重要的工程技能，以從事工程師、飛行員、空中交通管制員等航空領域的職業。
• 從第二年開始，學生可以在兩個獎勵計劃之間進行延期選擇，而無需接受進一步評估。 • 航空工程（榮譽）工學士，專注於飛機系統和設計；或者
• 航空運輸工程（榮譽）工學士，重點是航空運營和研究。
• 部分科目由理大學者與業界專業人士共同教授，為學生提供航空業的最新知識。
• 安排暑期實習、技術訪問和職業講座，以提供寶貴的實務經驗，增強學生為航空業做好準備。
所有被錄取的學生將開始共同一年級課程。在第一學年結束時，學生可以決定是繼續他們最初的選擇還是轉向工程學院內的另一個選擇。那些希望改變其他選擇的人需要透過排名評估來參加競爭過程，排名評估會綜合考慮入學資格分數、一年級 GPA 和麵試表現。
JS3140.zr: • 航空工程（榮譽）工學士計劃（AE 計劃）包括以下兩個獎項： • 航空工程（榮譽）工學士 • 航空運輸工程（榮譽）工學士 • 學生可以報名參加任何獎勵計劃，無需接受進一步評估。 • 學生通常從二年級開始學習他們喜歡的課程，直到畢業。

d: Biomedical engineering is recognised around the world as one of the fastest growing areas of innovation. It covers a wide spectrum of applications, such as devices used by health professionals in their diagnostic, therapeutic and rehabilitative practices; implants that are placed in patients for their health maintenance; wearable sensor networks to enhance athletic performance and safety; prostheses, orthoses and assistive devices that are used by people with special needs to facilitate their daily activities; and healthcare products and exercise equipment for general health promotion.

This developing global field requires professionals who understand both the health issues that motivate these technologies and the engineering solutions that they offer. It needs individuals with a solid foundation in both health sciences and engineering technologies.

Our BSc(Hons) in Biomedical Engineering curriculum prepares students for such a challenging career. They have opportunities to take subjects in both life sciences and engineering, and to integrate these concepts into interdisciplinary applications to improve human health.

All admitted students will embark on a Common Year One curriculum. Towards the end of year one, students can decide whether to continue with their initial choice or switch to another choice within the Faculty of Engineering. Those who wish to change to another choice need to join a competitive process through a ranking assessment, which considers a combination of entrance qualification score, Year One GPA, and interview performance.
JS3150.r: • Students will be awarded the following award upon successful completion of the graduation requirements: • BSc (Hons) in Biomedical Engineering • The option of enrolment in one of the below-mentioned Secondary Majors is available to the students of BSc (Hons) in Biomedical Engineering. Admission to the Secondary Major is on competitive basis and subject to a different credit requirement for graduation. • Secondary Major in Artificial Intelligence and Data Analytics (AIDA) • Secondary Major in Innovation and Entrepreneurship (IE)
z: 生物醫學工程被世界公認為成長最快的創新領域之一。它涵蓋了廣泛的應用，例如衛生專業人員在診斷、治療和復健實踐中使用的設備；植入患者體內以維持健康的植入物；可穿戴感測器網絡，以提高運動表現和安全性；供有特殊需求的人使用以方便其日常活動的義肢、矯形器和輔助裝置；用於促進一般健康的保健產品和運動器材。
這個不斷發展的全球領域需要專業人士了解推動這些技術的健康問題及其提供的工程解決方案。它需要在健康科學和工程技術方面擁有堅實基礎的個人。
我們的生物醫學工程（榮譽）理學士學位課程幫助學生為如此具有挑戰性的職業做好準備。他們有機會學習生命科學和工程學科，並將這些概念融入跨學​​科應用中，以改善人類健康。
所有被錄取的學生將開始共同一年級課程。在第一學年結束時，學生可以決定是繼續他們最初的選擇還是轉向工程學院內的另一個選擇。那些希望改變其他選擇的人需要透過排名評估來參加競爭過程，排名評估會綜合考慮入學資格分數、一年級 GPA 和麵試表現。
JS3150.zr: • 成功完成畢業要求後，學生將獲得以下獎項： • 生物醫學工程（榮譽）理學學士 • 生物醫學工程（榮譽）理學學士的學生可以選擇註冊下列其中一個二級專業。中學專業的入學是在競爭的基礎上進行的，並且畢業時有不同的學分要求。 • 人工智慧與資料分析副專業 (AIDA) • 創新與創業副專業 (IE)

d: The following programmes are offered under this departmental scheme:
(1) BSc (Hons) in Applied Biology with Biotechnology
(2) BSc (Hons) in Chemical Technology

Our BSc (Hons) Scheme in Biotechnology and Chemical Technology offers a comprehensive and flexible education in the sciences. In the first year, students follow a common curriculum shared with students from other departments within the Faculty of Science, which ensures a broad and solid foundation in scientific principles. After the first year, students can choose to specialise in one of the two majors. Both majors provide indepth knowledge and practical skills, preparing students for diverse career opportunities in related industries. This scheme is designed to equip students with the expertise needed to meet future scientific challenges.

All students admitted to the Faculty of Science will follow a Common Year One, which consists of two Faculty compulsory subjects, Science Professionals in Society, two free elective subjects and General University Requirements (GUR) subjects. Students in this departmental scheme are expected to have chosen a specific Major in Semester 2 of Year One. Students follow the curriculum of their selected Major programme from Year Two onwards. After successfully completing the four-year programme, students are awarded a degree in their selected Major programme. Students must complete at least 120 hours of Work-Integrated Education (WIE) before graduation.
JS3011.r: • Students will receive one of the following awards upon successful completion of the programme: • BSc (Hons) in Applied Biology with Biotechnology • BSc (Hons) in Chemical Technology • Students are subject to further selection criteria for admission to a major, i.e. their own preference, GPA and interview performance, during Semester 2 of Year One. Entry Scholarship • In recognition of high academic attainment, the Department will grant entry scholarships to eligible students with outstanding HKDSE scores admitted to the Scheme via JUPAS. The award criteria for the scholarship are listed on the information sheet. The criteria are subject to change, and awardees will be announced on the same website in due course.
z: 該部門計劃提供以下課程：
(1) 應用生物學與生物技術（榮譽）理學士學位
(2) 化學技術（榮譽）理學士
我們的生物技術和化學技術（榮譽）理學士計劃提供全面而靈活的科學教育。在第一年，學生們遵循與理學院其他系的學生共享的共同課程，這確保了科學​​原理的廣泛而堅實的基礎。第一年後，學生可以選擇專攻兩個專業之一。這兩個專業都提供深入的知識和實踐技能，為學生在相關行業的多樣化職業機會做好準備。該計劃旨在為學生提供應對未來科學挑戰所需的專業知識。
所有被理學院錄取的學生都將學習共同一年級課程，其中包括兩門學院必修科目、社會科學專業人士、兩門自由選修科目和一般大學要求 (GUR) 科目。該系所計劃的學生應在第一年第二學期選擇特定專業。學生從第二年開始遵循他們選擇的專業課程的課程。成功完成四年課程後，學生將獲得所選專業課程的學位。學生在畢業前必須完成至少 120 小時的工作整合教育 (WIE)。
JS3011.zr: • 成功完成課程後，學生將獲得以下獎勵之一： • 應用生物學與生物技術（榮譽）理學學士 • 化學技術（榮譽）理學學士 • 學生在第一年第二學期須遵守進一步的專業錄取標準，即自己的偏好、GPA 和麵試表現。入學獎學金 • 為表揚學業成就較高的學生，本署會向香港中學文憑考試成績優異、經聯招取錄的合資格學生頒發入學獎學金。獎學金的授予標準列於資訊表中。標準可能會發生變化，獲獎者將適時在同一網站上公佈。

d: This programme provides an excellent opportunity for students who would like to pursue an education in the building engineering and construction management profession. The advancing building construction industry in Hong Kong and neighbouring regions requires graduates who possess highly specialised skills in technology, management and communication. Students also face intellectual challenges along the course of study that promote self-development and enhance problem-solving skills. Our well-trained graduates are in great demand as professional building engineers and construction managers because they can easily adapt to the changing needs of the construction industry and have developed the expertise that is necessary to plan, coordinate, supervise and control the complex process of building projects.

All admitted students will embark on a Common Year One curriculum. Towards the end of year one, students can decide whether to continue with their initial choice or switch to another choice within the Faculty. Those who wish to change to another choice need to join a competitive process through a ranking assessment, which considers a combination of entrance qualification score, Year One GPA, and interview performance.
JS3791.r: • Students will be awarded the following upon successful completion of the graduation requirements: • BSc (Hons) in Building Engineering & Management • The option of Secondary Major in Artificial Intelligence and Data Analytics (AIDA) is available to the students of BSc (Hons) in Building Engineering and Management. Admission to the Secondary Majors is on a competitive basis and is subject to a different credit requirement for graduation. • To recognise high academic attainment, the Department will grant entry scholarships to eligible students with outstanding HKDSE scores admitted via JUPAS.
z: 該課程為想要接受建築工程和施工管理專業教育的學生提供了絕佳的機會。香港及鄰近地區不斷發展的建築建造業需要具備高度專業技術、管理及溝通技能的畢業生。學生在學習過程中也面臨著促進自我發展和提高解決問題能力的智力挑戰。我們訓練有素的畢業生作為專業建築工程師和施工經理非常受歡迎，因為他們可以輕鬆適應建築行業不斷變化的需求，並掌握了規劃、協調、監督和控制建築專案複雜過程所需的專業知識。
所有被錄取的學生將開始共同一年級課程。在第一學年結束時，學生可以決定是繼續他們最初的選擇還是轉向學院內的另一個選擇。那些希望改變其他選擇的人需要透過排名評估來參加競爭過程，排名評估會綜合考慮入學資格分數、一年級 GPA 和麵試表現。
JS3791.zr: • 成功完成畢業要求後，學生將獲得以下學位： • 建築工程與管理（榮譽）理學學士 • 建築工程與管理（榮譽）理學學士的學生可以選擇人工智慧和數據分析（AIDA）輔助專業。二級專業的入學是在競爭的基礎上進行的，並且畢業時有不同的學分要求。 • 為表揚高學術成就，學系會向香港中學文憑考試成績優異並通過聯招取錄的合資格學生頒發入學獎學金。

d: We equip graduates with the technical and academic skills necessary to excel in building sciences and building services engineering.

The BEng(Hons) in Building Sciences and Engineering programme offers students interdisciplinary study opportunities tailored to meet the emerging needs of the industry. It addresses the demand for locally trained building services engineers with expertise in consultancy, contracting, building management, and research and development.
Our graduates possess a broad range of personal skills, including effective communication, critical thinking, independent learning, and innovative problem-solving.

All admitted students will embark on a Common Year One curriculum. Towards the end of Year One, students can choose to continue with their initial programme or switch to another within the Faculty. Those who wish to change programmes will need to participate in a competitive process, which includes a ranking assessment based on a combination of entrance qualification scores, Year One GPA, and interview performance.
JS3211.r: • Students will be awarded the following degree upon completing the graduation requirements: • BEng (Hons) in Building Sciences and Engineering [建築科學及工程學(榮譽)工學士] • Students in the BEng (Hons) in Building Sciences and Engineering programme have the option to pursue a Secondary Major programme in Innovation and Entrepreneurship (IE) or Artificial Intelligence and Data Analytics (AIDA). Admission to a Secondary Major programme is competitive and subject to different credit requirements for graduation. Entry Scholarship • To recognise high academic attainment, the Department will grant entry scholarships to eligible students with outstanding HKDSE scores who are admitted via JUPAS. Details of this scholarship will be announced on the BEEE website in due course.
z: 我們為畢業生提供在建築科學和建築服務工程領域取得優異成績所需的技術和學術技能。
建築科學與工程（榮譽）工學士課程為學生提供跨學科學習機會，以滿足行業的新興需求。它滿足了對本地培訓的建築服務工程師的需求，這些工程師擁有諮詢、承包、建築管理和研發方面的專業知識。
我們的畢業生擁有廣泛的個人技能，包括有效溝通、批判性思考、獨立學習和創新解決問題的能力。
所有被錄取的學生將開始共同一年級課程。在第一年結束時，學生可以選擇繼續他們最初的課程或轉到學院內的另一個課程。那些希望轉專業的學生需要參加一個競爭性的過程，其中包括根據入學資格分數、一年級 GPA 和麵試表現進行排名評估。
JS3211.zr: • 完成畢業要求後，學生將獲得以下學位： • 建築科學與工程學（榮譽）工學士 [建築科學及工程學（榮譽）工學士] • 建築科學與工程（榮譽）工學士課程的學生可以選擇修讀創新與創業（IE）或人工智慧與數據分析（AIDA）的第二主修課程。中學專業課程的入學具有競爭性，並且畢業時需要滿足不同的學分要求。入學獎學金 • 為表揚高學術成就，學系會向香港中學文憑考試成績優異並經聯招取錄的合資格學生頒發入學獎學金。該獎學金的詳細資訊將適時在BEEE網站上公佈。

d: At PolyU, innovation and technology drive an academic environment that fosters national pride, social responsibility, and a global mindset. Our Bachelor's Degree Scheme gives you the time and flexibility to explore various fields, helping you make informed decisions about your preferred programme.

This Bachelor's Degree Scheme is a new admission pathway offered and operated at the Faculty level alongside our existing BBA Majors offered across our three departments. It provides students with foundational knowledge through a broad one-year curriculum that covers core business functions.

The Faculty-level Bachelor's Degree Scheme offers students maximum flexibility to develop individual study paths that match their interests, aspirations, and learning needs. Students will take a range of subjects in their first year of study before making a decision on the appropriate BBA Major across our three departments.
JS3003.r: • Our Bachelor's Degree Scheme provides one entry in application for a choice of 9 Majors, offering students the time and flexibility to explore these disciplinary fields and navigate their academic interests. • All admitted students will embark on a Common Year One curriculum. Towards the end of year one, students can choose their preferred programme through a ranking assessment, which considers a combination of entrance qualification score, Year One GPA, and interview performance. • Students will be awarded one of the following BBA (Hons) degrees upon successful completion of the programme: • BBA (Hons) in Accountancy • BBA (Hons) in Accounting and Finance • BBA (Hons) in Digital Finance and Investment • BBA (Hons) in Aviation Management and Finance • BBA (Hons) in International Shipping and Transport Logistics • BBA (Hons) in Supply Chain Management and Analytics • BBA (Hons) in Global Business and Logistics* *Dual Degree with the Copenhagen Business School, Denmark • BBA (Hons) in Management • BBA (Hons) in Marketing
z: 在理大，創新和科技推動學術環境的發展，培養民族自豪感、社會責任感和全球思維。我們的學士學位課程為您提供時間和靈活性來探索各個領域，幫助您對您的首選課程做出明智的決定。
該學士學位計劃是一個新的入學途徑，與我們三個系提供的現有 BBA 專業一起在學院層面提供和運作。它透過涵蓋核心業務功能的廣泛的一年​​課程為學生提供基礎知識。

d: The programme is designed to equip students with knowledge in Chinese history and culture as well as personal skills which they can apply in pursuing their career and in making contributions to the government, economy and society of Hong Kong, China and the rest of the world. The general aim of the programme is to educate and train its students into individuals who are
• strongly committed to self-cultivation and the welfare of the community;
• culturally enriched and effective in communication skills;
• respectful of the rule of law;
• socially responsible; and
• observant of business ethics and business common-sense.

All admitted students will embark on a Common Year One curriculum. Towards the end of year one, students can decide whether to continue with their initial choice or switch to another choice within the Faculty. Those who wish to change to another choice need to join a competitive process through a ranking assessment, which considers a combination of entrance qualification score, Year One GPA, and interview performance.

z: 該課程旨在讓學生掌握中國歷史和文化知識以及個人技能，使他們能夠運用這些知識來追求自己的職業生涯，並為香港、中國和世界其他地區的政府、經濟和社會做出貢獻。該計劃的總體目標是教育和培訓學生成為有能力的人
