d: This BEng (Hons) in Civil Engineering aims to nurture well-rounded civil engineering graduates who are conversant in environmental, geotechnical, hydraulic, structural, and transportation engineering, as well as construction management. Graduates will be able to plan, design, construct, and manage interdisciplinary civil engineering projects incorporating complex commercial, environmental, social, and legal considerations.

Full accreditation has been granted to this programme by The Hong Kong Institution of Engineers (HKIE). Graduates of the programme are qualified for Corporate Membership of HKIE after appropriate training and are eligible to join Scheme A training of HKIE in the civil, environmental, geotechnical, structural, logistics & transportation disciplines.

All admitted students will embark on a Common Year One curriculum. Towards the end of year one, students can decide whether to continue with their initial choice or switch to another choice within the Faculty. Those who wish to change to another choice need to join a competitive process through a ranking assessment, which considers a combination of entrance qualification score, Year One GPA, and interview performance.

The award criteria of the scholarship listed in this information sheet are subject to change and will be announced on the same website in due course.
z: 該土木工程（榮譽）學士學位課程旨在培養精通環境、岩土、水利、結構和運輸工程以及施工管理的全面發展的土木工程畢業生。畢業生將能夠規劃、設計、建造和管理跨學科土木工程項目，並考慮複雜的商業、環境、社會和法律因素。
本課程已獲得香港工程師學會（HKIE）的全面認證。該課程的畢業生經過適當的培訓後即可獲得香港工程師學會企業會員資格，並有資格參加香港工程師學會土木、環境、岩土、結構、物流及運輸學科的A計劃培訓。
所有被錄取的學生將開始共同一年級課程。在第一學年結束時，學生可以決定是繼續他們最初的選擇還是轉向學院內的另一個選擇。那些希望改變其他選擇的人需要透過排名評估來參加競爭過程，排名評估會綜合考慮入學資格分數、一年級 GPA 和麵試表現。
JS3739.zr: 入學獎學金 • 為表揚在香港中學文憑考試中取得優異成績的學生，本系會頒發入學獎學金給合資格經聯招取錄的香港中學文憑考試學生。本資訊表中所列獎學金的授予標準可能會發生變化，並將適時在同一網站上公佈。

d: Short DescriptionUpdated

Our Bachelor's Degree Scheme offers the flexibility to choose from seven majors through a single application, giving students ample time to explore these disciplines and navigate their academic interests.

All admitted students will embark on a Common Year One curriculum. Towards the end of year one, students of this Bachelor’s Degree Scheme can secure entry into one of the following departmental schemes/programmes through a ranking assessment, which considers a combination of entrance qualification score, Year One GPA, and interview performance:
• BSc (Hons) Scheme in Applied Mathematics and Finance Analytics (JS3220)
• BSc (Hons) in Applied Mathematics
• BSc (Hons) in Investment Science and Finance Analytics
• BSc (Hons) in Quantitative Finance and FinTech
• BSc (Hons) Scheme in Computing and AI (JS3868)
• BSc (Hons) in Computer Science
• BSc (Hons) in Enterprise Information Systems
• BSc (Hons) Scheme in Data Science and Artificial Intelligence (JS3223)
• BSc (Hons) in Artificial Intelligence (Subject to approval)
• BSc (Hons) in Artificial Intelligence with Financial Technology
• BSc (Hons) in Data Science and Analytics

Students may also choose to pursue a Double Major. This option gives students the chance to broaden their academic experience and earn two awards when they graduate. Admission to the Double Major is competitive and requires a different credit requirement for graduation.

• The BSc (Hons) in Computer Science [計算機科學(榮譽)理學士] aims to equip graduates with solid computing foundations in areas such as programming, computational thinking, data structures and algorithms, and become highly competent in software development for virtually all sectors.

• The BSc (Hons) in Enterprise Information Systems [企業信息管理(榮譽)理學士] aims to provide graduates with strong competence in investigating business systems, identifying improvement options and bridging the needs of business with the use of IT.

Admission to the Double Major is competitive and requires a different credit requirement for graduation.

d: Short DescriptionUpdated

This undergraduate programme is designed to nurture future-ready professionals in the fields of Data Science and Analytics, Artificial Intelligence (AI), and AI with Financial Technology. It equips students with a strong foundation in computing, data science, AI and relevant domain knowledge, while emphasizing the development of intelligent systems, analytical thinking, and innovative problem-solving skills across different areas. With the introduction of the new BSc (Hons) in Artificial Intelligence (subject to approval), students can also pursue a focused pathway that builds strong core AI capabilities and supports innovation across multiple industries.

Students will gain comprehensive knowledge in areas such as artificial intelligence, machine learning, data analytics, statistical modelling, and financial systems. The curriculum is structured to ensure that graduates are capable of developing advanced AI solutions, extracting insights from complex data, and applying their knowledge to real-world domains including finance and beyond, while adapting to the rapidly evolving technological and economic landscape. This balanced curriculum supports both specialised and broad career pathways.

All admitted students will begin with a Common Year One curriculum, which provides broad exposure to computing and mathematical sciences. Towards the end of the first year, students may choose to continue with their original programme or apply to switch to another within the Faculty of Computer and Mathematical Sciences. Selection for programme transfer is competitive and based on a combination of entrance qualification scores, Year One GPA, and interview performance.

This programme is ideal for students who aspire to become data scientists, financial technologists, AI engineers, or analytics professionals, and who are passionate about leveraging technology to drive innovation and impact in finance, business, and society.
JS3223.r: • Students will be awarded one of the following awards upon successful completion of the graduation requirements of the programme concerned: • BSc (Hons) in Artificial Intelligence (Subject to approval) • BSc (Hons) in Artificial Intelligence with Financial Technology • BSc (Hons) in Data Science and Analytics • Students may enrol in any awards without being subject to further assessment. • The option of a Secondary Major in Innovation and Entrepreneurship (IE) is available to the students of BSc (Hons) in Data Science and Analytics. Admission to the Secondary Major is competitive and is subject to a different credit requirement for graduation. • Students may also choose to pursue a Double Major, adding a Second Major from another department within the Faculty of Computer and Mathematical Sciences to their studies. This option gives students the chance to broaden their academic experience and earn two awards when they graduate. Admission to the Double Major is competitive and requires a different credit requirement for graduation.

該本科課程旨在培養數據科學與分析、人工智慧（AI）以及人工智慧與金融科技領域的未來專業人士。它為學生提供計算、數據科學、人工智慧和相關領域知識的堅實基礎，同時強調不同領域的智慧系統、分析思維和創新解決問題的能力的發展。隨著新的人工智慧（榮譽）理學士課程​​（待批准）的推出，學生還可以追求一條有針對性的途徑，建立強大的核心人工智慧能力並支援跨多個行業的創新。
學生將獲得人工智慧、機器學習、數據分析、統計建模和金融系統等領域的全面知識。課程的結構是為了確保畢業生能夠開發先進的人工智慧解決方案，從複雜的數據中提取見解，並將他們的知識應用到包括金融及其他領域在內的現實世界領域，同時適應快速發展的技術和經濟格局。這種平衡的課程支持專業和廣泛的職業道路。
所有被錄取的學生都將從一年級通用課程開始，該課程提供對計算和數學科學的廣泛接觸。在第一學年結束時，學生可以選擇繼續原來的課程或申請轉至電腦和數學科學學院的另一個課程。轉學計畫的選拔是競爭性的，綜合考慮入學資格分數、一年級 GPA 和麵試表現。
該專案非常適合那些渴望成為資料科學家、金融技術專家、人工智慧工程師或分析專業人員，以及熱衷於利用技術推動金融、商業和社會創新和影響的學生。
JS3223.zr: • 成功完成相關課程的畢業要求後，學生將獲得以下獎項之一： • 人工智慧（榮譽）理學學士（待批准） • 人工智慧與金融科技（榮譽）理學學士 • 資料科學與分析（榮譽）理學學士 • 學生可以報名參加任何獎項，無需接受進一步評估。 • 資料科學與分析（榮譽）理學士的學生可以選擇創新與創業（IE）輔修。中學專業的錄取具有競爭性，並且畢業時有不同的學分要求。 • 學生也可以選擇攻讀雙專業，在其學習中添加電腦和數學科學學院另一個系的第二專業。此選項使學生有機會擴大學術經驗並在畢業時獲得兩項獎項。雙主修的入學競爭非常激烈，並且需要不同的畢業學分要求。

d: Short DescriptionUpdated

The BA (Hons) in Design in the School of Design is Hong Kong’s premier four-year undergraduate design scheme. The scheme educates innovative forward-thinking designers who are able to give shape and invent desirable futures relevant for a rapidly changing society. The scheme offers an extensive range of different Design Specialisms that cater for tomorrow’s designers: Advertising Design, Environmental Design, Immersive Media and Game Design, Information Design, Interaction Design, Interior Design, Product Design, Service Design, and Social Design.
JS3569.r: • Students will be awarded one of the following degrees upon successful completion of the graduation requirements of the programme concerned: • BA (Hons) in Design (Advertising Design) • BA (Hons) in Design (Environmental Design) • BA (Hons) in Design (Immersive Media and Game Design) • BA (Hons) in Design (Information Design) • BA (Hons) in Design (Interaction Design) • BA (Hons) in Design (Interior Design) • BA (Hons) in Design (Product Design) • BA (Hons) in Design (Service Design) • BA (Hons) in Design (Social Design) • Students are subject to further assessment criteria, such as their choice, portfolio evaluation, interview performance, GPA and individual subject results for their degree selection at the end of Year One. • The option of a Secondary Major in Innovation and Entrepreneurship (IE) is available to students in the BA (Hons) Scheme in Design. • The option of a Secondary Major in AI and Data Analytics (AIDA) is available to students enrolled in the BA (Hons) in Design (Product Design) or the BA (Hons) in Design (Interaction Design) programme. • Admission to a Secondary Major is on a competitive basis and subject to different credit requirements for graduation.

設計學院的設計（榮譽）文學士學位課程是香港首屈一指的四年製本科設計課程。該計劃培養具有創新思維的前瞻性設計師，他們能夠塑造和發明與快速變化的社會相關的理想未來。該計劃提供了廣泛的不同設計專業，以滿足未來設計師的需求：廣告設計、環境設計、沉浸式媒體和遊戲設計、資訊設計、互動設計、室內設計、產品設計、服務設計和社交設計。
JS3569.zr: • 成功完成相關課程的畢業要求後，學生將獲得以下學位之一： • 設計（廣告設計）（榮譽）文學學士 • 設計（環境設計）（榮譽）文學學士 • 設計（沉浸式媒體與遊戲設計）（榮譽）文學學士 • 設計（資訊設計）（榮譽）文學學士 • 設計（榮譽設計）（榮譽）文學學士 • 設計（資訊設計）（榮譽）文學學士 • 設計（文學設計）（設計）文學學士 • 文學設計）（設計（室內設計）（榮譽）文學學士設計（產品設計） • 設計（服務設計）（榮譽）文學士 • 設計（社會設計）（榮譽）文學士 • 學生需接受進一步的評估標準，例如他們的選擇、作品集評估、面試表現、GPA 和第一年末學位選擇的個人科目成績。 • 設計學（榮譽）文學學士計劃的學生可以選擇創新與創業（IE）輔助專業。 • 就讀設計（榮譽）文學士（產品設計）或設計（互動設計）文學士（榮譽）課程的學生可以選擇人工智慧和資料分析（AIDA）輔助專業。 • 次要專業的入學是在競爭的基礎上進行的，並且畢業時有不同的學分要求。

d: The BEng (Hons) Scheme in Electrical Engineering consists of the following degrees. It aims to give students the flexibility to decide on the final degree in their study.

• BEng (Hons) in Electrical Engineering is one of the premier electrical engineering degree programmes in Hong Kong that provides unique and up-to-date education in electrical power and energy. The curriculum is designed to give a balanced treatment of university core requirements, electrical engineering fundamentals, advanced and specialist topics, and non-technical subjects such as management.

• BEng (Hons) in Transportation Systems Engineering is unique in Hong Kong, providing students with interdisciplinary knowledge and perspectives in modern transportation systems and a direct career path into the high-growth transportation industry and related sectors.

All admitted students will embark on a Common Year One curriculum. Towards the end of year one, students can decide whether to continue with their initial choice or switch to another choice within the Faculty of Engineering. Those who wish to change to another choice need to join a competitive process through a ranking assessment, which considers a combination of entrance qualification score, Year One GPA, and interview performance.
JS3170.r: • Students will gain one of the following awards upon successful completion of the graduation requirements of the programme concerned: • BEng (Hons) in Electrical Engineering 電機工程學(榮譽)工學士 • BEng (Hons) in Transportation Systems Engineering 運輸系統工程學(榮譽)工學士 • Students are subject to further assessment criteria to enrol in one of the honours degree programmes during Semester 2 of Year One. This assessment considers students’ preferences, GPA, and interview performance. • The option of Secondary Major in Artificial Intelligence and Data Analytics is available to students of BEng (Hons) in Electrical Engineering. Admission to the Secondary Major is on a competitive basis and subject to a different credit requirement for graduation. • Students may pursue a Minor in a different discipline. • All information is subject to change without notice. Entry Scholarship • To give encouragement and recognition to HKDSE students with outstanding academic performance, and to support their studies at The Hong Kong Polytechnic University (PolyU), the Department of Electrical and Electronic Engineering (EEE) at PolyU provide the Departmental Entry Academic Scholarships for JUPAS applicants*. Details of the scholarship will be announced in due course. * Subject to approval
z: 電機工程（榮譽）工學士計劃包含以下學位。它旨在讓學生靈活地決定其學習的最終學位。
• 電機工程（榮譽）工學士是香港首屈一指的電機工程學位課程之一，提供獨特且最新的電力和能源教育。本課程旨在均衡處理大學核心要求、電機工程基礎、高級和專業主題以及管理等非技術科目。
• 交通系統工程（榮譽）工學士課程在香港獨一無二，為學生提供現代交通系統的跨學科知識和視角，以及進入高成長交通產業及相關領域的直接職業道路。
所有被錄取的學生將開始共同一年級課程。在第一學年結束時，學生可以決定是繼續他們最初的選擇還是轉向工程學院內的另一個選擇。那些希望改變其他選擇的人需要透過排名評估來參加競爭過程，排名評估會綜合考慮入學資格分數、一年級 GPA 和麵試表現。
JS3170.zr: • 成功完成相關課程的畢業要求後，學生將獲得以下其中一項獎勵： • 電機工程（榮譽）工學士 電機工程學（榮譽）工學士 • 運輸系統工程學（榮譽）工學士（榮譽）工學士 • 學生須符合進一步的評估標準，才能在第一年第二學期入讀其中一項榮譽學位課程。該評估考慮了學生的偏好、GPA 和麵試表現。 • 電機工程（榮譽）工學士的學生可以選擇人工智慧和數據分析輔助專業。中學專業的入學是在競爭的基礎上進行的，並且畢業時有不同的學分要求。 • 學生可以輔修不同學科。 • 所有資訊如有更改，恕不另行通知。入學獎學金 • 為鼓勵及表揚成績優異的香港中學文憑考試學生，並支持他們在香港理工大學（理大）的學業，理大電機及電子工程學係為聯招申請者提供系入學學術獎學金*。獎學金詳情將適時公佈。 * 須經批准

d: The Bachelor’s Degree Scheme in Engineering provides one entry in application for a choice of 16 Majors, offering students the time and flexibility to explore these disciplinary fields and navigate their academic interests.

Students of the Scheme will start with a Common Year One curriculum. Towards the end of year one, students of this Scheme can choose their preferred departmental scheme / programme within the Faculty of Engineering through a ranking assessment.
JS3005.r: Students will gain one of the following awards upon successful completion of the programme: • BEng (Hons) in Aeronautical Engineering • BEng (Hons) in Air Transport Engineering • BSc (Hons) in Biomedical Engineering • BSc (Hons) in Sports Science and Technology • BEng (Hons) in Electrical Engineering • BEng (Hons) in Transportation Systems Engineering • BEng (Hons) in Electronic Systems and Internet-of-things • BSc (Hons) in Artificial Intelligence and Information Engineering • BSc (Hons) in Information Security • BEng (Hons) in Product Innovation with Marketing • BEng (Hons) in Smart Manufacturing • BSc (Hons) in Intelligent Supply Chain • BSc (Hons) in Engineering Management with Data Analytics • BSc (Hons) in Aviation Operations and Systems • BEng (Hons) in Intelligent Robotics Engineering • BEng (Hons) in Mechanical Engineering
z: 工程學士學位課程提供 16 個專業選擇的一次申請，為學生提供時間和靈活性來探索這些學科領域並培養他們的學術興趣。
該計劃的學生將從通用一年級課程開始。在第一學年結束時，該計劃的學生可以透過排名評估在工程學院內選擇自己喜歡的部門計劃/課程。
JS3005.zr: 成功完成課程後，學生將獲得以下獎項之一： • 航空工程（榮譽）工學士 • 航空運輸工程（榮譽）工學士 • 生物醫學工程（榮譽）理學學士 • 體育科學與技術（榮譽）理學士 • 電機工程（榮譽）工學士 • 交通系統工程（榮譽）工學士 • 榮譽系統和軟件（榮譽）學學士產品創新與行銷（榮譽）學士學位 • 智慧製造（榮譽）學士學位 • 智慧供應鏈（榮譽）學士學位 • 資料分析工程管理（榮譽）學士學位 • 航空營運與系統（榮譽）學士學位 • 智慧機器人工程（榮譽）學士學位 • 機械工程（榮譽）學士學位

d: The Bachelor of Arts (Honours) in English and Applied Linguistics (BAEAL) aims to equip graduates with the abilities and attributes necessary to become competent English language professionals and responsible global citizens in the 21st century. The programme aims to produce graduates with (a) a high level of proficiency in English; (b) a good understanding of the theoretical disciplines underlying applied English language studies and integrated language use; and (c) a strong ability to apply their knowledge and general linguistic skills in a variety of professional communication contexts.

All admitted students will embark on a Common Year One curriculum. Towards the end of year one, students can decide whether to continue with their initial choice or switch to another choice within the Faculty. Those who wish to change to another choice need to join a competitive process through a ranking assessment, which considers a combination of entrance qualification score, Year One GPA, and interview performance.
JS3240.r: • Students will be awarded the following degree upon completion of the graduation requirements: • BA (Hons) in English and Applied Linguistics • Students studying towards this degree have the option of a Secondary Major in AI and Data Analytics. Admission to this Secondary Major is on a competitive basis and subject to different credit requirements for graduation.
z: 英語和應用語言學文學士（榮譽）學位 (BAEAL) 旨在讓畢業生具備成為 21 世紀有能力的英語專業人士和負責任的全球公民所需的能力和素質。該計劃旨在培養具有（a）高水平英語能力的畢業生； (b) 對應用英語語言研究和綜合語言使用的理論學科有很好的理解； (c) 在各種專業溝通環境中應用知識和一般語言技能的強大能力。
所有被錄取的學生將開始共同一年級課程。在第一學年結束時，學生可以決定是繼續他們最初的選擇還是轉向學院內的另一個選擇。那些希望改變其他選擇的人需要透過排名評估來參加競爭過程，排名評估會綜合考慮入學資格分數、一年級 GPA 和麵試表現。
JS3240.zr: • 完成畢業要求後，學生將獲得以下學位： • 英語和應用語言學（榮譽）文學士 • 攻讀該學位的學生可以選擇人工智慧和數據分析第二專業。這個二級專業的入學是在競爭的基礎上進行的，並且畢業時需要滿足不同的學分要求。

d: This BEng (Hons) in Environmental Engineering and Sustainable Development (EESD) is a cutting-edge programme that blends environmental engineering, environmental science, and carbon neutrality technologies into practices. Graduates will be equipped with new generation knowledge for solving air, water, soil, and waste problems. They will also play a key role in shaping policies toward circular economies and environmental impact assessments.

The programme is fully accredited by The Hong Kong Institution of Engineers (HKIE). This means that graduates are eligible for Corporate Membership of HKIE after completing the necessary training and can participate in HKIE's Scheme A training in the Environmental disciplines.

All admitted students will embark on a Common Year One curriculum. Towards the end of year one, students can decide whether to continue with their initial choice or switch to another choice within the Faculty. Those who wish to change to another choice need to join a competitive process through a ranking assessment, which considers a combination of entrance qualification score, Year One GPA, and interview performance.
JS3375.r: Entry Scholarship • To recognise applicants with outstanding academic performance in the HKDSE, the Department will grant entry scholarships to eligible HKDSE students admitted to its programmes via JUPAS. The award criteria for the scholarship, listed in this information sheet, are subject to change and will be announced on the same website in due course.
z: 該環境工程與永續發展（EESD）榮譽學士學位課程是一門前沿課程，將環境工程、環境科學和碳中和技術融入實踐。畢業生將具備解決空氣、水、土壤和廢棄物問題的新一代知識。他們還將在製定循環經濟政策和環境影響評估方面發揮關鍵作用。
本課程獲得香港工程師學會（HKIE）的全面認可。這意味著畢業生在完成必要的培訓後就有資格成為香港工程師學會的企業會員，並且可以參加香港工程師學會環境學科的A計畫培訓。
所有被錄取的學生將開始共同一年級課程。在第一學年結束時，學生可以決定是繼續他們最初的選擇還是轉向學院內的另一個選擇。那些希望改變其他選擇的人需要透過排名評估來參加競爭過程，排名評估會綜合考慮入學資格分數、一年級 GPA 和麵試表現。
JS3375.zr: 入學獎學金 • 為表揚在香港中學文憑考試中表現優異的申請者，本系會頒發入學獎學金給合資格經聯招取錄的香港中學文憑考試學生。本資訊表中列出的獎學金授予標準可能會發生變化，並將適時在同一網站上公佈。

d: The overall aim of the programme is to train competent professionals for the fashion business, equipping them to work in textiles, apparel, retailing, design and related organisations. Graduates play an active role in the development of the global fashion and textiles industry in local and overseas markets. In addition to cultivating students’ professional competencies, the programme enhances their other essential competencies, such as innovation, digital fashion, entrepreneurship, social media marketing and business analytics. This programme expands graduates’ skillsets to meet the needs of today’s business environment. They excel in leadership, teamwork, healthy lifestyle practices and lifelong learning; they become trend leaders, innovators, critical thinkers, and creative problem solvers; and they possess effective communication and interpersonal skills. They are biliterate and trilingual, and they serve as informed and ethical leaders who promote social and national responsibility, engage in local and international affairs, act as responsible global citizens and exhibit cultural and aesthetic appreciation with a global perspective.
JS3050.r: • Students will be awarded one of the following degrees upon successful completion of the programme’s graduation requirements. • BA (Hons) in Fashion (Fashion Design) • BA (Hons) in Fashion (Knitwear Design) • BA (Hons) in Fashion (Contour Fashion and Activewear) • BA (Hons) in Fashion (Fashion Business) • BA (Hons) in Fashion (Fashion Innovation and Technology) • Students select a specialism at the end of their Year One. Admission to a specialism is subject to assessment criteria including students’ preferences, GPA and interview performance. • Students opting not to be streamed into any specialism will obtain a BA (Hons) in Fashion. Entry Scholarship and Additional Scholarships • To recognise the outstanding academic performance of HKDSE students, the School will grant entry scholarships to eligible HKDSE students admitted to the scheme via JUPAS. Apart from the entry scholarships, additional scholarships may be available. Please refer to the information sheet for details.
z: 該計劃的總體目標是為時尚產業培訓有能力的專業人士，使他們能夠在紡織、服裝、零售、設計和相關組織中工作。畢業生在本地和海外市場的全球時尚和紡織業的發展中發揮積極作用。除了培養學生的專業能力外，該計劃還增強了他們的其他基本能力，例如創新、數位時尚、創業、社交媒體行銷和商業分析。該計劃擴展了畢業生的技能，以滿足當今商業環境的需求。他們在領導力、團隊合作、健康生活方式和終身學習方面表現出色；他們成為潮流領導者、創新者、批判性思考者和創造性的問題解決者；他們擁有有效的溝通和人際交往能力。他們具有雙文、三語能力，是見多識廣、有道德的領導者，促進社會和國家責任，參與當地和國際事務，充當負責任的全球公民，並以全球視角展現文化和美學鑑賞力。
JS3050.zr: • 成功完成課程畢業要求後，學生將獲得以下學位之一。 • 時尚學（榮譽）文學士（時裝設計） • 時裝學（榮譽）文學士（針織品設計） • 時尚（輪廓時裝和運動服）（榮譽）文學士 • 時尚（時尚商業）（榮譽）文學士 • 時尚（時尚創新與技術）文學士（榮譽） • 學生在第一年結束時選擇專業。專業錄取取決於評估標準，包括學生的偏好、GPA 和麵試表現。 • 選擇不分流進入任何專業的學生將獲得時尚（榮譽）學士學位。入學獎學金及額外獎學金 • 為表揚香港中學文憑考試學生的優異學術表現，學院將向合資格經聯招取錄的香港中學文憑考試學生頒發入學獎學金。除了入學獎學金外，還可能提供其他獎學金。詳情請參閱資訊表。

d: The following programmes are offered under the Scheme:
BSc (Hons) in Food Safety and Technology

This programme aim to foster graduates to become food technologists, food innovators and food safety officers. Our programme has an industry-oriented curriculum design which equips students with scientific and engineering skills to understand, characterize and manipulate food for various applications. Diverse and intricate training develop students into all-round competitive graduates bench-marking international programmes in terms of professional knowledge, communication skills, intellectual curiosity and social responsibility. The programme emphasizes analytical and critical thinking abilities, creativity, problem-solving skills, teamwork and global outlook.
BSc (Hons) in Human Nutrition and Health / BSc (Hons) in Human Nutrition and Health (Nutrition in Practice)

We aim to nurture graduates who are capable of integrating scientific principles of nutrition into practical applications in various community and food service settings, thereby enhancing public health and well-being. Our programme is an application-orientated programme which equips students with a comprehensive understanding of human nutrition and its pivotal role in promoting health and preventing diseases. By fostering a deep understanding of the biochemical, physiological and societal roles of nutrients and dietary patterns in maintaining health, we develop students for assessing community nutritional needs, planning and implementing nutrition programmes, and evaluating their outcomes.

All admitted students will embark on a Common Year One curriculum. Towards the end of year one, students may choose to pursue either Food Safety and Technology or Human Nutrition and Health. Alternatively, they may apply to switch to other majors within the Faculty of Science. Students wishing to change to other majors need to join a competitive process through a ranking assessment, which considers a combination of entrance qualification score, Year One GPA, and interview performance.
JS3255.r: Students will be awarded either one of the following awards upon successful completion of all graduation requirements: • BSc (Hons) in Food Safety and Technology • BSc (Hons) in Human Nutrition and Health / BSc (Hons) in Human Nutrition and Health (Nutrition in Practice) Entry Scholarship • A departmental entry scholarship will be granted to students with high HKDSE achievements admitted via JUPAS. The award criteria for the scholarship are listed on the Departmental webpage.
z: 該計劃提供以下課程：
食品安全與技術（榮譽）理學士
該計畫旨在培養畢業生成為食品技術專家、食品創新者和食品安全官員。我們的課程採用以行業為導向的課程設計，使學生具備科學和工程技能，以了解、表徵和操縱食品以適應各種應用。多元化、精細化的培養，將學生培養成為在專業知識、溝通能力、求知欲、社會責任等方面對標國際計畫的全面、具有競爭力的畢業生。課程強調分析和批判性思考能力、創造力、解決問題的能力、團隊合作和全球視野。
人類營養與健康（榮譽）理學士 / 人類營養與健康（榮譽）理學士（營養實踐）
我們的目標是培養能夠將營養科學原理融入各種社區和食品服務環境的實際應用的畢業生，從而提高公眾健康和福祉。我們的課程是一個以應用為導向的課程，讓學生全面了解人類營養及其在促進健康和預防疾病方面的關鍵作用。透過培養對營養素和飲食模式在維持健康方面的生化、生理和社會作用的深入了解，我們培養學生評估社區營養需求、規劃和實施營養計劃以及評估其結果的能力。
所有被錄取的學生將開始共同一年級課程。在第一學年結束時，學生可以選擇攻讀食品安全與科技或人類營養與健康。或者，他們可以申請轉任至理學院內的其他專業。希望轉學到其他專業的學生需要透過排名評估參加競爭性流程，排名評估會綜合考慮入學資格分數、一年級 GPA 和麵試表現。
JS3255.zr: 成功完成所有畢業要求後，學生將獲頒以下其中一項獎項： • 食品安全及科技（榮譽）理學士學位 • 人類營養與健康（榮譽）理學士學位 / 人類營養與健康（營養實踐）理學士學位（榮譽）入學獎學金 • 透過聯招取錄的文憑試成績優異的學生，可獲頒系入學獎學金。獎學金的授予標準列在部門網頁上。

d: The BBA (Hons) Scheme in Global Business and Logistics, Aviation, Maritime and Supply Chain Management comprises the following awards. Students will be awarded one of the following awards upon successful completion of the graduation requirements of the programme concerned:
BBA (Hons) in Aviation Management and Finance

This programme equips students with a well-rounded business education with specialisation in aviation management and finance, an in-depth understanding of how airports, airlines, aircraft leasing companies, government agencies, regulators, and other groups of professionals, such as financial services firms and consultants, contribute to the functioning of aviation markets; and the necessary background required to become an integral part of the aviation industry.
BBA (Hons) in International Shipping and Transport Logistics

This programme provides a well-rounded business education, along with the opportunity to specialise in international shipping and logistics management. It enables students to acquire wide knowledge of maritime transport and logistics within a general broad framework of international transport and trade.

The programme fosters strong management skills in areas including communication and presentation, leadership and teamwork, problem solving and the effective use of information technology. Graduates are equipped with the skills necessary to understand and manage maritime organisations and personnel.
BBA (Hons) in Supply Chain Management and Analytics

Supply chain management focuses on how firms optimise resources in a logistics network that delivers value to end customers. As Hong Kong is a logistics and trading centre of global importance, supply chain management is of particular relevance to many businesses and industries. With the advancement of technological innovation and business analytics, the integration of management knowledge and analytical skills becomes essential for supply chain managers to make effective decisions.

This programme provides students with a well-rounded business education that specialises in supply chain management and analytics. The curriculum aims to develop students’ skills and knowledge in business and supply chain analytics, information technology and innovation, operations and cross-functional management, international business, and transport logistics to meet the current and future needs of logistics and supply chain related industries.
Dual Degree with Copenhagen Business School, Denmark
BBA (Hons) in Global Business and Logistics [PolyU]
BSc in International Business [CBS]

The Dual Degree Programme combines the strengths of the BBA in Global Business and Logistics with the BSc in International Business, offering a comprehensive education in international trade, supply chain management, and global business strategies. This programme equips students with critical skills in cross-cultural management, global marketing, and sustainable supply chain practices, alongside a deep understanding of the economic, cultural, and political factors influencing global business. Through theoretical studies, practical applications, and international exposure, graduates are prepared for successful careers in multinational corporations, logistics, consulting firms, and international organisations.

Copenhagen Business School (CBS) was established in 1917 by the Danish Society for the Advancement of Business Education and Research. Today, with 20,000 students and 1,500 employees, CBS is one of the largest business schools in Europe and one of the 8 Danish universities. It offers a wide range of undergraduate and graduate programmes within business, typically with an interdisciplinary and international focus. CBS is accredited by EQUIS (European Quality Improvement System), AMBA (Association of MBAs), as well as AACSB (Association to Advance Collegiate Schools of Business), thus making it one of the few schools worldwide to hold the triple-crown accreditation.

Students admitted to the programme will spend the first two years at PolyU, then final two years at CBS. Upon completion of the programme, students will be awarded two degrees in business, BBA (Hons) in Global Business and Logistics from PolyU, and BSc in International Business from CBS.

All admitted students embark on a Common Year One curriculum. After the first year of studies, students can decide whether to continue with their initial choice or switch to another choice within the Faculty. Those who wish to switch can choose their preferred departmental scheme/programme through a ranking assessment.
JS3070.r: • All students must complete a short work placement, either in the summer or during semester time. The Department provides assistance in finding suitable placements. • Students will be awarded one of the following awards upon successful completion of the graduation requirements of the programme concerned: • BBA (Hons) in Aviation Management and Finance • BBA (Hons) in International Shipping and Transport Logistics • BBA (Hons) in Supply Chain Management and Analytics • BBA (Hons) in Global Business and Logistics* *Dual Degree with the Copenhagen Business School, Denmark • The decision to admit a student to a major will be made by the Department based on the student’s choice, overall GPA of Year One study, and/or other criteria set out by the Department. Students will be asked to rank their major choices (from the most preferred one to the least) during the Semester 2 (probably before final examination) of their Year One study for the Department’s consideration and approval. For the dual degree programme, priority will be given to students admitted via JUPAS with outstanding HKDSE scores, i.e., 25 or above in any best 5 subjects (click here for an explanation).
z: 全球商業與物流、航空、海事和供應鏈管理 BBA（榮譽）計劃包括以下獎項。成功完成相關課程的畢業要求後，學生將獲得以下獎項之一：
航空管理與金融（榮譽）工商管理學士
該課程為學生提供全面的商業教育，專門從事航空管理和金融，深入了解機場、航空公司、飛機租賃公司、政府機構、監管機構和其他專業團體（例如金融服務公司和顧問）如何為航空市場的運作做出貢獻；以及成為航空業不可或缺的一部分所需的必要背景。
國際航運和運輸物流（榮譽）工商管理學士
該課程提供全面的商業教育，以及專門從事國際航運和物流管理的機會。它使學生能夠在國際運輸和貿易的總體框架內獲得廣泛的海運和物流知識。
該專案培養溝通和演示、領導力和團隊合作、解決問題和有效利用資訊科技等領域的強大管理技能。畢業生具備理解和管理海事組織和人員所需的技能。
供應鏈管理與分析（榮譽）工商管理學士
供應鏈管理重點在於企業如何優化物流網路中的資源，為最終客戶提供價值。由於香港是全球重要的物流及貿易中心，供應鏈管理對許多企業和產業尤其重要。隨著技術創新和商業分析的進步，管理知識和分析技能的整合對於供應鏈管理者做出有效決策至關重要。
該計畫為學生提供全面的商業教育，專門從事供應鏈管理和分析。該課程旨在培養學生在商業和供應鏈分析、資訊科技和創新、營運和跨職能管理、國際商務和運輸物流方面的技能和知識，以滿足物流和供應鏈相關行業當前和未來的需求。
丹麥哥本哈根商學院雙學位
全球商業及物流(榮譽)工商管理學士 [理大]
國際商務理學士 [CBS]
雙學位課程結合了全球商業和物流工商管理學士與國際商務理學學士的優勢，提供國際貿易、供應鏈管理和全球商業策略的全面教育。該課程為學生提供跨文化管理、全球行銷和永續供應鏈實踐的關鍵技能，同時深入了解影響全球商業的經濟、文化和政治因素。透過理論研究、實際應用和國際接觸，畢業生為在跨國公司、物流、顧問公司和國際組織中取得成功的職業生涯做好準備。
哥本哈根商學院（CBS）於1917年由丹麥商業教育與研究促進會成立。如今，CBS 擁有 20,000 名學生和 1,500 名員工，是歐洲最大的商學院之一，也是丹麥八所大學之一。它提供廣泛的商業本科和研究生課程，通常具有跨學科和國際重點。 CBS獲得EQUIS（歐洲品質改善系統）、AMBA（MBA協會）以及AACSB（高級商學院協會）的認證，使其成為全球少數獲得三冠王認證的學校之一。
入讀課程的學生將在理大度過前兩年，然後在哥倫比亞廣播公司度過最後兩年。完成課程後，學生將獲得兩個商業學位：理大全球商業及物流（榮譽）工商管理學士，以及哥倫比亞廣播公司國際商業理學士學位。
所有被錄取的學生都開始學習一年級通用課程。第一年的學習結束後，學生可以決定是繼續他們最初的選擇還是轉向學院內的另一個選擇。希望轉系的學生可以透過排名評估選擇自己喜歡的系所計畫/課程。
JS3070.zr: • 所有學生必須在夏季或學期期間完成短期工作實習。該部門為尋找合適的職位提供協助。 • 成功完成相關課程的畢業要求後，學生將獲得以下獎項之一： • 航空管理和金融學（榮譽）工商管理學士 • 國際航運和運輸物流（榮譽）工商管理學士 • 供應鏈管理和分析（榮譽）工商管理學士 • 全球商業和物流學士（榮譽）*學生將被要求在一年級學習的第二學期（可能在期末考之前）對他們的專業選擇進行排名（從最喜歡的到最不喜歡的），以供系裡考慮和批准。就雙學位課程而言，經聯招取錄並擁有香港中學文憑考試成績優異的學生，即任何最佳 5 科達 25 分或以上（請按此查看說明）。

d: The BSc (Hons) Scheme in Hotel and Tourism Management educates students about the business of hotel, smart tourism, and event and experience management. Its customer-service focus enables graduates to excel in the hotel, tourism, event and experience and the broader service industries. This multidisciplinary programme prepares students for careers at the management level in the hotel, tourism, event and experience, and broader service industries, either locally or internationally. Students learn to be customer-focused, analytical and independent, and at the same time develop communication and leadership skills. They also gain a global perspective to meet the growing challenges that are faced by the dynamic hotel, tourism, event and experience, and broader service industries.
JS3310.r: • Students will be awarded one of the following degrees upon successful completion of the graduation requirements of the programme: • BSc (Hons) in Hotel and Tourism Management (Hotel Management) • BSc (Hons) in Hotel and Tourism Management (Smart Tourism and Hospitality) • BSc (Hons) in Hotel and Tourism Management (Event and Experience Management) • BSc (Hons) in Hotel and Tourism Management with Secondary Major in AIDA • BSc (Hons) in Hotel and Tourism Management with Secondary Major in IE • (a) or (b) or (c) above (PolyU award) + BBA in Tourism and Hospitality Management (Modul University award) (for students enrolled on the Dual Degree Programme) • The decision to admit a student into a specific programme option will be made by the School based on the student’s choice, overall GPA in Year 1 and/or interview results. The students will be asked to rank their choices during the second semester of their Year 1 study for the School’s consideration and approval. • Admission into the secondary major is on a competitive basis and subject to different credit requirements for graduation. • Students who have selected either one of the two secondary major options, but are unable to complete it, will be awarded with the award title BSc (Hons) in Hotel and Tourism Management. • For JUPAS applicants with HKDSE scores which are at least 10% or higher than the average score of the last admission exercise, they can be given pre-guaranteed entry into an individual specialism ((a) or (b) or (c) above).
z: 酒店和旅遊管理（榮譽）理學士學位課程向學生傳授酒店業務、智慧旅遊以及活動和體驗管理方面的知識。其以客戶服務為重點，使畢業生能夠在酒店、旅遊、活動和體驗以及更廣泛的服務行業中脫穎而出。這個多學科計畫為學生在酒店、旅遊、活動和體驗以及更廣泛的本地或國際服務行業的管理級別職業做好準備。學生學會以客戶為中心、善於分析和獨立，同時培養溝通和領導技能。他們還獲得了全球視野，以應對充滿活力的酒店、旅遊業、活動和體驗以及更廣泛的服務業所面臨的日益增長的挑戰。
JS3310.zr: • 成功完成課程畢業要求後，學生將獲得以下學位之一： • 酒店與旅遊管理（酒店管理）理學學士（榮譽） • 酒店與旅遊管理（智慧旅遊與酒店管理）（榮譽）理學學士 • 酒店與旅遊管理（活動與體驗管理）（榮譽）理學學士 • 酒店與旅遊管理（榮譽）理學士，副修士，副修士，副修士），副修士（上述管理） 助理管理學士，副修士（上述管理）。 (c)（理大獎）+ 旅遊及飯店管理工商管理學士（Modul 大學獎）（適用於就讀雙學位課程的學生） • 學校將根據學生的選擇、第一年的總 GPA 和/或面試結果來決定是否錄取學生進入特定課程選項。學生將被要求在一年級學習的第二學期對他們的選擇進行排名，以供學校考慮和批准。 • 進入第二專業是在競爭的基礎上進行的，並且畢業時有不同的學分要求。 • 選擇兩個次要專業之一但無法完成的學生將獲得酒店和旅遊管理理學學士（榮譽）稱號。• 若聯招申請者的香港中學文憑考試成績較上次入學平均成績至少高出 10% 或以上，可預先保證入讀個別專業（上述 (a) 或 (b) 或 (c)）。

d: At PolyU, innovation and technology drive an academic environment fostering national pride, social responsibility, and a global mindset. Our Bachelor's Degree Scheme offers students the time and flexibility to explore various fields related to applied linguistics/ Chinese history and culture/ communication/ language sciences and analytics/ linguistics/ speech therapy/ translation/ interpreting, helping them make informed decisions about their preferred programme towards the end of their first year of studies and prepare for professional careers. All admitted students will embark on a Common Year One curriculum. Towards the end of year one, students can choose their preferred departmental programme through a ranking assessment, which considers a combination of entrance qualification score, Year One GPA, and interview performance.
JS3007.r: • Our Bachelor's Degree Scheme provides one entry in application for a choice of 4 Majors, offering students the time and flexibility to explore these disciplinary fields and navigate their academic interests. • The Bachelor's Degree Scheme in Humanities offers students the time and flexibility to explore various fields offered by the Faculty of Humanities. In Year One, which is common to all four Majors, students can get a taste of the subjects offered before enrolling in one of the Majors, as follows: • BA (Hons) in Chinese History and Culture (JS3320) • BA (Hons) in English and Applied Linguistics (JS3240) • BSc (Hons) in Language Science and Technology (JS3243) • BSc (Hons) in Speech Therapy (JS3242)
z: 在理大，創新和科技推動學術環境培養民族自豪感、社會責任感和全球思維。我們的學士學位課程為學生提供時間和靈活性，探索與應用語言學/中國歷史文化/傳播/語言科學與分析/語言學/言語治療/翻譯/口譯相關的各個領域，幫助他們在第一年學習結束時就自己喜歡的課程做出明智的決定，並為職業生涯做好準備。所有被錄取的學生將開始共同一年級課程。在第一學年結束時，學生可以透過排名評估來選擇自己喜歡的系所課程，排名評估會綜合考慮入學資格分數、一年級 GPA 和麵試表現。
JS3007.zr: • 我們的學士學位課程提供 4 個專業選擇的一次申請，為學生提供時間和靈活性來探索這些學科領域並培養他們的學術興趣。 • 人文學士學位課程為學生提供時間和靈活性來探索人文學院提供的各個領域。在所有四個專業共有的第一年，學生可以在註冊其中一個專業之前先體驗一下所提供的科目，如下： • 中國歷史和文化（榮譽）文學士（JS3320） • 英語和應用語言學（榮譽）文學士（JS3240） • 語言科學與技術（榮譽）理學學士（JS3243） • 語言治療學（榮譽）理學學士（JS3243） • 語言治療學（榮譽）理學學士（JS3243） • 語言治療（榮譽）理學學士（JS3243）

d: We are living in a smart era in which many of our daily decision-making processes are based on the collection, processing, analysis, and interpretation of a large amount of data and information. The Scheme encompasses three programmes that are aimed at training professionals who are interested to work in the following three inter-related areas: (1) electronic systems and Internet of Things; (2) artificial intelligence and information engineering; and (3) information security. Depending on their own areas of interest, students admitted into the Scheme are allowed to choose to specialise in one of these three areas.

All admitted students will embark on a Common Year One curriculum. Towards the end of year one, students can decide whether to continue with their initial choice or switch to another choice within the Faculty of Engineering. Those who wish to change to another choice need to join a competitive process through a ranking assessment, which considers a combination of entrance qualification score, Year One GPA, and interview performance.
JS3180.r: • Students will gain one of the following awards upon successful completion of the graduation requirements of the programme concerned: • BEng (Hons) in Electronic Systems and Internet-of-Things 電子系統及物聯網(榮譽)工學士 • BSc (Hons) in Artificial Intelligence and Information Engineering 人工智能及資訊工程學(榮譽)理學士 • BSc (Hons) in Information Security 資訊安全(榮譽)理學士 • Students are allowed to enrol in any programme without being subject to further assessment. • The option of a Secondary Major in Artificial Intelligence and Data Analytics (AIDA) is available to students of BEng (Hons) in Electronic Systems and Internet-of-Things. Admission to the Secondary Major is on a competitive basis and subject to a different credit requirement for graduation. • Students may pursue a Minor in a different discipline. • All information is subject to change without notice. Entry Scholarship • To give encouragement and recognition to HKDSE students with outstanding academic performance and to support their studies at The Hong Kong Polytechnic University (PolyU), the Department of Electrical and Electronic Engineering (EEE) at PolyU provides Departmental Entry Academic Scholarships for JUPAS applicants*. Details of the scholarship will be announced in due course. * Subject to approval
z: 我們生活在一個智慧時代，我們的許多日常決策過程都是基於大量數據和資訊的收集、處理、分析和解釋。該計劃包括三個項目，旨在培訓有興趣在以下三個相互關聯的領域工作的專業人員：（1）電子系統和物聯網；（二） 人工智慧與資訊工程； (3)資訊安全。根據自己的興趣領域，入讀該計劃的學生可以選擇專攻這三個領域之一。
所有被錄取的學生將開始共同一年級課程。在第一學年結束時，學生可以決定是繼續他們最初的選擇還是轉向工程學院內的另一個選擇。那些希望改變其他選擇的人需要透過排名評估來參加競爭過程，排名評估會綜合考慮入學資格分數、一年級 GPA 和麵試表現。
JS3180.zr: • 成功完成相關課程的畢業要求後，學生將獲得以下其中一項獎勵： • 電子系統及物聯網（榮譽）工學士（榮譽）電子系統及物聯網（榮譽）工學士 • 人工智慧與資訊工程（榮譽）理學士人工智慧及資訊工程學（榮譽）理學士 • 資訊安全（榮譽）理學士 資訊安全（榮譽）（人工智慧）/資訊• 電子系統和物聯網（榮譽）工學士的學生可以選擇人工智慧和數據分析（AIDA）輔助專業。中學專業的入學是在競爭的基礎上進行的，並且畢業時有不同的學分要求。 • 學生可以輔修不同學科。 • 所有資訊如有更改，恕不另行通知。入學獎學金 • 為鼓勵及表揚成績優異的香港中學文憑考試學生，並支持他們在香港理工大學（理大）的學業，理大電機及電子工程系為聯招申請者提供系入學學術獎學金*。獎學金詳情將適時公佈。 * 須經批准

d: To meet the needs of Hong Kong Society in enhancing its competitiveness in managing modern supply chain operations, technological and IT related enterprises in a global environment, this scheme has been developed to prepare a new generation of supply chain engineers and business analyst. This scheme provides comprehensive training of data analytics skills for supply chain and enterprise activities in the areas of business processes, information flows, organisational structure, logistics systems, supply chain and operations management. It also equips graduates with the essential management and business skills that are critical for the effective design, planning and efficient operation of enterprises under today's modern supply chain and business environment.

All admitted students will embark on a Common Year One curriculum. Towards the end of year one, students can decide whether to continue with their initial choice or switch to another choice within the Faculty of Engineering. Those who wish to change to another choice need to join a competitive process through a ranking assessment, which considers a combination of entrance qualification score, Year One GPA, and interview performance.
JS3237.r: • All admitted students will embark on a Common Year One curriculum within the Faculty of Engineering and will study a common curriculum for this scheme in the second year. Students must select one of the three honours degree awards no later than the end of the second semester of Year 2. • Students will be awarded one of the following awards upon successful completion of the graduation requirements of the programme concerned: • BSc (Hons) in Intelligent Supply Chain • BSc (Hons) in Engineering Management with Data Analytics • BSc (Hons) in Aviation Operations and Systems • Students are allowed to enrol in any awards without being subject to further assessment. • The option of Secondary Major in Artificial Intelligence and Data Analytics (AIDA) is available to students of BSc (Hons) in Intelligent Supply Chain. Admission to a Secondary Major is on a competitive basis and is subject to a different credit requirement for graduation. Entry Scholarship • To recognise the outstanding academic performance of HKDSE students, the department will grant entry scholarship to eligible HKDSE students admitted to the scheme via JUPAS. The award criteria for the scholarship are shown on https://www.polyu.edu.hk/ise/scholarships. They are subject to change and will be announced on the department website in due course.
z: 為滿足香港學會提昇在全球環境下管理現代供應鏈運作、科技及資訊科技相關企業的競爭力的需要，本計劃旨在培養新一代供應鏈工程師及業務分析師。該計劃為供應鏈和企業活動提供業務流程、資訊流、組織結構、物流系統、供應鏈和營運管理等領域的數據分析技能的全面培訓。它還為畢業生提供基本的管理和商業技能，這些技能對於當今現代供應鏈和商業環境下企業的有效設計、規劃和高效運營至關重要。
所有被錄取的學生將開始共同一年級課程。在第一學年結束時，學生可以決定是繼續他們最初的選擇還是轉向工程學院內的另一個選擇。那些希望改變其他選擇的人需要透過排名評估來參加競爭過程，排名評估會綜合考慮入學資格分數、一年級 GPA 和麵試表現。
JS3237.zr: • 所有被錄取的學生將開始在工程學院學習一年級通用課程，並在第二年學習該計劃的通用課程。學生必須在第二年第二學期結束前選擇三個榮譽學位之一。 • 成功完成相關課程的畢業要求後，學生將獲得以下獎項之一： • 智慧供應鏈（榮譽）理學學士 • 數據分析工程管理（榮譽）理學學士 • 航空運營和系統（榮譽）理學學士 • 學生可以註冊任何獎項，無需接受進一步評估。 • 智慧供應鏈（榮譽）理學士學位的學生可以選擇人工智慧和數據分析（AIDA）輔助專業。次要專業的入學是在競爭的基礎上進行的，並且畢業時有不同的學分要求。入學獎學金 • 為表揚香港中學文憑考試學生的優異學業表現，學系會向經聯招取錄的合資格香港中學文憑考試學生頒發入學獎學金。獎學金的授予標準請參閱https://www.polyu.edu.hk/ise/scholarships。它們可能會發生變化，並將在適當的時候在部門網站上公佈。

d: The programme aims to provide a unique educational opportunity for top-performing undergraduate students, offering them flexible learning pathways and curriculum options, personalised coaching and in-depth mentorship. It aims to nurture outstanding individuals, allowing them to excel academically across various disciplines with guaranteed outside-classroom and non-local learning opportunities. The initiative encourages an innovative and interest-driven approach to education and is specifically designed for high-achieving students, including those in Manpower-planned (MPP) programmes.

This university scheme allows students to study what they are truly interested in and passionate about. Unlike any other programmes, they have the flexibility to design their own Major by following a structured curriculum framework for interdisciplinary studies. This approach encourages interdisciplinary learning and fosters a sense of ownership, creativity and scholarship among students.
JS3000.r: The programme is designed to respond the increasing demand for versatile individuals in today's volatile society and economy. It will equip students with diverse skills and prepare them to navigate various professions and industries, adapting to the evolving job market. Additionally, the programme is designed with robust components to prepare students for further postgraduate education, engage in research, and position themselves for success in research and development fields.
z: 該計劃旨在為表現優異的本科生提供獨特的教育機會，為他們提供靈活的學習途徑和課程選擇、個人化輔導和深入指導。它旨在培養優秀人才，讓他們在各個學科領域取得優異的學術成績，並有保證的課堂外和非本地學習機會。該倡議鼓勵採用創新和興趣驅動的教育方法，專為成績優異的學生而設計，包括參加人力計劃 (MPP) 計畫的學生。
這個大學計劃允許學生學習他們真正感興趣和熱衷的東西。與任何其他課程不同，他們可以透過遵循跨學科研究的結構化課程框架來靈活地設計自己的專業。這種方法鼓勵跨學科學習，培養學生的主人翁意識、創造力和學術意識。
JS3000.zr: 該計劃旨在滿足當今動盪的社會和經濟中對多才多藝的個人日益增長的需求。它將為學生提供多樣化的技能，幫助他們做好駕馭各種職業和行業的準備，並適應不斷變化的就業市場。此外，該計畫的設計具有強大的組成部分，旨在幫助學生為進一步的研究生教育、從事研究以及為自己在研究和開發領域的成功做好準備。

d: The BBA (Hons) Scheme in Management and Marketing equips students with cutting-edge knowledge and practical skills for students to develop competencies to meet future challenges. Through rigorous teaching and engagement with the business community, the programmes focus on nurturing students' leadership and marketing skills, analytical techniques, team spirit and social responsibility.
Students can choose one of the following programmes within the Scheme: BBA (Hons) in Management or BBA (Hons) in Marketing.
BBA (Hons) in Management
Management skills are essential for all business professionals. As a field of study, management aims to maximise the potential of people and other resources within organisations.

This programme provides students with a well-rounded business education and general management training, as well as the opportunity to specialise in human resource management. Students are equipped with a wide range of management skills to give them the potential to develop as business leaders in Hong Kong, Mainland China, and the region.
BBA (Hons) in Marketing

This programme aims to equip students with comprehensive knowledge and practical skills in marketing principles, strategies, and tools necessary for effective marketing management in a dynamic global environment. The incorporation of cutting-edge digital marketing, business analytics, and artificial intelligence and big data for business modules prepares students for the digital transformation in marketing. The experiential learning, internships and industry project collaborations provides students’ hands-on experience to ensure relevance and employability. Graduating students are job-ready for developing their careers in advertising, brand management, market research, sales, digital marketing, and other marketing-related fields.
JS3080.r: • All admitted students will embark on a Common Year One curriculum. Towards the end of year one, students can decide whether to continue with their initial choice or switch to another choice within the Faculty. Those who wish to change to another choice need to join a competitive process through a ranking assessment, which considers a combination of entrance qualification score, Year One GPA, and interview performance. • Students will be awarded one of the following degrees upon successful completion of the graduation requirements of the programme: • BBA (Hons) in Management • BBA (Hons) in Marketing • Admission of a student into a specific programme option is based on student's choice, GPA and individual subject results in Year 1. • Both programmes offer the option of the Secondary Major in Artificial Intelligence and Data Analytics, subject to competitive admission and different credit requirements for graduation.
z: 管理與行銷學工商管理學士（榮譽）課程為學生提供前沿知識和實踐技能，幫助學生培養應對未來挑戰的能力。透過嚴格的教學和與商界的接觸，該計畫專注於培養學生的領導力和行銷技能、分析技巧、團隊精神和社會責任感。
學生可以在該計劃中選擇以下課程之一：管理學（榮譽）工商管理學士或行銷（榮譽）工商管理學士。
管理學（榮譽）學士學位
管理技能對於所有商業專業人員來說都是不可或缺的。作為一個研究領域，管理旨在最大限度地發揮組織內人員和其他資源的潛力。
該課程為學生提供全面的商業教育和一般管理培訓，以及專門從事人力資源管理的機會。學生具備廣泛的管理技能，使他們有潛力成為香港、中國內地和該地區的商業領袖。
行銷（榮譽）工商管理學士
本課程旨在讓學生掌握在動態的全球環境中進行有效行銷管理所需的行銷原理、策略和工具的全面知識和實踐技能。將尖端的數位行銷、商業分析、人工智慧和大數據納入業務模組，為學生的行銷數位轉型做好準備。體驗式學習、實習和行業計畫合作為學生提供了實踐經驗，以確保相關性和就業能力。畢業生已做好在廣告、品牌管理、市場研究、銷售、數位行銷和其他行銷相關領域發展職業生涯的準備。
JS3080.zr: • 所有被錄取的學生將開始學習一年級通用課程。在第一學年結束時，學生可以決定是繼續他們最初的選擇還是轉向學院內的另一個選擇。那些希望改變其他選擇的人需要透過排名評估來參加競爭過程，排名評估會綜合考慮入學資格分數、一年級 GPA 和麵試表現。 • 成功完成課程畢業要求後，學生將獲得以下學位之一： • 管理學（榮譽）工商管理學士 • 市場營銷（榮譽）工商管理學士 • 特定課程選項的錄取取決於學生的選擇、GPA 和第一年的個人科目成績。 • 兩個課程都提供人工智慧和資料分析輔助專業的選擇，但需滿足競爭性入學和不同的畢業學分要求。

d: Short DescriptionUpdated
Students admitted to the Scheme will study together for the first 2 years, and then complete their preferred programme normally within the next two years until graduation.
Free selection (with no quota limit) of either one programme for Years 3 and 4:
BEng (Hons) in Intelligent Robotics Engineering 智能機械人工程學 (榮譽)工學士

Intelligent robotics is an emerging engineering discipline that advances many systems on which modern society relies, including autonomous manufacturing systems, automated consumer products, automated experimental systems, intelligent vehicles, Internet of Things (IoT), healthcare, medical devices, and many more. The BEng (Hons) in Intelligent Robotics Engineering programme is the first of its kind in Hong Kong which aims to educate highly skilled engineers in the field of intelligent robotics to local and global industries.
BEng (Hons) in Mechanical Engineering 機械工程學(榮譽)工學士

We nurture mechanical engineering graduates who are able to apply modern technology to solve and manage multidisciplinary engineering problems. They have excellent employment opportunities in many industries/businesses, and are able to start their careers as mechanical engineers, service engineers, consultant engineers, design engineers or project engineers.
Secondary Major in AI and Data Analytics 「人工智能及數據分析」副主修課程

• Mechanical engineering combined with AI knowledge offers a unique and highly valued skill set for students. They can create innovative products, analyse data, and optimise performance, making them valuable in industries such as automotive, aerospace, and robotics. This integrated discipline offers great career opportunities for those interested in cutting-edge technologies.
• Admission to a Secondary Major is on a competitive basis and subject to different credit requirements for graduation.

All admitted students will embark on a Common Year One curriculum. Towards the end of year one, students can decide whether to continue with their initial choice or switch to another choice within the Faculty of Engineering. Those who wish to change to another choice need to join a competitive process through a ranking assessment, which considers a combination of entrance qualification score, Year One GPA, and interview performance.
JS3741.r: • The Bachelor of Engineering (Honours) Scheme in Mechanical Engineering includes the following two awards: • BEng (Hons) in Intelligent Robotics Engineering 智能機械人工程學 (榮譽)工學士 • BEng (Hons) in Mechanical Engineering 機械工程學(榮譽)工學士 • Students are allowed to enrol on any awards without being subject to further assessment. Entry Scholarship • To recognise applicants with outstanding academic performance in the HKDSE, the Department will grant entry scholarships to eligible HKDSE students admitted to its programmes via JUPAS. Please refer https://www.polyu.edu.hk/me/study/scholarship-and-financial-assistance/ for further details.
z: 簡短說明已更新
被錄取的學生將在前兩年一起學習，然後在接下來的兩年內正常完成他們喜歡的課程直到畢業。
第 3 年和第 4 年自由選擇（無名額限制）任一課程：
智慧機器人工程（榮譽）工學士 智慧機械人工程學（榮譽）工學士
智慧機器人技術是一門新興的工程學科，它推動了現代社會所依賴的許多系統的發展，包括自主製造系統、自動化消費產品、自動化實驗系統、智慧車輛、物聯網 (IoT)、醫療保健、醫療設備等等。智慧機器人工程（榮譽）工學士課程是香港首個此類課程，旨在為本地和全球行業培養智慧機器人領域的高技能工程師。
機械工程學士（榮譽）機械工程學士（榮譽）工學士
我们培养能够应用现代技术解决和管理多学科工程问题的机械工程毕业生。他們在許多行業/企業都有極好的就業機會，能夠以機械工程師、服務工程師、顧問工程師、設計工程師或專案工程師的身份開始自己的職業生涯。
人工智慧與數據分析副主修「人工智慧及數據分析」副主修課程
• 機械工程與人工智慧知識結合，為學生提供了獨特且極具價值的技能組合。他們可以創造創新產品、分析數據並優化性能，使其在汽車、航空航太和機器人等行業中發揮價值。這個綜合學科為那些對尖端技術感興趣的人提供了絕佳的職業機會。
• 次要專業的入學是在競爭的基礎上進行的，並且畢業時有不同的學分要求。
所有被錄取的學生將開始共同一年級課程。在第一學年結束時，學生可以決定是繼續他們最初的選擇還是轉向工程學院內的另一個選擇。那些希望改變其他選擇的人需要透過排名評估來參加競爭過程，排名評估會綜合考慮入學資格分數、一年級 GPA 和麵試表現。
JS3741.zr: • 機械工程（榮譽）工學士計畫包括以下兩個獎項： • 智慧機器人工程（榮譽）工學士 智慧機械人工程學（榮譽）工學士 • 機械工程（榮譽）工學士 機械工程學（榮譽）工學士 • 學生可報讀任何獎項，無需再接受進一步評審。入學獎學金 • 為表揚在香港中學文憑考試中表現優異的申請者，本系會頒發入學獎學金給合資格經聯招取錄的香港中學文憑考試學生。詳情請參閱https://www.polyu.edu.hk/me/study/scholarship-and-financial-assistance/。

d: Medical Laboratory Science is an essential scientific discipline in the healthcare sector. Medical laboratory scientists conduct laboratory analysis of clinical samples, which assists in disease diagnosis, treatment, risk assessment and the investigation of underlying disease mechanisms.

This programme aims to equip graduates to become competent and ethical medical laboratory scientists. Graduates of the programme possess the knowledge, skills, reasoning abilities and professional attitudes necessary to provide qualified healthcare services to the public.
JS3478.r: Students will be awarded the following award upon successful completion of the graduation requirements: • BSc (Hons) in Medical Laboratory Science
z: 醫學檢驗科學是醫療保健領域的重要科學學科。醫學實驗室科學家對臨床樣本進行實驗室分析，協助疾病診斷、治療、風險評估和潛在疾病機制的調查。
該計劃旨在使畢業生成為有能力、有道德的醫學實驗室科學家。該課程的畢業生具備向公眾提供合格醫療服務所需的知識、技能、推理能力和專業態度。
JS3478.zr: 成功完成畢業要求後，學生將獲得以下獎項： • 醫學檢驗科學（榮譽）理學士

d: Our mission is to educate young people to pursue a professional and lifelong career in mental health nursing, arguably, one of the world's most caring professions. This innovative academic programme aims to develop students' competency in delivering high-quality care, conduct mental health-related research, and make significant contributions to the mental health care services.

Through this programme, students will be able to develop essential skills in clinical reasoning, critical thinking, problem-solving, therapeutic communication, and clinical management of mental health clients in various clinical settings. Students can also learn how to work both independently and with other health care professionals to provide high-quality mental health care in a range of contexts, from psychiatric clinical settings to community mental health services, for different age groups across the lifespan.
JS3337.r: Students will be awarded the following award upon successful completion of the graduation requirements: • BSc (Hons) in Mental Health Nursing New Global Nursing Leader Distinction for high achieving students starting from 2025/26 admission With the highest DSE scores, students will join the Global Nursing Leader Distinction while they are studying the programme. Special features for students who join this programme: • Participate in WHO Collaborating Centres and other global exposure: • One internship or study trip in WHO Collaborating Centers in Europe, North America, or Australia • Up to two exchanges, including clinical visits and other exposures in Europe, North America, or Australia • Support for advanced nursing pathway during undergraduate study: • Sponsorship for up to six transferable credits (two subjects) to study in the Master of Science in Nursing programme at PolyU • Special mentoring by both senior staff and alumni to shed light on the promotional paths for nursing as clinicians, academics, and entrepreneurs • Other credentials: • Certificate of Global Nursing Leader Distinction upon completion • Certificate in specialisation in Traditional Chinese Medicinal Nursing (TCM) and the opportunity to practice TCM in North America Eligibility to join the programme: • Students with the highest DSE scores in the programme • Maintain a minimum cGPA of 3.2 throughout the study
z: 我們的使命是教育年輕人在心理健康護理領域追求專業和終身的職業生涯，可以說，這是世界上最有愛心的職業之一。這項創新的學術計畫旨在培養學生提供高品質護理的能力，進行心理健康相關研究，並為心理健康護理服務做出重大貢獻。
透過該課程，學生將能夠培養各種臨床環境中心理健康客戶的臨床推理、批判性思維、解決問題、治療溝通和臨床管理的基本技能。學生還可以學習如何獨立工作以及與其他醫療保健專業人員合作，在從精神病學臨床環境到社區心理健康服務的各種環境中為整個生命週期的不同年齡段提供高品質的心理健康護理。
JS3337.zr: 成功完成畢業要求後，學生將獲得以下獎項： • 心理健康護理學士（榮譽）新全球護理領袖傑出獎，從 2025/26 入學開始，面向成績優異的學生。憑藉最高的 DSE 分數，學生將在學習課程時參加全球護理領袖傑出獎。參加此課程的學生可享有以下特別優惠： • 參與世衛組織合作中心和其他全球接觸活動： • 在歐洲、北美或澳大利亞的世衛組織合作中心進行一次實習或學習旅行 • 最多兩次交流，包括歐洲、北美或澳大利亞的臨床訪問和其他接觸活動 • 本科學習期間支持高級護理銜接課程： • 贊助最多六個學位兩位高年級學生的特別指導工作人員和校友闡明護理作為臨床醫生、學者和企業家的晉升途徑 • 其他證書： • 完成後獲得全球護理領袖傑出證書 • 中醫護理 (TCM) 專業證書以及在北美實踐中醫的機會 參加該計劃的資格： • 在該計劃中 DSE 分數最高的學生 • 在整個學習過程中保持最低 cGPA 3.

d: Our mission is to educate young people to pursue professional careers in nursing, one of the world's most caring professions. This innovative academic programme develops students' competency in delivering quality care, carrying out relevant research and making significant contributions to the health of the community.

Students master the skills of clinical reasoning, communication and the use of technology. They also learn how to work efficiently alone, or with other healthcare professionals, to provide quality healthcare.
JS3648.r: Students will be awarded the following award upon successful completion of the graduation requirements: • BSc (Hons) in Nursing New Global Nursing Leader Distinction for high achieving students starting from 2025/26 admission With the highest DSE scores, students will join the Global Nursing Leader Distinction while they are studying the programme. Special features for students who join this programme: • Participate in WHO Collaborating Centres and other global exposure: • One internship or study trip in WHO Collaborating Centers in Europe, North America, or Australia • Up to two exchanges, including clinical visits and other exposures in Europe, North America, or Australia • Support for advanced nursing pathway during undergraduate study: • Sponsorship for up to six transferable credits (two subjects) to study in the Master of Science in Nursing programme at PolyU • Special mentoring by both senior staff and alumni to shed light on the promotional paths for nursing as clinicians, academics, and entrepreneurs • Other credentials: • Certificate of Global Nursing Leader Distinction upon completion • Certificate in specialisation in Traditional Chinese Medicinal Nursing (TCM) and the opportunity to practice TCM in North America Eligibility to join the programme: • Students with the highest DSE scores in the programme • Maintain a minimum cGPA of 3.2 throughout the study
z: 我們的使命是教育年輕人從事護理職業，這是世界上最有愛心的職業之一。這項創新的學術課程培養學生提供優質護理、進行相關研究以及為社區健康做出重大貢獻的能力。
學生掌握臨床推理、溝通和科技使用的技能。他們還學習如何單獨或與其他醫療保健專業人員高效工作，以提供優質的醫療保健。
JS3648.zr: 成功完成畢業要求後，學生將獲得以下獎項： • 護理學（榮譽）理學學士 新全球護理領袖傑出課程，從 2025/26 年入學開始，為成績優異的學生提供 憑藉最高的 DSE 成績，學生將在學習該課程期間參加全球護理領袖傑出課程。參加此課程的學生可享有以下特別優惠： • 參與世衛組織合作中心和其他全球接觸活動： • 在歐洲、北美或澳大利亞的世衛組織合作中心進行一次實習或學習旅行 • 最多兩次交流，包括歐洲、北美或澳大利亞的臨床訪問和其他接觸活動 • 本科學習期間支持高級護理銜接課程： • 贊助最多六個學位兩位高年級學生的特別指導工作人員和校友闡明護理作為臨床醫生、學者和企業家的晉升途徑 • 其他證書： • 完成後獲得全球護理領袖傑出證書 • 中醫護理 (TCM) 專業證書以及在北美實踐中醫的機會 參加該計劃的資格： • 在該計劃中 DSE 分數最高的學生 • 在整個學習過程中保持最低 cGPA 3.

d: This programme aims to generate graduates who are forward-looking and competent occupational therapists and can promote the health and well-being of people in Hong Kong.

A combination of medical, physical, neurological, psychological, and social subjects prepares students to enhance the functional performance of community-dwelling people with disabilities in terms of self-care, leisure, and work. Students learn how to maximise occupational performance, promote health, and improve life meaningfulness and quality of life of clients, their families and caregivers.

The programme prepares students to deliver occupation-based and client-centred occupational therapy with a commitment to promoting equal opportunities for all members of the community. It also prepares students for helping careers in which they empower clients to manage their disabilities, educate the public about healthy and meaningful living and pass on their professional knowledge to new generations of therapists.
JS3624.r: Students will be awarded the following degree upon completion of the graduation requirements: • BSc (Hons) in Occupational Therapy
z: 該課程旨在培養具有前瞻性和稱職的職業治療師，並能夠促進香港人民的健康和福祉的畢業生。
醫學、物理、神經學、心理和社會學科的結合使學生做好準備，提高社區居住的殘疾人在自我照顧、休閒和工作方面的功能表現。學生學習如何最大限度地提高職業績效、促進健康、提高客戶、其家人和照護者的生活意義和生活品質。
該計劃幫助學生做好提供基於職業和以客戶為中心的職業治療的準備，並致力於促進社區所有成員的平等機會。它還幫助學生為幫助職業做好準備，幫助客戶管理他們的殘疾，教育公眾健康和有意義的生活，並將他們的專業知識傳授給新一代的治療師。
JS3624.zr: 完成畢業要求後，學生將獲得以下學位： • 職業治療（榮譽）理學士

d: The Optometry programme prepares students to become primary eyecare practitioners with expert knowledge of the eye and the visual system. Students gain the knowledge and skills necessary to diagnose visual problems and offer treatment options, which may be in the form of optical lenses or visual training.

The journey to becoming an eyecare practitioner begins with a strong foundation in the basic life sciences, followed by a thorough grounding in the optometric sciences. In the second half of the programme, students acquire the clinical skills necessary to effectively manage a wide variety of visual problems. The five semesters of supervised clinical training in our Optometry Clinic and our satellite clinics with real patients give students many opportunities to learn to care for patients and to consolidate their clinical skills and knowledge.
Throughout the programme, students learn about ethical, professional, and legal issues in preparation for clinical practice.
JS3290.r: • Students receive clinical training in PolyU’s Optometry Clinic and Satellite Clinics. The majority of clients are Hong Kong Chinese. The students begin their clinical rotations in the fourth year of the programme and conduct their clinical practice in English, Cantonese or Putonghua. • Majority of our patients speaks Cantonese. Students are expected to manage good Cantonese skills before starting their clinical placement. • Students must possess the sensory and motor skills necessary to perform an eye examination. Significant coordination and manual dexterity using hands and fingers are important. Typical examples of skills required include but are not limited to: instillation of eye drops to patients, insertion and removal of contact lenses, assessment of blood pressure, simultaneous manipulation of lenses, instruments and devices.
z: 驗光課程幫助學生成為具有眼睛和視覺系統專業知識的初級眼保健從業者。學生獲得診斷視覺問題所需的知識和技能，並提供治療方案，可能是光學鏡片或視覺訓練的形式。
成為眼科保健從業者的旅程始於基礎生命科學的堅實基礎，然後是驗光科學的徹底基礎。在課程的後半部分，學生將獲得有效管理各種視覺問題所需的臨床技能。在我們的驗光診所和衛星診所與真實患者進行的五個學期的監督臨床培訓為學生提供了許多機會學習如何照顧患者並鞏固他們的臨床技能和知識。
在整個課程中，學生學習道德、專業和法律問題，為臨床實踐做好準備。
JS3290.zr: • 學生在理大眼科診所和衛星診所接受臨床訓練。大多數客戶是香港華人。學生於課程第四年開始臨床輪調，並以英語、粵語或普通話進行臨床實習。 • 我們的大多數患者都會說粵語。學生在開始臨床實習之前應具備良好的粵語技能。 • 學生必須具備進行眼科檢查所需的感覺和運動技能。使用手和手指的高度協調性和手動靈活性非常重要。所需技能的典型例子包括但不限於：給患者滴眼藥水、配戴和摘除隱形眼鏡、評估血壓、同時操作鏡片、儀器和設備。

d: JS3030 integrates Physics with Secondary Majors in "Artificial Intelligence and Data Analytics (AIDA)" or "Innovation and Entrepreneurship (IE)"; the credit requirement of a Secondary Major (36 credits) is approximately half that of the Physics Major (62 credits for AIDA; 68 credits for IE). The programme is designed to nurture high-calibre professionals with a mastery of science knowledge, supplemented with either AI or entrepreneurship skills. Graduates will be capable to formulate innovative solutions for scientific research task and manufacturing problems. Upon completion of the programme, the graduates are well-positioned to tackle real-life innovation and production challenges in the ever-changing society.

All admitted students embark on a Common Year One curriculum. Towards the end of year one, students can decide whether to continue with their initial choice or switch to another choice within the Faculty. Those who wish to change to another choice need to join a competitive process through a ranking assessment, which considers a combination of entrance qualification score, Year One GPA, and interview performance.
JS3030.r: Students will gain one of the following awards upon successful completion of the programme: • BSc (Hons) in Physics with a Secondary Major in Artificial Intelligence and Data Analytics • BSc (Hons) in Physics with a Secondary Major in Innovation and Entrepreneurship Entry Scholarship • In addition to the University Academic Scholarships for the outstanding HKDSE students (please refer to Study@PolyU for eligibility), Departmental Entry Scholarships will also be granted. The award criteria for the scholarship will be announced in due course.
z: JS3030將物理與第二專業「人工智慧與資料分析（AIDA）」或「創新與創業（IE）」結合；次要專業的學分要求（36 學分）大約是物理專業（AIDA 62 學分；IE 68 學分）的一半。該計劃旨在培養掌握科學知識並輔以人工智慧或創業技能的高素質專業人士。畢業生將能夠為科學研究任務和製造問題制定創新的解決方案。完成課程後，畢業生將能夠應對不斷變化的社會中現實生活中的創新和生產挑戰。
所有被錄取的學生都開始學習一年級通用課程。在第一學年結束時，學生可以決定是繼續他們最初的選擇還是轉向學院內的另一個選擇。那些希望改變其他選擇的人需要透過排名評估來參加競爭過程，排名評估會綜合考慮入學資格分數、一年級 GPA 和麵試表現。
JS3030.zr: 成功完成課程後，學生將獲得以下獎項之一： • 物理學（榮譽）理學士學位，副修人工智能和數據分析 • 物理學（榮譽）理學士學位，副修創新及創業入學獎學金 • 除了為香港中學文憑考試表現出色的學生提供大學學術獎學金（請參閱Study@PolyU了解資格）外，還將頒發院系入學獎學金。獎學金的授予標準將適時公佈。

d: This programme aims to produce qualified professionals who provide physiotherapy services to promote the health of clients and meet the healthcare needs of society. Graduates possess the knowledge, skills and professional attitudes required for the reliable, ethical and effective practice of physiotherapy. As lifelong learners and active consumers of the professional and scientific literature, graduates are able to develop the profession through continuing education and/or participating in investigative and evaluative projects. Their sense of social and professional responsibility is further reflected in their efforts to educate clients, the public and the next generation of therapists.
JS3636.r: Students will be awarded the following degree upon completion of the graduation requirements: • BSc (Hons) in Physiotherapy
z: 該計劃旨在培養合格的專業人士提供物理治療服務，以促進客戶的健康並滿足社會的醫療保健需求。畢業生擁有可靠、道德和有效的物理治療實踐所需的知識、技能和專業態度。作為專業和科學文獻的終身學習者和積極消費者，畢業生能夠透過繼續教育和/或參與調查和評估計畫來發展職業。他們的社會和專業責任感進一步體現在他們教育客戶、公眾和下一代治療師的努力中。
JS3636.zr: 完成畢業要求後，學生將獲得以下學位： • 物理治療（榮譽）理學士

d: Product Innovation and Smart Manufacturing (PISM) has been driving industries and service sectors to perform smarter, faster, and better. The PISM scheme aims to provide students with knowledge and skills in product innovation and smart manufacturing, including engineering economics, quality engineering, automation, engineering communication and information technology, so as to enable them to have a solid foundation and flexibility to pursue a bachelor's degree, either in product innovation with marketing or smart manufacturing, after the first and a half year of study.

All admitted students will embark on a Common Year One curriculum. Towards the end of year one, students can decide whether to continue with their initial choice or switch to another choice within the Faculty of Engineering. Those who wish to change to another choice need to join a competitive process through a ranking assessment, which considers a combination of entrance qualification score, Year One GPA, and interview performance.
JS3236.r: • All admitted students will embark on a Common Year One curriculum within the Faculty of Engineering and study a common curriculum for this scheme in the first semester of the second year. Students must select any one of the two honours degree awards no later than the end of the first semester of Year 2. • All information is subject to change without prior notice. • Students will be awarded one of the following awards upon successful completion of the graduation requirements of the programme concerned: • BEng (Hons) in Product Innovation with Marketing • BEng (Hons) in Smart Manufacturing • Students are allowed to enrol on any awards without being subject to further assessment. • The option of Secondary Major in Innovation and Entrepreneurship (IE) is available to the students of BEng (Hons) in Product Innovation with Marketing. Admission to Secondary Major is on competitive basis and subject to a different credit requirement for graduation. Entry Scholarship • To recognise the outstanding academic performance of HKDSE students, the department will grant entry scholarship to eligible HKDSE students admitted to the scheme via JUPAS. The award criteria for the scholarship are shown on https://www.polyu.edu.hk/ise/scholarships. They are subject to change and will be announced on department website in due course.
z: 產品創新和智慧製造 (PISM) 一直在推動工業和服務業變得更聰明、更快、更好。 PISM計畫旨在為學生提供產品創新和智慧製造方面的知識和技能，包括工程經濟學、品質工程、自動化、工程通訊和資訊技術，使他們能夠在經過一年半的學習後，為攻讀產品創新與行銷或智慧製造學士學位奠定堅實的基礎和靈活性。
所有被錄取的學生將開始共同一年級課程。在第一學年結束時，學生可以決定是繼續他們最初的選擇還是轉向工程學院內的另一個選擇。那些希望改變其他選擇的人需要透過排名評估來參加競爭過程，排名評估會綜合考慮入學資格分數、一年級 GPA 和麵試表現。
JS3236.zr: • 所有被錄取的學生將開始在工程學院學習一年級通用課程，並在第二年第一學期學習該計劃的通用課程。學生必須在第二年第一學期結束之前選擇兩個榮譽學位獎項中的任何一個。 • 所有資訊如有更改，恕不另行通知。 • 成功完成相關課程的畢業要求後，學生將獲得以下獎項之一： • 產品創新與行銷（榮譽）工學士 • 智慧製造（榮譽）工學士 • 學生可以報名參加任何獎項，無需接受進一步評估。 • 產品創新與行銷（榮譽）工學士的學生可以選擇創新與創業（IE）二級專業。中學專業的入學是在競爭的基礎上進行的，並且畢業時有不同的學分要求。入學獎學金 • 為表揚香港中學文憑考試學生的優異學業表現，學系會向經聯招取錄的合資格香港中學文憑考試學生頒發入學獎學金。獎學金的授予標準請參閱https://www.polyu.edu.hk/ise/scholarships。它們可能會發生變化，並將適時在部門網站上公佈。

d: Our professional programme offers an advanced and relevant education in the broad field of radiography, encompassing medical imaging and radiation therapy. Designed with an interdisciplinary approach, the curriculum equips students with essential competencies in clinical reasoning, professional ethics, AI-driven technologies, and practical skills.

We prepare graduates to become compassionate and skilled healthcare professionals, instilling in them a strong sense of empathy, responsibility, and effective communication. Our student-centered learning approach fosters independence, empowering students to build successful careers as radiographers or radiation therapists.

A cornerstone of our education is the development of lifelong learning abilities, ensuring our graduates remain at the forefront of this dynamic field. By integrating AI applications and honing communication skills, we empower students to adapt to rapid advancements, collaborate effectively, and deliver patient-centered care with innovation and confidence.
JS3612.r: Students will be awarded the following upon successful completion of the graduation requirements: • BSc (Hons) in Radiography
z: 我們的專業課程提供廣泛的放射線攝影領域的先進且相關的教育，包括醫學影像和放射治療。本課程採用跨學科方法設計，為學生提供臨床推理、職業道德、人工智慧驅動技術和實踐技能的基本能力。
我們培養畢業生成為富有同情心和熟練的醫療保健專業人員，向他們灌輸強烈的同理心、責任感和有效的溝通意識。我們以學生為中心的學習方法培養獨立性，使學生能夠作為放射技師或放射治療師建立成功的職業生涯。
我們教育的基石是終身學習能力的發展，確保我們的畢業生始終處於這個充滿活力的領域的前沿。透過整合人工智慧應用和磨練溝通技巧，我們使學生能夠適應快速進步、有效協作，並以創新和信心提供以患者為中心的護理。
JS3612.zr: 成功完成畢業要求後，學生將獲得以下學位： • 放射學（榮譽）理學士

d: This Bachelor's Degree Scheme is intended to nurture future scientists and talents by offering holistic, dynamic and pioneering innovative science-based education. During their first year of study, students can explore different science disciplines via experiential learning through search and discovery processes, cultivating their interest in scientific and technological innovations. The Common Year One Curriculum equips our students with the knowledge and skillset for the pursuit of a specific science major according to their aspirations, ability and interests, beginning in their second year of study.

All admitted students will embark on a Common Year One Curriculum comprising of 30 credits. Towards the end of year one, students can choose their preferred programme through a ranking assessment, which considers a combination of entrance qualification score, Year One GPA, and interview performance.
JS3008.r: • Our Bachelor's Degree Scheme provides one entry in application for a choice of 5 Majors, offering students the time and flexibility to explore these disciplinary fields and navigate their academic interests. • Students will receive one of the following awards upon successful completion of the programme: • BSc (Hons) in Applied Biology with Biotechnology • BSc (Hons) in Chemical Technology • BSc (Hons) in Food Safety and Technology • BSc (Hons) in Human Nutrition and Health / BSc (Hons) in Human Nutrition and Health (Nutrition in Practice) • BSc (Hons) in Physics with a Secondary Major in Artificial Intelligence and Data Analytics / BSc (Hons) in Physics with a Secondary Major in Innovation and Entrepreneurship • Faculty of Science Entry Scholarships for Outstanding Local Students will be awarded to students with high attainment in the HKDSE admitted to the scheme via JUPAS. The award criteria for the scholarship will be announced in due course.
z: 該學士學位課程旨在透過提供全面、充滿活力和開創性的創新科學教育來培養未來的科學家和人才。在第一年的學習中，學生可以透過搜尋和發現過程的體驗式學習來探索不同的科學學科，培養他們對科技創新的興趣。通用一年級課程為我們的學生提供從第二年學習開始，根據他們的願望、能力和興趣追求特定科學專業的知識和技能。
所有被錄取的學生將開始學習包含 30 個學分的通用一年級課程。在第一學年結束時，學生可以透過排名評估來選擇自己喜歡的課程，排名評估會綜合考慮入學資格分數、一年級 GPA 和麵試表現。
JS3008.zr: • 我們的學士學位課程提供 5 個專業選擇的一次申請，為學生提供時間和靈活性來探索這些學科領域並培養他們的學術興趣。 • 成功完成課程後，學生將獲得以下獎項之一： • 應用生物學與生物技術（榮譽）理學學士 • 化學技術（榮譽）理學學士 • 食品安全與技術（榮譽）理學學士 • 人類營養與健康（榮譽）理學學士 / 人類營養與健康（營養實踐）（榮譽）理學學士 • 物理學（榮譽）理學學士 / 人類營養與健康（營養學實踐）（榮譽）理學學士 • 物理學（人工智慧）數據分析理學院優秀本地學生入學獎學金將頒發給在香港中學文憑考試中取得高成績並經聯招取錄的學生。獎學金的授予標準將適時公佈。

d: This BSc (Hons) Scheme in Spatial Data Science and Smart Cities provides a unique and inter-disciplinary land surveying and geo-informatics (LSGI) education in Hong Kong that embraces the societal development need of today and the future. We nurture students to develop essential knowledge in our theme/scheme: spatial data science, sensing technologies, and their applications to smart cities. Subsequently, the theme/scheme extends to highly practical areas and job markets, such as survey and mapping, transportation and logistics, environmental and socio-economic surveying, and underground utility diagnostics. The BSc (Hons) in Land Surveying and Geo-Informatics programme is fully accredited by the Hong Kong Institute of Surveyors (HKIS) and other related local/international professional bodies, and the HKIS accreditation for the BSc (Hons) in Urban Informatics and Smart Cities programme is also received, which allows our graduates to pursue professional careers. Over the years, about 40% of our students have gained various international learning and practical experiences, including exchange, internship and study tours. Our inter-disciplinary curriculum is the only one in Hong Kong, equipping graduates for tackling various challenges in society and future city development.
JS3130.r: • Two full-time programmes are offered under the Scheme: • BSc (Hons) in Land Surveying and Geo-Informatics 土地測量及地理資訊學(榮譽)理學士 • BSc (Hons) in Urban Informatics and Smart Cities 城市信息學及智慧城市(榮譽)理學士 • The option of a Secondary Major in AI and Data Analytics (AIDA) is available to students of the BSc (Hons) in Land Surveying and Geo-Informatics. Admission to the Secondary Major is competitive and subject to a different credit requirement for graduation. All admitted students will embark on a Common Year One curriculum. Towards the end of year one, students can decide whether to continue with their initial choice or switch to another choice within the Faculty. Those who wish to change to another choice need to join a competitive process through a ranking assessment, which considers a combination of entrance qualification score, Year One GPA, and interview performance.
z: 這個空間數據科學和智慧城市（榮譽）理學士學位課程為香港提供獨特的跨學科土地測量和地理資訊學（LSGI）教育，滿足當今和未來的社會發展需求。我們培養學生在發展我們的主題/計劃中的基本知識：空間數據科學、感測技術及其在智慧城市中的應用。隨後，主題/方案擴展到高度實用的領域和就業市場，例如測繪、運輸和物流、環境和社會經濟測量以及地下公用設施診斷。土地測量及地理資訊學（榮譽）理學士課程​​獲香港測量師學會（HKIS）及其他相關本地/國際專業團體全面認可，城市資訊學及智慧城市（榮譽）理學士課程​​亦獲得香港測量師學會的認可，讓畢業生能夠投身專業事業。多年來，我們約有40%的學生獲得了各種國際學習和實務經驗，包括交流、實習和遊學。我們的跨學科課程是香港唯一的課程，幫助畢業生應對社會和未來城市發展的各種挑戰。
JS3130.zr: • 本計畫提供兩個全日制課程： • 土地測量與地理資訊學（榮譽）理學士 土地測量及地理資訊學（榮譽）理學士 • 城市資訊學與智慧城市（榮譽）理學士（榮譽）理學士 • 土地測量與地理資訊學（榮譽）理學士的學生可選擇人工智慧與數據分析（AIDA）副專業。中學專業的入學具有競爭性，並且畢業時需要滿足不同的學分要求。所有被錄取的學生將開始共同一年級課程。在第一學年結束時，學生可以決定是繼續他們最初的選擇還是轉向學院內的另一個選擇。那些希望改變其他選擇的人需要透過排名評估來參加競爭過程，排名評估會綜合考慮入學資格分數、一年級 GPA 和麵試表現。

d: This programme aims to produce collaborative practice-ready speech therapists with the ability to practice speech therapy safely and effectively in the areas of speech, language, voice, fluency and swallowing with children and adults presenting with developmental and acquired communication disorders and swallowing disabilities.

All admitted students will embark on a Common Year One curriculum. Towards the end of year one, students can decide whether to continue with their initial choice or switch to another choice within the Faculty. Those who wish to change to another choice need to join a competitive process through a ranking assessment, which considers a combination of entrance qualification score, Year One GPA, and interview performance.
JS3242.r: • Applicants should be able to communicate verbally in both Cantonese and English effectively. Additional proficiency in Mandarin (Putonghua) is preferred. • Students will be awarded the following degree upon successful completion of the graduation requirements: • BSc (Hons) in Speech Therapy • Contingent on successful accreditation of the programme by the Hong Kong Institute of Speech Therapists (HKIST), BScST graduates will be qualified to practise as speech therapists in an accredited register. • Only applicants who have put BScST as their Band A choice would be shortlisted and invited for interview.
z: 該計畫旨在培養具備協作實踐能力的言語治療師，能夠在言語、語言、聲音、流暢性和吞嚥方面安全有效地對患有發育性和後天性溝通障礙和吞嚥障礙的兒童和成人進行言語治療。
所有被錄取的學生將開始共同一年級課程。在第一學年結束時，學生可以決定是繼續他們最初的選擇還是轉向學院內的另一個選擇。那些希望改變其他選擇的人需要透過排名評估來參加競爭過程，排名評估會綜合考慮入學資格分數、一年級 GPA 和麵試表現。
JS3242.zr: • 申請人應能以粵語和英語進行有效的口語溝通。精通國語者優先。 • 成功完成畢業要求後，學生將獲得以下學位： • 語言治療（榮譽）理學士學位 • 如果該課程成功獲得香港言語治療師學會（HKIST）的認證，BScST 畢業生將有資格在認可的註冊機構中擔任言語治療師。 • 只有將BScST 作為Band A 選擇的申請者才會被列入候選名單並被邀請參加面試。

d: This challenging programme aims to develop all-round and flexible graduates with fundamental knowledge and practical skills in the interdisciplinary professions of land management, real estate development and construction project management. The Programme underpins surveying studies with the disciplines of economics and finance, law, management and technology and cultivates a global mindset with international studies in the real estate and construction markets in China and overseas.

Students are well prepared to enter the professions of building surveying, general practice surveying (real estate), planning and development, property and facility management and quantity surveying (construction economics) with full potentials to take leading and strategic roles in the profession and business of land, property and construction in future.

All admitted students will embark on a Common Year One curriculum. Towards the end of year one, students can decide whether to continue with their initial choice or switch to another choice within the Faculty. Those who wish to change to another choice need to join a competitive process through a ranking assessment, which considers a combination of entrance qualification score, Year One GPA, and interview performance.
JS3789.r: • Students will be awarded the following upon successful completion of the graduation requirements: • BSc(Hons) in Surveying • To recognise high academic attainment, the Department will grant entry scholarships to eligible students with outstanding HKDSE scores admitted via JUPAS.
z: 這個具有挑戰性的計畫旨在培養在土地管理、房地產開發和建設專案管理等跨學科專業領域具有基礎知識和實踐技能的全面、靈活的畢業生。該計畫以經濟和金融、法律、管理和技術等學科的測量研究為基礎，透過對中國和海外房地產和建築市場的國際研究培養全球思維。
學生為進入建築測量、一般實踐測量（房地產）、規劃與開發、財產和設施管理以及工料測量（建築經濟學）等專業做好了充分的準備，並充分發揮潛力，在未來的土地、財產和建築專業和業務中發揮領導和戰略作用。
所有被錄取的學生將開始共同一年級課程。在第一學年結束時，學生可以決定是繼續他們最初的選擇還是轉向學院內的另一個選擇。那些希望改變其他選擇的人需要透過排名評估來參加競爭過程，排名評估會綜合考慮入學資格分數、一年級 GPA 和麵試表現。
