6) 數學與統計學（榮譽）理學士
該課程旨在為學生提供數學和統計概念的堅實基礎，旨在培養適用於各個職業領域的邏輯思維和分析技能。
特別強調工業和商業領域的應用，包括大數據分析、機器學習和人工智慧等新興領域。學生將接受良好的培訓，使用各種電腦軟體包來解決數據驅動領域的現實問題。該計畫的畢業生準備在各個行業從事職業，包括管理科學、物流、電腦視覺化、計算金融、工程設計、精算科學、臨床研究、工業應用、社會科學研究等。
該計劃提供兩個研究方向：
i) 應用統計學
ii) 數據科學
學生可以根據自己的興趣和職業目標，在沒有任何專業或一兩個專業的情況下畢業。
7) 綠色能源與智慧技術（榮譽）理學士

該計劃的目的是培養具有知識和實踐技能的年輕專業人士，以開發和實施綠色和智慧技術驅動的方法，以在快速擴張的智慧和淨零碳城市發展領域開展職業生涯。該計畫提供綠色能源科學和智慧技術的培訓，如綠色能源發電、智慧能源儲存和分配、智慧控制系統和物聯網、碳審計、能源審計和能源管理。除了課堂學習和計畫之外，學生還將獲得實習和海外交流學習等體驗式學習機會。課程還可以幫助學生準備專業認證考試。該計畫的畢業生裝備精良，在能源審計和諮詢、能源/公用事業公司、綠色/智慧建築設計和管理、智慧交通和節能等領域成為綠色能源和智慧技術專業人士，具有很強的競爭力。基礎科學培訓也為學生進一步學習科學和工程或技術創新職業做好準備。
跨學科第二專業/第二專業

該大學預見跨學科創新對於應對全球挑戰的重要性，並提供靈活的課程結構，該結構更加靈活，適合當前和未知的未來需求。指定課程的學生將有機會在專業之外選擇跨學科第二專業（TSM）/第二專業（SM）。 TSM 旨在滿足香港的特殊人才需求，幫助學生匯集學科知識，在多種職業中脫穎而出，而 SM 則幫助學生從另一學科獲得深入的知識，以補充第一個專業。這種方法不僅為學生的職業生涯做好準備，也為各自領域的未來發展做好準備。 2025/26 學年推出 7 個 TSM 和 2 個 SM。請點擊此處了解更多詳情。
JS2510.zr: 一般學分要求為 128 學分，但生物資源和農業科學理學士（榮譽）學分為 129 學分，暑期實習還需額外 1 學分。

d: The Programmes will be considered for a joint admission. Students will choose their Majors via internal application.
BSocSc (Hons) in European Studies – French/German Stream

European civilisation is among the most influential in the world. The European Union has emerged as a major actor in world politics and economics; its growth and development are of vital global importance. Students will undergo rigorous training in French or German up to levels of academic and professional fluency. They may also be eligible for one of the double degree programmes with our European partners. By the time of graduation, students will have a firm knowledge of the European world and possess the communicative skills necessary for a future professional or academic career in the fields of European-Asian relations. The Programme includes a study year abroad (i.e. in the 3rd year of study) in a French or German speaking country.
BSocSc (Hons) in Geography

The Programme provides a solid training in geographical theories and methods, and helps students acquire intellectual and practical skills to analyse, assess and interpret geographical information both independently and as part of a team. It aims to provide students with a comprehensive knowledge of spatial order and the interdependence of different regions of the world, and a critical understanding of environmental and socio-economic development issues with a focus on global-local connections. The Programme also provides students with the ability to apply a variety of geographical techniques and methods to analyse and to interpret diverse people-environment interactions.
BSocSc (Hons) in Global & China Studies

The Programme trains students to explore the on-going transformations and engage with indigenous communities inside and beyond China. It highlights the situation of a changing China in the evolving world order. Students will study the socio-political, economic, environmental, and cultural processes of globalisation and the developments in China, and gain opportunities of language training and experiential learning in Hong Kong, Mainland China, and overseas via international exchange opportunities. The Programme trains students to understand Hong Kong, China and the world in relational and comparative perspectives. It also cultivates cosmopolitan, intercultural citizens who think globally and act locally.
BSocSc (Hons) in Government & International Studies

The Programme offers an immersive exploration of global politics and political science. It equips students with knowledge in key areas such as comparative politics, international relations, political philosophy, geopolitics, public administration and policy studies. Our curriculum uniquely focuses on the politics of Hong Kong, Mainland China, the Asia-Pacific region, and Europe, offering a global perspective that is both diverse and comprehensive. Students will also be trained in cutting-edge research methods and given the experience to conduct original research. Graduates will be well-prepared for global careers in public affairs, government, business, philanthropy, media, and international development. Our all-rounded curriculum ensures that students develop critical thinking, analytical, and practical skills necessary for success in these fields.
BA (Hons) in History

The Programme aims to help students develop a holistic perspective of history. It provides a balanced curriculum with equal emphasis on China and the global world. After completing the programme, students will possess a sound understanding of major events and movements that have shaped the growth of the human community, as well as the skills necessary to trace the historical roots of contemporary issues and to analyse worldwide the impact of individual events. Students will develop a critical and broadminded attitude toward the traditions and cultural heritage of different civilisations.
BSocSc (Hons) in Sociology

The Programme offers a comprehensive exploration of social relationships within global, regional, and local institutional contexts, underpinned by rigorous and cutting-edge data analysis and research methodologies. This programme is designed to cultivate students' ability in three key areas: (1) understanding persistence and change in social actions and structures and how they relate to diverse social institutions; (2) fostering a critical comprehension of social values and meanings of social behaviours; and (3) nurturing the capacity to undertake rigorous research on pertinent social issues.
Transdisciplinary Second Majors / Second Majors

The University envisions the importance of transdisciplinary innovations in response to the global challenges and offers a flexible curriculum structure that is much more agile and fits the present and yet-to-known future needs. Students of designated programmes will have the opportunity to opt for a transdisciplinary second major (TSM) / second major (SM) on top of their major. TSMs are geared for particular talent needs in Hong Kong and prepare students to pool knowledge from disciplines to excel in multiple careers, whereas SMs prepare students to gain in-depth knowledge from another discipline to complement the first major. This approach equips students not only for their careers, but also the future development of their respective fields. Seven TSMs and two SMs are launched in the 2025/26 academic year. Please click here for more details.
Student Learning Experiences
BSocSc (Hons) in European Studies – French/German Stream

European Studies is a global programme with a special emphasis on the French- and German-speaking world. In addition to the academic exchange and internship opportunities in Europe, it also offers numerous intercultural seminars, workshops, as well as international service-learning, career talks and visits in various European corporations and organisations, that operate in the Greater Bay Area and the Asia-Pacific.
BSocSc (Hons) in Geography

Geography students will have opportunities to participate in local and regional field trips and subject-related fieldwork and practical work. In addition, a mandatory field camp of around 4 to 9 days is organised for Year 3 students in semester 2 of every year. The past field camps have been held in the U.S., Australia, Mainland China and Southeast Asia, etc.

Besides, students will be able to participate in service-learning and interdisciplinary courses and projects and become responsible citizens with a global outlook. Students will examine social and/or environmental issues and leverage the geographical training to create possible solutions.
BSocSc (Hons) in Global & China Studies

The Programme normally organises the Summer Sojourn I in mainland China for the second-year students. Students may also choose between Global Work Placement and Summer Sojourn II in European countries during their third or fourth year of study.
BSocSc (Hons) in Government & International Studies
BA (Hons) in History
BSocSc (Hons) in Sociology

These Programmes offer the best student experience by enabling students to expand social network through interacting with students and academic staff from a variety of backgrounds, e.g. course-related and outside classroom learning organised by the Major Departments and/or student societies.

All Programmes also offer opportunities in local and/or overseas internship such as Social Sciences Internship and USA Disney Internship Programmes, and exchange with overseas agencies, firms and universities available from the University, Faculty, and Departments.
Career Opportunities
BSocSc (Hons) in European Studies – French/German Stream

Multinational corporations; European government or business organisations (e.g. Consulates and Chambers of Commerce); media and communication; finance/banking; trading/merchandising; transport/logistics; retail; tourism, cultural and education sectors.
BSocSc (Hons) in Geography
Commerce/finance, teaching/research, civil service, the media, tourism, administration/management, community/social services, and non-governmental organisations
BSocSc (Hons) in Global & China Studies

International business, trade and development, consultancy work, tourism, marketing, education and research, management, public relations, media and communication, international organisations, government agencies, NGOs.
BSocSc (Hons) in Government & International Studies
Civil service, media, local and international non-governmental organisations, social services, academic and commerce, district organisations, local and international think tanks.
BA (Hons) in History
Teaching, museum and archive work, civil service, cultural affairs, business, the media, publishing, or journalism.
BSocSc (Hons) in Sociology
Careers in social research, journalism and media, social services, education, civil services, public relations, marketing, administrative management, and human resources management.
z: 這些課程將被考慮聯合錄取。學生將透過內部申請選擇專業。
歐洲研究（榮譽）社會科學學士 – 法語/德語流
歐洲文明是世界上最有影響力的文明之一。歐盟已成為世界政治和經濟的主要參與者；它的成長和發展對全球具有至關重要的意義。學生將接受嚴格的法語或德語培訓，達到學術和專業流利程度。他們也可能有資格參加我們的歐洲合作夥伴的雙學位課程之一。畢業時，學生將對歐洲世界有深入的了解，並具備未來歐亞關係領域專業或學術生涯所需的溝通技巧。該計劃包括在法語或德語國家出國留學（即第三年學習）。
地理學（榮譽）社會科學學士
該計畫提供紮實的地理理論和方法培訓，幫助學生獲得獨立和團隊分析、評估和解釋地理資訊的知識和實踐技能。它旨在為學生提供關於空間秩序和世界不同地區相互依存的全面知識，以及對環境和社會經濟發展問題的批判性理解，重點關注全球與地方的聯繫。該計劃還使學生能夠應用各種地理技術和方法來分析和解釋不同的人與環境的相互作用。
全球與中國研究（榮譽）社會科學學士
該計畫培訓學生探索正在發生的變革，並與中國境內外的原住民社區互動。它凸顯了在不斷演變的世界秩序中不斷變化的中國的處境。學生將研究全球化的社會政治、經濟、環境和文化進程以及中國的發展，並透過國際交流機會獲得在香港、中國內地和海外進行語言培訓和體驗式學習的機會。本課程培養學生從關係和比較的角度了解香港、中國和世界。它還培養具有全球視野、在地化行動的國際化、跨文化公民。
政府與國際研究（榮譽）社會科學學士

該計劃提供對全球政治和政治科學的身臨其境的探索。它為學生提供比較政治、國際關係、政治哲學、地緣政治、公共管理和政策研究等關鍵領域的知識。我們的課程獨特地專注於香港、中國大陸、亞太地區和歐洲的政治，提供多元化和全面的全球視野。學生還將接受前沿研究方法的培訓，並獲得進行原創研究的經驗。畢業生將為公共事務、政府、商業、慈善、媒體和國際發展等領域的全球職業做好充分準備。我們全面的課程確保學生培養在這些領域取得成功所需的批判性思維、分析和實踐技能。
歷史（榮譽）文學士
該計劃旨在幫助學生發展歷史的整體視角。它提供均衡的課程，並重視中國和全球。完成課程後，學生將對影響人類社會發展的重大事件和運動有深入的了解，以及追溯當代問題的歷史根源和分析全球個別事件的影響所需的技能。學生將對不同文明的傳統和文化遺產培養批判性和寬廣的態度。
社會學（榮譽）理學士
該計劃以嚴格和前沿的數據分析和研究方法為基礎，對全球、區域和地方機構背景下的社會關係進行全面探索。本課程旨在培養學生在三個關鍵領域的能力：（1）理解社會行為和結構的持久性和變化以及它們如何與不同的社會機構相關； (2) 培養對社會價值觀和社會行為意義的批判性理解； (3) 培養對相關社會問題進行嚴格研究的能力。
跨學科第二專業/第二專業

該大學預見跨學科創新對於應對全球挑戰的重要性，並提供靈活的課程結構，該結構更加靈活，適合當前和未知的未來需求。指定課程的學生將有機會在專業之外選擇跨學科第二專業（TSM）/第二專業（SM）。 TSM 旨在滿足香港的特殊人才需求，幫助學生匯集學科知識，在多種職業中脫穎而出，而 SM 則幫助學生從另一學科獲得深入的知識，以補充第一個專業。這種方法不僅為學生的職業生涯做好準備，也為各自領域的未來發展做好準備。 2025/26 學年推出 7 個 TSM 和 2 個 SM。請點擊此處了解更多詳情。
學生學習經歷
歐洲研究（榮譽）社會科學學士 – 法語/德語流
歐洲研究是一個全球性項目，特別注重法語和德語世界。除了在歐洲的學術交流和實習機會外，它還提供眾多的跨文化研討會、工作坊，以及國際服務學習、職業講座和參觀在大灣區和亞太地區運營的各個歐洲公司和組織。
地理學（榮譽）社會科學學士
地理學生將有機會參與當地和區域實地考察以及與學科相關的實地考察和實踐工作。此外，每年第二學期還會為三年級學生舉辦為期約 4 至 9 天的強制性野外露營。歷屆野外營曾在美國、澳洲、中國大陸、東南亞等地舉辦。
此外，學生將能夠參與服務學習和跨學科課程和項目，成為具有全球視野的負責任的公民。學生將研究社會和/或環境問題，並利用地理培訓來創造可能的解決方案。
全球與中國研究（榮譽）社會科學學士
計畫通常為二年級學生組織暑期旅居中國大陸一期。學生在第三年或第四年的學習期間還可以選擇歐洲國家的全球工作實習和暑期寄居 II。
政府與國際研究（榮譽）社會科學學士
歷史（榮譽）文學士
社會學（榮譽）理學士
這些項目使學生能夠透過與來自不同背景的學生和學術人員互動來擴展社交網絡，從而提供最佳的學生體驗。由主要係所和/或學生社團組織的與課程相關的學習和課外學習。
所有項目還提供本地和/或海外實習機會，例如社會科學實習和美國迪士尼實習項目，以及與大學、學院和部門提供的海外機構、公司和大學進行交流。
職業機會
歐洲研究（榮譽）社會科學學士 – 法語/德語流
跨國公司；歐洲政府或商業組織（例如領事館和商會）；媒體和傳播；金融/銀行；貿易/推銷；運輸/物流；零售;旅遊、文化、教育等行業。
地理學（榮譽）社會科學學士
商業/金融、教學/研究、公務員、媒體、旅遊、行政/管理、社區/社會服務和非政府組織
全球與中國研究（榮譽）社會科學學士
國際商務、貿易與發展、諮詢工作、旅遊、行銷、教育與研究、管理、公共關係、媒體與傳播、國際組織、政府機構、非政府組織。
政府與國際研究（榮譽）社會科學學士
公務員、媒體、本地和國際非政府組織、社會服務、學術和商業、地區組織、本地和國際智囊團。
歷史（榮譽）文學士
教學、博物館和檔案工作、公務員、文化事務、商業、媒體、出版或新聞。
社會學（榮譽）理學士
社會研究、新聞與媒體、社會服務、教育、公務員、公共關係、行銷、行政管理和人力資源管理等職業。

d: To be physically active is an integral and important part of healthy living. With the increasing awareness and need for quality and active lifestyles, the number of public and private sport facilities, sport clubs, fitness clubs and residential clubhouses has increased substantially over the years. There is a high demand for professional management of sports and recreation programmes and facilities as well as delivery of quality physical education in school and exercise training in the community environments. With the continuous demand for trained graduates in the field of physical education, sport and recreation management, the Bachelor of Arts (Hons) in Physical Education and Recreation Management (PERM) Programme was established in 1992. The overall aim of the PERM Programme is to provide students with sufficient depth and breadth of knowledge, skills and practical experience (internship) in the discipline of physical education, exercise science and recreation management. Furthermore, under the University's ethos of "whole person education", students will also receive a strong liberal arts education that will prepare them for a variety of careers.
Unique Features

Starting in the 2025/26 academic year, a new major in sports science will be introduced in our existing PERM programme. This interdisciplinary path seamlessly blends traditional sports science courses with cutting-edge disciplines such as artificial intelligence, molecular biology, and Chinese medicine. This innovative curriculum not only equips students with foundational knowledge but also prepares them to tackle the complex challenges in the field of sports science. By fostering a holistic understanding of human performance and well-being, our graduates will emerge as leaders in the field, ready to make significant contributions both locally and internationally.
Specifically, the objectives of the PERM Programme are to enable students to:
• Acquire knowledge and concepts in physical activity, sports science and recreation management;
• Understand the key issues relating to sports science and recreation management in society;
• Apply knowledge and skills to effectively select, plan, conduct and manage programmes in physical education, sport, health fitness and recreation;
• Utilize a variety of assessment tools for evaluating sports performance, health-related and skill-related fitness, and recreation programmes;
• Develop critical thinking skills, independent research skills, communication skills and team work skills; and
• Foster positive attitudes towards adopting a healthy, active lifestyle.
Transdisciplinary Second Majors / Second Majors

The University envisions the importance of transdisciplinary innovations in response to the global challenges and offers a flexible curriculum structure that is much more agile and fits the present and yet-to-known future needs. Students of designated programmes will have the opportunity to opt for a transdisciplinary second major (TSM) / second major (SM) on top of their major. TSMs are geared for particular talent needs in Hong Kong and prepare students to pool knowledge from disciplines to excel in multiple careers, whereas SMs prepare students to gain in-depth knowledge from another discipline to complement the first major. This approach equips students not only for their careers, but also the future development of their respective fields. Seven TSMs and two SMs are launched in the 2025/26 academic year. Please click here for more details.
Student Learning Experiences

Students are required to complete 250 hours of internship placement separately in local and overseas. And, they are encouraged to apply exchange opportunities from one term to one academic year. Services learning are provided in various courses.
Career Opportunities
Graduates of the PERM Programme are employed in sport and recreation programme planning and management in the following agencies:
• Leisure and Cultural Services Department (Government)
• Disciplinary Forces (Government)
• National Sports Associations
• Hong Kong Sports Institute
• Non-Government Organisations (e.g. Chinese YMCA, Hong Kong Federation of Youth Groups)
• Sport Marketing and Consultancy Companies
• Sports Media
• Recreation Camps
• Residential Clubhouses and Private Recreation Clubs
• Fitness Centres
• Schools/Higher Education Institutes (Teaching Physical Education)
z: 身体活动是健康生活不可或缺的重要组成部分。隨著人們對優質和積極生活方式的認識和需求不斷提高，公共和私人體育設施、體育俱樂部、健身俱樂部和住宅俱樂部的數量多年來大幅增加。对体育和娱乐项目和设施的专业管理以及在学校提供优质体育教育和在社区环境中进行运动训练的需求很高。隨著體育教育、體育和娛樂管理領域對受過訓練的畢業生的持續需求，體育教育和娛樂管理（榮譽）文學士（PERM）課程於1992年設立。 PERM課程的總體目標是為學生提供體育、運動科學和娛樂管理學科足夠深度和廣度的知識、技能和實踐經驗（實習）。此外，在大学“全人教育”的校风下，学生还将接受强有力的文科教育，为他们从事各种职业做好准备。
獨特的特點
從2025/26學年開始，我們現有的PERM課程將引進一個新的運動科學專業。這條跨學科路徑將傳統運動科學課程與人工智慧、分子生物學、中醫學等前沿學科無縫融合。這種創新課程不僅為學生提供基礎知識，也為他們應對運動科學領域的複雜挑戰做好準備。透過培養對人類表現和福祉的全面理解，我們的畢業生將成為該領域的領導者，準備在本地和國際上做出重大貢獻。
具體而言，PERM 計劃的目標是使學生能夠：
• 獲得體育活動、體育科學和娛樂管理的知識和概念；
• 了解社會運動科學和娛樂管理的關鍵議題；
• 應用知識和技能有效地選擇、規劃、實施和管理體育、運動、健康健身和娛樂項目；
• 利用各種評估工具來評估運動表現、與健康相關和技能相關的健身以及娛樂計劃；
• 培養批判性思考能力、獨立研究能力、溝通能力和團隊合作能力；和
• 培養積極的態度，採取健康、積極的生活方式。
跨學科第二專業/第二專業

該大學預見跨學科創新對於應對全球挑戰的重要性，並提供靈活的課程結構，該結構更加靈活，適合當前和未知的未來需求。指定課程的學生將有機會在專業之外選擇跨學科第二專業（TSM）/第二專業（SM）。 TSM 旨在滿足香港的特殊人才需求，幫助學生匯集學科知識，在多種職業中脫穎而出，而 SM 則幫助學生從另一學科獲得深入的知識，以補充第一個專業。這種方法不僅為學生的職業生涯做好準備，也為各自領域的未來發展做好準備。 2025/26 學年推出 7 個 TSM 和 2 個 SM。請點擊此處了解更多詳情。
學生學習經歷
學生須在本地和海外分別完成250小時的實習。並且，鼓勵他們申請從一學期到一學年的交流機會。各種課程提供服務學習。
職業機會
PERM課程的畢業生受僱於以下機構從事體育和娛樂項目的規劃和管理：
• 康樂及文化事務署（政府）
• 紀律部隊（政府）
• 美國國家體育協會
• 香港體育學院
• 非政府組織（如中華基督教青年會、香港青年協會）
• 運動行銷與顧問公司
• 體育媒體
• 休閒營
• 住宅俱樂部和私人休閒俱樂部
• 健身中心
• 學校/高等教育機構（體育教學）

d: The Department of Social Work is one of the leading providers of social work training and education in Hong Kong. The four-year Bachelor of Social Work (Hons) Programme aims to equip students with knowledge and professional values in social work so that graduates can effectively meet the social service needs of the community in a flexible, realistic, creative and professional yet critical manner.

In the four-year curriculum, students are required to study a total of 128 units, including 4 units of Social Sciences common core, 78 units of Social Work Major courses (including Honours Project and Major electives), 31 units of General Education courses and 15 units of Elective courses. The Social Work Major courses are structured into four areas, namely (a) Human Behaviour and Social Environment, (b) Social Work Theory and Practice, (c) Social Policy, Research and Administration, and (d) Fieldwork. Graduates of our Bachelor of Social Work (Hons) Programme are recognised by most social work professional bodies at the international level. They can register as Registered Social Workers (RSW) with the Social Workers Registration Board in Hong Kong.
Unique Features

Students are required to attend another 100 hours of non-credit bearing pre-placement activities, a growth group, and four levels of integrative tutorials over four years. Following the University’s internationalisation strategy, there are growing opportunities for student exchange, overseas placements, visits from overseas scholars and other related activities to substantiate experiential and academic learning.
Student Learning Experiences

All social work students are required to undertake two fieldwork placements in their Year 3 and Year 4 study. Each supervised fieldwork placement is of 400 hours, thus adding up to 800 hours in total plus another 100 hours of pre-placement work.

All students are given an opportunity to consider applying for pursuing an exchange programme either in Year 2 or Year 3 study. Students may be able to finish the programme within 4 years if they pursue the exchange programme in semester 2 of Year 2 study and follow through the study plan provided. If it lasts for two semesters, the eligible ones will need to finish the whole Programme in five years.
Career Opportunities

Graduates holding a Bachelor of Social Work (Hons) degree are qualified to apply as Registered Social Workers (RSW) in Hong Kong according to the Social Workers Registration Ordinance 1997. They are eligible to be employed as Assistant Social Work Officers in the Social Welfare Department or non-governmental organisations in Hong Kong.
z: 社會工作學係是香港領先的社會工作培訓和教育機構之一。為期四年的社會工作（榮譽）學士課程旨在培養學生社會工作的知識和專業價值觀，使畢業生能夠以靈活、務實、創新、專業而又批判的方式，有效地滿足社會的社會服務需求。

在四年制課程中，學生共需學習128學分，其中包括4學分的社會科學共同核心課程、78學分的社會工作專業課程（包括榮譽項目和專業選修課）、31學分的通識教育課程和15學分的選修課程。社會工作專業課程分為四個領域，分別為（a）人類行為和社會環境，（b）社會工作理論與實踐，（c）社會政策、研究和管理，以及（d）實地考察。我們的社會工作（榮譽）學士課程的畢業生受到大多數國際社會工作專業機構的認可。他們可以向香港社會工作者註冊管理局註冊為註冊社會工作者（RSW）。
獨特的特點
學生需要在四年內參加另外 100 小時的不計學分的預安置活動、成長小組和四個級別的綜合教程。隨著大學的國際化策略，學生交流、海外實習、海外學者訪問和其他相關活動的機會越來越多，以充實體驗和學術學習。
學生學習經歷
所有社會工作學生都必須在三年級和四年級學習中進行兩次實地考察。每次受監督的實地考察實習時間為 400 小時，因此總共 800 小時，加上另外 100 小時的實習前工作。
所有學生都有機會考慮在二年級或三年級學習中申請交換計畫。如果學生在二年級學習的第二學期參加交換專案並遵循所提供的學習計劃，則可以在 4 年內完成課程。如果持續兩個學期，符合資格的學生需要在五年內完成整個專案。
職業機會
持有社會工作（榮譽）學士學位的畢業生，可根據《1997年社會工作者註冊條例》申請成為香港註冊社會工作者（RSW），並有資格受聘於香港社會福利署或非政府機構擔任助理社會工作主任。

d: Programme Vision

Bachelor of Arts (Hons) in Visual Arts programme celebrates the interdisciplinary intersections within art, design and media in between. Recent developments have introduced new processes, technology and situations that have resulted in an expanded notion of artistic practices beyond the traditional ways of engaging with and learning about the visual arts. The Academy considers all creative disciplines as equally valuable outlets for creative ideas and prepares its students to think, act and respond creatively to the circumstances around them.
Teaching Philosophy

The Bachelor of Arts (Hons) in Visual Arts Programme at the Academy of Visual Arts is a professional degree that focuses on intensive practice-led work in the visual arts supported by a programme in General Education. It emphasises creativity, versatility, and intelligent articulation, thus enabling its graduates to enter professional, studio-based careers in such fields as studio arts, design, and/or craft after earning the degree. Our BA-students have the opportunity to develop technical competencies, informed aesthetic judgment, and an understanding of the context in which contemporary work is created, rooted in the ever-shifting cultural climate of creative production.
Programme Structure

The Bachelor of Arts (Hons) in Visual Arts Programme is a comprehensive study programme in visual arts that incorporates subjects from across the scope of fine arts, design, craft and art theory. As a guiding principle of the programme, students will progress from breadth to depth over the time of study. Accordingly upon entry to the programme and completion of the required introductory courses, all students may choose electives that match with their personal preferences, their talent, and/or professional career intentions. Based on their choices in Year 2 they will further choose their courses in Year 3 and Year 4, thereby gradually developing a focus in their studies, which will finally articulate in one of two available programme concentrations:
• Studio and Media Arts (SMA); or
• Craft and Design (CD)
Unique Features
• Leading practice-based art & design academy in Hong Kong
• International teaching team and first-class studio facilities
• Professional degree, professional career
Student Learning Experiences

We require all students of the Bachelor of Arts (Hons) in Visual Arts programme to undertake a self-organised non-credit-bearing work experience (internship, work placement, or similar) during their time of study. The work experience links classroom theory to professional practice and provides the student with learning experiences beyond the academic programme. Such experiences are invaluable for the student's professional and personal development, giving them the opportunity to experience the wider arenas of the creative and cultural sectors.
Career Opportunities

The majority of our graduates are full-time employed, work in their own businesses or as freelancers. Among the full-time/self-employed graduates, the greater part works in the creative and cultural sectors, with a significant proportion also in visual arts education, or in public relations and communication, marketing or research.
z: 專案願景
視覺藝術（榮譽）文學士課程慶祝藝術、設計和媒體之間的跨學科交叉。最近的發展引入了新的流程、技術和情況，導致藝術實踐的概念超越了參與和學習視覺藝術的傳統方式。學院將所有創意學科視為具有同等價值的創意管道，培養學生創造性地思考、行動和應對周圍環境的能力。
教學理念
視覺藝術學院的視覺藝術文學士（榮譽）課程是一個專業學位，專注於由通識教育課程支持的以實踐為主導的視覺藝術密集工作。它強調創造力、多功能性和智慧表達，從而使其畢業生能夠在獲得學位後進入工作室藝術、設計和/或工藝等領域的專業工作室職業。我們的文學士學生有機會發展技術能力、知情的美學判斷力，並了解當代作品創作的背景，植根於不斷變化的創意生產文化氛圍。
程式結構
視覺藝術（榮譽）文學士課程是視覺藝術的綜合研究課程，涵蓋美術、設計、工藝和藝術理論等領域的學科。作為課程的指導原則，學生將在學習過程中從廣度到深度取得進步。因此，在進入該專案並完成所需的入門課程後，所有學生都可以選擇與其個人喜好、才能和/或職業意圖相符的選修課程。根據他們在第二年的選擇，他們將進一步選擇第三年和第四年的課程，從而逐漸發展他們的學習重點，最終將在兩個可用的課程集中之一中闡明：
• 工作室與媒體藝術（SMA）；或者
• 製程與設計（CD）
獨特的特點
• 香港領先的實踐藝術與設計學院
• 國際化的教學團隊和一流的工作室設施
• 專業學位、職業生涯
學生學習經歷
我們要求所有視覺藝術（榮譽）文學士課程的學生在學習期間自行組織不計學分的工作經驗（實習、工作實習或類似）。工作經驗將課堂理論與專業實踐聯繫起來，並為學生提供學術課程以外的學習經驗。這些經驗對於學生的專業和個人發展非常寶貴，讓他們有機會體驗創意和文化領域的更廣泛領域。
職業機會
我們的畢業生大多是全職僱員，在自己的企業工作或作為自由工作者。在全職/自營職業的畢業生中，大部分在創意和文化領域工作，其中很大一部分還從事視覺藝術教育、公共關係和傳播、行銷或研究。

d: The aim of the programme is to nurture the next-generation business leaders for the international job market, equipped with the latest technical knowhow to succeed in fast-changing technologies for business. The programme has the following objectives:

• To provide students with a solid knowledge base and skill set in data analytics that enable them to create innovative applications in business organisations, particularly in finance, economics, and consumer/marketing business;

• To provide students with good data-driven problem-solving skills and help them to develop an analytical and creative mind for data analytics solution design, management and planning in business organisations;
• To equip students with good inter-personal and communication skills for effective collaboration between IT and business units; and

• To equip students with a solid knowledge and experience in developing data analytics projects to support their career advancement and further studies in business computing, data analytics or related fields.

Graduates of this programme are expected to possess knowledge and professional skills in essential areas of computer science, economics, finance and decision sciences related to business computing. In addition to all the essential areas, graduates will also possess in-depth knowledge and professional skills in some specific areas in FinTech, Blockchain, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning and advanced programming and data-analytics skills, so as to broaden their awareness in business applications that involve Artificial Intelligence and Big Data Analysis.
Unique Features
The programme is co-offered by the Faculty of Science (Department of Computer Science) and the School of Business.
The programme is designed with overseas and/or local data analytics internship.
Student Learning Experiences
Students can opt for international exchange to diversify their learning experiences.
Students are able to undertake internship to gain Business Technology work experience.
Students are able to join an industry mentoring scheme to learn from data analytics professionals or practitioners.
Career Opportunities

We expect our graduates' skills to be attractive to many employers: they can start their careers as business communicators, data scientists, data developers, data engineers, database administrators, financial analysts, market researchers, and other IT-related professionals, or engage in financial services jobs. The training in this programme would also facilitate their ventures into launching their own businesses.
Scholarships
• Admissions Scholarship
• Global Experience Scholarship
Please refer to https://bcda.comp.hkbu.edu.hk/scholarship for details.
z: 該計劃的目的是為國際就業市場培養下一代商業領袖，讓他們掌握最新的技術知識，以在快速變化的商業技術中取得成功。該計劃有以下目標：
• 為學生提供紮實的數據分析知識基礎和技能，使他們能夠在商業組織中創建創新應用程序，特別是在金融、經濟和消費者/行銷業務中；
• 為學生提供良好的數據驅動問題解決技能，幫助他們培養商業組織中數據分析解決方案設計、管理和規劃的分析和創新思維；
• 培養學生良好的人際溝通和溝通技巧，以便IT部門和業務部門之間進行有效的協作；和
• 為學生提供開發數據分析專案的紮實知識和經驗，以支持他們的職業發展和在商業計算、數據分析或相關領域的進一步學習。
該計畫的畢業生應具備與商業計算相關的電腦科學、經濟學、金融和決策科學等重要領域的知識和專業技能。除了所有必要領域外，畢業生還將在金融科技、區塊鏈、人工智慧、機器學習等特定領域擁有深入的知識和專業技能，以及高級程式設計和數據分析技能，從而擴大他們在涉及人工智慧和大數據分析的商業應用方面的認識。
獨特的特點
本課程由理學院（電腦科學系）和商學院共同開設。
該計劃是根據海外和/或本地數據分析實習而設計的。
學生學習經歷
學生可以選擇國際交流以使他們的學習經驗多樣化。
學生可以進行實習以獲得商業技術工作經驗。
學生可以參加行業指導計劃，向數據分析專業人士或從業者學習。
職業機會
我們期望我們畢業生的技能對許多雇主有吸引力：他們可以作為業務溝通者、資料科學家、資料開發人員、資料工程師、資料庫管理員、金融分析師、市場研究人員和其他 IT 相關專業人員開始職業生涯，或從事金融服務工作。該計劃的培訓也將促進他們創辦自己的企業。
獎學金
• 入學獎學金
• 全球經驗獎學金
詳情請參閱https://bcda.comp.hkbu.edu.hk/scholarship。

d: This transdisciplinary programme is designed for tech savvy individuals who wish to pursue a career in applying technologies in the arts and culture sector and creative industries.

The arts and culture sector and creative industries have been expanding rapidly in Hong Kong and the Mainland. The integration of various technologies into art creation have led to many possibilities unimagined before. Specialists are needed to push for the future forms of arts and culture and creative industries.

HKBU is recognised for its strengths in film, acting, music, visual arts, culture and humanities, as well as strong connections with the arts and culture sector and creative industries. Creative Media and Practice is indeed one of the three interdisciplinary research clusters in HKBU’s 10-year Strategic Plan.

Graduates of this programme are capable of creating and delivering contents in the arts and culture sector and creative industries, achieving technology-augmented creativity and viewer experience, and using technologies such as extended realities in film, theatre, game development and designing museum experience and heritage conservation.
The programme is open to students from all academic backgrounds.
Unique Features

Students will work closely in teams alongside with professors and professionals who are interested in different aspects of arts and culture and creative industries. They will study in the existing facilities in HKBU such as the Augmented Reality Lab and Creative Robotics Lab, as well as the state-of-the-art facilities of the Jockey Club Campus of Creativity to be opened in 2024/25. Students will have many opportunities to complete multiple creative projects.
Student Learning Experiences

The key learning activities, particularly in the past few years, are collaboration on art-tech creation, arts and culture projects and experiential learning. Students will work with renowned professors and experts from around the world and the Mainland. They will also undergo multiple experiential learning activities in Hong Kong, the Mainland particularly the Greater Bay Area, and overseas.
Career Opportunities

Graduates can pursue independent creative endeavours or secure positions in film, music, gaming, and performing arts groups. Additionally, there are opportunities in production companies and creative agencies where they can work as:
• Interactive and Software Designers
• Sound Designers
• Video Designers
• Immersive Spatial Designers
• Product Designers
• Producers
• Technical Managers
• Artistic or Creative Directors

Graduates can leverage their expertise in immersive art to enhance viewer experiences in museums, galleries, and the MICE (meetings, incentives, conferences, and exhibitions) industries by integrating physical and virtual elements. Furthermore, museums, art traders, and art groups seek graduates skilled in the digitalisation and authentication of art.

The programme also provides a solid foundation for those wishing to continue their education through postgraduate studies, both locally and internationally. As new arts and culture venues emerge, the demand for art and technology specialists is expected to grow significantly.
z: 這個跨學科計畫專為那些希望在藝術和文化領域以及創意產業應用技術的精通技術的個人而設計。
香港和內地的文化藝術和創意產業發展迅速。各種技術融入藝術創作，帶來了許多以前無法想像的可能性。需要專家來推動藝術文化和創意產業的未來形式。
浸大以其在電影、表演、音樂、視覺藝術、文化及人文學科的優勢，以及與文化藝術界和創意產業的緊密聯繫而享有盛譽。創意媒體與實踐確實是浸大十年策略計畫中的三個跨領域研究集群之一。
該計畫的畢業生能夠在藝術和文化領域以及創意產業中創作和交付內容，實現技術增強的創造力和觀眾體驗，並在電影、戲劇、遊戲開發和設計博物館體驗和遺產保護中使用擴展現實等技術。
該計劃向所有學術背景的學生開放。
獨特的特點
學生將與對藝術、文化和創意產業不同方面感興趣的教授和專業人士一起緊密合作。他們將在浸大現有的設施，如擴增實境實驗室和創意機械人實驗室，以及將於2024/25啟用的賽馬會創意校園的先進設施中學習。學生將有很多機會完成多個創意專案。
學生學習經歷
關鍵的學習活動，特別是過去幾年，是藝術技術創作、藝術和文化計畫以及體驗式學習的合作。學生將與來自世界各地和內地的知名教授和專家一起工作。他們還將在香港、內地特別是大灣區以及海外進行多項體驗式學習活動。
職業機會
畢業生可以追求獨立的創意事業或在電影、音樂、遊戲和表演藝術團體中獲得職位。此外，他們還可以在製作公司和創意機構中擔任以下職位：
• 互動與軟體設計師
• 聲音設計師
• 影片設計師
• 沉浸式空間設計師
• 產品設計師
• 製片人
• 技術經理
• 藝術或創意總監
畢業生可以利用他們在沉浸式藝術方面的專業知識，透過整合實體和虛擬元素來增強博物館、畫廊和 MICE（會議、獎勵、大會和展覽）行業的觀眾體驗。此外，博物館、藝術品交易商和藝術團體也在尋求精通藝術數位化和認證的畢業生。
該計劃還為那些希望透過本地和國際研究生學習繼續接受教育的人提供了堅實的基礎。隨著新的藝術和文化場所的出現，對藝術和技術專家的需求預計將大幅增長。

d: This transdisciplinary programme is designed for students who are business-minded and wish to pursue a career in the entertainment business and/or arts, cultural and creative industries.

Entertainment business covers a very broad coverage: film, music, media, gaming, cultural events and performances. It has been rapidly developing in Hong Kong, the Mainland and across the globe in recent years. Technologies and new forms of monetization are also changing the viewer experience drastically. Global entertainment businesses need specialists who can perform a wide range of duties including content development, licensing, finance, marketing, administration, circulation, audience development, public education and more importantly, who can support and champion the fast-evolving new forms of audience engagement.

HKBU is recognised for its strengths in film, acting, music, visual arts, culture and humanities, as well as strong connections with the industries. It is well-prepared to develop into a research and education hub for creative industries in the next few years. Creative Media and Practice is indeed one of the three interdisciplinary research clusters in HKBU’s 10-year Strategic Plan.
The programme is open to students from all academic backgrounds.
Unique Programme Features
The programme is solution-based as students will complete multiple collaborative real-life projects in the industries.

Firstly, students will work closely in teams alongside with professors and professionals who are interested in different aspects of the entertainment business and/or arts, cultural and creative industries. Secondly, students will make full use of the existing facilities in HKBU such as the Augmented Reality Lab and Creative Robotics Lab, as well as the state-of-the-art facilities of the Jockey Club Campus of Creativity newly opened in 2024/25. Thirdly, students will be given options to explore the range of theory and research across the disciplines of arts and business while mandating the completion of core units in creativity, cultural understanding, ethics, and communication.
Student Learning Experiences

Students will undergo an array of experiential learning activities such as transdisciplinary studio collaboration, industry seminars and roundtable discussions. They will work on transdisciplinary projects to provide solutions to real-life problems in the creative and cultural industries under the supervision of renowned professors and experts in and outside Hong Kong. They will attend local and overseas field trips and complete internships in the Mainland particularly the Greater Bay Area and overseas.
Upon graduation, students will have a strong portfolio documenting their achievements. Skills such as teamwork and communication will also be cultivated and assessed.
Career Opportunities

Graduates of the programme will develop transdisciplinary skills, creativity, intercultural awareness and entrepreneurial mindset that enable them to facilitate creative content creation and delivery and/or take up business positions in administration, marketing, distribution, project and event management for entertainment, arts, culture and creative industries. Graduates will be effective in running business operations, engaging the public audiences, enhancing customer services and front-stage experiences. Their employers include entertainment businesses, creative industries, cultural venues, museums, exhibition spaces, performing venues, art groups, NGOs and foundations, art traders, event organisers and the Government.
z: 此跨學科課程專為具有商業頭腦並希望在娛樂業和/或藝術、文化和創意產業發展的學生而設計。
娛樂業務涵蓋的範圍非常廣泛：電影、音樂、媒體、遊戲、文化活動和表演。近年來在香港、內地以至全球迅速發展。科技和新的貨幣化形式也正在大大改變觀眾的體驗。全球娛樂企業需要能夠履行廣泛職責的專家，包括內容開發、授權、財務、行銷、管理、流通、觀眾發展、公共教育，更重要的是，能夠支持和倡導快速發展的新形式的觀眾參與。
浸大因其在電影、表演、音樂、視覺藝術、文化及人文學科方面的優勢以及與業界的緊密聯繫而享有盛譽。它已做好充分準備，在未來幾年內發展成為創意產業的研究和教育中心。創意媒體與實踐確實是浸大十年策略計畫中的三個跨領域研究集群之一。
該計劃向所有學術背景的學生開放。
獨特的計劃特點
該計劃以解決方案為基礎，因為學生將完成該行業中的多個協作現實專案。
首先，學生將與對娛樂業和/或藝術、文化和創意產業的不同方面感興趣的教授和專業人士一起緊密合作。其次，學生將充分利用浸大現有的設施，如擴增實境實驗室和創意機器人實驗室，以及2024/25年新啟用的賽馬會創意校園的先進設施。第三，學生將有機會探索藝術和商業學科的理論和研究範圍，同時要求完成創造力、文化理解、道德和溝通等核心單元。
學生學習經歷
學生將參加一系列體驗式學習活動，例如跨學科工作室合作、行業研討會和圓桌討論。他們將在香港內外知名教授和專家的指導下開展跨學科項目，為創意和文化產業的現實問題提供解決方案。他們將參加本地及海外實地考察，並在內地特別是大灣區及海外完成實習。
畢業後，學生將擁有一個強大的作品集來記錄他們的成就。團隊合作和溝通等技能也將被培養和評估。
職業機會
該計畫的畢業生將培養跨學科技能、創造力、跨文化意識和創業思維，使他們能夠促進創意內容的創作和交付和/或在娛樂、藝術、文化和創意產業的行政、行銷、發行、專案和活動管理方面擔任商業職位。畢業生將能夠有效地開展業務運營、吸引公眾受眾、增強客戶服務和前台體驗。他們的雇主包括娛樂企業、創意產業、文化場所、博物館、展覽空間、表演場所、藝術團體、非政府組織和基金會、藝術品貿易商、活動組織者和政府。

d: Technological innovation is transforming the global landscape of health and wellness, driving changes in the society and creating new opportunities for the industry. This programme will equip students with the necessary skill-set to apply and integrate technologies with their domain knowledge in health and wellness. Graduates will be technologically competent, entrepreneurial and adventurous. They will be able to identify problems and use cutting-edge health and social technologies to meet the emerging needs in the societies.
This transdisciplinary programme consists of two concentrations – Health and Social Wellness Concentration and Health Technology and Informatics Concentration.
Health and Social Wellness Concentration

Students in the Health and Social Wellness Concentration may choose courses in social identity & health cultures, health planning and communication, smart cities for healthy living, and innovative solutions for social enhancement.
Health Technology and Informatics Concentration
Students in the Health Technology and Informatics Concentration may take courses in the health management system, biotechnology, smart living technology, and healthcare intelligence.
It is open to students from all academic backgrounds.
Unique Features

Both concentrations will adopt an integrative curriculum covering a range of coherent topics. The Health and Social Wellness Concentration will cover social identity, health communication, healthy living and social enhancement. The Health Technology and Informatics Concentration will examine health management, biotechnology, smart living and healthcare intelligence.

Teaching will be informed by cutting-edge research particularly in HKBU’s Interdisciplinary Research Clusters of Data Analytics and Artificial Intelligence and Health & Drug Discovery. Various pedagogies will be adopted such as research-led learning, problem-based and solution-driven learning, service-learning, and guided study as directed by academic advisors.
Student Learning Experiences

Students will work closely in teams alongside with professors, professionals and students to provide solutions to real-life issues in health and wellness. They will also undergo multiple experiential learning activities in and outside Hong Kong.
Career Opportunities

Graduates of the Health and Social Wellness Concentration will find positions in corporate health and wellness teams, publishing industry, family health; or work as health or wellness coach/consultant. Those of the Health Technology and Informatics Concentration may work as health informatics specialists, data-based medical diagnosticians, or health data or social impact analysts.
z: 科技創新正在改變全球健康與保健格局，推動社會變革，為產業創造新機會。該計劃將為學生提供必要的技能，將技術與他們的健康和保健領域知識相結合。畢業生將具有技術能力、創業精神和冒險精神。他們將能夠發現問題並利用尖端的健康和社會技術來滿足社會中新出現的需求。
這個跨學科計畫由兩個專業組成——健康和社會保健專業以及健康技術和資訊學專業。
健康與社會保健專業
健康和社會健康專業的學生可以選擇社會認同和健康文化、健康規劃和溝通、健康生活智慧城市以及社會增強創新解決方案等課程。
健康科技與資訊學專業
健康科技和資訊學專業的學生可以學習健康管理系統、生物科技、智慧生活科技和醫療保健智慧等課程。
它向所有學術背景的學生開放。
獨特的特點
這兩個專業都將採用涵蓋一系列連貫主題的綜合課程。健康和社會保健專業將涵蓋社會認同、健康溝通、健康生活和社會增強。健康科技和資訊學專業將研究健康管理、生物技術、智慧生活和醫療保健智慧。
教學將以尖端研究為基礎，特別是浸大的數據分析和人工智慧以及健康與藥物發現跨學科研究集群。將採用各種教學方法​​，例如研究主導型學習、基於問題和解決方案驅動的學習、服務學習以及學術顧問指導下的指導學習。
學生學習經歷
學生將與教授、專業人士和學生緊密合作，為現實生活中的健康問題提供解決方案。他們還將在香港內外進行多項體驗式學習活動。
職業機會
健康與社會保健專業的畢業生將在企業健康與保健團隊、出版業、家庭健康等領域找到職位；或擔任健康或保健教練/顧問。健康科技與資訊學專業的人員可以擔任健康資訊學專家、基於數據的醫療診斷師、健康數據或社會影響分析師。

d: Humankind is facing a more unpredictable future as technological advancement has brought disruptive changes and global problems are becoming more complex and serious. Young people need to be more adaptable, resourceful and creative in meeting future challenges. This is a future-focused programme which enables students to design their own personalised learning pathways. It is especially suitable for students who aspire to make a difference in the future world through various means, such as entrepreneurship, research, advocacy, invention and performance.

The curriculum is made up of two major components. Firstly, in the solution-based learning modules, students will go through an active and exploratory intellectual journey consisting of cycles of problem-solving. The problems are contextualised in the real-life settings and students will work in groups under the guidance of their teachers and external specialists. Secondly, students will complete a major which gives them in-depth knowledge in one or more specific domains of their choice and prepares them for further study.
The programme is open to students from all academic backgrounds.
Unique Features

The solution-based learning modules use a block design, which immerses students in one set of coherent learning activities around a problem at a time. The modules are student-centred, and guided by professors and/or professionals, and aim to facilitate deep learning toward addressing real problems. In the early years of the programme, the problems are smaller, more well-defined, and there will be more faculty guidance. As students proceed, the problems will become bigger, less well-defined, and students will become more independent with less faculty supervision. Examples include finding ways to provide support to care takers of elderly people (Year 1 or 2), revitalizing a heritage (Year 3), and making steps toward feeding the world population (Year 4). Students will play active roles in choosing the problems in the solution-based learning modules, as well as the approaches to solve these problems. The programme will give students ample autonomy and flexibility in designing their modules and curricula.

Students will benefit from a number of guided self-learning pedagogies in the programme such as service-learning, collaborative learning and research-led learning. Depending on the problems they choose, they will work intensely with community partners, professionals, artists and entrepreneurs. In addition to joining internships and exchanges outside Hong Kong, they will work with overseas students and advisors in joint projects and learning activities such as summer schools.
Career Opportunities

Graduates will be resourceful and innovative problem-solvers and have a dedicated personal mission. They may become entrepreneurs, consultants, researchers, or artists, among other options. Their skills and abilities will enable them to take on multiple careers, which will be a trend in the future society, and make them especially competitive in jobs or industries that are yet to emerge.
z: 科技進步帶來顛覆性變革，全球性問題更加複雜嚴峻，人類面臨的未來更難以預測。年輕人在應對未來挑戰時需要更具適應能力、足智多謀和創造力。這是一個著眼於未來的計劃，使學生能夠設計自己的個人化學習路徑。它特別適合那些渴望透過創業、研究、倡導、發明和表演等多種方式改變未來世界的學生。
該課程由兩個主要部分組成。首先，在基於解決方案的學習模組中，學生將經歷一個由解決問題的循環組成的主動和探索性的智力之旅。這些問題都與現實生活環境有關，學生將在老師和外部專家的指導下進行小組合作。其次，學生將完成一門專業，使他們在自己選擇的一個或多個特定領域中獲得深入的知識，並為進一步的學習做好準備。
該計劃向所有學術背景的學生開放。
獨特的特點

基於解決方案的學習模組採用塊式設計，讓學生一次圍繞一個問題沉浸在一組連貫的學習活動中。這些模組以學生為中心，由教授和/或專業人士指導，旨在促進深度學習解決實際問題。在計畫的最初幾年，問題更小、更明確，並且會有更多的教師指導。隨著學生的持續學習，問題將變得更大、更不明確，學生將變得更加獨立，而教師的監督也將減少。例子包括尋找方法為老年人的照顧者提供支持（第一年或第二年）、振興遺產（第三年）以及採取措施養活世界人口（第四年）。學生將在基於解決方案的學習模組中選擇問題以及解決這些問題的方法中發揮積極作用。該計劃將為學生提供設計模組和課程的充分自主權和靈活性。
學生將受益於該計畫中的許多指導性自學教學法，例如服務學習、協作學習和研究主導的學習。根據他們選擇的問題，他們將與社區合作夥伴、專業人士、藝術家和企業家密切合作。除了參加香港以外的實習和交流外，他們還將與海外學生和顧問合作進行暑期學校等聯合計畫和學習活動。
職業機會
畢業生將成為足智多謀、富有創新精神的問題解決者，並肩負著奉獻的個人使命。他們可能成為企業家、顧問、研究人員或藝術家等。他們的技能和能力將使他們能夠從事多種職業，這將是未來社會的趨勢，並使他們在尚未出現的工作或行業中具有特別的競爭力。

d: This transdisciplinary programme educates forward-looking graduates who will be well-versed in essential knowledge of humanities and digital technologies, as well as capable of integrating them for i) innovative management of digital cultural resources, ii) critical analysis and development of innovation policies to foster positive impact of technology deployment across the social environment with diversity, and iii) managing innovation projects with strategic consideration of human factors for successful digital transformation. The programme emphasizes humanities play a key role in shaping technology development for our digital futures in the rapidly changing world. Our graduates can make creative use of technologies with good understanding of humanities aspects to navigate the upcoming transformation in different sectors of the society, to shape the digital futures, and to positively impact our civilization.

The graduates, based on their aspirations, can make different types of innovation to the digital futures, take a leading role in shaping policymaking about technology, manage and advise on technology research and development, and pursue careers in the arts and the cultural sectors, in government and public administration, in social and technology research, in NGOs and education sectors, in media, journalism and communications, in marketing and public relations, as well as in professions of the future that are and will continue to be on the rise.
Unique Features
• Transdisciplinary: integrating humanities perspectives with digital technologies for sustainable innovation
• Transcultural: fostering competence of “involving, encompassing, or extending across two or more cultures”
• Flexible: providing options of learning pathways: • Creativity and Culture – interaction and co-evolution/co-shaping of cultures and creativities;
• Innovation, Policy and Value – policies and strategies which can foster innovation and maximize the societal, economic and ethical value of creative activities; and

• Innovation Project Management – management of digital innovation projects that involve creative problem-solving, the development of new digital products or services, and the implementation of innovative ideas.
• Solution-based: putting emphasis on experiential learning and community engagement
Student Learning Experiences

Other than offering students internship opportunities to allow them to have actual experiences in different industries, this programme also adopts solution-based learning and students will complete multiple collaborative real-life projects in the industries to foster diversity, shared embodied experience, future vision, and civil society’s active role in shaping the innovation process. Students are provided with various occasions to work closely in teams alongside professors, professionals and students who are interested in different aspects of the digital futures and humanities to engage in the process of co-creation to shape technological development for the benefit of communities.
Career Opportunities

Deep humanities learning integrated with cutting-edge digital technologies enables our graduates to foster positive impact of technology deployment, and managing innovation projects with strategic consideration of human factors. Our graduates are able to take a leading role in shaping policymaking about technology, manage and advise on technology research and development, and pursue thrilling careers in the arts and the cultural sectors, in government and public administration, in social and technology research, in NGOs and education sectors, in media, journalism and communications, in marketing and public relations, as well as in professions of the future that are and will continue to be on the rise.
Some possible career paths:
• Creativity and Culture: E.g., digital culture programme manager, cultural strategist, digital archivist, digital content specialist, digital curator, user experience designer, arts educator, etc.
• Innovation, Policy and Value: E.g., innovation policy analyst, community development specialist, policy communications specialist, research and development manager, social media analyst, etc.

• Innovation Project Management: E.g., innovation project manager, cultural event planner, product innovation manager, arts and culture entrepreneur, social innovation consultant, risk management consultant, environment, social and governance (ESG) specialist, change management consultant, etc.
The programme also prepares students for pursuing postgraduate studies in local and overseas institutions.
z: 這個跨學科項目培養前瞻性的畢業生，他們將精通人文和數位技術的基本知識，並能夠將它們整合到i）數位文化資源的創新管理，ii）批判性分析和製定創新政策，以促進技術部署在多元化的社會環境中產生積極影響，以及iii）管理創新項目，並戰略性地考慮人為因素，以實現成功的數位轉型。該計劃強調人文學科在快速變化的世界中為我們的數位未來塑造技術發展方面發揮關鍵作用。我們的畢業生可以創造性地利用技術，對人文方面有深入的了解，以引導社會不同領域即將到來的變革，塑造數位未來，並對我們的文明產生積極影響。
畢業生可以根據自己的願望，對數位未來進行不同類型的創新，在製定技術政策方面發揮主導作用，對技術研發進行管理和建議，並在藝術和文化部門、政府和公共管理、社會和技術研究、非政府組織和教育部門、媒體、新聞和傳播、營銷和公共關係以及正在和將繼續上升的未來職業中追求職業生涯。
獨特的特點
• 跨學科：將人文視角與數位技術結合以實現永續創新
• 跨文化：培養「涉及、涵蓋或延伸兩種或多種文化」的能力
• 靈活：提供學習途徑選擇： • 創造力和文化－文化和創造力的互動和共同演化/共同塑造；
• 創新、政策和價值－能夠促進創新並最大限度地發揮創意活動的社會、經濟和道德價值的政策和策略；和
• 創新專案管理－管理涉及創意問題解決、新數位產品或服務開發以及創新理念實施的數位創新專案。
• 解決方案為基礎：強調體驗式學習和社區參與
學生學習經歷
除了為學生提供實習機會，讓他們在不同行業獲得實際經驗外，該項目還採用基於解決方案的學習，學生將完成行業中的多個協作現實項目，以促進多樣性、共享的具體經驗、未來願景以及公民社會在塑造創新過程中的積極作用。為學生提供各種機會，與對數位未來和人文學科不同方面感興趣的教授、專業人士和學生進行團隊密切合作，參與共同創造的過程，以塑造技術發展，造福社區。
職業機會
深度人文學習與尖端數位技術相結合，使我們的畢業生能夠促進技術部署的積極影響，並在策略性考慮人的因素的情況下管理創新專案。我們的畢業生能夠在製定技術政策、管理技術研發並提供建議方面發揮主導作用，並在藝術和文化部門、政府和公共管理、社會和技術研究、非政府組織和教育部門、媒體、新聞和傳播、營銷和公共關係以及正在和將繼續上升的未來職業中追求激動人心的職業。
一些可能的職業道路：
• 創造力與文化：例如，數位文化專案經理、文化策略家、數位檔案管理員、數位內容專家、數位策展人、使用者體驗設計師、藝術教育家等。
• 創新、政策與價值：例如創新政策分析師、社群發展專家、政策傳播專家、研發經理、社群媒體分析師等。
• 創新專案管理：例如創新專案經理、文化活動策劃者、產品創新經理、藝術文化企業家、社會創新顧問、風險管理顧問、環境、社會和治理（ESG）專家、變革管理顧問等。
該計劃還為學生在本地和海外機構攻讀研究生課程做好準備。

d: This programme aims to equip students with an in-depth understanding of Chinese language and literature. Training in communication and practical writing skills will be provided to enhance students’ language proficiency. In the area of Chinese literature, this programme will help students to develop the ability of literary criticism. Both classical and modern literary works from a range of genres and relevant literary theories will be covered. Upon graduation, students will be able to engage in the education, government and public administration, culture and media industry.
z: 該計畫旨在讓學生深入了解中國語言和文學。將提供溝通和實用寫作技能的培訓，以提高學生的語言能力。在中國文學領域，該計畫將幫助學生培養文學批評能力。將涵蓋各種流派的古典和現代文學作品以及相關的文學理論。畢業後，學生將能夠從事教育、政府和公共管理、文化和媒體行業。

d: The Bachelor of Arts with Honours in Language Studies and Translation programme is designed to help students develop practical skills they need in linguistic analysis and translation to succeed at university, work, and beyond. With ongoing guidance and support from a team of approachable teaching staff, students will not only learn a range of linguistic and translation skills, including how to deal with the cultural dimension of translation, account for the differences between the English and Chinese languages, translate texts in specialized areas, machine translation, interpretation, etc., it also offers basic training of the theories in Language Studies and Translation Studies, preparing students for further studies in these fields. Apart from pursuing further studies, our graduates also have ready access to a wealth of career opportunities in professions such as translation, publishing, media, administration, education, etc. Graduates with relevant teacher training can apply for full exemption from the Language Proficiency Requirement for English Teachers.
z: 語言研究和翻譯榮譽文學學士學位課程旨在幫助學生培養語言分析和翻譯所需的實踐技能，以便在大學、工作及其他方面取得成功。在平易近人的教師團隊的持續指導和支持下，學生不僅將學習一系列語言和翻譯技能，包括如何處理翻譯的文化維度、解釋英漢語言之間的差異、專業領域的文本翻譯、機器翻譯、口譯等，還提供語言研究和翻譯研究的基礎理論訓練，為學生在這些領域的進一步學習做好準備。除了繼續深造外，我們的畢業生還可以在翻譯、出版、媒體、行政、教育等行業中獲得豐富的就業機會。接受過相關教師培訓的畢業生可以申請完全豁免英語教師語言能力要求。

d: The programme aims to provide students with an in-depth education and training in strategic communications, digital advertising, media design, copywriting, and branding and campaign planning. Media skills, creative thinking and communication design are emphasized. In addition to professional facilities such as photography studio, film/TV production studio, sound recording studio, video editing and design laboratories, and art studio, the programme is taught by scholars and experts of media and advertising fields to equip students with the latest practical knowledge for creative careers.

With a Bachelor of Arts in Creative Advertising and Media Design degree, students are well suited for a wide range of careers in the creative media industries such as advertising design, digital and interactive media, strategic planning, art gallery and museum, film/TV production, and media education. Opportunities for postgraduate studies are available in Hong Kong and abroad.
z: 該計畫旨在為學生提供策略傳播、數位廣告、媒體設計、文案寫作以及品牌和活動策劃的深入教育和培訓。強調媒體技能、創造性思考和溝通設計。除了攝影工作室、影視製作工作室、錄音工作室、影片編輯設計實驗室、藝術工作室等專業設施外，該計畫還由媒體和​​廣告領域的學者和專家授課，為學生提供創意職業的最新實踐知識。
擁有創意廣告和媒體設計學士學位的學生非常適合創意媒體行業的各種職業，如廣告設計、數位和互動媒體、策略規劃、美術館和博物館、電影/電視製作和媒體教育。香港和海外都有研究生學習的機會。

d: The programme intends to provide students with a broad understanding of the English language through a variety of courses in literary works, linguistics and multimedia texts. The programme equips students with a solid understanding of the expansion of western culture in the context of globalization. Through the study of English-language literature, popular culture and mass media, students will be equipped with the mastery of English language and knowledge of the cultural framework.
z: 該計畫旨在透過文學作品、語言學和多媒體文本的各種課程，讓學生對英語有更廣泛的理解。該課程使學生對全球化背景下西方文化的擴張有深入的了解。透過英語文學、流行文化和大眾傳播媒體的學習，學生將掌握英語語言和文化框架知識。

d: This programme prepares students for a professional qualification in accounting and equips them with broad-based knowledge in financial accounting, management accounting, taxation, auditing, law and accounting information systems. Graduates can seek employment as professional accountants or pursue careers in related fields such as auditing, taxation and business advisory services.

The programme is accredited by the Hong Kong Institute of Certified Public Accountants (HKICPA), the Association of Chartered Certified Accountants (ACCA), the Association of International Accountants (AIA), and CPA Australia. Graduates are eligible to register with HKICPA's Qualification Programme and claim paper exemptions from examinations of ACCA, AIA and CPA Australia.
z: 該課程為學生獲得會計專業資格做好準備，並為他們提供財務會計、管理會計、稅務、審計、法律和會計資訊系統的廣泛知識。畢業生可以尋求專業會計師的工作，或從事審計、稅務和商業諮詢服務等相關領域的職業。
本課程獲得香港會計師公會（HKICPA）、英國特許公認會計師公會（ACCA）、國際會計師公會（AIA）和澳洲會計師公會（CPA Australia）的認可。畢業生有資格註冊香港會計師公會的資格計劃，並申請ACCA、AIA和澳洲註冊會計師考試的試卷豁免。

d: The programme provides a broad-based education in the concepts, theories and practices of business management. Building on the management knowledge they have acquired in the programme, students can further choose to specialise in a particular field of study, ranging from human resource management, international business, marketing, and supply chain management. The universality of the business management knowledge and skills would provide graduates enhanced career opportunities in a wide range of professions and industries.
z: 本課程提供企業管理概念、理論和實踐的廣泛教育。基於他們在課程中獲得的管理知識，學生可以進一步選擇專注於特定的學習領域，包括人力資源管理、國際商務、行銷和供應鏈管理。商業管理知識和技能的普遍性將為畢業生在廣泛的專業和行業中提供更多的職業機會。

d: The programme is designed to equip students with global perspectives as well as knowledge and skills necessary to solve problems and make practical recommendations for multinational corporations and organisations doing business internationally.

Students enrolled in this programme will develop proficiency in a foreign language and join a one-term exchange at an overseas institution during their study. Through these unique opportunities and experiences, students will not only gain a deeper understanding of the factors shaping businesses in an international context, but also develop soft skills that will help them succeed in diverse teams or multinational organisations.
z: 該計畫旨在培養學生的全球視野以及解決問題所需的知識和技能，並為在國際上開展業務的跨國公司和組織提出切實可行的建議。
參加該計畫的學生將在學習期間提高外語水平並參加海外機構的一學期交流。透過這些獨特的機會和經驗，學生不僅可以更深入地了解國際背景下塑造企業的因素，還可以培養軟技能，幫助他們在多元化團隊或跨國組織中取得成功。

d: The Marketing programme prepares students for diverse and dynamic careers in marketing communications, advertising, public relations, and beyond. The curriculum goes beyond foundational knowledge, incorporating cutting-edge trends and marketing tools such as experiential marketing, digital marketing, and the use of artificial intelligence and big data in e-retailing and marketing analytics.

Students will benefit from abundant hands-on practical training, allowing them to apply their skills in real business settings. Graduates will be equipped with professional expertise and advanced tools, empowering them to make strategic, data-driven, and impactful decisions in today’s fast-evolving marketing landscape.
z: 行銷課程為學生在行銷傳播、廣告、公共關係等領域的多樣化和充滿活力的職業做好準備。該課程超越了基礎知識，融入了前沿趨勢和行銷工具，例如體驗式行銷、數位行銷以及人工智慧和大數據在電子零售和行銷分析中的使用。
學生將受益於豐富的實務培訓，使他們能夠將自己的技能應用到實際的商業環境中。畢業生將配備專業知識和先進的工具，使他們能夠在當今快速發展的營銷環境中做出策略性的、數據驅動的和有影響力的決策。

d: The programme provides students with a solid foundation of theoretical knowledge and practical skills in real estate and surveying. It fosters an understanding of the latest technologies and advanced management practices, ensuring graduates are well-equipped to navigate the challenges of a dynamic and evolving industry. The programme is an accredited course recognised by the Royal Institution of Chartered Surveyors (RICS).
z: 該課程為學生提供房地產和測量方面的堅實理論知識和實踐技能基礎。它促進對最新技術和先進管理實踐的理解，確保畢業生有能力應對充滿活力和不斷發展的行業的挑戰。該課程是英國皇家特許測量師學會 (RICS) 認可的認證課程。

d: This dual degree programme is jointly offered by Lee Shau Kee School of Business and Administration and School of Arts and Social Sciences of HKMU. Students will complete 150 credit-units within four years and obtain two honours degrees, one in Applied Psychology, and the other in Business Management.

The programme provides students exposure to a wide spectrum of psychological and managerial perspectives during their study. Graduates would be able to integrate psychology and management concepts and theories to develop business solutions that factor in interests, behaviours and mental processes of different stakeholders.
z: 此雙學位課程由香港浸會大學李兆基商業管理學院與人文社會科學院合辦。學生將在四年內完成 150 個學分，並獲得兩個榮譽學位，一個是應用心理學學位，另一個是商業管理學位。
該計劃讓學生在學習期間接觸廣泛的心理學和管理觀點。畢業生將能夠整合心理學和管理概念和理論，並發展考慮不同利害關係人的利益、行為和心理過程的商業解決方案。

d: The programme imparts knowledge on general management in the tourism and hospitality sector, with a specific focus on emerging sustainability issues and trends in the sector. The programme also emphasises on experiential learning, as students enjoy various early-industry engagement opportunities to apply what they learn in the classroom to real-world situations. This programme integrates rigorous academic foundations with applied industry experience, empowering graduates to design and implement operational strategies that drive excellence in hospitality management while embedding sustainable practices across the tourism sector.
z: 該計劃傳授旅遊和酒店業一般管理知識，特別關注該行業新出現的可持續發展問題和趨勢。該計畫也強調體驗式學習，因為學生享有各種早期行業參與機會，可以將課堂上學到的知識應用到現實世界中。該課程將嚴格的學術基礎與應用行業經驗相結合，使畢業生能夠設計和實施營運策略，推動酒店管理的卓越發展，同時將永續實踐融入整個旅遊業。

d: The programme provides a broad-based education in the management of organisations, facilities, and events in traditional sports as well as the fast-growing eSports industry. Students will gain exposure to theoretical knowledge from multiple business disciplines, while gaining extensive hands-on experience through the programme’s work-based learning project.

Graduates of this programme would be able to demonstrate knowledge, skills and experience in athletic management as well as sports and eSports management. They would be able to produce practical management or marketing solutions for various organisations and operations related to sports and eSports.
z: 該計畫提供傳統體育以及快速發展的電子競技產業的組織、設施和賽事管理方面的廣泛教育。學生將獲得多個商業學科的理論知識，同時透過該計劃的基於工作的學習專案獲得廣泛的實踐經驗。
該課程的畢業生將能夠展示運動管理以及體育和電子競技管理方面的知識、技能和經驗。他們將能夠為與體育和電子競技相關的各種組織和營運提供實用的管理或行銷解決方案。

d: This programme aims to develop a good understanding of the structure and use of the English language, the sound professional knowledge and skills required of a fully qualified English language teacher in both primary and secondary schools. The programme leads to the award of two Honours Degrees - by including studies in two summer terms, the equivalent of five years of studies can be completed within four years.

Graduates will be recognized by the Education Bureau as having a language (English) major degree and a teacher qualification specializing in English language, and will be exempted from the English Language Proficiency Requirement (LPR). They will become fully qualified English Language teachers in Hong Kong upon graduation. Graduates will also be eligible to take up general administrative and executive work in the civil service, non-government organizations, the business or industry sectors and other positions for university graduates.
z: 課程旨在培養對英語語言結構和使用的良好理解，以及中小學合格英語教師所需的紮實專業知識和技能。該計劃將授予兩個榮譽學位——通過包括兩個夏季學期的學習，相當於五年的學習可以在四年內完成。
畢業生將獲教育局認可，擁有語言（英語）主修學位及英語專業教師資格，並獲豁免英語語言能力要求（LPR）。他們畢業後將成為香港完全合格的英語教師。畢業生還將有資格在公務員、非政府組織、商業或工業部門以及大學畢業生的其他職位中擔任一般行政和行政工作。

d: This programme aims to develop a high level of English proficiency and in-depth knowledge and understanding of key aspects in English linguistics and literature. By completing the relevant translation elective courses, students may also graduate with a minor in Translation.

The degree is recognized by the Education Bureau as an English language major degree, and graduates who also complete a teacher's qualification specializing in English language will become fully qualified English language teachers in Hong Kong and will be exempted from the English Language Proficiency Assessment for Teachers. Graduates will be eligible to take up general administrative and executive work in the civil service, non-government organizations, the business or industry sectors and other positions for university graduates.
z: 該計劃旨在培養高水準的英語水平以及對英語語言學和文學關鍵方面的深入了解和理解。透過完成相關的翻譯選修課程，學生畢業時還可以輔修翻譯。
該學位獲教育局認可為英語語言主修學位，畢業生如同時完成英語語言專業教師資格，將成為香港完全合格的英語教師，並可獲豁免參加教師英語能力評估。畢業生將有資格在公務員、非政府組織、商業或工業部門以及大學畢業生的其他職位中擔任一般行政和行政工作。

d: This programme aims to develop a high level of Chinese proficiency, with in-depth knowledge on the Chinese language and its application, including its cultural and social implications, its literary and language structures and its uses in various bilingual working contexts.

Graduates will contribute to the fields of Chinese education, publishing and media, creative industries, and general administration in the civil service, non-government organizations and business sectors.
z: 該計畫旨在培養高水平的漢語水平，深入了解漢語及其應用，包括其文化和社會影響、文學和語言結構及其在各種雙語工作環境中的使用。
畢業生將為中國教育、出版和媒體、創意產業、公務員、非政府組織和商業部門的一般管理領域做出貢獻。

d: This programme aims to develop in-depth knowledge on the Chinese language and its application in various bilingual working contexts. The programme leads to the award of two Honours Degrees – by including studies in summer terms, the equivalent of five years of studies can be completed within four years – which provide the professional knowledge and skills required of a fully qualified Chinese language teacher for both primary and secondary schools.

Graduates will be recognized by the Education Bureau as having a Chinese language major degree and a teacher qualification specializing in Chinese language education. Graduates can also contribute to the fields of publishing and media, creative industries, and general administration in the civil service, non-government organizations and business sectors.
z: 該計畫旨在深入了解漢語及其在各種雙語工作環境中的應用。該計畫將授予兩個榮譽學位——透過包括夏季學期的學習，可以在四年內完成相當於五年的學習——這為中小學提供了一名完全合格的漢語教師所需的專業知識和技能。
畢業生經教育局認可，並具有華文專業學位和華文教育教師資格。畢業生還可以為出版和媒體、創意產業以及公務員、非政府組織和商業部門的一般管理領域做出貢獻。

d: Students will learn theories, analytical frameworks and practices of early childhood education. They will also engage in the teaching of young children in field work practicum. Upon graduation, they are fully qualified as kindergarten teachers, child care workers, child care centre supervisors, and special childcare workers. They also have met the academic requirements to serve as kindergarten principals.
Most courses in the programme use Chinese as medium of instruction.
z: 學生將學習幼兒教育的理論、分析架構和實踐。他們還將在野外工作實習中從事幼兒教學。畢業後，他們完全具備幼兒園教師、幼兒保育員、托幼中心管理員、特殊保育員的資格。他們也符合擔任幼兒園園長的學術要求。
該計畫的大部分課程都使用中文作為教學語言。

d: Cyber security is one of the most in-demand skillsets around the world, especially in countries that are developing smart cities. This programme aims to provide students with a breadth of knowledge of theories and professional practices in cyber and computer security. Students will gain an in-depth understanding of the specialized areas of computer network, network security, blockchain, IoT, and digital forensics. Graduates may pursue positions such as network engineer, system analyst, digital forensic expert, and cyber security specialist. Potential employers include mobile / network services providers, and corporations / organizations in various sectors, including government, finance, healthcare, and logistics.
z: 網路安全是世界各地最需要的技能之一，特別是在正在發展智慧城市的國家。該計劃旨在為學生提供網路和電腦安全方面的理論和專業實踐的廣泛知識。學生將深入了解電腦網路、網路安全、區塊鏈、物聯網和數位取證等專業領域。畢業生可以擔任網路工程師、系統分析師、數位鑑識專家和網路安全專家等職位。潛在雇主包括行動/網路服務提供者以及政府、金融、醫療保健和物流等各部門的公司/組織。

d: The programme is built upon a foundation in Mathematics, Electronics, Computing, as well as the areas of computer network, software design, signal processing, and digital communication. Courses in the specialized areas focus on high performance computer design, wireless communication, digital multimedia, biomedical technologies, network programming, and mobile application development. Students will also participate in industrial training and placement.

Graduates from this programme will have the ability to analyse and design electronic and computer software, hardware, networks and systems. They can become a software programmer/analyst, computer system designer or telecommunication engineer.
This programme is accredited by the Hong Kong Institution of Engineers (HKIE).
z: 本課程建立在數學、電子、計算以及電腦網路、軟體設計、訊號處理和數位通訊領域的基礎上。专业领域的课程侧重于高性能计算机设计、无线通信、数字多媒体、生物医学技术、网络编程和移动应用程序开发。學生還將參加行業培訓和實習。
該課程的畢業生將具備分析和設計電子和電腦軟體、硬體、網路和系統的能力。他們可以成為軟體程式設計師/分析師、電腦系統設計師或電信工程師。
本課程獲得香港工程師學會（HKIE）認可。

d: The programme aims to develop students with awareness and knowledge on the environmental problems in Hong Kong and around the globe; and to equip them with knowledge and practical skills in the areas of environmental science & green management for applications in government, industrial and environmental conservation sectors.
z: 該計劃旨在培養學生對香港及全球環境問題的認識和知識；培養他們在環境科學和綠色管理領域的知識和實踐技能，以便在政府、工業和環境保護部門中應用。

d: This programme aims to provide students with an in-depth understanding of the theories, practices, and research methodologies in biomedical sciences and biotechnology. In Year-3 summer term, professional training and workplace attachment will be provided to students so as to prepare them to be competent and successful practitioners in biomedical sciences and biotechnology disciplines after graduation.
z: 該計畫旨在讓學生深入了解生物醫學和生物技術的理論、實踐和研究方法。在三年級夏季學期，將為學生提供專業培訓和工作實習，以幫助他們畢業後成為生物醫學科學和生物技術學科的合格和成功的從業者。

d: This programme offers students the flexibility to explore a variety of modules across STEAM subjects while fostering the development of their skills, knowledge, and capabilities through interdisciplinary learning. It empowers students to align their career or personal aspirations with tailored study pathways, evaluate required qualifications, and reflect on their strengths and experiences. The versatility of the STEAM degree makes it applicable to a wide range of careers and industries, many of which demand expertise across multiple STEAM disciplines. Its adaptability is particularly beneficial for individuals with diverse professional roles or multifaceted interests.
z: 該計畫為學生提供了探索 STEAM 學科的各種模組的靈活性，同時透過跨學科學習促進他們的技能、知識和能力的發展。它使學生能夠將他們的職業或個人抱負與定制的學習途徑結合起來，評估所需的資格，並反思他們的優勢和經驗。 STEAM 學位的多功能性使其適用於廣泛的職業和行業，其中許多職業和行業需要跨多個 STEAM 學科的專業知識。它的適應性對於具有不同職業角色或多方面興趣的個人特別有益。
